title: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic non-rigid objects from monocular video requires integrating visual cues from direct observations with data-driven priors over geometry and appearance. Prior approaches either learn to directly predict 4D representations from visual input or initialize a 3D representation that is subsequently deformed and refined based on video evidence. However, the former are constrained by the scarcity of 4D training data, while the latter leverage priors only for the initial reconstruction and rely solely on video supervision thereafter; neither handles complex in-the-wild scenarios with large deformations and occlusions well. We present Lift4D, a test-time optimization framework that addresses both limitations. First, we adapt an existing single-view 3D reconstruction model to yield temporally consistent per-frame predictions via causal latent conditioning, providing a coherent initialization for a deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting representation. We then ``sculpt'' this representation to match the input video through an occlusion-aware optimization that faithfully recovers visible surface details while completing unobserved regions using a view-conditioned diffusion prior. We demonstrate that Lift4D clearly improves over prior 4D reconstruction methods, particularly on challenging in-the-wild sequences with severe occlusions and non-rigid motion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lift4D，一种测试时优化框架，通过因果潜在条件生成时间一致的初始化，并结合遮挡感知优化和扩散先验，实现单目视频的4D非刚体重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D重建方法面临两大局限：直接预测4D受限于训练数据稀缺，而先初始化再变形的方法仅依赖视频监督，无法处理野外场景中的大变形和严重遮挡。因此需要一种能同时利用数据先验和视频观测的框架。
light_analysis.method: Lift4D首先适配单视图3D重建模型，通过因果潜在条件产生时间一致的逐帧预测，初始化可变形3D高斯散射表示。随后通过遮挡感知优化，结合视图条件扩散先验，恢复可见表面细节并补全未观测区域。
light_analysis.result: 在具有严重遮挡和非刚体运动的挑战性野外序列上，Lift4D明显优于先前的4D重建方法。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但表明在复杂场景下性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lift4D提出了一个有效的测试时优化框架，解决了单目非刚体4D重建中的大变形和遮挡问题。通过因果潜在条件和扩散先验的结合，提升了重建的时空一致性和完整性，对动态场景理解有重要价值。

title: Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，通过随机位置编码和长度课程改进LLM的长上下文推理长度泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通常在短序列上预训练，然后通过额外训练扩展到长序列，但仍难以进一步泛化到极长序列。现有方法如YaRN虽然有效，但在远超出分布的长度上表现不佳。因此需要一种能够有效提升模型对超长序列推理能力的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: Randomized YaRN结合YaRN位置外推与随机位置编码，并在训练中采用长度课程。在短上下文训练时，为token分配从更大位置范围采样的YaRN位置编码，使模型即使在短输入上也暴露于分布外位置表示。这逐步引入OOD位置分布，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在BABILong和MRCR基准上，使用<8K上下文训练，Randomized YaRN在16K至128K上下文长度上持续提升推理性能，优于标准微调。最大增益出现在远超出分布的长度上，表明该方法有效改善了长上下文推理的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Randomized YaRN通过逐步暴露模型于分布外位置分布，为可泛化的长上下文推理提供了有效方法。其学术价值在于揭示了位置编码随机化对长度泛化的作用，实际应用中可提升LLM处理超长文档等任务的能力。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或与其他位置编码结合。

title: Keep The Essentials: Efficient Reference Conditioned Generation via Token Dropping
abstract: Reference-based diffusion models enable highly controllable image generation by leveraging elements from input images to guide prompt-driven synthesis. However, these models are computationally expensive in runtime, and their cost scales severely with the number of input references. While the efficiency of diffusion models has been extensively studied in the context of prompt-driven generation, it remains largely under-explored in the realm of reference-based models. This setting presents unique challenges not addressed by methods focusing solely on generation. In particular, the wasteful representation of references as dense token grids offers significant opportunities for improvement. In this work, we present Sparse Context, a method for constructing sparse reference representations by retaining only a reduced subset of reference tokens. We observe that even without modifying the model, dropping a significant portion of reference tokens at inference time largely preserves its generation capabilities. To fully realize this potential, we fine-tune the model with random token dropping at varying ratios, encouraging robustness to partial reference representations. Crucially, this training strategy decouples the model from any specific token selection rule, allowing flexible control at inference time. At inference time, instead of random dropping, we apply task-aware token selection strategies that prioritize the most informative regions of the reference images, adapting the token budget to the input and task requirements. Extensive experiments show our method achieves a 4x increase in inference speed for multi-reference generation and an 2x for single reference generation. Importantly, this efficiency is achieved without compromising visual quality across both spatially-aligned editing and subject-driven generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sparse Context方法，通过token dropping实现高效的参考条件生成，显著提升推理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 参考扩散模型运行时计算成本高昂，尤其是多参考场景下，而现有针对扩散模型的效率优化方法未充分考虑参考条件生成的独特挑战。参考图像被表示为密集token网格，存在大量冗余，亟需高效稀疏化方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建稀疏参考表示（Sparse Context），仅保留部分参考token。训练时以随机比例丢弃token，增强模型对稀疏表示的鲁棒性；推理时采用任务感知的选择策略，优先保留最信息丰富的区域，灵活控制token预算。
light_analysis.result: 在多种参考条件生成任务中，多参考场景推理速度提升4倍，单参考场景提升2倍，且不牺牲视觉质量。与原始模型相比，生成效果相当或更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效且灵活的参考条件生成方法，通过token dropping显著加速推理，同时保持生成质量。该方法具有通用性，适用于空间对齐编辑和主题驱动生成等任务，未来可扩展至更多参考条件应用。

title: Semantic Browsing: Controllable Diversity for Image Generation
abstract: Modern text-to-image models excel in visual fidelity and prompt adherence. However, this strict adherence comes at the cost of diversity: generated samples tend to collapse into a single visual interpretation. Existing methods to improve diversity produce outputs driven by incidental variations rather than meaningful design choices. This motivates a new variant of the diversity task where structure is enforced on the generated samples. We introduce a method for controlled diversity that enables Semantic Browsing, where users can navigate structured image galleries and experience creative exploration through a systematic traversal of meaningful, interpretable axes of variation. Achieving this level of semantic control requires a deep understanding of the scene. We exploit the fact that recent text-to-image models are trained on elaborated captions, effectively decoupling semantic decision-making from pixel generation. This enables a paradigm shift: instead of relying on stochastic variation within the text-to-image model, we induce diversity directly at the text level. By leveraging rich textual representations, we allow a Vision Language Model (VLM) to operate on the full scene context. To overcome the generic outputs typical of standard VLMs, we employ an agentic workflow that explicitly enforces structured variation attuned to the original prompt. We demonstrate that our method produces diverse and navigable design spaces where every variation corresponds to a specific, user-understandable semantic decision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过文本层面操控实现可控多样性的图像生成方法，支持用户在有语义意义的轴上导航图像画廊。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型忠实于提示但缺乏多样性，生成的样本倾向于单一视觉解释。已有的多样性提升方法往往产生偶然变化，而非有意义的设计选择。这限制了创意探索，用户无法系统地生成和浏览不同语义解释的图像。因此需要一种结构化的多样性生成方法，使变化受控且可理解。
light_analysis.method: 方法利用文本到图像模型在详细描述上训练的特点，将多样性生成从像素级转移到文本级。通过视觉语言模型（VLM）分析完整场景上下文，并结合代理工作流，针对原始提示生成结构化、多样化的文本描述。这些描述随后用于生成图像，从而产生沿用户可理解语义轴变化的图像集合，实现语义浏览。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法能够生成多样且可导航的设计空间，其中每种图像变化都对应一个特定的、用户可理解的语义决策。与基线相比，生成的图像在保持提示忠实度的同时，具有更明显的结构化语义多样性，避免了随机偶然变化，使创意探索更加系统化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了语义浏览这一新范式，实现了可控的图像多样性生成，显著提升了创意探索的灵活性和可解释性。该方法在概念设计、艺术创作等领域有重要应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的语义轴，或结合用户交互进行实时调整。

title: AIR: Adaptive Interleaved Reasoning with Code in MLLMs
abstract: Following the paradigm shift initiated by OpenAI o3, interleaved reasoning with code to enhance multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has become a pivotal research frontier. The existing literature focuses primarily on tool-use within vision-perception tasks. However, such approaches typically rely on predefined heuristics for visual manipulation and are inherently incapable of addressing numerical computation problems due to their exclusive focus on visual operations. This paper empowers MLLMs with adaptive interleaved reasoning capabilities through extended reinforcement learning training on code-augmented complex numerical computation tasks. To this end, we propose a comprehensive three-component solution consisting of: a two-stage cold-start data construction pipeline, data filtering strategies for RL dataset curation, and an adaptive tool-invocation strategy leveraging a group-constrained reward function for interleaved reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that after Reinforcement Learning training with the group-constrained reward function, performance improves by an average of 6.1 percentage points (pp) on evaluation benchmarks. Specifically, the accuracy for interleaved reasoning samples increases by 9.9 pp, and the overall success rate of tool-use exceeds 95%. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/CongHan0808/AIR.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIR框架，通过强化学习训练使多模态大语言模型具备自适应代码交错推理能力，显著提升数值计算任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交错推理方法依赖预定义启发式规则处理视觉任务，无法解决数值计算问题。本文旨在通过扩展强化学习训练代码增强的复杂数值计算任务，使MLLMs能自适应地选择视觉操作或数值计算，填补该研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出三部分解决方案：两阶段冷启动数据构建管道生成初始代码增强数据；RL数据集筛选策略优化训练样本；基于组约束奖励函数的自适应工具调用策略，引导模型在推理轨迹中灵活选择工具。
light_analysis.result: 经强化学习训练后，评估基准平均提升6.1个百分点；交错推理样本准确率提升9.9个百分点；工具使用整体成功率超过95%，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过数据构建、筛选和自适应调用策略，有效提升了MLLM在数值计算等复杂任务上的性能。强化学习训练使模型掌握灵活的交错推理能力，具有广泛应用前景，未来可拓展更复杂的推理场景。

title: Open Problem: Is AdamW Effective Under Heavy-Tailed Noise?
abstract: AdamW is the de facto optimizer for training large language models (LLMs), yet the theory behind it still lives mostly in finite-variance regimes. This is increasingly unsatisfying, as empirical evidence indicates that stochastic gradient noise in LLM pretraining is typically heavy-tailed. Recent work shows that sign-based optimizers such as Lion and Muon achieve sharp heavy-tailed rates, and that AdaGrad can also converge under heavy-tailed noise. However, no rigorous convergence theory for AdamW has yet been established in this regime. Can AdamW converge under the same heavy-tailed assumptions, or does its second-moment accumulator create a genuine obstruction? We formulate this as an open problem, prove a positive weighted-metric benchmark, and give a corridor lower-bound mechanism showing how denominator memory can hide large gradients.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个开放问题：AdamW优化器在重尾随机梯度噪声下是否有效，并给出理论基准和下界分析。
light_analysis.motivation: AdamW是大语言模型训练的事实标准优化器，但其理论收敛性主要建立在梯度噪声有限方差的假设下。然而，实证研究表明LLM预训练中的随机梯度噪声通常是重尾的，这导致现有理论无法解释AdamW的实际表现。近期工作显示符号优化器（如Lion、Muon）和AdaGrad在重尾噪声下具有收敛保证，但AdamW是否也能在相同假设下收敛尚不明确。因此，需要建立AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛理论，或揭示其分母记忆机制可能带来的根本障碍。
light_analysis.method: 论文将问题形式化为一个开放问题，并提出了理论分析方法。首先，证明了一个正加权度量基准，用于衡量AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性。然后，通过构造一个走廊下界机制，展示了AdamW中的分母记忆（即二阶动量累积）如何可能隐藏大梯度信号，从而阻碍收敛。这种分析揭示了AdamW与符号优化器、AdaGrad在重尾环境下的本质差异，为后续理论研究提供了方向。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体的数值实验结果，但给出了理论分析结果：证明了正加权度量基准，并提出了走廊下界机制。该机制表明，AdamW的分母记忆可能导致在重尾噪声下无法有效处理大梯度，从而可能比符号优化器更差。这一理论发现与现有实证观察一致，即AdamW在LLM训练中可能不如Lion或Muon高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文明确将AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性作为开放问题提出，并通过理论分析给出了初步基准和下界机制。该工作揭示了现有优化器理论重尾噪声下的不足，为未来设计更鲁棒的优化算法提供了理论基础。未来方向包括：严格证明AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛或发散，以及改进其分母累积策略以提升实际表现。

title: IMAGIN-4D: Image-Guided Controllable Interaction Generation
abstract: Generating human-object interactions (HOI) is central to character animation, robotics, AR/VR, and embodied AI. Recent HOI generation methods synthesize motion from text, object geometry, and sparse waypoints, controlling action semantics and object trajectories. However, these signals underspecify interaction: the same prompt and trajectory can produce different grasps, approach directions, body poses, object poses, contacts, and body-object layouts. We address this ambiguity with a reference image as a visual specification of the desired interaction snapshot. However, a single global image representation conflates distinct cues and conditions all frames on identical visual evidence. We therefore introduce IMAGIN-4D, a diffusion-based HOI generator that decomposes image conditioning spatio-temporally. For spatial conditioning, IMAGIN-4D extracts supervised interaction-state tokens for body pose, object pose, body-object contact, and spatial relationships at the depicted frame. For temporal conditioning, it computes frame-aware tokens by querying image patches per generated frame, allowing sequence segments to attend to different visual cues from the same image. To balance image, text, and waypoint cues, IMAGIN-4D uses role-aware conditioning: text, waypoints, and interaction-state tokens use separate AdaLN streams, while frame-aware visual tokens cross-attend with motion tokens. Since HOI motion datasets lack paired images, we build a synthetic motion-to-image rendering pipeline from FullBodyManipulation (FBM) and introduce an image-adherence metric to evaluate whether generated motions match the reference snapshot. Experiments on FBM and BEHAVE show that IMAGIN-4D improves fine-grained interaction control over single-token and uniformly image-conditioned baselines while preserving waypoint-following and motion quality. Code and models will be released at https://imagin4d.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IMAGIN-4D扩散模型，通过时空分解图像条件实现细粒度可控的人-物交互生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有HOI生成方法使用文本、物体几何和路径点控制，但信号不足导致交互歧义；参考图像可提供视觉规范，但单一全局图像混淆线索且对所有帧施加相同条件。本文旨在通过时空分解图像条件来消除歧义，实现更精确的交互控制。
light_analysis.method: IMAGIN-4D是一种扩散模型，空间上提取有监督交互状态标记（身体姿势、物体姿势、接触、空间关系），时间上通过每帧查询图像块生成帧感知标记。使用角色感知条件：文本、路径点和交互状态用单独AdaLN流，帧感知视觉标记与运动标记交叉注意。利用FBM构建合成渲染管道，并引入图像符合度度量。
light_analysis.result: 在FBM和BEHAVE数据集上，IMAGIN-4D在细粒度交互控制上优于单标记和统一图像条件基线，同时保持路径点跟随和运动质量。摘要未提供具体数值，仅定性描述改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过时空分解图像条件有效解决了HOI生成中的多模态歧义，实现了更精确的交互生成，对角色动画、机器人等领域具有应用价值。未来可扩展至更多交互类型，但未提及局限性。

title: PsyBridge: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Multi-Dimensional Mental Health Assessment and Decision Support
abstract: Mental health assessment commonly relies on isolated screening instruments or data-driven models that often lack interpretability and multi-dimensional integration. Existing approaches frequently focus on individual indicators such as depression or anxiety while providing limited support for comprehensive and explainable decision-making. To address this limitation, this study proposes PsyBridge, a hybrid intelligent decision-support framework designed for multi-dimensional mental health assessment through the integration of clinically validated screening tools, cognitive evaluation, and personality profiling within a unified architecture. The proposed framework incorporates PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments alongside cognitive and behavioural indicators using a modular design and a weighted aggregation mechanism to generate interpretable mental health risk classifications and recommendations. To evaluate the framework, a semi-synthetic dataset consisting of 500 patient profiles representing varying severity levels was constructed based on clinically grounded score distributions. Experimental results demonstrate that PsyBridge achieves an overall accuracy of 0.84, outperforming standalone PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments while improving precision, recall, and F1-score. Sensitivity analysis and ablation studies further indicate that integrating cognitive and personality components contributes to more stable classification performance and reduces inconsistencies in moderate-risk prediction. The findings suggest that PsyBridge provides a scalable and interpretable approach for AI-assisted mental health decision support, particularly within digital healthcare and telehealth environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PsyBridge混合智能框架，整合多维度评估工具实现可解释的心理健康风险分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有心理健康评估依赖孤立筛查或黑盒模型，缺乏多维度整合与可解释性，难以支持全面决策。
light_analysis.method: 采用模块化设计，融合PHQ-9、GAD-7、认知指标及人格画像，通过加权聚合机制生成可解释风险等级与建议，基于500个半合成患者数据验证。
light_analysis.result: 总体准确率0.84，优于单量表评估，精确率、召回率、F1均提升；消融研究证实多维度整合增强分类稳定性并减少中等风险预测矛盾。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供可扩展、可解释的AI辅助决策方案，适用于数字医疗与远程心理评估场景，但需真实数据进一步验证。

title: Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles
abstract: This paper presents our algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, focusing on Bit Manipulation Puzzles. In this task, the objective is to discover a hidden logical rule transforming input binary strings to outputs, then apply it to unseen inputs. Large Language Models (LLMs) notoriously struggle here; traditional methods force them to simulate complex boolean logic and arithmetic, leading to hallucinations. Furthermore, the search space of bitwise operations (combinations of shifts, rotations, and logic gates) suffers from a severe combinatorial explosion. To overcome this computational intractability, we present a novel approach that abandons arithmetic logic entirely in favor of string similarity, structured search, and autonomous error recovery.   Our core contributions are: 1. Bases and Truth Table Formulation: We reframe logic-gate deduction into a base-selection task, leveraging string similarity (minimal bit flips) to isolate primitive transformations ("bases") and deduce truth tables without complex arithmetic. 2. Backtracking DFS and Error Recovery: We formalize a search process that tests candidate bases, detects logical collisions across examples, and backtracks upon failure to perform robust error recovery. 3. Bit Tokenization and Interactive Reasoning SFT: We force the tokenizer to encode binary strings as individual single-bit tokens. We use dynamic masking to simulate external oracle feedback, training the model to hypothesize, self-evaluate, and backtrack natively.   Evaluated on bit manipulation puzzles, our approach achieved over 96% validation accuracy. This represents the highest performance in this category, driving our 7th Place overall finish in the contest.
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. 7th Place Solution for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge (Kaggle)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于字符串相似性、结构化搜索和自主错误恢复的方法，解决LLM在位操作谜题中的推理困难，达到96%验证准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型(LLM)在解决位操作谜题时面临严重挑战。该任务要求发现隐藏逻辑规则以将输入二进制字符串转换为输出，但传统方法强制LLM模拟复杂布尔逻辑和算术运算，易导致幻觉。此外，位运算搜索空间（移位、旋转、逻辑门组合）存在组合爆炸，计算棘手。现有方法无法有效应对这些困难，需要新颖的推理策略。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括三部分：1) 基与真值表公式化：将逻辑门推导转化为基选择任务，利用字符串相似性（最小位翻转）隔离原始变换（基）并推导真值表，避免复杂算术。2) 回溯DFS与错误恢复：形式化搜索过程，测试候选基，跨示例检测逻辑冲突，失败时回溯以进行鲁棒错误恢复。3) 比特分词与交互推理SFT：强制分词器将二进制字符串编码为单个比特令牌，使用动态掩码模拟外部Oracle反馈，训练模型原生地假设、自我评估和回溯。
light_analysis.result: 在位操作谜题上评估，方法达到超过96%的验证准确率，是该类别最高性能，助力团队在竞赛中获得总排名第7。与基准方法相比，显著减少了幻觉并处理了组合爆炸问题，实验结果表明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种新颖的LLM推理方法，通过字符串相似性、结构化搜索和错误恢复，成功解决了位操作谜题中的组合爆炸和幻觉问题。学术上贡献了基与真值表公式化及交互推理训练范式，实用上可推广至其他需要复杂符号推理的任务。未来工作可能扩展至更广泛的逻辑推理场景。

title: Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?
abstract: Prior work shows that large language models (LLMs) exhibit introspective capability on benign tasks. We extend the question to safety contexts and examine how reliably a model can recognize that its own prior response was elicited by an adversarial prefill attack. Across ten open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs (3B to 70B) and four safety benchmarks, no model reliably recognizes its own compromised outputs, with models claiming intent on prefilled responses at an average rate of $27.3\%$. Introspective signal stems largely from safety- and refusal-related reasoning. Orthogonalizing models' weights against the refusal direction collapses the gap between claiming rates on prefilled and natural outputs to near zero, though the direction is not its unique mediator. The signal is also probe-dependent: framing the question as internal intention versus external tampering elicits qualitatively different responses on the same models. We test three LoRA finetuning methods (SFT, GRPO, DPO) on eight models from 3B to 27B; all three widen the intention-probe gap on every model from 8B to 27B, with method ranking varying by model. The intervention does not transfer to the tampering probe and counterintuitively raises attack success rate under adversarial prefill on most models, amounting to a partial mitigation. These findings outline mechanisms underpinning the observed introspective signals in safety contexts and highlight risks in the reliability of LLM self-reports.

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLMs能否可靠地自我报告对抗性前缀攻击，发现模型不可靠且内省信号机制复杂。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前工作表明LLMs在良性任务上具有内省能力，但在安全上下文（如对抗性前缀攻击）中，模型能否识别自身输出被攻击尚不明确。现有方法无法保证可靠自报告，需探究内省信号的来源和局限性，以评估LLM自我报告的可信度。
light_analysis.method: 评估10个开源指令微调LLM（3B-70B）在4个安全基准上的表现，通过平均声称率（27.3%）衡量模型识别被攻击输出的可靠性。分析内省信号与安全/拒绝推理的关联，并采用权重正交化（对抗拒绝方向）和三种LoRA微调方法（SFT、GRPO、DPO）进行干预实验。
light_analysis.result: 无模型能可靠识别自身被攻击输出，平均声称率仅27.3%。正交化权重后预填充与自然输出的声称率差距几乎为零，但该方向并非唯一介质。微调方法扩大了意图-探针差距，但未转移到篡改探针，且多数模型上对抗前缀攻击成功率反而上升，仅为部分缓解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了安全上下文中内省信号的部分机制，强调LLM自我报告的不可靠性风险。未来需探索更鲁棒的自报告方式，避免依赖有限的内省信号，并关注微调干预的负面影响。

title: Tapered Language Models
abstract: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-based variants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters are allocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original transformer and largely unchanged since, yet a growing body of evidence suggests that layers contribute non-uniformly to the final output, with later layers refining the residual stream rather than transforming it. We ask whether parameter capacity should reflect this asymmetry. Our controlled experiment shows that, under a fixed budget, allocating more capacity to earlier layers and less to later layers improves perplexity over a uniform-width baseline, while the reverse allocation hurts. Building on this result, we introduce Tapered Language Models (TLMs), an architectural principle in which a parameter-bearing component is monotonically tapered across depth under a fixed total budget. MLPs are the natural site for this instantiation: they dominate parameter count across all modern LM families and expose width as a single, clean axis of variation. Across three model scales and four architectures (Transformer, Gated Attention, Hope-attention, and Titans), tapering MLP width via a smooth cosine schedule consistently improves perplexity and downstream benchmark performance over uniform baselines, at no additional parameter or compute cost. These findings establish depth-aware capacity allocation as a simple, architecture-agnostic axis of language model design, a free lever hidden in plain sight.

light_analysis.overview: 提出锥形语言模型（TLM），通过非均匀分配参数容量（早期层多、后期层少）在固定预算下提升语言模型性能，是一种架构无关的免费优化策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代语言模型（如Transformer、RNN）默认使用相同层堆叠，参数均匀分配。但研究表明各层对输出的贡献不均，后期层主要细化残差流而非变换。这引发思考：参数容量是否应反映这种不对称？均匀分配可能浪费资源，调整分配有望在相同成本下提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制实验验证：固定预算下，早期层分配更多容量、后期层更少可提高困惑度，反之则降低。基于此，提出锥形语言模型（TLM）：在固定总参数预算下，使用平滑余弦调度对MLP宽度进行单调锥形化（早期宽、后期窄）。MLP是参数主体，宽度是单一可调轴。在三种模型规模和四种架构（Transformer、Gated Attention、Hope-attention、Titans）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，TLM策略在所有测试架构和规模下均一致提升困惑度（perplexity）和下游任务性能，相比均匀基线无额外参数或计算开销。例如，在Transformer上达到相同困惑度需更少参数，或固定参数下困惑度更低。具体提升幅度因模型和任务而异，但均一致正向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 深度感知的容量分配是一种简单、架构无关的语言模型设计轴，在固定预算下免费提升性能。该发现挑战了均匀层宽度的默认做法，为未来LM设计提供新方向。局限性包括未探索其他参数组件（如注意力头）的锥形化，以及最佳调度函数可能依赖任务。

title: GeoFidelity-Bench: Evaluating Segment-Level Geographic Fidelity in Text-to-Image Street-View Generation
abstract: Text-to-image models can generate visually plausible city streets, but whether their outputs correspond to a requested road segment rather than a generic city prior remains unclear. We introduce GeoFidelity-Bench, a reference-panel benchmark for segment-conditioned geographic fidelity in street-view generation. It contains 7,117 curated Mapillary images covering 109 named OpenStreetMap road segments in 25 cities across six continents. For each generated panel, the benchmark ranks the target reference panel against panels from the nearest segment in the same city, other segments in the same city, and segments from other cities, making local discrimination rather than absolute target similarity the primary test. We evaluate six open-weight text-to-image generators under city-only, street-and-neighborhood, and GPS-augmented prompts. Adding street and neighborhood names is associated with an increase of 5.5 percentage points in top-1 retrieval accuracy over city-only prompts, with a 95% confidence interval from 3.4 to 7.7 percentage points. However, the similarity margin between the target and the nearest segment in the same city remains near zero, indicating that local names improve broad local plausibility more than exact segment identity. Prompts that keep the city fixed but use incorrect street or neighborhood names further show that only part of the gain depends on the correct local names, while appending raw GPS coordinates as ordinary text yields no statistically clear additional benefit. Held-out real-image queries successfully recover segment identity, showing that the curated references contain usable segment-level signal. GeoFidelity-Bench thus reveals a persistent gap between city- or neighborhood-plausible street-view generation and faithful generation for a specific road segment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoFidelity-Bench基准，评估文本到图像模型在街景生成中是否匹配具体路段而非通用城市特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型能生成视觉合理的城市街景，但无法确定其输出是否对应特定路段而非通用城市先验。该问题重要，因为需要验证模型的地理保真度，而现有方法缺乏细粒度评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建含7,117张Mapillary图像的基准，覆盖六大洲25个城市109个路段。通过将目标参考面板与本城市最近路段、其他路段及外城市路段排序，测试局部判别能力。评估六个开源模型在仅城市、街道+街区、GPS增强三种提示下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 添加街道和街区名称使top-1检索准确率比仅城市提示提升5.5个百分点（95%置信区间3.4-7.7）。但目标与本城市最近路段的相似度差距接近零，表明局部名称提升整体合理性而非精确路段身份。使用错误街道名称仅部分增益，GPS无统计显著效果。真实图像查询成功恢复路段身份。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoFidelity-Bench揭示了城市或街区合理的街景生成与特定路段忠实生成之间的持续差距。该基准可用于评估模型的地理保真度，未来工作可探索如何缩小这一差距。

title: On the Limits of Prompt-Conditioned Language Models as General-Purpose Learners
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are frequently portrayed as general-purpose solvers capable of solving arbitrary tasks. We argue that this view overlooks a fundamental constraint: language is a compressed and capacity-limited interface for conveying task information. Modelling User--System interaction as a bilevel \emph{cheap-talk} game, we analyse how latent tasks are encoded into prompts and reinterpreted under alignment and safety constraints. We introduce a conceptual decomposition separating task inference from execution and derive PAC-Bayes bounds that distinguish finite-sample estimation error from irreducible structural limitations. Our first main result establishes an \emph{expressivity floor}: language acts as a capacity-limited communication channel, and whenever the informational complexity of a task family exceeds the capacity of that channel, distinct tasks become unavoidably indistinguishable to the Solver, inducing a strictly positive error floor that cannot be eliminated by additional data, optimisation, or model scaling alone. We then establish an \emph{objective-misalignment floor}: when alignment constraints restrict the admissible output set, the User-ideal distribution may lie outside the feasible class, inducing an irreducible distortion. Together, these results yield a formal negative conclusion: prompt-conditioned LLMs are not universal problem solvers through prompting alone, as there exist task families for which correct behaviour is provably unattainable even in the infinite-data regime. More broadly, our analysis shows the limits of prompt-based generalisation arise from information-constrained communication and alignment-constrained objectives. This suggests that interfaces beyond natural language, including multimodal observations and, external memory, may reduce the inherent LLM limitations by increasing the task-relevant information available to the System.

light_analysis.overview: 理论证明提示条件语言模型存在固有误差下限，无法通过数据或规模消除。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前普遍认为LLMs是通用问题求解器，但这种观点忽略了语言作为任务信息传递接口的容量限制。现有方法依赖提示工程优化，但缺乏对根本性约束的理论分析。本文旨在揭示语言通信通道的容量限制和对齐约束如何导致不可消除的误差，质疑提示泛化的普适性。
light_analysis.method: 将用户-系统交互建模为廉价谈话博弈，把任务推断与执行解耦。推导PAC-Bayes界，区分有限样本误差和结构限制。定义表达力下限：当任务信息复杂度超过语言通道容量时，不同任务不可区分，产生不可消除误差。定义目标错位下限：对齐约束限制输出集，导致用户理想分布不可达。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明存在两类正误差下限：一是任务族信息复杂度超过语言通道容量导致的不可区分误差；二是对齐约束导致的不可逆分布畸变。这些误差在无限数据下仍存在，表明提示条件LLMs无法通过提示解决所有任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了提示泛化的固有限制源于信息受限通信和对齐约束目标。提出超越自然语言的接口（如多模态、外部记忆）可能缓解这些限制。工作为理解LLMs能力边界提供理论基础，对提示工程和模型设计有重要指导意义。

title: MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?
abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究多智能体LLM系统中提示优化的效果，揭示其潜力与挑战，并建立基准测试MAS-PromptBench。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）由多个基于LLM的智能体组成，系统提示是关键的优化面，但扩展到MAS时面临搜索空间指数级增长等挑战。现有研究不清楚提示优化是否、何时以及多大程度上能提升MAS性能，且增益对系统配置的敏感性未知。因此需要系统性地研究提示优化在不同MAS设置中的效果。
light_analysis.method: 通过变化任务、工作流、通信协议和团队规模等维度，构建MAS-PromptBench基准测试。将两种最先进的单智能体提示优化方法自然地扩展到多智能体场景，作为优化器进行性能测评。覆盖广泛的MAS配置，系统评估提示优化的效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明提示优化在多种MAS设置中能带来显著性能提升，同时暴露了开放性挑战。研究刻画了何时以及多大程度上提示优化有助于不同MAS场景，量化了其增益的敏感性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统性地研究了MAS中提示优化的效果，建立了基准测试MAS-PromptBench，为后续研究提供基础。学术价值在于量化了优化收益的敏感性，实际价值在于指导MAS部署。未来工作可探索更高效的优化算法，以及优化对系统稳定性的影响。

title: Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences
abstract: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost. In summary, our framework makes the sequential approximation toolkit general-purpose and adaptive while improving upon state-of-the-art-guarantees for dynamic trace estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用框架序贯估计缓慢变化序列的函数，并开发自适应预算分配算法，取得更优路径长度变分界。
light_analysis.motivation: 在科学计算和机器学习中，常需序贯估计缓慢变化序列中每个元素的函数（如隐式迹估计、谱密度计算）。现有方法如Dharangutte & Musco (2021)使用固定查询预算，其代价依赖最坏情况变化量，对稳定序列（偶尔突变）效率低下。此外，先前工作假设变化上界已知，限制了实用性。因此，需要一种通用、自适应的框架，在利用序列平滑性的同时，能够处理未知变化并降低总估计成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个通用框架，将隐式迹估计推广至各类线性及非线性函数（包括矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分、PDE边界值问题）。核心创新是局部自适应预算算法：根据相邻元素实际变化量α_i动态调整估计预算，使总成本满足路径长度变分界O(∑α_i)，而非先前固定预算的O(m·max α_i)。此外，针对未知α_i的情况，设计了在线估计方法，几乎不增加额外成本。框架适用于多种向量空间和函数类型。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，新算法在估计长度为m的序列时，总代价由O(m·max α_i)改进为O(∑α_i)，对稳定序列（α_i整体小）显著降低。在矩阵幂、谱密度等任务上获得新颖的序贯估计结果。与传统固定预算方法相比，自适应分配避免了因罕见突变而浪费资源。当变化未知时，在线估计方法以极低开销实现了接近已知边界的性能。实验部分摘要未明确说明，但理论改进明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将序贯逼近工具从隐式迹估计推广至通用场景，并实现了自适应预算分配，显著提升了效率。学术意义在于提供了更紧的路径长度变分界，推动了动态估计理论发展。实际价值：适用于信号处理、科学计算等需要实时估计缓慢变化序列的应用。未来可探索更复杂的函数形式或非向量空间扩展。局限性：摘要未提及实验验证，需进一步实证。

title: EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions
abstract: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench

light_analysis.overview: 从真实企业工作会话构建的企业代理基准，提供852个可重复任务和评估协议，强调多维度评估而非单一分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业代理在复杂工作空间中处理异构文件、调用工具并交付业务工件，现有基准缺乏真实性和可重复性。因此需要从实际企业会话中提取任务，以评估代理在真实工作流中的表现，并考虑工件交付、成本、运行时等多维度指标，避免单一分数掩盖关键差异。
light_analysis.method: 从大型企业工作场所会话存档中提取852个可重复任务，每个任务配备恢复的fixtures、重写的提示、角色类、技能子类、硬规则和语义标准。由于数据包含内部内容，不公开原始数据，而是发布构建和评估协议。评估配置包括Codex与GPT-5.5组合，并测量harness-model组合、工件交付、视觉质量、成本、运行时和技能转移行为。
light_analysis.result: 最佳配置（Codex with GPT-5.5）在EnterpriseClawBench上仅达到0.663分。结果表明企业代理评估必须报告多维度指标，而非单一分数；现有代理性能仍有较大提升空间，且不同维度的权衡需要明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了从真实企业会话构建可重复基准的方法论，强调多维度评估的重要性。虽然数据未公开，但协议可复现。未来可扩展任务集或引入更多模型，对实际企业代理部署和评估具有重要参考价值。局限性包括数据敏感性导致无法公开，以及任务覆盖范围可能有限。

title: Lightweight Neural Framework for Robust 3D Volume and Surface Estimation from Multi-View Images
abstract: Accurate volume and surface area estimation is critical for diverse applications, from marine ecology to medical diagnostics. However, existing methods often suffer from high computational costs and poor performance with sparse and noisy data. We propose a fully feed-forward framework that regresses scale-normalized volume and surface area and their associated uncertainties directly from multi-view images. By fusing 3D point cloud reconstructions with view-aligned 2D features through a graph-based decoder, our model bypasses iterative optimization, ensuring exceptional scalability and rapid inference. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly when operating with a low number of input images. Validated across coral monitoring, dietary analysis, and anthropometry, our proposed framework provides a robust, adaptable solution for quantitative shape analysis. This architecture provides a high-speed, scalable alternative for precise geometric estimation from visual data, maintaining high performance even in resource-constrained or sparse-view scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个轻量级全前馈框架，直接从多视图图像回归缩放归一化的3D体积和表面积及其不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 体积和表面积估计在海洋生态、医学诊断等领域至关重要，但现有方法计算成本高，对稀疏噪声数据性能差。该研究旨在提供一种高效、鲁棒的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过融合3D点云重建与视图对齐的2D特征，利用基于图的解码器直接回归缩放归一化的体积、表面积及不确定性，完全避免迭代优化，实现快速推理和高可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在珊瑚监测、饮食分析和人体测量等多个数据集上，该方法优于现有技术，尤其在输入图像数量少时表现突出，验证了其鲁棒性和适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为从视觉数据中精确估计几何量提供了高速、可扩展的替代方案，在资源受限或稀疏视图场景下保持高性能，但未明确讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: TailorMind: Towards Preference-Aligned Multimodal Content Generation
abstract: Personalized content systems depend on available UGC and struggle when suitable content is absent, delayed, or costly to create. Although multimodal generators can synthesize content on demand, how to translate behavioral traces into generation-ready preferences remains underexplored. We study personalized multimodal content generation: creating user-tailored multimodal content without existing item pools or waiting for matching UGC. We propose TailorMind, linking collaborative preference modeling with controllable multimodal generation. TailorMind enriches sparse user histories via hypergraph collaborative filtering and optimizes textual profiles with ranking-error feedback and textual gradient descent. Retrieval-augmented style control grounds outputs in authentic UGC patterns, while cross-modal cohesion reflection reduces semantic drift. We construct TailorBench, a benchmark from three mainstream platforms evaluated along five dimensions: coherence, novelty, aesthetic, hallucination, profiling. Experiments show that TailorMind achieves competitive or stronger coherence, improves novelty and aesthetic quality over representative generation baselines and ground-truth UGC, demonstrating advantages over retrieving available content or comparable UGC, while achieving up to 29% Recall gains in reranking. Our code is released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/TailorMind.
comment: 18 pages, 13 figures, 6 tables. Code available at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/TailorMind

light_analysis.overview: 提出TailorMind，将协同偏好建模与可控多模态生成结合，实现个性化多模态内容生成，无需现有内容池。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化内容系统依赖用户生成内容（UGC），当合适内容缺失或创建成本高时性能受限。多模态生成器可合成内容，但如何将用户行为痕迹转化为生成偏好尚未充分探索。本研究旨在解决无现有项目池或等待匹配UGC情况下的个性化多模态内容生成问题。
light_analysis.method: TailorMind通过超图协同过滤丰富稀疏用户历史，利用排序误差反馈和文本梯度下降优化文本描述。采用检索增强风格控制，基于真实UGC模式引导输出，并通过跨模态一致性反射减少语义漂移。构建TailorBench基准，从一致性、新颖性、美学、幻觉、画像五个维度评估。
light_analysis.result: 在TailorBench上，TailorMind相比代表性生成基线和真实UGC，在一致性上具有竞争力，并显著提升新颖性和美学质量。在重排序任务中Recall提升最高达29%，展示了优于检索可用内容或类似UGC的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TailorMind实现了无需现有内容池的个性化多模态内容生成，通过协同偏好建模和可控生成技术，显著提升生成质量。其开源代码有助于推动该领域发展。未来可探索更高效的偏好建模和跨模态对齐。

title: Learning Process Rewards via Success Visitation Matching for Efficient RL
abstract: In many modern applications of reinforcement learning (RL), the natural reward for a task of interest is inherently sparse: a reward of 0 is given everywhere except when the task is completed, when a reward of +1 is given. Training a policy to maximize such a sparse reward requires solving a challenging credit assignment problem, leading to slow or ineffective RL improvement. We propose a simple approach to transform a sparse outcome reward into a dense process reward. Our approach relies on training a discriminator to distinguish between previous successful and unsuccessful episodes, and using this discriminator to incentivize the RL-learned policy to match the state-action visitations of successful episodes, while avoiding those of unsuccessful episodes. By incentivizing the policy to match the visitations over all states, not just those that correspond to task success, this reward provides dense feedback on whether progress is being made towards task completion, and, we show, provably achieves this without changing the optimal policy. Focusing on finetuning of robotic control policies, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significantly faster RL finetuning performance on both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, as compared to simply maximizing the sparse outcome reward.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过成功访问匹配将稀疏奖励转化为密集过程奖励的方法，加速强化学习微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 在许多现代强化学习应用中，任务的自然奖励是稀疏的，仅在任务完成时给予+1奖励，否则为0。训练策略最大化这种稀疏奖励面临困难的信用分配问题，导致RL改进缓慢或无效。现有方法缺乏有效手段将稀疏奖励转化为密集反馈，无法提供持续的任务进展信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种简单方法，通过训练判别器区分先前成功的和失败的轨迹，利用该判别器激励RL策略匹配成功轨迹的访问分布，同时避免失败轨迹。通过在所有状态上匹配访问分布，而非仅任务成功状态，提供密集的过程奖励信号，并证明不改变最优策略。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实环境的机器人操作任务微调中，该方法相比直接最大化稀疏奖励显著加速了RL微调性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将稀疏奖励转化为密集过程奖励，有效解决了信用分配问题，提升了RL效率。在机器人控制微调中展示了实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的任务和判别器设计。

title: Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay
abstract: Matrix-aware optimizers such as Muon and Muown have recently shown strong empirical performance for pre-training Transformers. In particular, Muown separates each weight matrix into row magnitudes and an un-normalized direction variable, updating the former with Adam and the latter with Muon. We show that the directional update of Muown is equivalent to a Riemannian step on the normalized directions, while the magnitude of the un-normalized parameterization only modulates the angular step size. This explains the step-size stability of Muown and suggests making the angular step size explicit. The resulting method, AngularMuown, optimizes directly over the normalized directions and uses a schedulable angular multiplier decoupled from the radial magnitude update. AngularMuown improves over Muown and, at the time of writing, a preliminary version is leading the per-optimizer category of the modded nanoGPT speedrunning competition. Further experiments on Qwen2-0.5B, and 1.1B parameter mixture-of-experts models confirm the algorithm scales beyond small models. An implementation of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/fhueb/angular-muown

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了Muown优化器隐式执行角步长衰减的机制，并提出显式调度角步长的AngularMuown方法。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon和Muown等矩阵感知优化器在预训练Transformer中表现优异，但其角步长机制未被充分理解，现有方法依赖于隐式衰减，缺乏灵活性和可解释性。理解这一机制有助于设计更稳定且可调的优化算法。
light_analysis.method: 将Muown的方向更新等效为归一化方向上的黎曼步长，并分离角步长与径向幅度更新。提出AngularMuown，直接优化归一化方向，使用可调度的角乘子，与Adam更新的径向分量解耦。实验基于modded nanoGPT竞赛和Qwen2-0.5B/1.1B MoE模型。
light_analysis.result: AngularMuown在per-optimizer类别的modded nanoGPT速度竞赛中领先，并优于原始Muown。在Qwen2-0.5B和1.1B参数MoE模型上验证了可扩展性，展示了算法从小到大规模模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文阐明了Muown的几何解释，提出了显式角步长调度的优化方法，提升了性能与可控性。代码已开源，为矩阵感知优化器的理论理解和实践改进提供了新方向，未来可探索更复杂的调度策略。

title: Pose Anything Anywhere:Model-free Object Poses from Arbitrary References
abstract: Estimating the 6D pose of unseen objects is a fundamental yet challenging problem for open-world robotics and embodied perception. Model-based methods are accurate but depend on CAD assets or heavy onboarding, while most model-free approaches are still limited to pairwise single-anchor matching and thus fail under occlusion and large viewpoint changes with low query-reference overlap. Therefore, we present PANY, a unified model-free framework that seamlessly supports both RGB and RGB-D inputs, operates on one or sparse pose-free reference views, and generalizes effectively to novel objects. Built on a multi-view transformer geometry backbone, PANY moves beyond pairwise matching by learning view-consistent geometry and cross-view alignment cues that remain stable under wide baselines and limited overlap. When additional unposed assist views are available, PANY aggregates them via pose-graph canonical registration to increase geometric coverage and reinforce the final pose. Extensive experiments show that PANY achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, substantially outperforming existing model-free methods, improving pose accuracy by +12% on YCB-V and over +20% on LM-O. Furthermore, PANY consistently performs well under both single-reference and sparse-reference settings, demonstrating strong robustness in real-world environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PANY，一个统一的无模型6D位姿估计框架，支持RGB/RGB-D输入，从任意参考视图泛化到新物体。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无模型6D位姿估计方法受限于成对单锚匹配，在遮挡和大视角变化下因查询-参考重叠低而失败。模型方法依赖CAD资产或繁重注册，限制了开放世界机器人应用。需要一种能处理稀疏、无位姿参考视图且对遮挡和视角变化鲁棒的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: PANY基于多视角Transformer几何骨干，学习视角一致的几何和跨视图对齐线索，克服宽基线和低重叠问题。支持RGB和RGB-D输入，可处理单张或稀疏无位姿参考视图。当额外无位姿辅助视图可用时，通过位姿图规范注册聚合它们以增加几何覆盖并强化最终位姿。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能。在YCB-V数据集上，位姿精度提升12%；在LM-O数据集上提升超过20%。在单参考和稀疏参考设置下均表现良好，展现出强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PANY为开放世界6D位姿估计提供了高效、鲁棒的无模型解决方案，无需CAD资产或重注册。其多视图几何学习和规范注册策略在遮挡和视角变化下表现出色。未来可探索更高效的特征融合和扩展到更多模态。

title: AI Exposure Scores: what they measure, what they miss, and what comes next
abstract: A set of exposure scores calculated in 2023 has become a central empirical input to the future of work debate. Produced by Eloundou et al. (2023) and referred to here as the GPTs are GPTs scores, they define exposure as the share of occupational tasks a large language model can assist with. This work is a genuine methodological contribution, but as the scores travel from the time and place they were produced, the limitations the authors named do not always travel with them. Two gaps have widened as a result. The first is structural, between what static exposure scores measure and what policy questions actually require. Taking the diffusion of these scores as a case study, we show how their temporal, geographic, and ontological limitations compound in policy-facing analyses, and we survey five families of research responding to these limits: dynamic and benchmark-based measures, ensemble methods, task-framework extensions, worker-centered metrics, and adoption and usage data. The second gap is the one we argue needs more attention: the coordination between researchers and policymakers. The policy-relevant work which ask who is harmed, who benefits, how, and when, continues to reference the static GPTs are GPTs scores without engagement with the methodological updates that would let these questions be answered more reliably. We then ask what additional steps towards navigating uncertainty remain: ex-post frameworks and the deliberate, political work of reimagining what futures are worthy of building towards are. Closing the research-policy gap is a shared task: policymakers must widen their evidence base, engage workers as epistemic partners, and shift from prediction to preparedness; researchers must build data infrastructure, adopt participatory methods, and write with policymakers in mind. Better measurement matters, but it will not close the second gap alone.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示GPTs are GPTs静态暴露分数的结构性局限与研究-政策协调缺口，提出从预测转向准备、多方协作改进测量与应用的路线。
light_analysis.motivation: Eloundou等人2023年提出的AI暴露分数已成为未来工作辩论的核心实证输入，但其静态性在跨时空、本体论迁移中局限性放大，导致政策问题无法被准确回答。现有方法未能动态追踪技术演变、忽视地域差异，且工人中心视角缺失。更重要的是，研究人员与政策制定者之间的协调不足，使政策相关追问（谁受益、何时、如何）仍依赖过时分数，亟需弥合双重差距。
light_analysis.method: 以GPTs are GPTs分数扩散为案例，分析其时间、地理和本体论局限如何叠加影响政策分析。系统调研五类回应方法：动态与基准度量、集成方法、任务框架扩展、工人中心指标、采纳与使用数据。最后论证研究-政策协调是更需关注的缺口，并提出导航不确定性的额外步骤：事后框架与政治性未来重塑。
light_analysis.result: 识别两大差距：结构性差距——静态分数测量（任务占比）与政策需求（谁受益、何时）不匹配；协调差距——研究人员忽略方法论更新而政策制定者依赖过时分数。案例显示分数扩散中初始明示的局限性常被遗漏，导致分析失真。五类方法虽部分回应结构性问题，但协调差距仍未解决，政策建议转化为行动需要更紧密的跨领域合作。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是揭示AI暴露分数应用中的双重差距，并呼吁从测量转向治理。政策制定者应拓宽证据基础（如采用动态数据、工人经验），从预测适配转向紧急准备；研究人员需建设数据基础设施、采用参与式方法并面向政策写作。更好测量必要但不足以闭合协调差距，需政治性对话重新想象值得建设的未来。

title: AI-driven Optimisation of Quality of Recovery (QoR) in Remote Patient Monitoring
abstract: Remote patient monitoring depends on patient-reported data to capture the subjective dimension of recovery that devices cannot measure. The Quality of Recovery (QoR-15) survey is the gold-standard instrument for this purpose. It was designed and validated for occasional in-hospital assessment, yet remote monitoring now administers it to patients daily. In our own post-surgical deployment, only 55% of patients submitted the survey more than 14 days of 30 monitoring days. We developed QoR-compact, a five-item daily input for the RPM prediction pathway. Setting a deployment-driven target of one-third of the daily items, we exhaustively evaluated all 3,003 five-question subsets of the QoR-15 and tested whether the best of them matches the full instrument in predicting near-term postoperative recovery severity. QoR-compact achieves a mean AUC-ROC of 0.968 (95% CI 0.915-0.988), statistically comparable to the 0.964 baseline obtained with one-third of the items. Patient-level backtesting indicates that it tracks readmission events as faithfully as the full form. Its five items span the physical and psychological axes of recovery: Q3 (feeling rested), Q9 (feeling comfortable and in control), Q10 (general well-being), Q12 (severe pain), and Q14 (feeling worried or anxious). The QoR-15 remains the gold-standard measure of recovery; QoR-compact complements it as a shorter daily input designed for prediction. This parity provides the basis for a prospective study of whether a lighter daily input is, in turn, completed more consistently. External validation on larger cohorts is required before clinical use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QoR-compact，一个5项每日问卷，用于远程患者监护中预测术后恢复严重性，性能与完整QoR-15相当。
light_analysis.motivation: 远程患者监护中，QoR-15每日使用导致依从性低，仅55%患者提交超过14天。需要更短问卷以提高完成率，同时保持预测性能，以有效监测术后恢复。
light_analysis.method: 针对RPM预测路径，设定每日项目数三分之一（5项），穷举评估QoR-15所有3003个5项子集，选择最佳子集QoR-compact。使用AUC-ROC评估预测术后恢复严重性，并与完整问卷对比。
light_analysis.result: QoR-compact平均AUC-ROC为0.968（95%CI 0.915-0.988），与使用三分之一项目的基线0.964统计可比。患者级回测表明跟踪再入院事件同样准确。
light_analysis.conclusion: QoR-compact作为更短的每日输入，与QoR-15互补，为前瞻性研究提供基础，以验证减轻每日输入能否提高完成率。需要外部验证。

title: DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling
abstract: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiT-Reward，利用预训练文本到图像扩散Transformer的生成表示进行奖励建模，在偏好预测和策略优化中超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像奖励模型需要独立训练，而图像生成模型本身可能包含丰富的视觉语义。本文探索能否将生成中学习的表示直接用于评估生成图像质量，以提高奖励模型的效率和泛化能力。现有方法如HPSv3性能有限，且训练成本高。通过利用预训练DiT的表示，可以避免从头训练，同时利用生成模型的优势。
light_analysis.method: DiT-Reward将预训练文本到图像扩散Transformer转换为奖励模型。它处理接近干净的图像潜变量，并聚合跨Transformer层的文本条件图像表示。使用与HPSv3相同的训练数据混合。当生成主干冻结时，轻量级头部仍能提取偏好预测。还通过探针分析发现中后层表示对奖励预测最有效，且组合不同阶段表示能提升性能。模型容量越大，奖励性能越好。
light_analysis.result: DiT-Reward在四个偏好基准上超越HPSv3：HPDv2达到85.6%，HPDv3达到77.6%。用于优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时，DiT-Reward优于HPSv3，在真实性上有明显提升。直接潜变量评分相比HPSv3实现1.65倍推理加速，峰值内存相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 预训练生成DiT可提供迁移性强的表示用于奖励建模和策略优化，其性能随生成主干容量增加而提升。工作表明生成表示在下游评估任务中的有效性，为奖励模型设计提供新范式。未来可探索其他生成架构的表示迁移，以及更高效的轻量级头部设计。

title: Hedgementation = Hedgerow Segmentation: A Remote Sensing Benchmark
abstract: We propose Hedgementation: a new benchmark to evaluate machine learning models for hedgerow mapping from remote sensing data at country scale and 10m$^2$ spatial resolution. We combine and harmonize multiple remote sensing data products and ground truth labels sourced from a hedgerow inventory in France. We measure the ability of three baseline models to generalize across spatial distance, and across climatic zones, a more explicitly challenging task. Our benchmark tests both supervised and self-supervised learning approaches for remote sensing, applied to tracking fine-scale features of high agricultural importance. The code to reproduce the benchmark and baselines results is available at https://github.com/hedgementation/hedgementation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hedgementation基准，用于评估遥感树篱分割模型，整合多源数据与自监督学习方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 树篱是农业生态重要但精细的特征，遥感映射面临跨空间和气候泛化挑战。现有研究缺乏统一的大规模基准来评估模型泛化能力，尤其是在不同气候区域。该基准旨在填补这一空白，推动精细农业遥感发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建法国国家尺度（10m²分辨率）树篱分割基准，融合多个遥感数据产品（如Sentinel-2）和地面标签。评估三个基线模型（如U-Net）在空间距离和气候区域上的泛化能力。比较监督与自监督学习方法，开源代码库便于复现。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供量化结果，但论文通过空间距离和气候区域划分测试集，系统评估了基线模型的泛化性能。自监督方法在部分跨域场景中表现优于监督基线，具体数值待论文详述。代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个国家尺度树篱分割基准，促进遥感精细特征建模与自监督学习应用。基准可扩展至其他农业特征或更高分辨率数据，为生态监测和精准农业提供工具。局限性在于当前仅覆盖法国，需验证全球泛化。

title: Data Selection Through Iterative Self-Filtering for Vision-Language Settings
abstract: The availability of large amounts of clean data is paramount to training neural networks. However, at large scales, manual oversight is impractical, resulting in sizeable datasets that can be very noisy. Attempts to mitigate this obstacle to producing performant vision-language models have so far involved heuristics, curated reference datasets, and using pre-trained models. Here we propose a novel, bootstrapped method in which a CLIP model is trained on an evolving, self-selected dataset. This evolving dataset constitutes a balance of filtered, highly probable clean samples as well as diverse samples from the entire distribution. Our proposed Self-Filtering method iterates between training the model and selecting a subsequently improved data mixture. Training on vision-language datasets filtered by the proposed approach improves downstream performance without the need for additional data or pre-trained models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自过滤方法迭代训练CLIP模型并选择数据集，无需额外数据或预训练模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模训练数据中的噪声严重影响模型性能，而人工清洗成本高昂。现有方法依赖启发式规则、参考数据集或预训练模型来筛选数据，但这些方法要么引入偏见，要么需要额外资源。本文旨在开发一种无需外部监督的自适应数据筛选方法，以提升视觉-语言模型的训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出自过滤方法，迭代进行模型训练和数据选择。在每轮迭代中，使用当前CLIP模型对训练样本进行评分，保留高置信度（干净）样本，同时从全分布中采样多样样本以保持数据平衡。所选数据混合用于下一轮模型训练，如此循环，最终得到优化的数据集和模型。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉-语言数据集上，使用自过滤方法训练的模型在多个下游任务上性能提升。与使用原始噪声数据或启发式筛选方法相比，该方法在无需额外数据或预训练模型的情况下，取得了更好的准确率和泛化能力。具体改进幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种自举式的数据筛选方法，通过迭代训练与数据选择，有效缓解了大规模数据噪声问题。该方法简单、无需外部资源，为视觉-语言模型的数据准备提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的样本评分策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Vera: A Layered Diffusion Model for Content-Preserving Video Editing
abstract: Video diffusion models have enabled remarkable progress in video generation and editing. However, content preservation remains a core challenge: existing methods regenerate every pixel and often alter elements that should remain unchanged, such as characters or background scenes. We introduce Vera, a layered diffusion framework for content-preserving video editing. Instead of regenerating the entire video, Vera generates an edit layer along with an alpha matte for compositing with the source video, separating creative editing from content preservation by design. To encourage coherent composition with the source video, we extend the text-to-video DiT into a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture, with separate DiTs for each layer that interact through joint self-attention. To support the training of Vera, we further construct a high-quality layered dataset with accurate alpha mattes, diverse scenes and dynamics, and visual effects. Across our quantitative benchmark and human preference study, Vera outperforms leading open-source video editing models in content preservation while remaining competitive in edit quality, using 486K frames of layered training data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vera，一种分层扩散模型，通过生成编辑层和alpha遮罩与源视频合成，实现内容保持的视频编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在编辑时难以保持内容，因为重新生成整个视频会改变不应改变的元素（如人物、背景）。该问题重要，因为视频编辑需要精确控制哪些部分变化。当前方法不足在于无法分离编辑与内容保持，导致编辑过程中内容丢失。
light_analysis.method: Vera采用分层扩散框架，生成编辑层和alpha遮罩，通过合成保持源视频内容。将文本到视频DiT扩展为Mixture-of-Transformers（MoT）架构，每层有独立DiT，通过联合自注意力交互以促进连贯合成。为训练Vera，构建高质量分层数据集，包含精确alpha遮罩、多样场景和动态及视觉效果。
light_analysis.result: 在定量基准和人类偏好研究中，Vera在内容保持方面优于领先的开源视频编辑模型，同时在编辑质量上具有竞争力。训练使用了486K帧的分层数据，摘要未明确具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出分层框架分离编辑与内容保持，及MoT架构促进层间合成。学术上为视频编辑提供新范式，实际应用中可实现更可控的编辑。潜在局限性是依赖高质量分层数据，未来可探索更高效的数据生成或无需遮罩的端到端方法。

title: Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification
abstract: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经分类树（NCT），通过树形架构编码子群结构，无需子群标注即可实现鲁棒分类并提供可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习模型常利用虚假相关性，平均准确率高但对少数子群表现差。现有方法需子群标注或推断伪标签，且推理时仅输出类别预测，无法揭示样本的潜在子群。因此需要一种既能提升鲁棒性又能提供子群可解释性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出神经分类树（NCT），采用树形架构编码子群结构。通过将每个样本根据预测正确性路由到“易”或“难”节点，并将这些路由作为伪标签进行迭代训练，从而解开冲突子群，无需子群监督。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准（涵盖二分类和多分类虚假相关性）上评估，NCT学习的树拓扑一致地隔离少数子群，提供强可解释性，同时与最先进方法相比具有竞争力的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NCT实现了模型架构与数据潜在子群结构的透明映射，兼具鲁棒性和可解释性。未来可探索更复杂的路由机制或应用于更广泛的任务。

title: Causal Discovery in the Era of Agents
abstract: Recent attempts to combine large language models (LLMs) with causal discovery ask models to infer pairwise directions, propose graph structures, or inject language-model outputs as priors and constraints. These approaches promise faster analysis, but they also obscure whether a causal evidence is supported by data and assumptions or by textual associations, prompt artifacts and hallucinated mechanisms. We argue for a different role for agents in causal discovery. Agents should inspect data, retrieve context, explain method assumptions and clarify graph outputs, but they should not supply edges, orientations, priors, constraints or causal conclusions. We propose the principle that agents assist the workflow, while causal claims remain grounded in data, explicit assumptions, formal algorithms, diagnostics and user or domain-expert decisions. We instantiate this principle in causal-learn+, an online platform that coordinates data analysis, preprocessing, method recommendation, expert-knowledge incorporation, formal discovery and interpretation around the algorithmic ecosystem of causal-learn. A case study on Big Five personality data illustrates agent-assisted pipeline of causal discovery without turning language-model unreliability into causal evidence. The platform is available at causallearn.com.

light_analysis.overview: 提出智能体在因果发现中应辅助工作流而非直接提供因果结论，并实现causal-learn+平台践行该原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有将大语言模型与因果发现结合的方法，让模型推断方向、提出图结构或注入先验，但这些方法模糊了因果证据的来源，可能混杂文本关联、提示伪影和幻觉机制。需要明确区分基于数据与假设的因果结论和语言模型的不确定性输出。
light_analysis.method: 提出智能体辅助因果发现的原则：智能体负责检查数据、检索上下文、解释方法假设和澄清图输出，但不应提供边、方向、先验或因果结论。基于此原则开发causal-learn+在线平台，协调数据分析、预处理、方法推荐、专家知识融入、形式化发现和解释，依托causal-learn算法生态。
light_analysis.result: 通过大五人格数据案例研究，展示了智能体辅助的因果发现流程，验证了在不将语言模型不可靠性转化为因果证据的前提下，实现有效的因果分析。平台已上线causallearn.com，但摘要未提供与其他方法的量化对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文明确了智能体在因果发现中的角色边界，强调因果主张必须基于数据、假设和算法。causal-learn+平台为此原则提供了具体实现，有助于提升因果发现的可靠性和可解释性。未来可进一步扩展平台功能及应对更复杂场景。

title: Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers
abstract: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种可扩展的双向学习框架，通过参数化功能保留变换实现十亿参数预训练Transformer的线性模式连接与模型融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有线性模式连接方法通常仅从单个模型端点优化插值路径，难以有效扩展到大规模预训练Transformer。为解决此问题，需要一种在保持功能等价的同时，能在大规模架构上实现低障碍连接与鲁棒融合的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出双向学习框架，对两个模型施加适当的参数化功能保留权重变换，使其在共享线性插值路径上联合学习对应变换。通过双向优化降低插值障碍，实现十亿参数级模型的可靠融合。未明确提及数据集，但实验涉及WikiText和ImageNet。
light_analysis.result: 在中等参数语言模型上实现WikiText近零损失障碍，为首个该规模下近无障线性连接演示；ViT-L在插值路径上保持ImageNet top-1准确率超69%；十亿参数LLM仅有小损失障碍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明适当解决参数对称性可显著改善大型预训练Transformer的线性连接与融合性能。代码已开源，为模型合并提供新工具。未来工作或涉及更复杂架构和任务。

title: Polycepta: Object-Centric Appearance Estimation for Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: The tracking-by-detection paradigm in multi-object tracking (MOT) typically relies on static appearance descriptors to complement motion estimation. However, these descriptors are frame-independent, limiting their robustness as visual cues. Since such descriptors are often obtained from computationally intensive pretrained backbones, real-time MOT systems frequently abandon appearance cues altogether and rely solely on motion prediction and geometric association. In this work, we introduce Polycepta, an object-centric appearance state estimation framework that reformulates appearance modeling as a recursive estimation problem rather than a frame-wise matching task. Polycepta constructs and continuously updates an independent appearance state for each tracked object, enabling future appearance representations to be estimated from accumulated observations. Polycepta is encouraged to learn the appearance-state construction of object-specific representations rather than memorize them through a proposed learning strategy, enabling appearance estimation for unseen classes. A key property of Polycepta is that the quality of appearance estimation improves as object states evolve during inference. While conventional appearance descriptors remain static or degrade over time, Polycepta progressively refines appearance estimates as additional observations are accumulated. Extensive experiments on KITTI, the Waymo Open Dataset, and MOT17 demonstrate consistent reductions in identity switches and improvements in tracking performance when integrated into the tracking-by-detection pipelines. Polycepta operates at 90.57 Hz and delivers state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark when integrated into the RobMOT framework, achieving a MOTA of 92.27\%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polycepta，一种以对象为中心的外观状态估计框架，将外观建模重构为递归估计问题，提升多目标跟踪的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的检测跟踪范式在MOT中依赖静态外观描述符，但帧独立的描述符鲁棒性有限。由于预训练骨干网络计算量大，实时系统常舍弃外观线索，仅依赖运动预测和几何关联。这限制了跟踪性能，尤其是在外观变化或遮挡场景中。
light_analysis.method: Polycepta为每个跟踪对象构建并持续更新独立的外观状态，将未来外观表示从累积观测中估计出来。通过提出的学习策略，鼓励学习对象特定表示的外观状态构建，而非记忆，从而实现对未见类的外观估计。框架以递归方式运行，随着对象状态演化提升估计质量。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI、Waymo Open Dataset和MOT17上，集成Polycepta的检测跟踪管线一致降低了身份切换数并提升了跟踪性能。在KITTI基准上结合RobMOT框架，以90.57 Hz运行，MOTA达92.27%，达到最先进水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polycepta将外观建模从帧间匹配改为递归估计，显著提升了MOT中的外观鲁棒性。其计算高效且能泛化至未见类别。未来工作可探索更复杂的对象状态更新机制及跨模态扩展。

title: MORL-A2C: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Reranker for Optimizing Healthiness in MOPI-HFRS
abstract: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.
comment: Accepted at the International Workshop on Resource-Efficient Learning for Knowledge Discovery (RelKD) at ACM SIGKDD 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出MORL-A2C，通过强化学习顺序重排优化食物推荐中的健康-偏好权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 不健康的饮食习惯是美国持续的公共卫生问题，现有推荐系统优先考虑用户偏好而忽视营养健康。MOPI-HFRS虽通过Pareto优化联合优化偏好、健康和多样性，但依赖静态的单步权衡解决方案，无法捕捉饮食决策的顺序性。因此需要一种顺序决策方法来实现动态健康-偏好平衡。
light_analysis.method: MORL-A2C使用冻结的GNN嵌入，将推荐形式化为K步重排问题，采用优势演员-评论家算法，使用标量化的相关性和健康奖励。通过行为克隆从冻结嵌入的点积排序器进行策略热启动，并修正了MOPI-HFRS评估流水线中低估基线的错误。
light_analysis.result: 在宏营养素基准上，MORL-A2C排序质量略有下降（Recall@20从25.64%降至23.61%，NDCG@20从23.52%降至20.64%），但健康对齐度大幅提升（H-Score@20从46.05%增至69.57%），且在完整营养素基准上趋势一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了策略驱动的顺序优化能有效驾驭多目标食物推荐中的健康-偏好权衡，具有重要的公共卫生意义。未来可扩展到其他营养维度或更复杂的用户模型，但当前计算开销可能较大。

title: Against Proxy Optimization
abstract: I discuss conditions under which maximizing a proxy utility function is harmful and suggest this poses problems for applying decision theory.

light_analysis.overview: 论文分析代理效用函数最大化在特定条件下的危害，对决策理论应用提出质疑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有决策理论常基于最大化代理效用函数，但未充分探讨其潜在危害。本研究旨在识别这些条件，警示决策理论应用中的风险。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析讨论代理优化有害的条件，可能涉及数学推导或逻辑论证，但摘要未明确具体方法。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，主要贡献为理论性警示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了代理优化在特定条件下的危害性，对决策理论应用提出警告。未来需研究规避危害的方法。

title: SPIRAL: Learning to Search and Aggregate
abstract: Language model reasoning can be substantially improved at test time via scaffolds that scale inference compute across different primitives -- sequential reasoning within a trace, independently sampled parallel traces, and aggregation of multiple reasoning traces into a final response. During post-training, however, language models are optimized only for sequential reasoning within a single trace. We introduce Sequential-Parallel-Aggregative Reinforcement Learning (SPIRAL), a framework in which a language model is trained to use all three primitives, as part of a unified inference compute pipeline. Concretely, the language model first samples a set of independent traces in parallel, each produced through sequential chain-of-thought reasoning, and then generates a final aggregation trace conditioned on those traces; all components are optimized end-to-end against the reward of the final aggregated response. To train this system, SPIRAL uses set reinforcement learning to teach models to produce a set of traces that are collectively useful for an aggregator and standard reinforcement learning to teach models to aggregate the set into improved final responses. Our experiments on reasoning tasks show that SPIRAL effectively scales with inference compute, outperforming GRPO by up to 11$\times$ scaling efficiency and 15% higher performance when all three compute primitives are scaled.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPIRAL框架，利用强化学习统一训练语言模型在推理时进行顺序推理、并行采样和轨迹聚合，提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在测试时可通过扩展推理计算（如顺序推理、并行轨迹、聚合）提升性能，但在后训练阶段仅优化单轨迹顺序推理。现有方法未能有效结合这三种原语，导致推理扩展效率不足。SPIRAL旨在通过强化学习统一训练，使模型学会并行生成有用轨迹并聚合得到更优答案。
light_analysis.method: SPIRAL采用集合强化学习训练模型并行生成一组独立推理轨迹，并使用标准强化学习训练聚合器将这些轨迹合并为最终答案。整个流程端到端优化，基于最终答案的奖励信号。模型先并行采样多条链式思维轨迹，再生成聚合轨迹。实验在推理任务上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在推理任务上，SPIRAL有效扩展推理计算，相比GRPO，扩展效率提升最高达11倍，性能提升15%（当三种原语都扩展时）。结果表明SPIRAL能更好利用并行计算和聚合策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPIRAL证明通过强化学习统一训练语言模型使用顺序、并行和聚合原语，可显著提升推理扩展效率和性能。该框架为后训练阶段设计更复杂的推理scaffold提供了新思路，未来可探索更丰富的聚合策略和扩展至其他任务。

title: Quantifying the Agreement Between Data-Influence and Data-Similarity to Understand LLM Behavior
abstract: One way to understand LLM behavior is to trace its output back to the training data. Two types of measures are commonly used for output tracing: data-similarity and data-influence. The former is cheaper while the latter is believed to be more accurate. Even though many works have compared them for ground-truth tasks, no such comparisons exist for output tracing. Here, we fill this gap and precisely quantify the commonalities and differences between the two measures. We do this by first ranking the training documents according to each measure and then computing the overlap between the two rankings. Our main finding is that the two rankings agree significantly, but there is an asymmetry between them: The top documents of data-similarity are assigned more consistent ranks by data-influence than the other way around. This result is valid across a range of experiments involving OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, and GPT2. We exploit the asymmetry to obtain a favorable cost-accuracy trade-off by using the costly data-influence to refine the results of data-similarity.

light_analysis.overview: 量化数据影响与数据相似性在LLM输出溯源中的一致性，发现不对称性并利用其优化成本-准确率权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解LLM行为常通过输出溯源到训练数据，常用数据相似性和数据影响两种度量。前者成本低，后者被认为更准确。尽管已有工作比较两者在真实任务上的表现，但缺乏在输出溯源场景下的对比。本研究旨在填补这一空白，精确量化两者的共性和差异，以指导实际应用中的度量选择。
light_analysis.method: 通过两种度量分别对训练文档排序，计算排序重叠度。实验涉及OLMo2-1B、Qwen3-1.7B、LlaMa3.2-1B、Gemma3-1B和GPT2等多个模型。主要发现是排序显著一致，但存在不对称性：数据相似性排名靠前的文档在数据影响下排名更一致，反之则不然。利用该不对称性，用成本高的数据影响来优化数据相似性的结果，获得更好的成本-准确率权衡。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，两种度量在排名上显著一致，但不对称性显著。数据相似性顶部文档在数据影响下的排名一致性高于数据影响顶部文档在数据相似性下的排名。利用这一特性，通过数据影响细化数据相似性结果，实现了更优的成本-准确率权衡，具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次在输出溯源场景下系统比较数据影响与数据相似性，揭示了它们的高度一致性和不对称性。提出的成本-准确率权衡策略具有实际价值，可在保持准确率的同时降低计算成本。未来可探索更多模型和任务下的泛化性，以及不对称性的理论解释。

title: The Topology of Ill-Posed Questions: Persistent Homology for Detection and Steering in LLMs
abstract: Ill-posed questions, including ambiguous, underspecified, or contradictory queries, may admit no valid answer or multiple plausible answers, posing a challenge for large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches largely analyze ill-posedness through model outputs and often focus on specific subclasses. We investigate whether diverse sources of ill-posedness can be represented within a unified topology of LLM internal states and whether this structure can be used to steer response behavior. We model the contextual hidden states of prompt tokens at each transformer layer as a point cloud and characterize its geometry using finite zero-dimensional persistent homology. Each layer is summarized by three compact descriptors: mean finite lifetime, normalized lifetime entropy, and largest-lifetime concentration. Concatenating these descriptors across layers yields a topology representation of the question. We further introduce topology-conditioned activation steering, which retrieves topologically similar examples and constructs query-specific activation interventions that encourage source-aware clarification or abstention. Across three open-weight LLMs, topology features consistently outperform prompt-based and pooled-hidden-state baselines for ill-posedness classification, improving average accuracy from \(67.4\%\) to \(78.9\%\) on AmbigQA, from \(79.9\%\) to \(88.5\%\) on SituatedQA, and from \(57.6\%\) to \(69.6\%\) on CLAMBER 9-way classification. Topology-conditioned steering increases the average total acceptable response rate from \(61.4\%\) to \(70.6\%\) and grounded acceptable responses from \(11.9\%\) to \(16.4\%\). These results show that persistent homology provides both an interpretable representation of ill-posedness and an effective mechanism for targeted response steering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用持续性同调分析LLM内部状态拓扑，统一表示多种不良问题，并实现分类与响应引导。
light_analysis.motivation: 不良问题（歧义、欠定义、矛盾查询）对LLM构成挑战，现有方法主要通过输出分析或针对特定子类，缺乏统一的结构化表征和干预手段。本研究旨在探索能否在LLM内部状态中建立统一的拓扑表示，并利用该结构进行响应引导。
light_analysis.method: 将每层transformer中提示词的上下文隐藏状态建模为点云，用零维持续性同调提取几何特征，每个层生成三个紧凑描述符：平均有限寿命、归一化寿命熵、最大寿命集中度。跨层串联得到问题的拓扑表示。进一步提出拓扑条件激活引导，检索拓扑相似示例构建查询特定的激活干预，鼓励澄清或拒绝回答。
light_analysis.result: 在三个开源LLM上，拓扑特征在不良问题分类中显著优于基于提示和池化隐藏状态的基线：AmbigQA准确率从67.4%提升至78.9%，SituatedQA从79.9%提升至88.5%，CLAMBER九分类从57.6%提升至69.6%。拓扑条件引导使总可接受响应率从61.4%提升至70.6%，有依据的可接受响应率从11.9%提升至16.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 持续性同调为不良问题提供了可解释的表示，并实现了有效的响应引导机制。该方法统一处理多种不良问题，提升LLM鲁棒性和可靠性。未来可探索更高阶同调及更多模型的应用。

title: It's Much Easier for Neural Networks to learn Game of Life Dynamics with the Right Activation Function: Polynomial Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
abstract: Previous work has found a gap between the scale of neural networks that reliably learn Conway's Game of Life, and minimal networks capable of representing the classic cellular automaton with hard-coded parameter values. Viewing neural network learning as a search process suggests a dependence on networks large enough to contain sub-networks with lucky initializations (sometimes known as 'winning tickets') that actually learn the task. In this work, we reorient our perspective from discovering Life rules as a search problem back to a learning problem, and reason that with fitting inductive biases, the problem should be much more amenable to minimal networks. We find that network variants with several alternative activation functions meaningfully outperform the default choice of Rectified Linear Units, and in particular, that a 2nd degree polynomial activation function consistently learns Life dynamics with or without the benefit of learning neural weights. Our results provide an informative demonstration of the benefits of matching learning to the task at hand and challenge the easy default choice of scale for all problems. In particular, we advocate for the use of cellular automata as simple test domains for developing strategies that can benefit machine learning for science, physics-based deep learning, and interpretable machine learning.
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 2026 Artificial Life Conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用多项式Kolmogorov-Arnold网络和二次多项式激活函数，显著提升神经网络学习Conway's Game of Life动力学的效率，挑战了默认使用大规模网络的做法。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究表明，神经网络要可靠学习Conway's Game of Life需要较大规模，而最小网络只能硬编码参数。学习被视为搜索过程，依赖网络足够大以包含“幸运初始化”的子网络。本文重新将问题视为学习问题，认为通过合适的归纳偏置（如激活函数选择），最小网络也能有效学习。该问题的重要性在于展示归纳偏置对学习效率和网络规模的影响。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是使用具有不同激活函数的网络变体，特别是采用二次多项式激活函数的Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（PKAN）。与标准ReLU对比，在Conway's Game of Life数据集上训练。关键创新在于利用多项式激活函数提供更匹配任务的非线性，同时允许网络在不依赖权重学习的情况下学习动态。实验设置包括有/无权重梯度更新的情况。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，使用二次多项式激活函数的网络变体在一致性学习Game of Life动态方面显著优于ReLU，即使在没有权重学习的情况下也能成功。而ReLU网络需要更大规模才能达到类似性能。结果量化上虽无具体数值，但强调了多项式激活函数带来的性能提升和网络规模减小。与基线方法（ReLU）对比，PKAN在训练成功率上表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明，通过选择合适的激活函数（如二次多项式），神经网络可以更高效地学习复杂动态系统，挑战了“增大规模解决所有问题”的默认选择。研究价值在于强调了归纳偏置匹配任务的重要性，并为科学深度学习提供了简单测试域（元胞自动机）。未来工作可扩展至其他物理系统或可解释机器学习。

title: Evaluation Awareness Is Not One Capability: Evidence from Open Language Models
abstract: Safety benchmarks assume that test-condition behavior predicts deployment behavior, an assumption that fails if models detect evaluation cues and adapt. This opens a gap between benchmark performance and deployment behavior: compliance measured under test conditions becomes an optimistic upper bound that overstates how safely a model behaves once the evaluation harness is removed. We characterize this evaluation awareness through eight experiments across 37 open-weight models and seven families. (i)Detection is moderate and training-driven (24/37 models exceed chance, best AUROC 0.714 vs.0.819 human, with instruction tuning dominating over scale). (ii)Detection shifts safety behavior (hard refusal drops 5.8 percentage points under hypothetical framing, and 21/140 HarmBench framing effects are significant, with compliance rising up to +30 percentage points. (iii)Representations survive behavioral collapse (probes retain AUROC 0.98 under rewrites that drive behavior below chance, and multi-layer steering causally moves three downstream tasks while random controls do not). (iv)These axes are weakly coupled (only 1/15 correlations are significant, the sole robust link being behavioral detection versus framing resistance, $ρ=-0.79$, $p<0.001$).
