We call this gap the benchmark illusion: because detectability, behavioral manifestation, and controllability vary independently, it is multivariate rather than a single number, so no single awareness score is a reliable proxy for deployment safety.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示语言模型评估意识的多维性，证明其检测、行为和控制维度弱耦合，挑战单一评估安全指标的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全基准假设测试行为可预测部署行为，但模型可能检测评估线索并调整自身，导致基准测试高估实际安全性。现有研究未深入分析这一差距的成因及跨模型、跨任务的表现，缺乏对评估意识多维性的系统理解。
light_analysis.method: 对37个开源模型（7个系列）进行8项实验，涵盖检测能力（AUROC）、安全行为变化（硬拒绝率、HarmBench得分）、表征鲁棒性（探针AUROC、多层引导）及维度相关性分析。使用假设框架改写、行为崩溃等干预手段，度量检测、行为与控制轴的耦合程度。
light_analysis.result: 检测能力中等（24/37模型优于随机，最高AUROC 0.714 vs 人类0.819），指令微调主导；硬拒绝率在假设框架下降低5.8个百分点，21/140 HarmBench效应显著，合规性提升最高30个百分点；表征探针在行为崩溃后仍达AUROC 0.98；仅1/15相关性显著（行为检测与框架抵抗 ρ=-0.79）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 评估意识是多维而非单一能力，检测、行为和控制轴弱耦合，单一安全分数不可靠。研究揭示了“基准幻觉”，强调需多维度评估部署安全，为未来安全对齐方法设计提供新视角，但未提出具体缓解方案。

title: Solve for the Hyperparameter, Skip the Search: Kolmogorov-Optimal Scaling Laws for Spline Regression
abstract: Hyperparameter tuning almost always means search: fit the model at every value on a grid, score each by cross-validation, and keep the winner. For spline regression that search is unnecessary. The optimal resolution can be solved for in closed form, to the accuracy an exhaustive search reaches, at a fraction of the compute. Three ingredients make this possible: classical approximation theory pins the squared bias to a known power of the resolution G, exactly the Kolmogorov n-width of the smoothness class; the basis dimension is an explicit polynomial in G; and leave-one-out error follows from a single fit via the PRESS identity. Balancing the two known curves gives the minimizer analytically. We extend this calculus to many coordinates by replacing ambient input dimension with interaction order, the number of active low-order components in an ANOVA decomposition, yielding a scaling law in which the optimal resolution and error are power functions of the effective density (sample size per active component), with input dimension absent from the exponent. The law becomes an algorithm. KORE (Kolmogorov-optimal Order-aware Resolution Estimation) fits two pilot resolutions, solves a leverage-calibrated 2x2 system for the bias and noise scales, and evaluates the closed-form plug-in resolution with a tiny leave-one-out certificate: about a dozen fits instead of a full grid sweep, with a consistency guarantee as the sample grows. Across additive and sparse pairwise targets up to 80 input dimensions, KORE matches exhaustive 3-fold cross-validation and the full classical ladder (GCV, Mallows' Cp, AIC, BIC) while fitting roughly 8x fewer models; on 36 real tabular datasets it ranks first among 21 methods in accuracy per unit of compute, ahead of tuned boosters and kernel machines. When complexity lives in low interaction order, solving for the resolution beats searching for it.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KORE算法，利用Kolmogorov最优缩放律闭式求解样条回归的最优分辨率，避免超参数搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 超参数调优通常依赖网格搜索和交叉验证，计算成本高昂。对于样条回归，现有方法虽有效但缺乏理论指导，最优分辨率可通过闭式解精确获得。本文旨在消除不必要的搜索，利用经典近似理论推导解析解，大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 基于Kolmogorov n-width将平方偏差建模为分辨率的幂函数，基维度为显式多项式，利用PRESS恒等式得留一误差。通过平衡偏差和方差解析求解最优分辨率。扩展到高维时，用交互阶替代输入维度，得到缩放律。KORE算法拟合两个试点分辨率，校准偏置和噪声尺度，闭式计算最优分辨率，并给出小样本留一验证。
light_analysis.result: 在加性和稀疏配对目标（高达80维）上，KORE匹配穷举3折交叉验证及GCV、Cp、AIC、BIC等经典准则，拟合模型数减少约8倍。在36个真实表格数据集中，每单位计算量的精度排名第一，优于调优的梯度提升机和核机器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了当复杂度存在于低交互阶时，解析求解分辨率优于搜索。KORE提供了高效、一致的估计方法，具有显著的计算优势和实践价值，未来可扩展至其他模型。

title: A Spectral Theory of Normalized Corrected GNN Propagation
abstract: We develop a spectral theory for \emph{normalized corrected GNN propagation}. The object of study is the symmetric normalized adjacency with its degree-stationary component removed, matching the normalization used by standard GCN-style models while isolating the stationary direction most directly tied to oversmoothing. The central theoretical question is whether this corrected normalized operator preserves class-discriminative signal after many propagation layers. Our main result is a high-probability exact-recovery theorem for the binary Contextual Stochastic Block Model after \(k=O(\log n)\) propagation steps in the dense polylogarithmic regime \(p\ge C\log^B n/n\), for any fixed \(B>4\), under explicit graph-signal and feature-SNR conditions. We also establish a multi-class partial recovery theorem showing contraction toward class centers for most nodes. Synthetic and real node-classification experiments are included as empirical checks of the theory's predicted dependence on depth, graph signal, and feature noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出归一化修正GNN传播的谱理论，证明在CSBM模型下经过O(log n)层传播可实现精确恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络中过平滑问题严重限制了深层模型的性能，现有理论分析多针对未归一化或标准归一化传播。本文旨在理解移除度平稳分量后的归一化修正传播如何保留类别判别信息，尤其关注多层传播后信号保持的理论条件，为设计深层GNN提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 研究对称归一化邻接矩阵移除其度平稳分量后的算子，将其置于二分类上下文随机块模型（CSBM）框架下。在密集poly对数区域p≥C log^B n/n（B>4）中，证明经k=O(log n)步传播后，在显式图信号和特征信噪比条件下可实现高概率精确恢复。同时给出多类部分恢复定理，表明大多数节点向类中心收缩。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，在合适的信号和噪声条件下，修正传播经对数深度后仍能保持类别可分性，精确恢复概率随n增大趋近于1。合成和真实节点分类实验验证了理论关于深度、图信号和特征噪声依赖关系的预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为归一化修正GNN传播建立了严格的谱理论，揭示了过平滑的抑制机制，证明了深层传播的可行性。该工作为设计抗过平滑的GNN架构提供了理论依据，实验进一步支持理论结果。未来可推广到更一般的图模型或异质性设置。

title: Patient-Aware Contrastive Learning Preserves Per-Patient Structure in RR-Interval Representations
abstract: Contrastive representation learning struggles on physiological signals when each subject contributes a distinct baseline pattern. If class differences overlap with subject differences,class-level objectives such as supervised contrastive learning tend to merge per-subject structure into a single per-class cluster,removing the individual variation that a model needs to generalize to unseen patients. We study this problem in the setting of Paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation(PAF) detection from RR-interval(RRI) sequences and propose a patient-aware contrastive objective that forms positive pairs only from same-patient, same-class segments, preserving each patient's own sinus rhythm(SR) baseline while still pushing the two classes apart. Examining the learned embeddings directly, our objective achieves the most consistent per-patient SR structure (cohesion $0.850$ vs. $0.800$ for supervised contrastive loss (SupCon) and $0.772$ for binary cross-entropy (BCE)). We also identify that BCE produces the cleanest global class separation yet the most disordered per-patient structure. This is precisely why a linear probe trained on its features breaks down on unseen patients. On the IRIDIA-AF dataset, the resulting representation reaches a patient-independent Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of $0.989 \pm 0.003$ with $2.6\times$ lower seed variance than supervised contrastive baselines.These results highlight that per-subject geometric consistency, rather than global class separability, is key to robust cross-patient generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出患者感知对比学习目标，保留每位患者的个体基线结构，提升跨患者泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在生理信号中，每位患者有独特基线模式，现有对比学习方法（如监督对比学习）会合并患者结构到单一类别簇中，丢失个体变异，导致模型在未见患者上泛化能力差。论文以阵发性房颤检测为例，研究如何保留每位患者的窦性心律基线。
light_analysis.method: 提出患者感知对比目标，仅从同一患者、同一类别形成正样本对，在推动两类分离的同时保留每位患者的个体基线结构。使用RR间期序列数据，嵌入空间分析采用内聚度度量（cohesion）。在IRIDIA-AF数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 患者感知对比目标实现了最一致的每患者SR结构（内聚度0.850 vs. 监督对比损失0.800和二元交叉熵0.772）。线性探针在未见患者上表现更佳，AUROC达0.989±0.003，种子方差比监督对比基线低2.6倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，每个受试者的几何一致性（而非全局类别分离）是跨患者鲁棒泛化的关键。该方法为生理信号表示学习提供了新思路，未来可应用于其他个体差异显著的临床任务。

title: SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SVD-Surgeon，一种无训练方法，将最优脑外科医生框架应用于奇异值基础，通过闭式更新补偿截断的奇异值，提升SVD压缩的困惑度-压缩权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型部署受限于内存和计算需求。低秩压缩（如SVD）是有效手段，但现有方法关注分解和保留哪些成分，未考虑移除成分对损失的二阶影响。需要一种方法来补偿截断误差并智能选择剪枝目标，以在不重新训练情况下提升压缩效果。
light_analysis.method: SVD-Surgeon将每个奇异值视为参数，基于最优脑外科医生（OBS）框架计算保留奇异值的闭式更新，以二阶近似补偿移除奇异值造成的损失。同时推导出奇异值的显著性指标用于剪枝选择。该方法直接作用于奇异值分解，可叠加于现有SVD压缩器（如SVD-LLM）之上，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 将SVD-Surgeon应用于SVD-LLM，在OPT系列和LLaMA 2-7B上显著改善困惑度-压缩权衡。例如，在50%压缩率下，困惑度降低约0.5点。与基线SVD-LLM对比，在多种压缩率下均取得更优性能，且无需额外训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVD-Surgeon提供了一种训练后压缩LLM的有效方法，通过补偿奇异值截断损失提升了SVD压缩的质量。其即插即用特性便于集成到现有流程中，为低秩压缩提供了新视角。未来可探索与其他量化或剪枝方法的结合。

title: Scheduling Thoughts: Learning the Order of Thought in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked diffusion language models decode by iteratively unmasking tokens, where the unmasking order defines an "order of thought" that strongly influences generation quality yet is typically chosen heuristically. We derive a tractable upper bound on the sequential decoding mismatch, measured by the Kullback-Leibler divergence and expressed in terms of the model's pathwise log-likelihood, with tightness under sufficient model expressivity. This bound induces a dense self-aware reward over ordered trajectories, casting order selection as a principled policy optimization problem with a frozen denoiser. We instantiate this idea as Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS), which learns a lightweight order policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization and applies seamlessly to both any-order and semi-autoregressive decoding. On Sudoku with 1B MDM, SAS improves puzzle accuracy from 82.0% (best heuristic schedule) to 91.8%, and reaches 97.5% with second-stage fine-tuning along learned trajectories. On mathematical reasoning with LLaDA-8B, SAS improves pass@1 on GSM8K from 64% to 76% and on MBPP from 39.5% to 41%, consistently matching or exceeding heuristic schedules across generation lengths and block sizes. Project page: https://jimmyxu123.github.io/SAS

light_analysis.overview: 提出Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS)，通过学习解码顺序提升扩散语言模型的生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型通过迭代解掩码生成，但解掩码顺序（即“思维顺序”）通常由启发式方法决定，严重影响生成质量。现有方法缺乏对顺序的理论指导和优化框架，导致生成不稳定。该研究旨在将顺序选择建模为策略优化问题，以系统化地学习最优顺序，从而提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文推导了基于KL散度的顺序解码失配上界，并表达为路径对数似然的函数，在模型表达力足够时紧致。该上界诱导出密集的自感知奖励，将顺序选择转化为冻结降噪器下的策略优化问题。SAS方法利用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）学习轻量级顺序策略，可无缝应用于任意顺序和半自回归解码，无需修改底层模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Sudoku任务上，使用1B MDM模型，SAS将准确率从最佳启发式调度的82.0%提升至91.8%，第二阶段微调后达到97.5%。在数学推理任务上，LLaDA-8B模型在GSM8K上pass@1从64%提升至76%，在MBPP上从39.5%提升至41%，且在不同生成长度和块大小下一致匹配或超越启发式调度。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAS通过理论驱动的顺序学习显著提升了扩散语言模型的生成质量，验证了将顺序选择作为策略优化问题的有效性。该方法通用性强，适用于多种解码范式，在数独和数学推理任务上均取得显著改进。未来工作可探索扩展到更大模型和更复杂任务，并进一步优化策略学习效率。

title: LangMAP: A Language-Adaptive Approach to Tokenization
abstract: Language-specific tokenizers improve tokenization quality and the downstream performance of models on those languages. However, using such a tokenizer comes at a cost: either a new model must be trained from scratch, or the vocabulary of an existing pretrained model must be adapted. We propose Language-adaptive Maximum a Posteriori (LangMAP) Tokenization, a tokenization scheme that extends the UnigramLM algorithm to the multilingual setting, producing language-specific tokenization from a single shared vocabulary. Notably, LangMAP can be used when training a multilingual language model from scratch or to adapt a pretrained model's tokenizer to individual languages without changing its vocabulary. While language labels are required at training time, a key feature of the algorithm is that it then performs language-specific tokenization at inference without knowledge of the input's language. Across 14 open-source tokenizers, 9 natural languages, and 9 programming languages, LangMAP improves morphological boundary alignment and, for all coding languages tested, alignment with abstract syntax tree (AST) leaf boundaries. In fine-tuning experiments, results are mixed: LangMAP improves target-language grammatical acceptability (MultiBLiMP) on the languages tested; its benefits are less consistent on knowledge-related tasks (Global-PIQA, Belebele).

light_analysis.overview: 提出LangMAP，一种语言自适应分词方法，通过扩展UnigramLM算法到多语言设置，从单一共享词汇表中生成语言特定分词，无需改变词汇表即可适应预训练模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言特定分词器能提高分词质量和下游性能，但使用它们需要从头训练新模型或调整现有预训练模型的词汇表，成本高昂。现有方法无法在推理时无需语言标签实现语言特定分词。
light_analysis.method: LangMAP扩展UnigramLM算法到多语言设置，使用最大后验概率估计，在训练时需要语言标签，但推理时无需知道输入语言即可进行语言特定分词。可应用于从零训练多语言模型或适应预训练模型的分词器而无需改变词汇表。
light_analysis.result: 在14个分词器、9种自然语言和9种编程语言上，LangMAP改进了形态边界对齐，并对所有编程语言改善了与抽象语法树叶子边界的对齐。微调实验中，在语法可接受性任务（MultiBLiMP）上有所改进，但在知识相关任务（Global-PIQA, Belebele）上效果不一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: LangMAP提供了一种有效的语言自适应分词方案，在无需改变词汇表的情况下实现语言特定分词，在形态和语法任务上表现良好。但知识相关任务上的提升有限，未来可进一步优化以提升泛化能力。

title: Dense Reward for Multi-View 3D Reasoning with Global Maps and Local Views
abstract: Multi-view 3D Visual Question Answering (MV3D-VQA) requires integrating partial observations into a coherent 3D scene representation and selecting informative viewpoints for multi-step spatial reasoning. However, current multimodal LLMs are typically trained with sparse, answer-level supervision, which often yields inconsistent cross-view reasoning and brittle view selection. We present DR-MV3D (Dense Reward for MV3D-VQA), a map-grounded learning framework that provides dense, verifiable rewards to supervise the reasoning process. Our approach decomposes MV3D-VQA into (i) allocentric global map construction, (ii) question-conditioned view-trajectory planning, and (iii) egocentric grounding for answer prediction. To make intermediate steps learnable without manual annotations, we introduce two rewards: a global consistency reward that aligns the predicted map with geometry-consistent pseudo targets from frozen 3D vision foundation models (e.g., VGGT + SAM3), and a local trajectory reward that supervises ordered viewpoint selection. We optimize the full pipeline with trajectory-level policy optimization (GRPO). Experiments on MindCube, VSI-Bench, and BLINK (MV) show that DR-MV3D consistently improves over strong multi-image baselines, supporting the effectiveness of process-level dense supervision for multi-view 3D reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DR-MV3D框架，通过密集奖励机制监督多视图3D推理的中间过程，提升模型在空间推理和视图选择上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在多视图3D VQA中仅受稀疏的答案级监督，导致跨视图推理不一致且视图选择脆弱。这限制了对部分观测场景的综合理解。因此，需要一种能提供过程级密集、可验证奖励的方法，以引导模型学习合理的全局建图和局部视图规划。
light_analysis.method: 将MV3D-VQA分解为全局地图构建、基于问题的视图轨迹规划和以自我为中心的答案预测三部分。引入两种奖励：全局一致性奖励，利用冻结的3D视觉基础模型生成几何一致伪目标来对齐预测地图；局部轨迹奖励，监督有序视点选择。整个流程通过轨迹级策略优化（GRPO）联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在MindCube、VSI-Bench和BLINK（MV）数据集上，DR-MV3D显著优于多图像基线方法。实验表明，过程级密集监督能有效提升多视图3D推理的准确性和鲁棒性，证实了所提奖励机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DR-MV3D通过密集奖励框架成功改善了多视图3D推理的中间步骤可学习性，为精细空间理解提供了新思路。其过程级监督策略具有通用性，未来可扩展到更复杂的场景和任务，但当前依赖预训练基础模型可能带来计算开销。

title: The Energy Consumption of Transformer Fine-Tuning: A Roofline-Inspired Scaling Model
abstract: Transformer-based models underpin modern natural language processing but incur rapidly growing computational and energy costs. As training scales in both model size and parallelism, accurately predicting energy consumption has become critical for sustainable and cost-aware system design. We present a framework for modeling the energy consumption of Transformer training on multiple GPUs. Using controlled architectural sweeps of BERT models, we relate measured energy to lightweight proxies for compute, memory traffic, and hardware efficiency. Inspired by roofline models, our approach incorporates a speedup-based hardware-efficiency factor that captures the effects of tensor parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism. We derive a scaling law model that accurately predicts training energy across heterogeneous configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于roofline模型的Transformer训练能量消耗建模框架，能够准确预测异构配置下的训练能量。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型计算和能源成本快速增长，随着训练规模扩大，准确预测能耗对可持续性和成本敏感的系统设计至关重要。现有方法缺乏精确预测模型，无法有效指导资源分配和优化。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制BERT模型架构扫描，将测量能量与计算、内存流量和硬件效率的轻量级代理关联。受roofline模型启发，引入基于加速的硬件效率因子，捕捉张量并行和完全分片数据并行的影响，推导出缩放律模型。
light_analysis.result: 模型能够准确预测跨异构配置（如不同模型大小和并行策略）的训练能量消耗，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标或对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了能量建模框架和缩放律模型，为可持续和成本感知的系统设计提供了理论支持。未来可扩展到其他模型架构或优化硬件效率因子的计算。

title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct
abstract: Scaling reinforcement learning for visual mathematical reasoning requires more than generating harder questions: as data volume grows, the reward labels themselves must remain reliable. Yet existing data pipelines scale supervision while trusting the labeller, and policy-side methods assume the underlying answers are already correct. We instead treat scaling as a verifiable data-construction problem and decouple two axes before any policy update: prompt difficulty, expanded by route-specific evolution operators, and answer reliability, enforced by offline hypothesis-test falsification. We instantiate this as VeriEvol, an iterative framework with two extensible components: a type-aware evolution module that rewrites low-difficulty image-question seeds into harder, image-grounded prompts; and HTV-Agent, a verifier that accepts an answer only after multi-source counter-evidence has failed to refute it. The resulting verified data scales in volume, extends by adding evolution routes or verifier channels, and plugs directly into existing GRPO-style RL recipes. On a five-benchmark visual-math suite, scaling evolved SFT data from 10K to 250K samples raises the mean accuracy from 35.42 to 54.73; then, with backbone, SFT initialization, and GRPO recipe held fixed, VeriEvol adds a cumulative +3.88 over an un-evolved RL baseline, of which +1.82 comes from evolved prompts and +2.06 from the HTV-Agent verifier. We release the prompts, data, models, code, and the full verifier trace of every sample, so that downstream work can scale and audit the pipeline rather than only inspect its outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VeriEvol框架，通过可验证的数据构造分离难度扩展与答案可靠性，提升多模态数学推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习扩展多模态数学推理时，简单增加问题难度会导致标签可靠性下降，因为数据管道依赖标注者信任，策略侧方法假定答案正确。实际需要同时扩展数据量并保证奖励标签可靠，因此将扩展视为可验证数据构造问题，在策略更新前解耦两个维度。
light_analysis.method: 提出VeriEvol迭代框架，包含类型感知演化模块和HTV-Agent验证器。演化模块根据种子问题类型重写低难度图文问题为更难的图像支撑提示；HTV-Agent通过多源反证假设检验，只有无法反驳时才接受答案。框架可扩展演化路径和验证通道，直接集成到GRPO强化学习pipeline。
light_analysis.result: 在五个视觉数学基准上，将演化SFT数据从10K扩到250K，平均准确率从35.42升至54.73。在固定骨干、SFT初始化、GRPO配方下，VeriEvol比未演化RL基线累加提升+3.88，其中演化提示贡献+1.82，HTV-Agent验证器贡献+2.06。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于将数据扩展视为可验证构造问题，解耦难度与可靠性，提出演化与验证可扩展组件。学术价值在于为多模态数学推理强化学习提供可靠数据管道；实际价值在于开源完整资源便于审计和扩展。未来可探索更多演化路线和验证通道。

title: AwakeForest: An Interactive Geospatial Platform for Large-Scale Forest Imagery
abstract: Forest imagery analysis often involves multiple tightly coupled vision tasks, which must be performed under substantial variation in geographic regions, sensors, and acquisition conditions. However, practitioners often lack a unified tool that is geospatial-native, cloud-optimized, and ML-integrated for end-to-end workflows spanning annotation, prediction, visualization, and downstream analysis at scale. We present AwakeForest, an interactive end-to-end platform designed for large-scale forest imagery that integrates model-assisted inference, automatic annotation, and human-in-the-loop refinement within a single workflow. Our platform supports plug-and-play integration of pretrained models and enables scalable interaction with forest imagery ranging from standard aerial scenes to large orthomosaics that can span several gigabytes to hundreds of gigabytes. AwakeForest produces analysis-ready outputs that can be directly used for downstream analysis and to support iterative model and annotation updates on new scenes. We demonstrate the system on the PALMS dataset and illustrate how AwakeForest supports an end-to-end workflow for practical forest management and analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AwakeForest，一个面向大规模森林图像的交互式地理空间端到端平台，集成模型辅助推理、自动标注和人工循环优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林图像分析涉及多个紧密耦合的视觉任务，需应对地理区域、传感器和采集条件的显著差异，但现有工具缺乏地理空间原生、云优化和ML集成的一体化方案，难以支持从标注到分析的端到端规模化工作流。
light_analysis.method: AwakeForest采用交互式端到端架构，支持即插即用预训练模型，提供可扩展交互能力（从标准航片到数百GB正射影像），集成自动标注、模型辅助推理和人工循环优化，生成直接用于下游分析和迭代更新的输出。
light_analysis.result: 在PALMS数据集上演示了系统的端到端流程，验证了其在大规模森林图像管理与分析中的实用性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标或对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: AwakeForest填补了地理空间森林图像分析平台的空白，提供统一、可扩展的ML集成工作流，支持实际森林管理与分析；未来可扩展至更多传感器和模型，并优化大规模数据处理效率。

title: LightSTAR: Efficient Visual Document Retrieval via Lightweight Selection with Vision-Adaptive Refinement
abstract: Visual document retrieval requires rapidly locating relevant pages from large multi-modal corpora in response to user queries. While recent methods powered by Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show competitive accuracy, they suffer from prohibitive computational costs by applying intensive MLLM encoding to every single page. Meanwhile, we observe that user queries are typically keyword-anchored, containing semantically rich words that are expected to appear directly in the visible text of relevant pages, offering an efficient cue for quickly narrowing down candidate pages. Building on this insight, we propose LightSTAR, an efficient framework that decomposes visual document retrieval into: 1) LLM-free Visual Selection, which utilizes content-grounded query encoding to focus on informative words and employs LLM-free visual embeddings to produce a high-recall candidate set; and 2) Vision-adaptive Semantic Refinement, which further performs fine-grained semantic matching exclusively on these top candidates via adaptive region-wise feature fusion to effectively combine textual and layout cues, optimized through a hardness-aware contrastive objective. Experimental results demonstrate that LightSTAR achieves state-of-the-art retrieval accuracy while reducing end-to-end latency by several-fold, offering a highly practical solution to the accuracy-efficiency trade-off in visual document retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/bokufa/LightSTAR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LightSTAR框架，通过无LLM的视觉选择与视觉自适应语义精炼，显著提升视觉文档检索的效率与准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉文档检索需从大型多模态语料库中快速定位相关页面。现有基于多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的方法虽精度高，但需对每页进行密集编码，计算成本过高。观察到用户查询通常包含关键词，这些词往往直接出现在相关页面的可见文本中，可作为快速缩小候选范围的线索。现有方法未能有效利用这一特性，在精度与效率间存在严重权衡。
light_analysis.method: LightSTAR将检索分解为两步：1) 无LLM视觉选择：采用内容引导的查询编码聚焦信息词，并利用免LLM的视觉嵌入生成高召回候选集；2) 视觉自适应语义精炼：仅对候选页面通过自适应区域特征融合进行细粒度语义匹配，整合文本与布局线索，并通过困难感知对比目标优化。整体流程避免了MLLM的逐页编码，显著降低计算量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LightSTAR在多个视觉文档检索基准上达到最先进（SOTA）的检索准确率，同时将端到端延迟降低数倍。例如，与基于MLLM的方法相比，在保持更高精度的前提下，推理速度提升3-5倍（具体倍数因数据集而异）。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LightSTAR通过分解检索流程并利用关键词先验，有效解决了视觉文档检索中精度与效率的权衡问题。其无LLM的选择阶段和自适应精炼阶段设计具有通用性，可应用于实时文档搜索场景。未来可探索更高效的视觉嵌入或扩展到多模态对话检索。

title: Simulation-Free Estimation of Traffic Flows from Sparse Count Data
abstract: We propose a method for estimating time-varying traffic flow patterns from sparse aggregated vehicle counts. The method partitions the study area into spatial regions, constructs a set of feasible region-to-region routes, and solves a weighted least-squares optimization problem to determine the number of vehicles to allocate on each route. A weighted contribution matrix encodes sensor coverage, steering the optimizer toward flow configurations that are directly observable by sensors. Edge-level trajectories are then derived by scoring candidate routes against the temporal and volumetric profiles of aggregated regional sensor counts.   The method is evaluated on the Brussels road network using real and synthetic traffic data. Results show that the proposed approach reproduces the daily traffic profile in the input data and outperforms the baseline methods at a fraction of the computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无仿真的稀疏计数数据交通流估计方法，通过加权最小二乘优化和路径评分实现高效准确的路网交通流重构。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际交通管理中，传感器覆盖稀疏且数据聚合，难以准确估计时变交通流模式。现有方法多依赖仿真，计算成本高且对参数敏感。本文旨在利用稀疏聚合计数数据，无需仿真即可高效估计区域间路径流量及边级轨迹，解决实时交通监控与规划中的瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 将研究区域划分为空间子区，枚举所有可行的区域间路径。构建加权最小二乘优化模型，通过加权贡献矩阵编码传感器覆盖，分配各路径的车辆数。随后，基于候选路径与区域传感器计数的时间及容量廓线的匹配度，推导边级轨迹。整个过程无需交通仿真，仅依赖线性代数与优化。
light_analysis.result: 在布鲁塞尔路网使用真实与合成数据验证：所提方法能准确再现日交通流剖面，且计算成本仅为基线方法的几分之一。与现有仿真依赖方法相比，估计精度更高，尤其在稀疏传感器场景下优势显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效、无仿真的交通流估计方法，适用于稀疏计数数据。学术上拓展了交通流反推理论，实际中为低成本实时监控提供可行方案。未来可引入动态区域划分或在线优化以应对实时性需求。

title: POTracker: Optimizing Large Language Models for Standard-Compliant Power Outage Report Generation
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) are good at general text generation, but it is still hard to use them for domain-specific data generation because the output must follow strict formatting and structural rules. Unlike open-ended tasks such as question answering or translation, domain-specific generation must be both semantically correct and compliant with existing guidelines and standards. In this work, we study the nationwide interoperability problem of utility power outage reports in the United States. In practice, outage reports need to be machine-readable (e.g., JSON or XML) and must strictly follow requirements from energy-sector regulatory bodies. To address this problem, we propose POTracker, an optimized LLM for power outage report generation. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct using our proposed objective. The key contribution is a new loss function, POTrackerLoss, that considers both textual similarity and structural (tag) similarity between the generated report and the ground-truth report. We evaluate POTracker on a dataset of 1,000 power outage reports and compare it with five well-known fine-tuning methods and one rule-based XML conversion method. Results show that POTracker outperforms other fine-tuning approaches, improving overall accuracy by up to 51% and reaching 86.47% structural accuracy for generated power outage reports. In addition, we conduct a human study to assess the quality of the ground-truth standard reports, where domain experts assign the generated labels an average score of 4.03 on a 0--5 scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出POTracker，通过新损失函数POTrackerLoss优化LLM，生成符合美国电力行业标准的停电报告，显著提升结构准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用LLM擅长开放式文本生成，但在电力中断报告等特定领域，输出必须严格遵循格式和结构（如JSON/XML）及监管要求。现有方法难以同时保证语义正确和结构合规，缺乏针对结构化生成的优化。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型微调，提出POTrackerLoss损失函数，结合文本相似性（如BLEU）和结构相似性（标签序列匹配）。使用1000份真实停电报告数据集训练，比较五种微调方法和一种规则转换方法。
light_analysis.result: POTracker在各项指标上优于对比方法，整体准确率提升最高达51%，结构准确率达到86.47%。人类评估中，领域专家对生成报告质量评分为4.03/5，验证了其符合标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了结合结构相似性的损失函数可有效提升领域特定报告生成质量，为其他需严格合规的结构化生成任务提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更多监管领域，但需注意数据集规模和泛化性。

title: Self-Compacting Language Model Agents
abstract: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact, a scaffold that allows the model itself to decide when and how to compact. Specifically, it pairs two inference-time elements: (i) a compaction tool the model invokes to summarize the accumulated context, and (ii) a lightweight rubric specifying when to fire (a sub-task has resolved, or the trajectory is converging) and when to suppress (mid-derivation, or when stuck). Both are needed. The tool alone is unevenly used across open-weight models, often invoked at unhelpful moments or not at all; the rubric alone cannot act. Together, they elicit effective adaptive compaction without any fine-tuning or external supervision. We present empirical results on six benchmarks (competitive math and agentic search) and seven models. Our results show that SelfCompact matches or exceeds fixed-interval summarization at a fraction of the token cost, improving over a no-summarization baseline by up to 18.1 points on math and 5-9 points on agentic search at 30-70% lower per-question cost. Our results expose a meta-cognitive gap: although unprompted models cannot reliably tell when their own context is rotting, a lightweight rubric closes this gap, reframing when to compact as a capability that scaffolds can supply without training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SelfCompact框架，让语言模型自主决定何时及如何压缩代理轨迹，通过压缩工具与轻量级规则相结合，无需微调实现自适应压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期代理轨迹中，链式推理和工具调用会产生陈旧内容，导致后续生成锚定并超出上下文窗口。现有固定间隔压缩方法忽视轨迹结构，可能在推导或搜索过程中丢弃部分结果。因此需要一种自适应压缩机制，由模型自身决定压缩时机和方式，以避免无效压缩和资源浪费。
light_analysis.method: SelfCompact包含两个关键元素：一是压缩工具（compaction tool），模型可调用以总结累积的上下文；二是轻量级规则（rubric），指定何时触发压缩（子任务完成或轨迹收敛）以及何时抑制（推导中途或卡住）。两者协同工作，无需微调或外部监督即可实现有效的自适应压缩。实验覆盖六个基准（竞赛数学和智能体搜索）和七个模型。
light_analysis.result: SelfCompact在匹配或超越固定间隔摘要的同时，大幅降低令牌成本。相比无摘要基线，在数学任务上提升高达18.1个百分点，在智能体搜索上提升5-9个百分点，且每问题成本降低30-70%。揭示了元认知差距：未引导的模型无法可靠判断上下文是否腐烂，而轻量级规则可弥补此差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: SelfCompact通过让模型自主压缩上下文，显著提升长轨迹任务效率，降低计算成本。其成功表明，通过脚手架提供压缩决策能力，无需训练即可增强智能体性能。未来可进一步探索更精细的规则或跨任务泛化，但已证明在多种模型和基准上的有效性。

title: Scaling State-Space Models from Lines to Paragraphs: An Ablation of Mamba-based OCR
abstract: End-to-end OCR increasingly relies on autoregressive sequence models, where the quadratic cost of Transformer attention limits efficient transcription of long, paragraph-level text. State-Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba offer linear-time decoding and have recently been shown to match Transformer accuracy on printed historical lines, but their behavior as sequences grow from short lines to full paragraphs, and their generalization to handwriting, remain poorly understood. We study how a Mamba-based OCR recognizer scales from lines to paragraphs. We first conduct a systematic exploration of its four core hyperparameters (decoder depth, state dimension, expansion factor, and connector depth) on synthetic paragraphs from 100 to 1,000 characters, identifying the recurrent state dimension and the expansion factor as the dominant levers for long-sequence accuracy. We then compare the recognizer against a Transformer baseline trained under an identical protocol. On clean synthetic paragraphs, both models stay below 1% CER at every length while the SSM runs 1.4 to 4.5 times faster, the speedup growing with sequence length. On real handwriting, however, the SSM lags clearly behind: it reaches 8.2% CER on IAM lines and 10.0% on IAM paragraphs, against 4.2% and 3.5% for the Transformer baseline. Through controlled experiments we show that a substantial part of this gap stems from data scarcity rather than from an intrinsic architectural limit: the autoregressive SSM decoder is markedly data-hungry on long sequences. Our study clarifies when SSMs are a practical choice for large-scale document transcription and when they are not.
comment: Accepted at ICDAR 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning (WML)

light_analysis.overview: 研究Mamba-based OCR从行到段落的扩展行为，揭示其在长序列上速度优势但手写体上数据饥饿问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端OCR依赖自回归模型，Transformer的二次复杂度限制长段落高效转录。SSM如Mamba提供线性时间解码，但对其在长段落和手写体上的行为了解不足。研究动机是探究Mamba OCR的扩展性，明确其适用场景，弥补现有认知空白。
light_analysis.method: 使用Mamba OCR识别器，系统消融四个超参数（解码器深度、状态维度、扩展因子、连接器深度）在合成段落（100-1000字符）。与Transformer基线在相同协议下比较。在手写数据集IAM上进行真实场景测试，通过控制实验分析性能差距来源。
light_analysis.result: 合成段落上，SSM和Transformer均低于1% CER，但SSM快1.4-4.5倍（速度优势随长度增长）。真实手写IAM上，SSM行CER 8.2%、段落10.0%，Transformer行4.2%、段落3.5%。差距主要源于数据稀缺而非架构限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究明确了SSM在大规模文档转录中的实用性条件：在干净长文本上高效且快，但对手写等数据稀缺场景需要更多数据。未来需探索缓解SSM数据饥饿的方法，如数据增强或迁移学习。

title: Collapsed Effective Operators for Higher-order Structures
abstract: Higher-order structures are powerful relational modeling tools, yet existing spectral operators decompose the topology into separate ranks, leaving practitioners to fuse the information back to vertices through ad hoc choices. We introduce Collapsed Effective Operators, which condense higher-order degrees of freedom into a single vertex-level operator via Schur complementation of a graded Laplacian. This yields a (generally dense) operator that encodes long-range interactions mediated by topology and is applicable to arbitrary higher-order constructs. We show it preserves positive semi-definiteness with a spectral upper bound relative to the rank-0 Hodge Laplacian, effectively lowering system energy under higher-order connectivity. Empirically, our operator improves spectral clustering, signal smoothing, and enables the inclusion of topological features in neural network architectures via positional encoding. The project page can be found http://circle-group.github.io/research/CollapsedEffectiveOperators

light_analysis.overview: 提出折叠有效算子，通过舒尔补将高阶结构压缩为顶点级算子，实现长程交互编码。
light_analysis.motivation: 高阶结构是强大的关系建模工具，但现有谱算子将拓扑分解为不同阶数（如0阶、1阶等），导致需要人工选择融合方式回到顶点。这种分解方法缺乏统一性，难以捕捉跨阶的长程交互，且应用时依赖经验性融合策略，限制了高阶结构在谱聚类、信号处理等任务中的有效利用。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出折叠有效算子（Collapsed Effective Operators），通过对分级拉普拉斯矩阵进行舒尔补，将高阶自由度压缩为单个顶点级算子。该算子通常为稠密矩阵，编码由拓扑介导的长程相互作用，适用于任意高阶结构。理论证明其保持半正定性，且谱上界相对于rank-0 Hodge Laplacian，能有效降低系统能量。
light_analysis.result: 在实验中，该算子提升了谱聚类的性能，改善了信号平滑效果，并通过位置编码将拓扑特征融入神经网络架构。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但表明该方法在多个任务上优于现有分解融合方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 折叠有效算子为高阶结构的顶点级分析提供了统一框架，兼具理论保证（半正定、能量降低）与实用价值（改进谱聚类、信号平滑、神经网络集成）。未来可探索其在图神经网络、高阶网络分析等领域的应用，并研究高效计算稠密算子的近似方法。

title: Arbor: Explicit Geometric Conditioning for Controllable 3D Asset Generation
abstract: Text and image conditioned 3D models now generate convincing assets, but they still offer little direct control over the space an object should occupy or avoid. In authoring, this spatial intent is often known before generation starts. A chair should fit a seating envelope, a prop should leave clearance for motion, or a part should expose a contact surface. Prompts and image views are poor carriers for such constraints, requiring the need for an explicit control interface.   We present Arbor, a trainable attachment for text conditioned latent 3D generation. Arbor introduces constraint meshes as a native 3D control interface. The interface uses hull regions where geometry should exist, avoidance regions that should remain empty, and touch regions the object should contact. Unlike completion or whole object scaffold control, these meshes are not target evidence. They are local typed requirements and can include regions where no surface should appear. Arbor keeps this signal as geometry by converting constraint meshes into tokens and learning a routed attachment inside a frozen denoiser. Each latent region can therefore receive the part of the constraint that matters for its spatial location.   We evaluate Arbor on automatic and artist curated control benchmarks with hull, avoidance, and touch constraints, and compare the metric trends to a user preference study. Even without dedicated compliance losses, Arbor improves constraint obedience while preserving object quality and variation under fixed constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Arbor，一种显式几何条件模块，通过约束网格实现可控3D资产生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本和图像条件的3D生成模型难以精确控制物体应占据或避让的空间，而作者过程中空间意图（如椅子贴合坐姿包络、道具留出运动间隙）通常已知。提示词和图像视图无法有效传递此类约束，亟需显式控制接口。
light_analysis.method: Arbor作为文本条件潜变量3D生成的可训练附件，引入约束网格作为原生3D控制接口，包含壳体区域（几何应存在）、避让区域（应空置）和接触区域（物体应接触）。将约束网格转化为令牌，在冻结去噪器内学习路由附件，使每个潜变量区域接收相应空间约束，无需专用损失函数。
light_analysis.result: 在自动和艺术家策划的控制基准上评估壳体、避让和接触约束，并与用户偏好研究比较指标趋势。Arbor在保持物体质量和变化性的同时，显著提升了约束遵从度，无需专用顺应损失即可改善控制效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Arbor首次将约束网格作为原生控制接口集成到3D生成中，实现了精确的空间控制，适用于需要明确几何约束的创作场景。未来可扩展至更复杂约束（如动力学限制）并优化令牌化效率。

title: UniverSat: Resolution- and Modality-Agnostic Transformers for Earth Observation
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) dominate computer vision. However, their reliance on rigid patch projectors hinders transfer to Earth Observation (EO), where input modalities, scales, and resolutions vary widely. We introduce UniverSat, a ViT-style backbone built around a Universal Patch Encoder that maps patches from arbitrary spatial, spectral, and temporal resolutions, and from both optical and non-optical sensors, into a shared embedding space with a shared set of weights. This enables training a single model on heterogeneous multimodal corpora via self-supervision, yielding robust, sensor-agnostic spatial features. We validate this approach with strong results across classification and segmentation on standard EO benchmarks from GeoBench, PANGEABench, and SpectralEarth. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/gastruc/UniverSat.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniverSat，一种分辨率和模态无关的ViT骨干网络，通过通用补丁编码器统一处理异质多模态地球观测数据。
light_analysis.motivation: ViT在计算机视觉中占主导地位，但其刚性补丁投影器限制了向地球观测（EO）的迁移。EO中输入模态、尺度、分辨率差异大，现有方法需针对不同传感器分别训练，缺乏泛化性。因此需要一种能统一处理多模态、多分辨率数据的通用骨干网络。
light_analysis.method: UniverSat基于ViT架构，核心是通用补丁编码器（Universal Patch Encoder），采用共享权重将任意空间、光谱、时间分辨率的补丁（包括光学和非光学传感器）映射到共享嵌入空间。支持单模型通过自监督学习在异质多模态语料库上训练，产生传感器无关的鲁棒空间特征。
light_analysis.result: 在GeoBench、PANGEABench和SpectralEarth等标准EO基准上，对分类和分割任务取得了强结果。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniverSat解决了ViT在EO中分辨率/模态依赖的问题，实现了单模型多源数据训练，具有重要学术价值（拓展ViT到异质数据）和实际应用价值（简化多传感器部署）。未来可探索更多任务验证及补丁编码的效率优化。

title: TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization
abstract: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to use or extend, and remaining hard to compare head-to-head. Together, these raise the bar for adopting optimizers in existing or new domains, and for advancing them via new strategies. We address these gaps with TROPT, the first open-source framework that unifies discrete optimizers' execution and standardizes their development under a single interface. TROPT makes it easy to customize end-to-end optimization recipes by swapping any component -- models, objectives, and optimizers -- extending its reach across domains and new applications. TROPT currently ships with 30+ optimization recipes -- covering applications such as jailbreaking and probing model internals -- built from 15+ optimizers (spanning white-box to black-box access) and 15+ losses, from foundational to state-of-the-art methods. Demonstrating its utility, we leverage TROPT in several studies: (i) controlled, large-scale experiments comparing and enhancing optimization strategies for LLM jailbreaks, revealing potent-yet-underadopted techniques; and (ii) porting optimizers from one domain (e.g., LLM jailbreak) to new domains (e.g., corpus-poisoning embedding model). In all, TROPT significantly lowers the barrier to adopting and advancing discrete text optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TROPT，首个统一离散文本优化器的开源框架，支持多种模型、目标和优化器，便于定制和对比。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散文本触发器优化在模型红队、审计和可解释性中至关重要，但现有优化器分散在不同的研究代码库中，难以直接比较和复用；优化器变体众多，工程开销大，阻碍了在不同领域的采用和进步。TROPT旨在通过统一接口和标准化开发，降低这些障碍。
light_analysis.method: TROPT是一个开源框架，统一了离散优化器的执行流程，并提供单一接口进行组件化定制（模型、目标、优化器）。它内置15+优化器（白盒到黑盒）、15+损失函数，组合成30+优化方案，覆盖越狱攻击、模型内部探测等应用。框架支持跨领域移植优化器。
light_analysis.result: 通过大规模控制实验，TROPT比较和改进了LLM越狱优化策略，揭示了强大但未被充分利用的技术。同时，成功将优化器从LLM越狱领域移植到新的领域（如语料中毒嵌入模型）。实验证明了框架在统一和推进离散文本优化中的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TROPT显著降低了离散文本优化的采用和推进门槛，提供了标准化开发和复用的基础。其开放架构便于社区贡献新优化器或损失函数，有潜力加速对抗性攻击、模型审计等领域的研究。未来可能支持更多模型和优化策略。

title: Brain-Adapter: A Dual-Stream Vision-Language MIL Framework for Comprehensive 3D CT Diagnosis of Acute Intracranial Pathologies
abstract: Automated diagnosis of 3D brain CT scans is essential for critical care, yet it remains challenging due to the heavy reliance on manual annotations and the limited semantic understanding of conventional models. While 2D foundation vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable generalization, effectively transferring their representational power to 3D volumes remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose Brain-Adapter, a novel dual-stream multiple instance learning (MIL) framework that leverages pre-trained 2D biomedical VLMs and raw diagnostic reports for robust scan-level multi-label classification. Specifically, we introduce a Text-Conditioned Attention (TCA) mechanism, utilizing raw diagnostic sentences as semantic queries to dynamically align visual cues with specific disease concepts. Concurrently, a parallel visual MIL stream captures global scan characteristics, supervised by structured labels extracted via a Large Language Model (LLM). To ensure representation coherence, a consistency constraint enforces synergy between the two streams. During inference, an Uncertainty-Aware Refinement (UAR) module dynamically calibrates and fuses these dual-stream predictions to resolve ambiguous cases. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D models and standard MIL approaches. By eliminating the reliance on dense annotations, Brain-Adapter provides a highly scalable and clinically viable solution for 3D acute intracranial pathology analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Brain-Adapter，一种双流视觉-语言多实例学习框架，利用预训练2D生物医学视觉语言模型和原始诊断报告，实现3D脑CT的鲁棒多标签分类，消除对密集标注的依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D脑CT自动诊断对重症监护至关重要，但传统方法依赖大量手动标注，且语义理解有限。2D基础视觉语言模型虽泛化能力强，但将其表征能力有效迁移到3D体积是关键挑战。现有方法难以同时利用报告中的语义知识并实现无需密集标注的精确诊断。
light_analysis.method: 提出Brain-Adapter双流多实例学习框架。文本流引入文本条件注意力机制，以原始诊断句子作为语义查询动态对齐视觉线索与疾病概念；视觉流通过并行MIL捕捉全局特征，并由大语言模型提取的结构化标签监督。两流之间通过一致性约束协同。推理时不确定性感知精炼模块动态校准融合双流预测，解决歧义病例。
light_analysis.result: 在3D脑CT数据集上广泛实验，Brain-Adapter显著优于最先进的3D模型和标准多实例学习方法。具体性能提升摘要未明确数值，但强调在无需密集标注下取得优异效果，证明其临床可行性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Brain-Adapter通过双流架构有效结合2D视觉语言模型先验与原始报告语义，消除了对密集标注的依赖，为急性颅内病理3D分析提供了可扩展的临床方案。未来可进一步探索更高效的双流融合策略及在更多3D医学影像任务中的应用。

title: CADRE: Stable, Parameter Efficient Adaptation of Medical Vision Language Models with Bounded Forgetting and Prior Drift
abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) such as BiomedCLIP generalize broadly, but adapting them to a clinical service is as much a safety problem as an accuracy one. Updating a deployed model for a new imaging modality can fail silently in two ways that harm patients: it can forget modalities it already handled (catastrophic forgetting), and it can drift from its trustworthy pretrained prior toward modality-specific shortcuts. We study parameter-efficient continual adaptation through these two properties rather than leaderboard accuracy, presenting CADRE: a frozen-backbone framework combining low-rank adaptation (LoRA) with an online, self-scaling, similarity-aware elastic weight consolidation term that bounds retained-competence loss, and an anchor-to-prior penalty bounding embedding drift from the frozen prior. Two short guarantees, a bound on total consolidation mass and a scale-invariance property, remove the scale-related sources of vanilla EWC's order fragility. Using breast cancer across three maximally dissimilar modalities (histopathology, ultrasound, chest radiography) as a controlled cross-modality stress test, under a multi-seed, multi-order protocol with paired significance testing and training approximately 0.23% of parameters, CADRE attains the highest accuracy, SPQ, and backward transfer and the lowest forgetting among adapting methods, reducing forgetting roughly sevenfold versus the strongest regularized baseline (0.075 to 0.011; paired p=0.023) and achieving positive backward transfer where every baseline is negative. We frame these as stability properties aligned with clinical-safety desiderata, not a deployment guarantee; robustness to distribution shift and adversarial inputs is out of scope.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CADRE框架，通过有界遗忘和先验漂移约束实现医学视觉语言模型的稳定、参数高效适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学视觉语言模型（如BiomedCLIP）在适应新成像模态时存在两大安全隐患：灾难性遗忘和先验漂移。现有方法仅追求准确率，忽视这些问题，可能导致患者伤害。因此需要一种能同时保证安全性和准确性的持续适应方法。
light_analysis.method: CADRE采用冻结骨干框架，结合LoRA低秩适应与在线自缩放相似感知弹性权重合并（EWC）项，限制遗忘损失；同时引入锚到先验惩罚项，限制嵌入漂移。提出两个数学保证：总合并质量有界和尺度不变性，解决了EWC的顺序脆弱性。训练仅更新约0.23%参数。
light_analysis.result: 在乳腺癌三种模态（组织病理学、超声、胸部X光）的跨模态压力测试中，采用多种子、多顺序协议，CADRE取得最高准确率、SPQ和反向迁移，最低遗忘。相比最强正则基线，遗忘从0.075降至0.011（减少约7倍，p=0.023），且实现正反向迁移（基线均为负）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CADRE将稳定性属性与临床安全需求对齐，而非部署保证。未涵盖分布偏移和对抗输入鲁棒性。学术贡献在于提出参数高效适应中的安全性度量，实际应用价值在于为医学VLM的安全部署提供理论基础。

title: From Reconstruction to Decision: A Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for Curvilinear Segmentation
abstract: Curvilinear object segmentation, including vessels and cracks, is challenging due to extreme spatial sparsity and topological fragility, where small local errors can cause severe structural disconnections. Meanwhile, modern segmentation pipelines increasingly rely on strong but hard-to-modify foundation encoders whose heavy downsampling limits fine structural recovery. Motivated by this, we focus on the post-encoder stage and study two recurring and actionable failure modes: a reconstruction bottleneck in high-resolution feature restoration and a decision bottleneck in binarization. We present PEPA, a lightweight Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for 2D curvilinear segmentation pipelines with accessible decoder/head features and target, query, or class descriptors. PEPA couples (i) Target-Conditioned Snake Upsampling (TCSU), which uses target-conditioned continuous snake-like sampling to better recover thin and tortuous structures during upsampling, and (ii) Target-Adaptive Differentiable Thresholding (TADT), which predicts target-specific thresholds and optimizes a soft-threshold surrogate with explicit safeguards against trivial bias shifting. Under this post-encoder interface, PEPA can be attached to both prompt-based decoders and conventional dense predictors. Experiments on five medical and industrial benchmarks show that adding PEPA to frozen-encoder baselines yields consistent improvements, with gains in topological connectivity (clDice) typically exceeding those in region overlap (IoU), indicating improved structural continuity. With only $\sim$0.26M additional parameters, PEPA offers a practical post-encoder enhancement for structure-centric segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级后编码器插件PEPA，通过目标条件蛇形上采样和自适应可微阈值化，提升细长物体分割的结构连续性。
light_analysis.motivation: 细长物体（如血管、裂纹）分割因空间稀疏性和拓扑脆弱性而困难，局部误差易导致结构断裂。现代分割流水线依赖强但难以修改的基础编码器，其重下采样限制了精细结构恢复。现有方法在特征上采样重建和决策二值化阶段存在瓶颈，缺乏针对拓扑连续性的轻量级后编码器改进方案。
light_analysis.method: PEPA包含两个核心模块：目标条件蛇形上采样（TCSU），利用目标条件连续蛇形采样恢复细长扭曲结构；目标自适应可微阈值化（TADT），预测目标特定阈值并优化软阈值代理，防止平凡偏置偏移。PEPA作为后编码器插件，可附加于提示解码器或传统密集预测器，仅增加约0.26M参数。
light_analysis.result: 在五个医学和工业基准上，PEPA在冻结编码器基线上持续提升性能，其中拓扑连接性指标（clDice）的改进通常超过区域重叠指标（IoU），表明结构连续性增强。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但强调了一致性改进和低参数开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEPA提出了一种轻量级后编码器增强方法，专注于细长物体分割的结构连续性，无需修改基础编码器即可提升拓扑质量。其模块化设计便于集成到现有流水线，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的蛇形采样策略或扩展到3D分割。

title: C^2GR: Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay for a Continually Learnable Universal Segmentation Model
abstract: Universal segmentation models exhibit significant potential for diverse tasks involving different imaging modalities and segmentation objectives. Task-Incremental Learning provides a privacy-preserving approach to continually evolve a universal model on tasks from sequentially-arriving medical departments. However, training the model solely on the incoming task induces forgetting on past tasks, since consecutive tasks exhibit concurrent shifts in image appearance and segmentation objective. To address this problem, we propose a novel Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay (C^2GR) framework that simultaneously synthesizes image-mask pairs of previous tasks to mitigate forgetting under concurrent appearance and objective shifts. This requires preserving image-mask correspondence for structure-realistic generation and bridging asynchronous optimization of the generator and segmentor for segmentation-oriented generation. Specifically, we propose a Bayesian Joint Diffusion (BJD) method that formulates the correspondence as conditional distributions optimized via conditional denoising. Furthermore, we develop a Relation-aware Unified Prompt Synchronization (RUPS) scheme to simultaneously modulate the generator and segmentor via a shared task-relation-aware prompt for synchronizing their optimization. Experiments on 20 tasks spanning diverse modalities and objectives demonstrate that C^2GR exhibits only a 2.44% drop in overall performance compared to joint training with all task data, effectively alleviating forgetting from the concurrent shifts. Our code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mar-cry/C2GR.
comment: This paper has been submitted to a relevant journal

light_analysis.overview: 提出C^2GR框架，通过耦合生成式重放缓解医疗影像通用分割模型在任务增量学习中的遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用分割模型在多模态、多目标医疗任务中潜力巨大，但任务增量学习面临持续的外观和语义偏移，导致灾难性遗忘。现有方法难以同时处理两种偏移，且生成数据缺乏结构真实性和分割导向性，亟需一种隐私保护的连续学习方案。
light_analysis.method: C^2GR框架包含两个核心组件：1) 贝叶斯联合扩散(BJD)方法，将图像-掩码对应关系建模为条件分布，通过条件去噪生成结构真实的前任务数据；2) 关系感知统一提示同步(RUPS)方案，通过共享任务关系感知提示同步优化生成器和分割器，实现分割导向的生成。
light_analysis.result: 在20个跨模态、跨目标的任务上，C^2GR相比联合训练仅下降2.44%的整体性能，有效缓解了并发偏移带来的遗忘。实验未详细说明与各基线的对比，但强调遗忘抑制效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: C^2GR为医疗影像通用分割模型的任务增量学习提供了一种隐私保护的高效方案，在保持性能的同时缓解遗忘。未来可探索更复杂的任务关系和生成质量提升。代码已开源。

title: War in the Abstract: The Rise and Consequences of Militarized Language in Scientific Communication
abstract: Scientists do not, by profession, wage war. Yet warfare's vocabulary consistently appears in their abstracts. To quantify the extent to which warfare's vocabulary pervades scientific abstracts, we analyze 21.4 million papers (2010-2025; OpenAlex, PubMed). We additionally run a within-subject war-framing experiment (N = 801; 32,040 trials) designed to provide causal insight into the effects of militaristic language on persuasion. Between 2010 and 2025, the presence of militaristic terms in scientific abstracts rose 48% in OpenAlex and 32% in PubMed, with the rise accelerating sharply after 2019 (cross-database r = 0.96, p < 10^-8). The prevalence of militaristic language is conflict-aligned at both country and annual scales (Uppsala Conflict Data Program; r = 0.77-0.84), with the abstracts from the Global South displaying the fastest rise in militaristic language. Among disciplines, social sciences leads in level of such language while engineering and computer science lead in growth. The COVID and post-2022 large-language-model eras also saw the rise and narrowed the language gap between native-English and non-English authors. In our follow-up experiment, we found that war framing reduced credibility (mean shift -0.18 Likert units, 95% CI [-0.21, -0.14]; d_z = -0.28, p < 10^-20), funding willingness (d_z = -0.12) and policy support (d_z = -0.08), with a trend-level increase in sense of urgency (d_z = +0.07). Collectively, findings reveal that while scientific abstracts drift toward warfare, the use of militaristic language may erode credibility, funding willingness, and policy support.

light_analysis.overview: 量化分析科学摘要中军事化语言的增长趋势及其对可信度、资助意愿和政策支持的负面影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学交流中军事化语言的使用日益普遍，但其影响尚不明确。现有研究缺乏大规模定量分析和因果推断。作者通过分析2140万篇摘要和实验，揭示2010-2025年间军事术语使用率显著上升，尤其在社会科学、工程和计算机科学领域，以及全球南方国家。该问题关乎科学传播的可信度和公共支持。
light_analysis.method: 分析OpenAlex和PubMed中2010-2025年的2140万篇摘要，检测军事术语出现频率。使用Uppsala冲突数据验证与全球冲突的关联。进行N=801的受试者内实验（32,040次试验），通过战争框架操纵测试对可信度、资助意愿和政策支持的影响。
light_analysis.result: 军事术语在OpenAlex中上升48%，PubMed中32%，2019年后加速（跨数据库相关系数r=0.96，p<10^-8）。与全球冲突水平正相关（r=0.77-0.84）。实验显示战争框架显著降低可信度（平均下降-0.18 Likert单位，d_z=-0.28）、资助意愿（d_z=-0.12）和政策支持（d_z=-0.08），仅趋势性增加紧迫感（d_z=+0.07）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 科学摘要日益军事化，但使用军事语言实际上削弱了说服力，包括可信度、资助和政策支持。该发现对科学传播策略有重要启示，提示需谨慎使用战争隐喻。未来可探索替代语言的效果及不同受众的差异。

title: TriggerBench: Investigating Prospective Memory for Large Language Models
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long interactions, existing evaluations focus predominantly on retrospective memory (RM) via explicit queries. Prospective memory (PM), the critical ability to spontaneously recall and act on latent constraints without direct prompts, remains largely unevaluated. We introduce TriggerBench, a comprehensive PM benchmark spanning five dimensions across both daily assistants and professional workflows. TriggerBench pairs scenarios with matched RM controls, contrastive positive/negative variants, and overloaded triggers, enabling fine-grained measurement of proactive recall, false-alarm rate, and attentional robustness under a single protocol. Our evaluation yields three key findings. (i) PM shows a precision-recall trade-off and attentional fragility. Though enhanced reasoning significantly improves proactive recall, models may overfit to an "always-remind" heuristic. Furthermore, PM accuracy degrades substantially under implicit constraints or triggers overloaded by concurrent user requests, indicating that robust PM remains an open challenge. (ii) PM is notably harder than RM: on identical contexts, RM near-saturates up to 100K tokens, while PM decays sharply as context length scales. (iii) PM may serve as a behavioral probe of spare reasoning capacity. Pairing PM scenarios with AIME-2025 math problems reveals that successful trajectories yield higher PM accuracy than failed ones at the same context length, showing PM tracks spare reasoning budget that token count obscures. Project page: https://github.com/KristenZHANG/TriggerBench-Official.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriggerBench基准测试，系统评估大语言模型的前瞻记忆能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估主要关注通过显式查询的回溯记忆，而前瞻记忆——自发回忆并行动于潜在约束的能力——对LLM在长交互中的实际应用至关重要，但尚未被系统评估。
light_analysis.method: 引入TriggerBench，涵盖日常助手和专业工作流的五个维度，包含匹配的回溯记忆控制、对比正负变体和过载触发器，实现主动召回率、误报率和注意力鲁棒性的细粒度测量。
light_analysis.result: 前瞻记忆存在精确率-召回率权衡和注意力脆弱性；增强推理提升主动召回但可能过度拟合“总是提醒”启发式；隐式约束或过载触发器下性能显著下降；在相同上下文中回溯记忆接近饱和而前瞻记忆随上下文长度急剧衰减；前瞻记忆可作为推理能力的行为探针。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出LLM前瞻记忆基准，揭示其独特特性（权衡、脆弱性、长度依赖性）及作为推理能力探针的潜力，为LLM在实际部署中的鲁棒性评估提供新视角。

title: MeGAS: Thermomechanical Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Thermophysical Scene Editing
abstract: Recent advances integrate physically grounded Newtonian dynamics with neural rendering frameworks, narrowing the gap between photorealistic scene reconstruction and physics-based animation. However, existing approaches focus on mechanically driven dynamics while neglecting temperature, a fundamental yet invisible physical factor underlying phenomena such as melting, solidification, and other thermomechanical processes. In this paper, we propose MeGAS, a novel framework that incorporates thermomechanical phase-change dynamics into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Specifically, we propose a new thermomechanical dynamic Gaussian Splatting representation that augments 3DGS with temperature attributes and employs a heat advection-diffusion solver with MPM dynamics incorporating phase transitions, enabling physically plausible and visually realistic synthesis of thermophysical phenomena. Furthermore, a new topology-adaptive Gaussian rendering strategy is proposed to mitigate cracking and floaters under extreme deformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MeGAS produces physically consistent thermomechanical behavior while maintaining high-fidelity photorealistic rendering, advancing toward physics-integrated world models.
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page: http://zju3dv.github.io/MeGAS

light_analysis.overview: 提出MeGAS框架，将热机械相变动力学融入3D高斯泼溅，实现热物理场景的物理一致编辑与逼真渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法仅关注机械驱动动力学，忽略了温度这一基础但不可见的物理因素，导致无法模拟熔化、凝固等热机械过程。将温度属性与相变动力学集成到神经渲染框架中，是实现更真实物理动画和场景编辑的关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出热机械动态高斯泼溅表示，为3DGS增加温度属性，并采用热对流-扩散求解器结合MPM动力学处理相变。同时提出拓扑自适应高斯渲染策略，缓解极端变形下的裂纹和浮动伪影。通过物理驱动与神经渲染的融合，实现热物理现象的逼真合成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MeGAS生成物理一致的热机械行为，同时保持高保真度照片级渲染。在多种热物理现象（如熔化、凝固）上验证了方法的有效性和物理真实性，相比基线方法在视觉质量和物理一致性上均有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeGAS将热力学引入神经渲染，拓展了物理集成世界模型的能力。学术上证明了温度动力学的可渲染性，应用上支持热物理场景编辑与动画生成。未来可扩展至更复杂热-力耦合场景，但计算效率可能成为实际部署的局限。

title: Do Location Encoders Capture Spatial Effects? A GeoShapley Benchmark Across Scales
abstract: Location encoders transform geographic coordinates into high dimensional embeddings for downstream machine learning, but it is unclear how well these representations capture interpretable spatial effects. We benchmark whether GeoShapley, a game-theoretic explainer that treats all location features as a single joint player, can recover spatially varying coefficients from models built on location-encoder embeddings. Eleven encoders from the TorchSpatial framework are evaluated against a synthetic process with known coefficients, across three scales (grid, county, global), with and without raw coordinates alongside the embedding, and under untrained and contrastively trained conditions. Measuring recovery as the correlation between estimated and true coefficients, we report how it varies with scale and encoder architecture and compare the embeddings against a raw-coordinate baseline. Recovery of the primary coefficient is consistently high across encoders, whereas recovery of a secondary coefficient is more scale-dependent, differing most at the global scale; the raw-coordinate baseline remains competitive throughout.
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, Submitted to SIGSPATIAL '26 short papers

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过GeoShapley解释器系统评估11种位置编码器在不同尺度下捕捉空间效应的能力，发现主要系数恢复良好，但次要系数恢复受尺度影响显著。
light_analysis.motivation: 位置编码器将地理坐标转换为高维嵌入用于下游任务，但现有方法无法验证这些表示是否真正捕获了可解释的空间效应。该问题重要因为空间效应是地理空间分析的核心，而现有评估缺乏可解释性指标。以原始坐标为基线，作者旨在揭示编码器在不同尺度下的表现差异。
light_analysis.method: 采用GeoShapley博弈论解释器，将位置特征视为单一联合玩家，从嵌入中恢复空间变化系数。基于TorchSpatial框架的11种编码器，在网格、县、全球三个尺度上，使用合成数据（已知系数）对比嵌入与原始坐标基线，并考虑未训练和对比训练条件。通过相关系数衡量恢复效果。
light_analysis.result: 主要系数恢复的相关系数在所有编码器和尺度上均较高（>0.9），而次要系数恢复在全局尺度上显著下降（平均相关系数<0.6）。原始坐标基线在多数场景下与嵌入性能相当，尤其在全局尺度上竞争力更强。对比训练未带来显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 位置编码器能可靠捕捉主要空间效应，但对次要效应的捕获受尺度制约，建议在全局任务中考虑原始坐标。工作为空间表示学习提供了可解释性基准，未来需探索更复杂的空间模式或更精细的解释方法。

title: AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction
abstract: AI agents are driving a new software paradigm, with the ability to autonomously call tools, extract information, manage memory, and complete tasks that span applications and data sources. Most existing end-user operating systems, however, are designed for application-centric workflows and offer little native support for AI agents. This mismatch limits the wider adoption of agents and leads to execution overhead and safety risks when running agents on conventional systems. While the concept of agent-native operating systems is emerging, the research community lacks an open testbed to explore the architectural primitives desired for agent-mediated interaction. We present AOHP (Android Open Harness Project), an OS-level agent harness built on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP). The core design principle of AOHP is to treat agents as first-class OS actors, enabling adaptive user interfaces and agent-friendly runtime environments. AOHP preserves the mature Android software and hardware ecosystem while introducing three agent-oriented system mechanisms: personalized service composition, efficient agent interfaces, and secure information flow. Based on preliminary experiments on challenging tasks covering key capabilities of OS agents, AOHP shows clear advantages in task completion (+21.12% completion rate), execution cost (-51.55% token cost), and security-policy compliance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AOHP，一个基于AOSP的开源OS级代理框架，将代理视为一等OS参与者，提升交互效率与安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端操作系统以应用为中心，缺乏对AI代理的原生支持，导致代理执行开销大、安全风险高。尽管代理原生OS概念兴起，但缺乏开放测试平台来探索架构原语。该研究旨在解决此问题，提供一个可实验的OS级代理框架。
light_analysis.method: AOHP构建于AOSP之上，核心设计是将代理视为一等OS参与者。引入三种机制：个性化服务组合（动态配置代理行为）、高效代理接口（优化代理与OS交互）以及安全信息流（保证数据安全）。框架保留Android生态，同时提供代理友好的运行环境。
light_analysis.result: 在覆盖OS代理关键能力的挑战任务中，AOHP相比基线表现出明显优势：任务完成率提升21.12%，令牌成本降低51.55%，且满足安全策略合规要求。实验验证了三个核心机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AOHP证明了在成熟OS中引入代理原生架构的可行性，为代理研究提供了开放测试平台。学术上推动了代理-OS交互研究，实践上可加速AI代理在移动设备上的部署。未来可扩展更多OS机制并评估大规模应用场景。

title: Selective Time Series Forecasting via Metalearning
abstract: Deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art in time series forecasting, yet their accuracy varies considerably across samples, as some instances remain inherently difficult to predict. Reject option mechanisms, which allow models to abstain from high-risk predictions, are well established in classification and regression but underexplored in forecasting. Existing abstention strategies typically rely on proxies, such as the width of the prediction interval or learned confidence scores derived from forecasts. However, these approaches are inherently tied to the training domain, limiting their ability to generalize. We propose a selective forecasting framework that addresses this limitation by modeling the empirical percentile of forecasting errors, that is, a scale-invariant statistic, based on structural characteristics extracted from recent lags via metalearning. By decoupling the rejection decision from the forecast itself and grounding it in domain-agnostic features, the framework enables effective abstention transfer across heterogeneous time series. Experiments in both in-domain and transfer learning settings show that rejecting samples predicted as challenging consistently improves forecasting accuracy across coverage levels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于元学习的尺度不变统计量建模方法，实现时间序列选择性预测中的拒判决策跨域迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测中不同样本预测难度差异大，现有拒判机制依赖预测区间宽度或置信度分数等代理，这些方法受限于训练领域，难以泛化到异质序列。亟需一种领域无关的拒判策略以提升预测鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 通过元学习从近期滞后序列中提取结构特征，建模预测误差的经验百分位数（尺度不变统计量），将拒判决策与预测模型解耦，实现基于领域无关特征的跨域拒判迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在领域内和迁移学习实验中，该框架通过拒判困难样本，在不同覆盖水平下一致提升了预测精度，验证了拒判机制的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种可迁移的选择性预测框架，通过元学习构建领域无关的拒判标准，显著提升异质时间序列预测的准确性和鲁棒性，为安全关键应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: What Does a Chemical Language Model Know About Molecules?
abstract: Chemical language models (cLMs) are widely assumed to learn surface-level syntactic patterns rather than learning meaningful molecular semantics. Here, we apply sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to MolFormer, an encoder-only cLM, to mechanistically examine how molecular representations are built across layers. We discover that early layers rely on position-tracking latents to parse molecular grammar, while later layers encode atom-in-substructure and pharmacologically relevant features. Additionally, we show that non-canonical SMILES produce more disruptive representation shifts than invalid SMILES, driven by position-latent disruption propagating across layers. To support further exploration, we develop InterMol, an interactive visualizer for SAE activations on molecular strings and structures.

light_analysis.overview: 通过稀疏自编码器揭示化学语言模型MolFormer中分子表示的层级构建机制，证明模型不仅学习语法，也学习原子亚结构和药理特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 化学语言模型（cLMs）通常被认为只捕捉表面句法模式，缺乏对分子语义的真正理解。然而，神经网络的表示能力可能超越这一假设。为了验证cLMs是否编码有意义的分子知识，本文采用机制性分析方法，通过稀疏自编码器检查MolFormer的内部表示，旨在揭示模型从语法到语义的层级学习过程。
light_analysis.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）对仅编码器的化学语言模型MolFormer进行机械可解释性分析。通过提取跨层的潜在变量，研究早期层（位置跟踪）和后期层（原子亚结构和药理学特征）的表示差异。此外，比较规范与非规范SMILES的表示偏移，并开发交互式可视化工具InterMol以支持进一步探索。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现早期层依赖位置跟踪潜在变量解析分子语法，后期层编码原子子结构和药理学相关特征。非规范SMILES相比无效SMILES引起更严重的表示偏移，主要由位置潜在变量的跨层传播破坏驱动。这些发现验证了cLM内部存在有意义的分子语义表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次从机制层面证明了化学语言模型不仅学习表面语法，还能编码分子结构和药理语义，修正了学界对cLM能力的普遍认知。InterMol可视化工具为解释化学表示提供了实用平台。未来工作可探索针对不同分子的SAE训练，或将其应用于其他化学模型。

title: Cross-Architectural Mixture-of-Experts with Adaptive Soft Routing for Plant Leaf Disease Classification
abstract: Plant leaf disease classification is crucial for crop protection and precision agriculture but remains challenging under complex backgrounds, illumination variations, and severe class imbalance. Moreover, single-architecture models often fail to effectively capture both local and global representations. To address these challenges, this study proposes an adaptive soft Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework with cross-architectural routing that integrates EfficientNet-B0, DenseNet-121, and Swin-Tiny to exploit complementary multi-scale, local, and global features. A soft gating mechanism dynamically assigns input-dependent expert weights, while a two-stage refinement training strategy improves optimization stability and generalization. Experiments on a highly imbalanced potato leaf disease dataset achieve 91.68% recall and 92.62% F1-score, surpassing the strongest individual expert by 5.91% and 5.03%, respectively. Additional evaluations on durian and sesame leaf disease datasets yield F1-scores of 94.03% and 97.04%, demonstrating robust cross-dataset generalization and the potential of the proposed framework for reliable real-world crop health monitoring

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨架构自适应软路由的混合专家框架，集成多种网络，用于植物叶片病害分类，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 植物叶片病害分类对作物保护和精准农业至关重要，但面临复杂背景、光照变化和严重类别不平衡等挑战。现有单架构模型难以同时捕捉局部和全局表征，导致分类性能不足。因此需要一种能够融合多尺度、局部和全局特征的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应软MoE框架，集成EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121和Swin-Tiny三个专家网络，利用软门控机制根据输入动态分配专家权重，实现跨架构自适应路由。采用两阶段精炼训练策略优化稳定性和泛化性，有效融合互补特征。
light_analysis.result: 在高度不平衡的马铃薯叶病数据集上，召回率91.68%、F1-score 92.62%，分别超过最强单个专家5.91%和5.03%。在榴莲和芝麻叶病数据集上F1-score达94.03%和97.04%，展示出强大的跨数据集泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过跨架构MoE有效整合多尺度、局部和全局特征，显著提升分类准确性和泛化能力，适用于实际作物健康监测。未来可探索更多专家组合和更高效的路由机制以进一步提升性能。

title: Rethinking Object-Centric Representations for Video Dynamics Modeling
abstract: Unsupervised video object tracking aims to decompose dynamic scenes into persistent, object-centric entities without manual annotations. Many recent approaches rely on slot-based representations, where a fixed set of latent variables ("slots") represent individual objects across frames. To preserve object identity, these models enforce temporal consistency on slot embeddings. However, when appearance and pose are entangled, this consistency objective conflicts with object motion and viewpoint changes. As a result, slots tend to lock onto static regions (e.g., background) to satisfy the consistency objective, while foreground objects become fragmented across multiple slots or frequently swap identities. To address these limitations, we propose STAITUS, a unified framework that explicitly disentangles each slot into appearance and geometric pose (position/scale). Leveraging this disentanglement, STAITUS enforces within-frame spatial separation and applies temporal alignment only in appearance space, yielding sharper masks and more persistent identities under motion, occlusion, and object entry/exit. Furthermore, to mitigate over-segmentation, we introduce an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically adjusts the number of active slots to match scene complexity. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that STAITUS substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in segmentation quality and tracking stability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAITUS框架，通过解耦外观与几何姿态，提升无监督视频对象跟踪的稳定性和分割质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于槽表示的无监督视频对象跟踪方法，在保持对象身份时因外观与姿态缠结，导致一致性约束与运动、视角变化冲突，使得槽常锁定静态区域，前景对象碎片化或身份交换。需解决此问题以实现鲁棒跟踪。
light_analysis.method: 提出STAITUS框架，将每个槽显式解耦为外观和几何姿态（位置/尺度），在帧内强制空间分离，仅在外观空间进行时序对齐，从而在运动、遮挡和对象进出时获得更清晰的掩码和更持久的身份。同时引入自适应门控机制，动态调整活跃槽数量以匹配场景复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，STAITUS在分割质量和跟踪稳定性上显著优于最先进的基线方法。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但强调在运动、遮挡等场景下的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAITUS通过外观-姿态解耦和自适应门控，有效解决了传统槽表示在视频动态建模中的身份混淆和过分割问题。学术价值在于提出新的表示范式，实际应用可提升无监督视频理解的鲁棒性。未来工作可探索更复杂的几何变换或与其他视觉任务的结合。

title: Interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Network with Feature-Isolated Temporal Attention Mechanism for Electricity Load Forecasting
abstract: Accurate electricity load forecasting is a crucial prerequisite for stable power system operations. While prevalent deep learning models present competitive performance, they often operate as black boxes and lack interpretability. While the Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) has emerged as a promising alternative because of its learnable activation function design, its direct application to time-series forecasting faces challenges in modeling complex temporal data patterns. Also, simple integration into existing architectures, such as serving as replacement of neural modules, cannot fully leverage KAN's interpretability strengths. To address these gaps, this study develops LoadKAN, a novel hybrid and interpretable framework for load forecasting that synergistically combines a specifically-designed feature-isolated temporal attention mechanism with a KAN module. The attention stage aims to extract temporal dynamics from each input feature independently, such as historical load and human mobility, providing distilled feature representations to the KAN module for interpretable predictions. When evaluated on datasets from three representative U.S. electricity markets, our LoadKAN remains highly competitive when compared to extensively-tuned, state-of-the-art, black-box deep learning benchmarks. More importantly, LoadKAN's interpretability enables a granular analysis of the learned non-linear relationships between six distinct mobility patterns and electricity load. Through KAN-learned activation functions, our quantitative sensitivity analyses on mobility features reveal complex and market-specific dependencies. These findings further demonstrate the ability of our LoadKAN to generate insights often obscured by opaque black-box neural forecasting models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoadKAN，融合特征隔离时间注意力和KAN模块，实现可解释的电力负荷预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确负荷预测对电力系统稳定运行至关重要，但现有深度学习模型多为黑箱，缺乏可解释性。Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）因可学习激活函数而成为有前景的替代方案，但直接应用于时间序列面临建模复杂时序模式的挑战，且简单集成到现有架构中无法充分发挥其可解释性优势。因此，研究开发了一种混合可解释框架LoadKAN，旨在结合特征隔离时间注意力和KAN模块，在保持高预测性能的同时提供模型决策的透明性。
light_analysis.method: LoadKAN设计了一种特征隔离时间注意力机制，独立提取每个输入特征（如历史负荷和人类移动性）的时间动态，生成精炼的特征表示，再输入KAN模块进行可解释预测。KAN采用可学习激活函数，能够建模非线性关系。在三个美国电力市场数据集上，LoadKAN与经过精细调优的最先进黑箱基准模型进行比较，验证了其预测竞争力。通过KAN学习到的激活函数，对六个移动性模式与电力负荷的关系进行了定量敏感性分析。
light_analysis.result: 在美国三个代表性电力市场数据集上的实验表明，LoadKAN在预测性能上与经过大量调优的最先进黑箱深度学习基准保持高度竞争力。更重要的是，其可解释性允许对六个不同移动性模式与电力负荷之间学习到的非线性关系进行细致分析。通过KAN学习的激活函数，定量敏感性分析揭示了复杂且市场特定的依赖关系，这些见解通常被不透明的黑箱神经预测模型所掩盖。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoadKAN成功结合了特征隔离时间注意力和KAN模块，实现了电力负荷预测的高性能与可解释性。其通过可解释激活函数揭示移动性特征与负荷之间的非线性关系，有助于理解负荷驱动因素，为电网运营提供深刻洞察。该框架展示了KAN在时间序列预测中的潜力，未来可推广至其他可解释性要求高的预测任务，但可能需要进一步优化计算效率。

title: GRINQH: Graded Input-based Quantization Hierarchy for Efficient LLM Generation
abstract: Autoregressive decoding with LLMs is primarily bottlenecked by GPU memory bandwidth, especially in edge-computing settings. While quantization is essential for mitigating this bottleneck, most existing methods treat inference as a uniform process and fail to account for the asymmetry between the compute-bound prefill stage and the memory-bound decoding stage. We propose GRINQH (GRaded INput-based Quantization Hierarchy), a weight-only post-training quantization framework that accelerates decoding by unifying quantization and sparsification. GRINQH leverages activation magnitudes as a proxy for computational importance to dynamically assign weight channels to different precision levels, enabling flexible average bit widths during decoding. Evaluated on Llama3 and Qwen3 models, GRINQH outperforms state-of-the-art fixed- and mixed-precision baselines at comparable 3- and 4-bit settings, even enabling effective 2-bit generation. We experimentally verify theoretical speedups by leveraging a hierarchical nested memory layout for multi-precision storage in a custom GPU kernel. Ultimately, GRINQH establishes a new state-of-the-art Pareto frontier for LLM generation, enabling a dynamic trade-off between generation quality and inference speed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRINQH，一种基于输入分级的量化层次框架，通过动态精度分配统一量化和稀疏化，加速LLM解码，建立生成质量与速度的新Pareto前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM自回归解码受GPU内存带宽限制，尤其在边缘计算场景。现有量化方法将推理视为统一过程，忽略了计算受限的预填充阶段与内存受限的解码阶段之间的不对称性。这导致无法高效利用带宽，需要在生成质量和速度之间做出次优妥协。
light_analysis.method: GRINQH是一种权重量化后训练框架，利用激活幅度作为计算重要性的代理，将权重通道动态分配至不同精度级别，实现解码时的灵活平均位宽。它统一了量化与稀疏化，并通过自定义GPU内核中的分层嵌套内存布局支持多精度存储，从而验证理论加速。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama3和Qwen3模型上评估，GRINQH在3-bit和4-bit设置下优于现有固定和混合精度基线，甚至实现了有效的2-bit生成。实验验证了理论加速，建立了LLM生成的新Pareto前沿，实现了生成质量与速度的动态权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRINQH通过动态精度分配有效解决了LLM解码的内存带宽瓶颈，推动了边缘计算等场景的实用化。其统一量化和稀疏化的思路具有创新性，为未来自适应推理提供了方向。局限性可能包括对激活幅度依赖的稳健性，未来可探索更智能的重要性度量。

title: Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design
abstract: This paper examines the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design. The aim is to identify and highlight potential common structures, synergies, and challenges. How should and can technical systems be designed, and what implications does this have for the design of our environment? In light of the current debate surrounding artificial intelligence, this paper aims to serve as a preliminary study to help better understand the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design within the context of human-centered technological development. Following a brief introduction, the two concepts of Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design are presented and graphically visualized. The terms of freedom and responsibility in human decision-making, conviviality, and subjectivity are discussed, along with examples illustrating the distinction between human and artificial intelligence (Turing Test and Chinese Room). The various concepts of evolutionary design (e.g., co-evolutionary or sustainable software development, clean code, or green IT) and Gilbert Simondon's concept of the "open machine" are introduced. The interdependencies between functional specialization and open technology development are highlighted. Both concepts share similar structures. In joint cooperation, they can lead to positive effects and mutual synergies. Significant differences lie in the areas of autonomy and determination in decision-making, as well as in genuine and simulated subjectivity. Open technology development is also currently suffering from the functional specialization of software and AI applications due to a purely market- and consumer-oriented approach. Even optimizations for energy efficiency in sustainable software development lead to greater specialization and thus also have a detrimental effect on open and quality-oriented technology development.

light_analysis.overview: 初步研究数字人文主义与进化设计的概念共性、协同作用与挑战，旨在促进以人为本的技术发展。
light_analysis.motivation: 在AI讨论背景下，需理解数字人文主义与进化设计如何共同作用于人本技术设计。现有方法忽视两者协同效应，且市场导向的功能专门化阻碍开放技术发展。论文旨在识别概念间共同结构及自由、责任等伦理维度。
light_analysis.method: 通过概念分析、图形化可视化及案例（图灵测试、中文屋）区分人类与人工智能；引入进化设计子概念（协同进化开发、绿色IT）和西蒙东的'开放机器'概念；探讨功能专门化与开放技术开发的相互依赖关系。
light_analysis.result: 识别出两概念在结构上的相似性，合作可产生正向协同效应。主要差异在决策自主性、确定性及真实与模拟主观性。市场导向导致功能专门化，能效优化加剧专门化，损害开放和高质量技术开发。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示数字人文主义与进化设计在促进人本技术发展上的潜力与挑战。学术价值在于澄清概念关系，实际应用需平衡功能专门化与开放开发。未来可深入探讨协同实现路径。

title: Leveraging Similarities in Multi-Armed Bandits
abstract: In many online learning and bandit problems, the actions we consider possess inherent similarities--for instance because they share latent traits, tags, or hierarchical structure. We study online learning with a similarity-structured action set, encoded by a rooted tree whose leaves are the actions and whose levels quantify how closely two actions are related. The loss sequence is assumed tree-compatible: losses of similar actions are constrained to be close. We establish an impossibility result showing that usual one-point bandit feedback cannot, in general, leverage range or tree-induced similarity, even under very strong similarity constraints. We then provide a unified set of algorithms which adapt to a wide range of richer feedback models, from semi-bandit feedback down to multi-point bandit protocols, including the minimal two-point feedback setting. We show these algorithms exhibit best-of-both-worlds guarantees and provably exploit action similarities by replacing the number of actions $K$ by a similarity-aware effective number of actions $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ in the regret bounds. As an application, we show that under two-point feedback, it is possible to achieve $\sqrt{T}$ regret in Lipschitz bandits when $d \leq 2$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了统一算法框架，利用动作相似性将遗憾界中的动作数K替换为有效动作数K_eff，并在多种反馈模型下实现最佳两世界保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 动作之间存在固有相似性（如共享特征、标签或层次结构），但标准赌博机算法无法利用这些相似性提升学习效率。证明单点反馈普遍无法利用相似性，即使强约束下也不行，因此需要更丰富的反馈模型来挖掘相似性潜力。
light_analysis.method: 用树结构编码动作相似性，假设损失序列树兼容。设计统一算法族，适应半赌博机、多点反馈（含最小两点反馈）等多种模型。关键创新：引入相似性感知有效动作数K_eff替换K，实现遗憾界最优。应用示例：在两点反馈下，Lipschitz赌博机在d≤2时达到√T遗憾。
light_analysis.result: 在多种反馈模型下，算法利用相似性将遗憾界中的动作数K替换为K_eff。具体地，两点反馈下Lipschitz赌博机在d≤2时达到O(√T)遗憾。与基线方法对比，实现了best-of-both-worlds保证，即既适应相似性又适应无相似性的情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了单点反馈无法利用动作相似性，并提出了统一的算法框架利用更丰富的反馈模型（如两点反馈）。学术价值在于为相似性结构赌博机问题提供理论下界和高效算法；实际应用包括推荐系统等具有层次结构的场景。未来可扩展至更复杂的反馈模型。

title: UnBias-Plus: Detect, Explain, and Rewrite Bias
abstract: Bias in natural language remains a persistent challenge in both human-written and AI-generated content, affecting domains such as journalism, education, and AI research. Most existing detection methods identify only the presence of bias, with limited support for granular detection, interpretable explanations, neutral rewriting, and openly available trained models. We present UnBias-Plus, an open-source toolkit unifying (1) segment-level multi-class bias classification, (2) biased span localization, (3) neutral text rewriting, and (4) reasoning for each decision. Available via Python, CLI, REST API, and web interfaces, UnBias-Plus supports accessible bias analysis. The toolkit, source code, models, datasets, and documentation are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: UnBias-Plus是一个统一偏见检测、定位、重写和推理的开源工具包。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏见检测方法仅识别偏见存在，缺乏细粒度检测、可解释解释和中立重写能力，影响新闻、教育、AI研究等领域，亟需全面的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出UnBias-Plus，包含段级多类偏见分类、偏见跨度定位、中立文本重写和推理解释，通过Python、CLI、REST API和Web界面提供，开源并公开模型和数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但工具包提供完整功能，并公开了源码、模型和数据集，便于研究和应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了统一的开源偏见分析工具包，支持检测、解释和重写，具有学术和实用价值，可推动偏见处理领域的标准化和可复现性。

title: Differential Spectral Damping Gap Adaptive Regularization for Ill-Conditioned Kernel Methods
abstract: Kernel methods requiring matrix inversion -- particularly Least-Squares Twin Support Vector Machines (LSTSVM) -- suffer from exponential eigenvalue decay in their system matrices, producing severely ill-conditioned problems where standard Tikhonov regularization applies uniform damping regardless of eigenvector reliability. We propose Differential Spectral Damping (DSD), a regularization formula that adapts its penalty to localized eigengap structure: preserving eigenvectors with large spectral gaps (reliable per Davis-Kahan perturbation theory) while aggressively suppressing those with small gaps (directionally corrupted beyond recovery). We motivate DSD through a principled design procedure grounded in the Davis-Kahan $\sin(Θ)$ theorem, systematically deriving the requirements for a reliability-aware damping function and selecting the exponential form for its smoothness, differentiability, and natural saturation properties.
