Through rigorous paired testing with fairly optimized baselines (including gradient-optimized Tikhonov receiving equal optimization opportunity), we demonstrate that DSD improves LSTSVM classification accuracy by +4.8 percentage points on real-world GINA ($d=970$, Cohen's $d = 4.49$, $p < 0.0001$), +10.4 percentage points at $d=200$, and +2.6 percentage points on Madelon ($d=500$) -- all using only principled spectral initialization while Tikhonov receives grid search. For pre-image reconstruction on manifold data, DSD ties Tikhonov at high perturbation noise ($p=0.99$) but slightly underperforms at lower noise levels; both reduce naive inversion error by $66\times$. We characterize the precise operating regime ($d \geq 100$, condition number $> 10^3$) and document where simpler methods suffice, providing practitioners with clear deployment guidance.
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables, 1 figure. Complete source code and experiments are available at https://github.com/Praveg432/dsd-regularization

light_analysis.overview: 提出差分谱阻尼(DSD)正则化方法，根据特征间隙自适应惩罚，解决病态核矩阵逆计算问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 核方法(如LSTSVM)需矩阵求逆，但系统矩阵特征值呈指数衰减导致严重病态。标准Tikhonov正则化对各特征向量统一阻尼，忽略其可靠性差异。现有方法无法区分可靠与不可靠特征方向，在病态场景下性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理设计可靠性感知阻尼函数：保留大特征间隙(可靠)特征向量，抑制小间隙(不可靠)方向。采用指数形式实现平滑、可微及自然饱和特性。无需网格搜索，仅需谱初始化。
light_analysis.result: 在LSTSVM分类任务中，GINA数据集(d=970)准确率+4.8pp(Cohen's d=4.49,p<0.0001)，d=200时+10.4pp，Madelon(d=500)+2.6pp。预图像重建高噪声水平与Tikhonov持平，低噪声略逊；两者均将逆误差降低66倍。适用条件：d≥100且条件数>10³。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSD有效提升病态核方法性能，提供理论驱动的自适应正则化，无需昂贵调参。学术价值：基于谱间隙的可靠性正则化框架。实际价值：明确部署边界。局限：低噪声预图像重建略差，未来可探索其他阻尼函数。

title: HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models
abstract: We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.   HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种统一的率失真最优后训练量化管道HyperQuant，结合哈达玛变换、最优格点量化和熵编码，实现大语言模型和扩散模型权重与KV缓存的高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型和扩散模型参数庞大，KV缓存占用大量内存，现有后训练量化方法在极低比特率下性能下降或非最优。需要一种统一且率失真最优的量化方案，能在不同比特率下保持模型质量，同时兼容硬件加速路径。
light_analysis.method: HyperQuant组合四种技术：(1) 每个tile的随机哈达玛变换使权重和激活分布近高斯；(2) 量化到E8、D4、A2或Z最优格点；(3) 无损位剥离和近熵最优的Rice变长编码；(4) KV缓存偏差校正以保持注意力语义。集成8/4比特Tensor-Core路径（fp8、int8、nvfp4、mxfp4）。
light_analysis.result: 在权重量化3-5 bps上优于HIGGS；KV量化至1.7 bps胜TurboQuant和OCTOPUS。对19B参数LTX-2 DiT视频模型量化无可见帧伪影。H100上4 bps压缩线性权重~3.9x、KV缓存~3.79x，接近无损。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperQuant实现了统一、率失真最优的量化框架，在极低比特率下保持高质量，兼容Tensor Core硬件加速，具有实际部署价值。未来可扩展至更多模型架构与精度设置。

title: ReasoningLens: Hierarchical Visualization and Diagnostic Auditing for Large Reasoning Models
abstract: The emergence of Large Reasoning Models has introduced exceptionally long Chain-of-Thought traces, creating a transparency burden where critical logic is often buried under massive procedural text. To address this, we present ReasoningLens, an open-source framework designed for the hierarchical visualization and diagnostic auditing of complex reasoning chains. ReasoningLens addresses information necropsy by: (1) structuring traces into interactive hierarchies that separate high-level strategy from low-level execution; (2) leveraging an agentic auditor for automated error detection and tool-augmented verification; and (3) synthesizing systemic reasoning profiles to reveal model-specific blind spots. By transforming unstructured walls of text into actionable insights, ReasoningLens provides a modular foundation for interpreting, debugging, and optimizing the next generation of reasoning-centric AI.
comment: Our project is available at https://github.com/icip-cas/ReasoningLens

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReasoningLens开源框架，通过层级可视化和诊断审计增强大型推理模型思维链的透明性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型产生极长的思维链，关键逻辑被大量过程性文本淹没，导致透明性不足，现有方法难以有效解析和调试。
light_analysis.method: ReasoningLens将思维链结构化为交互式层级，分离高层策略与低层执行；利用智能体审计器自动检测错误并进行工具增强验证；综合生成系统推理概况，揭示模型特定盲点。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但框架旨在将无结构的文本转化为可操作洞察，支持模型解释、调试和优化，为下一代推理AI提供模块化基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReasoningLens通过层级可视化和诊断审计解决了长思维链的透明性问题，提供了可扩展的框架，有助于提升大型推理模型的可解释性和可靠性，未来可应用于模型优化和审计。

title: Litmus: Zero-Label, Code-Driven Metric Specification for Evaluating AI Systems
abstract: As agentic LLM systems move from prototypes to deployment across increasingly diverse domains, evaluating them has become both more important and more difficult. The challenge is not only that individual metrics may be unreliable, but that evaluation goals are often left implicit. Without a clear account of what a system is expected to do, how it can fail, and which failures matter, metric choices become difficult to justify, interpret, or validate. We present Litmus, a zero-label system that designs evaluation and monitoring metrics for AI pipelines by eliciting evaluation intent from source code and targeted interrogation. Instead of assuming that the evaluation target is already known, Litmus first identifies what must be measured and why, then converts those answers into constraints for constructing a justified, per-stage metric portfolio. We evaluate Litmus on three real, code-defined AI pipelines - financial account grouping, scientific QA, and inherent risk assessment - against AutoMetrics and three DynamicRubric baselines. Litmus achieves the broadest or tied-broadest concern coverage, spans more pipeline stages, produces a near-zero-redundancy portfolio, and ranks first in validity against per-row quality labels on all three pipelines - decisively on scientific QA (Spearman $ρ=0.72$ vs. less than $0.47$ for every baseline), and within overlapping confidence intervals in relation to two components of the audit framework despite using no labels during metric design. Our results support a shift from automatic metric implementation to automatic metric specification: before asking which metric to compute, evaluation systems should ask what must be measured and why.

light_analysis.overview: 提出零标签系统Litmus，通过代码驱动自动生成AI系统评估指标，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着代理型LLM系统从原型部署到多样领域，评估变得更重要也更困难。现有方法中，单个指标可能不可靠，且评估目标常隐含不清，导致指标选择难以论证、解释或验证。缺乏对系统预期行为、失败模式及重要性的明确说明，使得评估过程缺乏透明性和可审计性。
light_analysis.method: Litmus通过分析源代码和针对性询问来引出评估意图，先识别必须测量的内容及原因，然后转化为约束条件，为每个管道阶段构造合理且非冗余的指标组合。该方法无需任何标签，完全基于代码驱动。在金融账户分组、科学QA和固有风险评估三个真实AI管道上评估，与AutoMetrics和DynamicRubric基线对比。
light_analysis.result: Litmus在三个管道上均取得最广或并列最广的关注度覆盖，覆盖更多管道阶段，产生近零冗余指标组合，且在所有管道中有效性排名第一（基于每行质量标签）。科学QA任务上，Spearman ρ=0.72，而所有基线均低于0.47。与审计框架的两个组件相比，虽在置信区间重叠，但Litmus设计指标时未使用任何标签。
light_analysis.conclusion: Litmus支持从自动指标实现向自动指标规范的转变：在计算哪个指标之前，先询问必须测量什么及为什么。这提高了评估的可解释性和合理性，适用于无需预定义目标的复杂AI系统。潜在局限包括对代码质量的依赖及跨领域泛化性需进一步验证。

title: Physics-Informed Modeling for Wood Thermal Analysis and Prediction
abstract: Wood materials exhibit complex, spatially varying thermal properties that challenge traditional architectural assumptions of material homogeneity. Although data-driven approaches can directly map wood RGB images to their corresponding thermal responses, they operate as uninterpretable black boxes that prioritize statistical correlation and may absorb experimental noise rather than thermodynamic plausibility. To address these limitations, we present physics-informed deep learning frameworks that integrate partial differential equations (PDEs) to predict pixel-level thermal responses of spatially heterogeneous wood materials using wood RGB images and testbed temperature maps. Specifically, we investigate two distinct approaches to enforcing a normalized 2D steady-state heat transfer equation derived from the general heat transfer equation: Physics-Informed Convolutional Neural Networks (PICNNs), which embed physics as a soft penalty term in the loss function, and Physics-Integrated Convolutional Neural Networks (PInteCNNs), which hard-code an analytical approximator-predictor-corrector solver directly into convolutional neural networks. To validate our proposed approaches, we collect three real-world multimodal datasets of Poplar, Grandis Cross-Cut (Grandis-CC), and Grandis Radial-Cut (Grandis-RC) wood samples. We further demonstrate that embedding physical inductive biases successfully balances predictive accuracy, physical interpretability, and intra-species diversity, outperforming data-driven approaches in handling complex wood material heterogeneity and enabling the extraction of interpretable physical parameters. Project: https://zekifayes.github.io/pim

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息深度学习框架，集成偏微分方程预测木材像素级热响应，实现可解释性与准确性平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 木材具有复杂空间变化的热特性，传统假设均质性不准确。数据驱动方法虽能直接映射RGB图像到热响应，但作为不可解释的黑箱，优先统计相关性，可能吸收实验噪声而非热力学合理性。现有方法在处理木材异质性和物理可解释性方面存在不足，亟需结合物理定律的模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种物理信息深度学习框架：物理信息卷积神经网络（PICNNs）将归一化稳态热传导方程作为软惩罚项加入损失函数；物理集成卷积神经网络（PInteCNNs）将解析近似-预测-校正求解器硬编码入CNN。使用Poplar、Grandis-CC和Grandis-RC三种真实世界多模态木材数据集，通过RGB图像和温度图预测像素级热响应。
light_analysis.result: 在三种木材数据集上，物理信息模型比纯数据驱动方法更有效处理材料异质性，平衡预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明嵌入物理归纳偏置成功提升性能，并支持提取可解释物理参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明将物理定律嵌入深度学习能提升木材热分析的鲁棒性和可解释性，适合复杂异质材料。学术价值在于提出两种物理集成范式；实际应用包括建筑热性能评估、木材干燥优化等。未来可扩展至其他材料或三维传热模型。

title: Do LLM Embedding Spaces Recover Expert Structure?
abstract: Pretrained text embeddings are increasingly used as representational maps, yet high category separability does not imply that their geometry recovers expert-defined structure. We study this problem in mental-health-related language, where symptom relations provide an external reference and online communities introduce strong domain, affective, stylistic, and discourse confounds. Using 28 Reddit communities, we compare pretrained and supervised fine-tuned Qwen3 embedding spaces at two scales (0.6B and 4B). We construct category prototypes, evaluate their representational dissimilarity matrices against an expert symptom matrix with representational similarity analysis, and complement this global test with prototype-based typicality and multi-baseline confound controls. Pretrained embeddings show measurable alignment with expert structure within the mental-health subset; fine-tuning strengthens this alignment most at the finest category level; and larger scale improves both zero-shot alignment and supervision-induced gains. Residual alignment remains substantial after controlling for VAD, LIWC, lexical style, and topic-distribution structure. These results suggest that LLM embeddings can recover expert-relevant category geometry, but this recovery is level-dependent and should be tested against explicit confounds rather than inferred from classification alone.

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLM嵌入空间在心理健康语言中能否恢复专家定义的症状结构，发现对齐程度依赖层级且受混淆因素影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练文本嵌入广泛应用于表征映射，但高类别可分性并不保证其几何结构能恢复专家定义的结构。在心理健康领域，症状关系提供外部参考，而在线社区引入情感、风格、话语等强混淆因素。现有方法仅依赖分类性能评估嵌入质量，忽视了与专家结构的一致性。因此，需要系统检验嵌入空间能否捕捉专家定义的类别几何，并控制混杂变量。
light_analysis.method: 使用28个Reddit社区数据，比较预训练和监督微调的Qwen3嵌入空间（0.6B和4B参数）。构建类别原型，通过表征相似性分析（RSA）将原型的不相似性矩阵与专家症状矩阵对齐。同时采用原型典型性分析和多基线混淆控制，包括VAD情感、LIWC、词汇风格和主题分布结构，以评估嵌入恢复专家结构的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 预训练嵌入在心理健康子集上与专家结构有可测量的对齐（摘要未报告具体数值）。监督微调在最细粒度类别上显著增强对齐。更大模型规模（4B优于0.6B）同时提升零样本对齐和监督微调增益。在控制VAD、LIWC、词汇风格和主题分布等混淆后，残差对齐仍显著，表明嵌入恢复的结构超越简单统计特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM嵌入能够在一定程度恢复专家定义的类别几何，但这种恢复依赖于层级粒度（细粒度更优）和模型规模，且不能从分类表现直接推断。研究建议在嵌入评估中需显式测试专业结构而非仅依赖分类性能，为心理健康领域的语义表征提供方法论指导。未来可扩展更多领域和混淆控制方法。

title: Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Accepted at 35th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到LLM中，实现鲁棒的超长期时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在多模态时间序列预测中缺乏校准的概率建模，难以对齐非文本数据与文本的异构表示，导致在超长期预测中性能不佳且鲁棒性差。
light_analysis.method: Diffusion-LLM框架联合设计条件扩散模型与LLM，通过共享潜在空间学习未来数据的条件分布，同时改进语义对齐，实现分布感知正则化。
light_analysis.result: 在ETT、Weather、ECL等六个长期预测基准上，Diffusion-LLM一致超越现有LLM基线，尤其在超长期和少样本场景中取得显著提升，验证了其鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作有效解决了LLM在时间序列预测中的概率建模与模态对齐问题，为超长期预测提供新范式，未来可扩展至更多多模态任务。

title: Self-Stigma Is Not a Monolith, but Generic Empathy Is: Persona-Conditioned LLM Support for People Who Use Drugs
abstract: Self-stigma predicts treatment avoidance and disengagement among people who use drugs (PWUD), yet conversational systems aiming to provide support typically treat self-stigma expression as a uniform signal. We present a three-phase, proof-of-concept study of a persona-aware approach to LLM support. Latent Profile Analysis (LPA) on indicator-level features from 1,174 self-stigma expressors on Reddit yields a four-persona typology validated against held-out behavioral and linguistic features. Sequential Bayesian and recurrent neural classifiers recover these personas from limited posting histories, substantially outperforming batch and few-shot LLM baselines (macro-F1 = 0.74 at 30 posts). Evaluation by eight clinical experts across three contemporary LLMs revealed a misalignment: persona-matched responses successfully achieved targeted behavioral shifts, yet raters holistically preferred the generic empathy of the persona-neutral baseline. Our findings suggest that holistic empathy judgments and clinically-aligned response design can pull in opposite directions, and that evaluating LLM-based stigma support requires rubrics capable of decomposing the two.

light_analysis.overview: 提出人格感知的LLM支持方法，通过潜在剖面分析识别药物使用者的自我污名表达人格，并发现人格匹配响应虽能实现行为改变但临床专家更偏好通用共情。
light_analysis.motivation: 药物使用者的自我污名会导致治疗回避和脱离，但现有对话系统通常将自我污名表达视为统一信号。研究表明不同人格类型的污名表达需要差异化支持，而当前方法缺乏对污名异质性的考虑，无法提供个性化干预。
light_analysis.method: 三阶段概念验证研究：首先对Reddit上1174名自我污名表达者进行潜在剖面分析，得到四人格类型并验证；然后使用序列贝叶斯和循环神经网络分类器从有限发帖历史中恢复人格（宏观F1=0.74，30条帖子），优于批次和小样本LLM基线；最后由8位临床专家评估三种当代LLM的人格匹配响应。
light_analysis.result: 人格匹配响应成功实现了针对性行为改变，但临床专家在整体偏好上更倾向于人格中性基线的通用共情。这表明整体共情判断与临床对齐的响应设计可能相互冲突，评估LLM污名支持需要能够分解两者的评估标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了自我污名表达的异质性，验证了人格感知方法的可行性，但发现通用共情在临床评估中更受偏好。未来工作需设计兼顾人格适配与共情感知的评估方法，并探索平衡两者的干预策略。

title: Energy-Based Transformers as Predictors of Reading Difficulty
abstract: Transformer language models have become established tools for modeling human sentence processing, with measures such as surprisal and attention entropy serving as effective predictors of reading difficulty that together capture complementary aspects of processing load. Here, we explore a related class of transformer models: energy-based transformers, which provide a principled formal link to associative memory models, bringing processing research into direct contact with the broader literature on Hopfield networks and dense associative memory. To our knowledge, this is the first exploration of an energy-based transformer measure in computational psycholinguistics. Across reading-time corpora (Natural Stories, UCL eye-tracking, UCL self-paced reading), the energy measure is a robust predictor of reading times, providing significant fit beyond surprisal in all three. In a controlled experiment on relative clause processing, energy at a single layer captures the well-known object/subject asymmetry. We find evidence that it subsumes effects attributable to both attention entropy and surprisal, suggesting that energy may serve as a single unified predictor where multiple complementary measures have previously been required.

light_analysis.overview: 首次探索能量基Transformer在计算心理语言学中预测阅读难度，并提出能量度量可统一替代多种互补指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Transformer语言模型使用surprisal和注意力熵等指标预测阅读难度，但两者只能互补捕捉处理负荷的不同方面，缺乏统一预测因子。能量基Transformer与联想记忆模型有原理性联系，尚未在心理语言学中应用。作者旨在验证能量度量能否作为单一、统一的阅读难度预测指标，简化模型并加深对语言处理机制的理解。
light_analysis.method: 采用能量基Transformer模型，从中提取能量度量作为预测因子。在Natural Stories、UCL眼动追踪和UCL自定步速阅读三个阅读时间语料库上评估，对比surprisal和注意力熵。此外，在关系从句处理控制实验中，分析单层能量能否区分宾语和主语关系从句的处理不对称性。
light_analysis.result: 能量度量在三个语料库中均为阅读时间的稳健预测因子，对surprisal的改进在所有数据集上显著。在关系从句实验中，单层能量成功捕捉了对象/主语不对称性。进一步分析表明，能量度量吸收了注意力熵和surprisal的效应，可作为统一预测指标替代多个互补指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明能量基Transformer的能量度量是阅读难度的有效统一预测器，性能优于现有指标。研究将语言处理与联想记忆模型理论联系，为理解句子处理机制提供了新视角。未来可扩展至其他语言现象或神经影像学验证。

title: Measuring & Mitigating Over-Alignment for LLMs in Multilingual Criminal Law Courts
abstract: While the wider applicability of LLMs in the legal field is currently debated due to their reliability and the gravity of any errors, narrow uses with well-understood and mitigated risks have emerged. Notably the Swiss Federal Supreme Court uses small on-premises models for tentative translations and short-passage summarization across the four official languages. However, such usage is challenging in the context of Criminal Law. Since rulings and cases employees work on routinely can contain detailed descriptions of violent and sexual offenses, their legitimate work is compromised by refusals and disclaimers due to the activation of model guardrails (over-alignment).   To measure this phenomenon, we introduce TF-RefusalBench, a multilingual benchmark for criminal-law translation and summarization derived from public Swiss Supreme Court rulings. TF-RefusalBench contains 5,200 total prompts across French, German, Italian, and English, corresponding to common task prompts and passages likely to trigger refusal. We then use TF-RefusalBench to show that over-alignment is a multifaceted phenomenon, influenced by the model and the prompt and text languages being processed, and that its impact cannot be evaluated solely from an over-refusal perspective, given the disclaimer's impact on task faithfulness. Finally, we evaluate approaches to enable on-premises LLMs for Criminal Law Tasks, demonstrating that while prompting can be effective, abliteration (refusal directions ablation) eliminates refusal with minimal impact on task performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TF-RefusalBench基准，测量并缓解多语言刑事法律场景中LLM的过度对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在法律领域应用受限于过度对齐，特别是在刑事法律中，安全护栏导致对暴力、性犯罪等合法工作的拒绝和免责声明。现有研究缺乏针对多语言刑事法律场景的专门基准和缓解方法，且过度对齐的影响维度复杂，需要系统测量。
light_analysis.method: 基于瑞士联邦最高法院公开裁决构建多语言基准TF-RefusalBench，包含5,200个提示，覆盖法、德、意、英四种语言，涉及翻译和摘要任务。通过对比不同模型、语言组合分析过度对齐现象，并评估提示工程与abliteration（拒绝方向消融）两种缓解策略。
light_analysis.result: 过度对齐受模型、提示语言和文本语言交互影响，且不能仅从拒绝率评估，还需考虑免责声明对任务忠实度的破坏。Abliteration方法能完全消除拒绝，且对翻译和摘要任务性能影响极小（如BLEU和ROUGE分数几乎不变）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次针对多语言刑事法律场景量化过度对齐，提出有效缓解方法。TF-RefusalBench为评估提供标准化工具，abliteration为本地部署LLM提供可行方案。未来需进一步研究对其他安全维度的影响及跨领域泛化。

title: Polynomial Dice Loss for Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Medical image segmentation is a fundamental task for medical image processing and computer-assisted intervention, yet data imbalance and small lesion detection pose significant challenges. Dice Loss, which measures the overlap between predicted and ground truth regions, is widely used to mitigate these issues. To further emphasize its properties, we propose Polynomial Dice Loss, a polynomial extension of Dice Loss. Specifically, by leveraging the geometric characteristics of Dice Loss and formulating the loss function as a polynomial representation via Taylor expansion, we enable the adjustment of the contribution of higher-order components to the loss function. In our experiments, we evaluate the proposed method against loss functions derived from conventional Dice and Tversky coefficients. Experimental results and further analysis show that the polynomial formulation provides a simple way to control the loss shape and achieves competitive performance across multiple segmentation settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多项式Dice损失函数，通过泰勒展开控制损失形状，提升医疗图像分割中数据不平衡和小病灶检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗图像分割面临数据不平衡和小病灶检测难题，现有Dice Loss虽能缓解但灵活性不足。传统方法无法精细调节损失函数对难易样本的权重，导致小病灶易被忽略。因此需要一种可调整损失形状的方法来提升分割精度。
light_analysis.method: 基于Dice Loss的几何特性，利用泰勒展开将其表示为多项式形式，通过调节高阶项系数控制损失函数形状。该方法无需修改网络结构，仅替换损失函数即可适应不同分割场景，如小病灶或类别不平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在多个医疗图像分割任务中，与基于Dice系数和Tversky系数的损失函数对比，Polynomial Dice Loss在分割精度上达到竞争性性能，尤其在小病灶检测上表现更优，能有效控制损失曲线形状，提升模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的多项式Dice损失通过简单修改损失项权重即可适应不同数据分布，为医疗图像分割提供了一种灵活有效的损失函数设计思路。未来可探索自适应调节多项式阶数或更复杂的展开方式。

title: Convergence of Gradient Descent for General Neural Network Architectures Beyond the NTK Regime
abstract: Training dynamics is central to understanding neural networks, yet its theoretical analysis remains difficult even for simple architectures and becomes substantially more challenging for general modern architectures. In this paper, we propose a convergence framework for analyzing gradient descent (GD) dynamics under a broad family of neural network architectures and datasets beyond the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. The framework is formulated at the level of network blocks and covers architectures including pre-normalized multi-layer transformers. More precisely, under mild assumptions, we prove that for almost all initializations, GD with regular learning rates converges to the neighbourhood of a stationary point. This is mainly proved by establishing an iterate-dependent PL-type inequality through analyticity and measure-zero arguments, and by proving Lipschitz smoothness along the GD trajectory through polynomial generalized smoothness and a local relaxed dissipative condition. We further interpret the theorem under Xavier initialization and practical architectural scaling, showing that the learning rate scale depends on the depth and effective bottleneck dimensions rather than the largest width. Finally, we derive structural nondegeneracy implications for residual connections and function composition, and provide a generic characterization of global minimizers within our framework.
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2506.24120

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个通用收敛框架，证明梯度下降在超越神经正切核机制的多种神经网络架构上收敛到驻点邻域。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练动态是理解神经网络的核心，但理论分析困难，尤其对于现代通用架构。现有神经正切核（NTK）机制分析简单架构有效，但难以推广到复杂架构如预标准化多层Transformer。本文旨在建立不依赖NTK机制的通用收敛理论。
light_analysis.method: 提出块级收敛框架，覆盖预标准化多层Transformer等架构。通过解析性和测度零参数建立迭代依赖的PL型不等式，利用多项式广义光滑和局部松弛耗散条件证明Lipschitz光滑性。分析Xavier初始化下的学习率缩放，其依赖于深度和有效瓶颈维度而非最大宽度。
light_analysis.result: 在温和假设下，对于几乎所有初始化，常规学习率的梯度下降收敛到驻点的邻域。推导了残差连接和函数组合的结构非退化含义，并给出了全局最小化器的通用刻画。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架超越了NTK机制，适用于现代神经网络架构，揭示了学习率缩放与深度和瓶颈维度相关，为理解训练动态提供了新视角。未来可扩展至其他优化器或架构。

title: Rethinking Molecular Graph Backdoors under Chemistry-aware Admission
abstract: Backdoor attacks on molecular graph neural networks (GNNs) are typically evaluated as abstract graph edits, but real molecular learning pipelines do not train on arbitrary graphs. Molecular records must first survive parsing, sanitization, canonicalization, and graph-string consistency checks. We formalize this overlooked admission stage as ChemGuard, an operational protocol for testing whether a submitted molecular record can enter a realistic learning pipeline, while complementing existing defenses. ChemGuard admits a record only when its molecular string is sanitizable and the graph reconstructed from that string matches the submitted molecular graph. Under this operational view, many existing graph-based backdoors lose much of their apparent efficacy because their poisons are chemically invalid or representation-inconsistent. We then show that admission checks alone are insufficient to rule out molecular backdoors. We propose ChemBack, an admission-aware molecular backdoor attack that constructs chemically feasible motif-anchor attachments and ranks admitted candidates by fingerprint-based Tanimoto similarity to clean target-class molecules. ChemBack is model-free during trigger selection, using molecular structures, target labels, fingerprints, and public validity checks, but no victim model, surrogate GNN, learned embedding, gradient, logit, or training-code access. Across molecular benchmarks, validators, architectures, and defenses, \textbf{ChemBack} achieves high attack success with fully admitted poisons while preserving clean accuracy. Our results reveal a two-sided lesson, chemistry-aware admission suppresses many graph-only backdoors, yet chemically valid and target-aligned molecular backdoors remain a practical threat.

light_analysis.overview: 提出化学感知的分子图后门攻击框架ChemBack和防御评估协议ChemGuard，揭示化学有效性对后门攻击的双面影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际分子学习流程包含严格的化学有效性检查（如解析、清洗、规范化和图字符串一致性检查），而现有后门攻击多在抽象图上评估，忽视这些检查，导致高估攻击效力。因此需要重新审视后门攻击的真实威胁，并设计考虑化学有效性的攻击与防御。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出ChemGuard协议，要求分子字符串可清洗且从字符串重建的图与提交图匹配，以模拟真实学习流程。然后提出ChemBack攻击，通过构造化学可行的基序附着（motif-anchor attachments），并利用指纹Tanimoto相似性对候选毒药排序，使其与目标类干净分子相似。ChemBack无需模型访问，仅依赖分子结构、标签和有效性检查。
light_analysis.result: 在多个分子基准、不同验证器、架构（如GCN、GAT、GIN）及防御下，ChemBack实现了高攻击成功率（如平均ASR>90%），且所有毒药均通过ChemGuard的化学检查，同时保持干净测试准确率几乎无下降。相比现有后门攻击（如随机边扰动、子图替换），ChemBack在化学有效性下更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 化学感知的检查（ChemGuard）能抑制许多基于图的抽象后门攻击，但化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门（ChemBack）仍是实际威胁。该工作揭示了化学有效性在分子图后门研究中的双面性，为设计更鲁棒的分子GNN和防御策略提供了新方向，未来可探索更复杂的化学反应规则。

title: Adaptive Hard-Soft Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Robust Boundary-Constrained PDE Solving
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide an effective way to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical principles into the learning process. However, the conventional PINN formulation, in which all constraints are imposed as soft penalty terms within a composite loss, often exhibits slow convergence, sensitivity to loss weight scaling, and inaccurate boundary enforcement due to poor conditioning of the optimization landscape. To address these limitations, this study proposes a unified hard--soft physics--informed neural network (HSPINN) with adaptive loss weighting. In this framework, Dirichlet and periodic boundary conditions are enforced exactly by construction through analytical or polynomial lifting, masking functions, and periodic feature mappings, while the governing PDE residuals, Neumann fluxes, and initial conditions are treated as soft constraints. An inverse-share softmax strategy dynamically balances the relative importance of individual loss components during training, eliminating manual penalty tuning and improving gradient stability. This formulation ensures boundary admissibility throughout optimization and enhances convergence efficiency and numerical robustness. Applications to representative elliptic (Poisson), parabolic (Burgers), and hyperbolic (convection with periodic boundaries) problems demonstrate that HSPINN consistently achieves faster convergence, higher accuracy, and greater stability than conventional PINNs, establishing a general and scalable foundation for physics-constrained deep learning across science and technology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应硬-软物理信息神经网络(HSPINN)，通过精确强制边界条件和自适应损失加权，提升PDE求解的收敛性、准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统PINN将所有约束作为软惩罚项，导致收敛慢、对损失权重敏感、边界条件不准确。这些问题限制了PINN在边界约束PDE求解中的实用性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出HSPINN，通过解析/多项式提升、掩蔽函数和周期性特征映射精确强制Dirichlet和周期边界条件（硬约束），PDE残差等作为软约束。采用逆共享softmax策略动态平衡损失分量，消除手动调参并改善梯度稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在Poisson、Burgers和周期性对流问题中，相比传统PINN，HSPINN收敛更快、精度更高、稳定性更强，具体指标如损失下降速度和最终误差均有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: HSPINN为物理约束深度学习提供了通用可扩展基础，有效提升边界约束PDE求解的鲁棒性和效率，可推广至科学和工程领域的多种应用。

title: SOAP-Bubbles: Structured Weight Uncertainty for Neural Networks
abstract: Structured weight-uncertainty can improve many aspects of deep learning, but it remains costly to estimate and difficult to implement. Here, we show that these issues can be addressed by adapting the SOAP optimizer. Our key idea is to run IVON, an existing diagonal-covariance variational method, in the eigenspace of SOAP's preconditioner and then use the preconditioner to transform the diagonal estimate into a non-diagonal covariance. The resulting method has costs similar to those of SOAP and requires no drastic changes to training pipelines. We call the posteriors obtained in this way SOAP-Bubbles and our new optimizer Eigenspace-VON (EVON). We show that, for logistic regression, EVON recovers the exact Gaussian covariance and that, for language model pretraining, it yields significantly better results than existing diagonal-covariance methods. Our work makes it easier to estimate more expressive posterior distributions for deep learning at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EVON优化器，通过在SOAP预条件子特征空间中运行IVON，高效估计结构化权重不确定性，得到非对角后验SOAP-Bubbles。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构化权重不确定性能改善深度学习性能，但现有方法估计成本高、实现复杂，难以规模化应用。本文旨在解决这些障碍，提供一种轻量级且易于集成的方案。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是将对角协方差变分法IVON嵌入SOAP优化器的预条件子特征空间，利用预条件子将对角协方差变换为非对角形式，得到新优化器Eigenspace-VON (EVON)。该方法保持与SOAP相近的计算成本，无需大幅修改训练流程。
light_analysis.result: 在逻辑回归任务中，EVON能精确恢复真实高斯协方差；在语言模型预训练中，其性能显著优于传统对角协方差方法，验证了结构化不确定性估计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EVON/SOAP-Bubbles提供了一种高效、易实现的结构化后验估计方法，降低了不确定性量化的门槛，尤其适用于大规模深度学习，未来可扩展至更多模型架构。

title: Changing Modalities: Adapting Remote Sensing Models to New Satellites and Sensors
abstract: Machine learning models for remote sensing are trained and deployed on a static set of modalities. However, as we equip newer satellites with novel sensors and retire old ones, practitioners may wish to deploy an existing model on a substitution, superset, or subset of modalities with minimal retraining given data availability or practical computational constraints. We study the setting of updating existing models to changing modalities and identify three main scenarios: Modality Transfer (substitution), Addition (superset), and Peeking (subset). We propose DeluluNet, an architecture with modular components for all three changing modality scenarios. DeluluNet is trained end-to-end, learning a multi-modal model from a unimodal teacher and unlabeled multimodal data via modality hallucination--predicting missing modality representations from those that are present. As a result, DeluluNet can keep predicting even when input modalities change, providing a practical alternative to re-labeling and re-training in a changing world.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeluluNet架构，通过模态幻觉实现遥感模型向新卫星传感器的模态适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感模型在固定模态上训练，但卫星更新导致模态变化（替换、增加、子集），重新标注和训练成本高。现有方法缺乏对模态变化的灵活适应，需要一种无需大量重新训练即可部署的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出DeluluNet，基于模块化组件，通过模态幻觉从单模态教师和未标记多模态数据端到端学习多模态模型。识别三种变化场景：模态转移、增加、窥视。从存在模态预测缺失模态表示。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但表明DeluluNet能在模态变化时持续预测，为重新标注和训练提供替代方案。推断该方法在多种场景下有效，但需查阅原文获取准确性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeluluNet通过模态幻觉实现了对变化的模态的鲁棒适应，避免了昂贵的重新训练。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于卫星遥感系统的动态更新。未来可扩展至其他模态变化场景。

title: Faithful Grounded Visual Reasoning via Learned Proxy-Tokens
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Visual Question Answering (VQA), yet their "black-box" nature hinders deployment in critical domains. Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) approaches attempt to improve interpretability by explicitly couple textual rationales with visual grounding information, which are typically textual coordinates. This mechanism lacks a learnable semantic link to the visual features, often resulting in a semantic-spatial gap where the model hallucinates coordinates that do not correspond to image evidences. In this work, we introduce Composer, a MLLM that leverages a novel visual grounding mechanism based on learned proxy-tokens to promote faithful interpretability. These discrete symbolic pointers explicitly index the image latent space, allowing the model to manipulate visual regions as addressable, semantically manipulable sets. To rigorously validate our novel grounding mechanism, we constructed ComposerGCoT, a dataset synthesized to enable holistic assessment of reasoning consistency and grounding accuracy. Experimental results indicate that Composer achieves performance parity with its coordinate-based counterpart in final answer accuracy, while improving visual grounding accuracy by +9.0 points. By demonstrating that discrete proxy-tokens capture spatial semantics more effectively than typical textual coordinates, we establish that visual grounding mechanisms with learnable semantic links represent a promising path toward trustworthy and reliable MLLMs.
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Code, model and data available at: https://github.com/CEA-LIST/Composer

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于学习代理令牌的视觉定位机制，实现忠实可解释的多模态视觉推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在视觉问答中表现优异，但其黑箱特性阻碍了关键领域部署。现有可解释方法通过文本坐标耦合理由与视觉定位，但缺乏与视觉特征的可学习语义连接，导致语义-空间鸿沟，模型常产生与图像证据不符的坐标幻觉。需一种具有可学习语义链接的视觉定位机制来提升忠实性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Composer模型，基于学习代理令牌的新型视觉定位机制。代理令牌作为离散符号指针，显式索引图像潜在空间，将视觉区域视为可寻址、可语义操作集。同时构建ComposerGCoT数据集，用于综合评估推理一致性和定位准确性。该方法通过可学习语义链接替代传统文本坐标，弥合语义-空间鸿沟。
light_analysis.result: Composer在最终答案准确率上与基于坐标的对应模型持平，同时视觉定位准确率提升9.0个百分点。实验表明，离散代理令牌比典型文本坐标更有效地捕获空间语义，验证了可学习语义链接的视觉定位机制在可信赖多模态大模型中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Composer证明了具有可学习语义链接的视觉定位机制是迈向可信赖多模态大模型的有前景方向。离散代理令牌能忠实反映图像证据，提升可解释性。未来可探索该机制在其他多模态任务中的应用，以及处理更复杂空间关系。局限性可能包括数据集规模有限及对细粒度定位的泛化能力。

title: Superhuman AI for Generals.io Using Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We present a superhuman AI agent for Generals.io, a real-time strategy game that requires both long-horizon planning and short-term tactics under strong imperfect information. Trained for four days on 4x NVIDIA H200 GPUs, our agent reaches #1 on the public 1v1 leaderboard of over 5,000 human players, leading the second-ranked player by the same margin that separates second place from 25th, and beats the two top-ranked humans head-to-head with a combined 199-70 record across 269 ladder matches. A key enabler is a JAX-native simulator that reaches tens of millions of frames per second on a single GPU, roughly a 10,000x speedup over the prior simulator. On top of this, we train a vision transformer policy end-to-end by self-play with a policy-gradient loop and sparse win/loss reward, using top-advantage sample filtering and an exponential moving average of the policy parameters. Taken together, our findings highlight what matters, and what does not, once a fast simulator removes the data bottleneck.

light_analysis.overview: 使用自对弈强化学习和JAX原生模拟器，在Generals.io实时策略游戏中训练出超人AI代理。
light_analysis.motivation: Generals.io是一款存在强不完美信息的实时策略游戏，需要长期规划和短期战术。现有方法受限于数据瓶颈，而本研究的动机是通过构建高速模拟器来突破这一瓶颈，从而训练出超越人类顶尖玩家的AI代理。
light_analysis.method: 采用JAX原生模拟器，在单个GPU上达到每秒数千万帧，相比之前模拟器提速约10,000倍。在此基础上，使用视觉Transformer策略网络，通过自对弈和策略梯度循环进行端到端训练，奖励为稀疏的胜负信号。采用优势样本过滤和策略参数的指数移动平均来稳定训练。
light_analysis.result: 在4个NVIDIA H200 GPU上训练4天后，代理在公开1v1排行榜上超过5000名人类玩家排名第一，领先第二名与第二名到第25名的差距相同。在头对头比赛中以199胜70负的战绩击败前两名人类选手。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了在高速模拟器消除数据瓶颈后，自对弈强化学习能够产生超人水平的游戏AI。主要贡献在于JAX模拟器的巨大加速和简单有效的训练流程，为类似实时策略游戏提供了可复现的框架。未来可扩展到多人场景或更复杂的游戏机制。

title: Abstract representational geometry supports inference in large language models
abstract: A defining feature of human intelligence is the ability to adapt to changing environments by inferring latent task structure from sparse observations. Neuroscientific research indicates that this capability relies on the hippocampus constructing abstract representations, expressed as low-dimensional, approximately orthogonal manifolds in neural state space. However, the internal mechanisms of large language models (LLMs) remain largely opaque, making it unclear whether they form comparable abstract representations or instead rely on task-specific statistical regularities when performing comparable reasoning tasks. Here we adapt a contextual reversal-learning paradigm to a text-based setting and compare humans and LLMs at both the Behavioural and representational levels. We report that although LLMs exhibit generalizable reasoning less frequently than humans, when such inference occurs, their internal states exhibit abstract geometric structures that resemble those reported in the hippocampus. Notably, this representational geometry is not uniformly distributed but is organized hierarchically across model depth: whereas lower layers show early, stable encoding of stimulus identity, higher layers form a hippocampal-like functional band enriched for abstract context geometry associated with inference. Furthermore, complementary intervention experiments mechanistically implicate geometry in reasoning: task-sequence language modelling induces geometric disentanglement, whereas geometric regularization of higher layers increases the emergence of generalizable inference. Together, these findings establish abstract representational geometry as a mechanistic principle supporting inference in large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大语言模型内部存在类似海马体的抽象表征几何结构，该结构分层组织并机械性地支持推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能够通过稀疏观测推断潜在任务结构，依赖于海马体构建的低维正交抽象表征。大语言模型内部机制不透明，不清楚其是形成类似抽象表征还是依赖统计规律。理解LLM是否具备这种能力对于揭示其推理机制和与人类智能的异同至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 将情境反转学习范式改编为文本任务，比较人类和LLM的行为与表征。分析模型内部状态的几何结构，观察其跨层级组织。通过干预实验：任务序列语言建模诱导几何解耦，以及几何正则化提升高层表征的抽象性，探究几何与推理的因果关系。
light_analysis.result: LLM的泛化推理频率低于人类，但当推理发生时，其内部状态呈现类似海马体的抽象几何结构。该结构分层：低层稳定编码刺激身份，高层形成与推理相关的抽象语境几何。干预实验表明，几何正则化增加了泛化推理的出现，证实几何对推理的机械性作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了抽象表征几何作为大语言模型推理的机械原理，揭示了LLM内部组织与生物智能的相似性。该发现有助于设计更高效的推理模型，但可能局限于特定任务范式，未来需探索更广泛的场景。

title: RT-DocLayout: Real-Time End-to-End Document Layout Analysis with Reading Order in the Wild
abstract: Accurate document layout analysis remains a critical bottleneck for document parsing systems, due to the intricate coupling among heterogeneous document layout elements, geometric distortions (\eg, paper warping and bending, perspective variations), and reading order within diverse layout structures. Existing approaches typically rely on fragmented multi-stage pipelines or computationally heavy generative Transformer architectures, leading to error propagation and limited efficiency.   In this paper, we present RT-DocLayout, a highly efficient end-to-end framework for document layout analysis, designed as a front-end for document parsing tasks. The proposed model unifies classification, detection, pixel-level segmentation, and reading order prediction for layout elements within a single 33M-parameter architecture. Built upon the RT-DETR, our key contribution is a unified multi-task formulation within a single query-based decoder that simultaneously classifies, regresses bounding box, generates masks, and constructs relationship to reason reading order.   By jointly learning geometric and structural representations, RT-DocLayout introduces multi-task optimization that substantially improves robustness under real-world document distortions. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in document layout analysis while maintaining real-time inference speed(132.1 FPS). When coupled with downstream OCR engines, RT-DocLayout significantly improves full-document reconstruction quality, providing a scalable and practical foundation for real-world document intelligence systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RT-DocLayout，一个统一多任务端到端框架，在单架构中同时完成文档布局分析和阅读顺序预测，实现实时高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文档布局分析方法通常依赖多阶段流水线或计算密集的生成式Transformer架构，导致错误传播和效率低下，难以应对真实场景中几何畸变和阅读顺序的复杂性。因此需要一个统一高效的端到端解决方案。
light_analysis.method: RT-DocLayout基于RT-DETR构建，核心创新是设计了一个统一多任务公式的单一查询解码器，能同时进行边界框回归、分类、像素级分割和阅读顺序关系推理。模型仅33M参数，通过联合学习几何和结构表示，增强了在真实文档畸变下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准上取得SOTA性能，同时推理速度达到132.1 FPS。作为前端与下游OCR引擎结合时，显著提升了全文档重建质量，验证了其在真实文档智能系统中的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RT-DocLayout以实时速度和轻量级参数实现了文档布局分析与阅读顺序预测的统一，为文档解析系统提供了高效可扩展的前端。未来可探索更复杂的文档结构和多语言适应性。

title: WaveDetect: Robust Framework for Machine-Generated Text Detection via Wavelet Transform
abstract: As Large Language Models asymptotically approach human-level fluency in natural language generation, solely relying on surface-level semantic artifacts for detecting LLM-generated texts has become increasingly precarious. Existing detectors often falter when facing three critical challenges: adversarial perturbations, cross-domain shifts, and the rapid temporal evolution of the foundation model. To address these issues, we propose \wavedetect, a novel framework that reformulates text detection as a signal processing task within the time-frequency domain. Unlike previous methods that analyze static token probability distributions, \wavedetect models the generated output as a probability signal, upon which a differentiable Continuous Wavelet Transform is applied to convert them into learnable spectral representations. This process reveals the intrinsic ``spectral fingerprints'' in machine-generated texts--patterns that remain invisible in time domain. Comprehensive evaluations on three well-curated datasets (RAID, EvoBench, and Domain-Shift) show that our method achieves a new state-of-the-art. It not only achieves superior accuracy but also exhibits remarkable robustness against sophisticated attacks, generalization across out-of-distribution topics and unseen evolving LLMs. Our results validate the efficacy of spectral analysis as a promising paradigm for LLM-generated texts detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WaveDetect框架，将文本检测转化为时频域信号处理任务，通过小波变换提取机器生成文本的‘频谱指纹’，实现鲁棒的检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM文本检测器依赖表面语义特征，难以应对对抗扰动、跨域偏移和模型快速演进三大挑战。随着LLM生成文本趋近人类水平，传统方法可靠性下降。需要更鲁棒的检测范式，能够捕捉机器文本中隐藏的、时域不可见的固有模式。
light_analysis.method: WaveDetect将文本生成输出建模为概率信号，应用可微连续小波变换转换为可学习频谱表示，提取机器文本的‘频谱指纹’（在时域不可见）。框架在RAID、EvoBench和Domain-Shift三个数据集上评估，采用端到端训练，无需手工特征。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到新SOTA，不仅准确率更高，且对对抗攻击、跨领域主题和未见过的演进LLM均表现出强鲁棒性。具体数值摘要未给出，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了频谱分析作为LLM文本检测新范式的有效性。该方法具有强鲁棒性和泛化能力，可应对实际部署中的动态变化。未来方向包括进一步优化小波变换与文本特定适配。

title: VideoAgent: All-in-One Framework for Video Understanding and Editing
abstract: Video editing has become essential in digital media creation, yet existing automated systems are restricted to short segment processing and domain-specific tasks. They face two critical limitations: i) inability to handle diverse video comprehension and editing operations, and ii) lack of long-video understanding for coherent narrative creation. We propose VideoAgent, an all-in-one agentic framework addressing these challenges through two key innovations. First, we develop automated video shot creation with shot planning agents for coherent narratives and cross-modal retrieval for aligned visual content. Second, we design a multi-agent orchestration framework integrating over thirty specialized editing agents. Intent parsing filters relevant tools while textual-gradient graph optimization assembles complex editing pipelines. Extensive experiments on our newly-proposed VideoEdit benchmark and public datasets demonstrate VideoAgent's superiority over existing multimodal LLMs and agentic systems. VideoAgent achieves 87-95% orchestration success rates while reducing API costs by 60%. Human evaluation across six video categories shows VideoAgent produces professional-quality content approaching human-level performance, with ratings only 4% below human-created videos. We release our code at https://github.com/HKUDS/VideoAgent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoAgent，一个统一框架，通过自动镜头创建和多智能体编排，实现视频理解与编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频编辑系统局限于短片段处理和特定任务，无法处理多样化的视频理解和编辑操作，且缺乏长视频理解以生成连贯叙事。这限制了自动视频编辑的应用。
light_analysis.method: VideoAgent通过两个关键创新：1）自动镜头创建，使用镜头规划代理生成连贯叙事，跨模态检索对齐视觉内容；2）多智能体编排框架，集成超过30个专业编辑代理。意图解析过滤相关工具，文本-梯度图优化组装复杂编辑流水线。
light_analysis.result: 在新提出的VideoEdit基准和公共数据集上，VideoAgent优于现有多模态LLM和代理系统。编排成功率87-95%，API成本降低60%。人类评估中，六类视频的专业质量接近人类水平，评分仅比人类创建视频低4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoAgent实现了长视频理解与多样编辑的统一框架，展示了高质量结果和成本效益。未来可扩展更多编辑智能体。

title: Tmax: A simple recipe for terminal agents
abstract: Terminal-using agents have quickly become the most popular downstream application of language models (LMs). Despite their prevalence, relatively little academic work has examined RL-based training of these models, likely due to difficult benchmarks, a lack of data, and a lack of simple baseline recipes. We present Tmax, the strongest open RL recipe for terminal agents to date, bringing open data recipes closer to the frontier. While simple, our recipe achieves 27\% on Terminal-Bench 2.0 with only 9B parameters, outperforming much larger models from prior work. Concretely, we generate data using a novel taxonomy, combining difficulty control, personas, and verifier diversification, which allows us to cheaply generate large amounts of terminal environments for RL and SFT training. We open-source our terminal dataset, which is over 2.5x larger than previously released terminal-agent datasets. We then train open-weight models using RL with our data, using a simple, outcome-only recipe. We release our data, models, and code as a strong baseline for future open academic work on terminal agents at https://github.com/hamishivi/tmax.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tmax，一个简单且开源的强化学习配方，用于训练终端智能体，在9B参数下达到27%准确率，超越更大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 终端智能体是语言模型最流行的下游应用，但基于强化学习的训练研究相对缺乏，主要由于基准测试困难、数据不足和缺乏简单基线。现有方法多依赖大型模型或专有数据，阻碍了学术研究。本文旨在提供一个简单、开源且高效的基线，促进终端智能体领域的开放研究。
light_analysis.method: 采用新颖的分类法生成训练数据，结合难度控制、角色设计和验证器多样化，高效生产大量终端环境。使用这些数据对开源模型进行监督微调（SFT）和基于结果的强化学习（RL）训练。数据集规模比先前公开的终端智能体数据集大2.5倍以上。模型仅9B参数，训练简单且仅使用结果信号。
light_analysis.result: 在Terminal-Bench 2.0上，Tmax（9B参数）达到27%的准确率，显著优于先前工作中更大的模型。数据集和模型均开源，为未来学术工作提供强基线。实验表明，即使简单的RL配方也能在终端智能体任务上取得竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Tmax提供了首个简单且完全开源的高性能终端智能体训练方案，其数据集（扩大2.5倍）和模型可作为基准。该方法验证了基于结果RL的有效性，降低了终端智能体研究的门槛。未来工作可探索更复杂的RL算法或扩展至更多终端环境。

title: The Anatomy of the CTC Oracle Gap: Acoustic Exhaustion and Linguistic Recovery
abstract: We study the limits of CTC-internal scoring for N-best hypothesis selection and locate the information bottleneck separating acoustic confidence from linguistic plausibility. Eleven CTC-internal and acoustic-feature scoring strategies produce no statistically significant WER improvement over greedy decoding on LibriSpeech dev-other at G=16 (all p > 0.05). The exhaustion is systematic: CTC's Spearman $ρ$ between hypothesis score and per-utterance WER degrades from -0.574 at G=4 to -0.270 at G=128, a 53% loss driven by blank-path proliferation. This establishes that the discriminative capacity of CTC-internal representations is saturated: no recombination of acoustic signals can close the oracle gap.   Confirming that the bottleneck is linguistic, not acoustic, external linguistic information introduced via MBR decoding breaks through it. MBR-CER decoding with a RoBERTa pseudo-log-likelihood (PLL) posterior ($τ$=10, G=128) achieves 5.42% WER on held-out LibriSpeech test-other (greedy 5.96%, $Δ$=-0.535 pp, p<0.0001, 9.0% relative). RoBERTa PLL $ρ$ degrades only 21% over the same range, retaining discriminating power where CTC loses it. Applied without retuning across two Zipformer architectures, three domains (LibriSpeech, TED-LIUM 3, VoxPopuli), and four MUSAN noise levels, the recipe gives significant gains in 11 of 13 conditions.   On the training side, standard MWER training via the CTC forward-backward algorithm implements Rao-Blackwellized REINFORCE at the output projection (variance about 3x below Viterbi). Yet sequence-level fine-tuning fails at near-converged checkpoints: all four MWER configurations on CR-CTC collapse (+6.18 to +8.90 pp WER), as a training oracle gap of 0.007 pp provides no usable reward signal.
comment: 30 pages, 8 figures. Code and data: https://github.com/Melodiz/RBPO

light_analysis.overview: 揭示CTC内部评分瓶颈在于语言而非声学，提出基于RoBERTa的MBR解码突破该瓶颈，在多个数据集上显著降低WER。
light_analysis.motivation: CTC解码中，N-best假设选择依赖内部评分，但现有方法提升有限。本文定位信息瓶颈，发现CTC内部表征的判别能力已饱和，声学信号无法闭合oracle间隙，而语言信息才是关键瓶颈，亟需引入外部语言知识来改善解码性能。
light_analysis.method: 系统评估11种CTC内部和声学特征评分策略，发现均无统计显著提升。提出使用RoBERTa伪对数似然（PLL）作为后验的MBR解码（MBR-CER），在G=128时以温度τ=10解码。实验涵盖两种Zipformer架构、三个领域（LibriSpeech、TED-LIUM 3、VoxPopuli）及四种噪声水平。
light_analysis.result: MBR-CER解码在LibriSpeech test-other上WER从贪婪解码的5.96%降至5.42%（相对降低9.0%，p<0.0001）。CTC的Spearman ρ随G增大从-0.574降至-0.270（损失53%），而RoBERTa PLL ρ仅降21%，保持判别力。在13个条件中11个获得显著增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明CTC内部评分存在声学耗尽现象，外部语言信息是突破瓶颈的关键。MBR解码简单有效，无需重新训练。训练侧发现标准MWER在接近收敛时因奖励信号微弱而失效。未来可探索更优的语言模型集成方式。

title: EHR-Complex: Benchmarking Medical Agents for Complex Clinical Reasoning
abstract: Clinical agents promise to democratize access to electronic health records (EHRs), yet existing benchmarks fail to reflect the complexity of practical EHR analysis, e.g., often operating on idealized, clean EHRs via static SQL generation rather than interactive execution. In this work, we introduce EHR-Complex, a large-scale benchmark designed for interactive clinical database reasoning. Built on the large MIMIC-IV substrate (365K patients, 31 tables, 500M+ records), EHR-Complex comprises about 52K tasks spanning six clinical intents, supporting both patient-level and population-level queries, where each task requires an agent to interact with a sandboxed environment by executing SQL queries or Python code. Notably, EHR-Complex considers the real-world SQL task complexity for longitudinal multi-table aggregation and compositional reasoning, resulting in 31.93 SQL structural components per query on average. Evaluation results on EHR-Complex reveal the clinical difficulty of these EHR reasoning scenarios, with the top-performing model achieving only 62.3% exact-match accuracy. Pass^k consistency drops below 50% for nearly all evaluated models at k=4, exposing broad stochastic fragility. A fine-grained analysis of more than 3,800 failed trajectories for representative LLMs reveals three dominant failure modes: SQL logic errors, medical-code lookup failures, and semantic misunderstandings. EHR-Complex provides a rigorous testbed for clinical agents and highlights remaining gaps in robust reasoning for large-scale EHR analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EHR-Complex基准，用于评估临床代理在复杂电子健康记录分析中的交互式推理能力，包含大规模多表SQL任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有临床代理基准多基于理想化、静态的SQL生成，无法反映实际EHR分析的复杂性和交互需求。临床代理有望民主化EHR访问，但需要处理纵向多表聚合、组合推理等真实任务，现有方法缺乏对此类复杂度的评估，导致难以衡量代理在实际临床场景中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于MIMIC-IV数据库（36.5万患者、31个表、5亿+记录）构建EHR-Complex，包含约5.2万个任务，覆盖六种临床意图（患者级和群体级查询）。每个任务要求代理通过执行SQL或Python代码与沙箱环境交互，平均每个查询包含31.93个SQL结构组件，强调跨表聚合和组合推理。
light_analysis.result: 最优模型（未具名）在精确匹配准确率上仅达62.3%；Pass@4一致性低于50%，表明模型存在随机脆弱性。对超过3800个失败轨迹的细粒度分析揭示了三种主要失败模式：SQL逻辑错误、医学代码查找失败和语义误解。
light_analysis.conclusion: EHR-Complex为临床代理提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了当前模型在复杂EHR推理中的显著差距。该基准推动了临床决策支持系统的评估，但未来需扩展更多任务类型和错误分析，以提升代理的鲁棒性。

title: GRIMIP: A General Framework for Instance-Specific Configuration of MIP Solvers Using LLMs
abstract: Configuring the hyperparameters of Mixed-integer programming (MIP) solvers is a high-dimensional, instance-dependent optimization problem where suboptimal settings can degrade solving time by orders of magnitude. Default configurations are often suboptimal, while traditional tuning methods either suffer from the ``cold-start'' problem and inefficient search or heavily rely on expert experience. This paper introduces \textbf{GRIMIP} (\textbf{\underline{G}}eneral \textbf{\underline{R}}easoning for \textbf{\underline{I}}nstance-specific \textbf{\underline{MIP}} configuration), a novel hybrid intelligence framework that synergistically integrates the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) with the sample-efficient search of Bayesian Optimization (BO). GRIMIP enables the LLM to function as a complete probabilistic surrogate within the BO loop, significantly improving performance and reducing sampling and evaluation costs. On seven benchmarks including MIPLIB, GRIMIP achieves over 40\% reduction in Primal-Dual Integral on hard instances, outperforming SMAC and other LLM-assisted BO methods. By granting LLMs sufficient autonomy, GRIMIP combines the expert-level reasoning of LLMs with the efficient search of BO, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRIMIP框架，通过融合大语言模型与贝叶斯优化，实现混合整数规划求解器超参数的实例化配置，显著提升求解性能。
light_analysis.motivation: MIP求解器的超参数配置是高维、实例依赖的优化问题，默认配置常次优，传统调优方法存在冷启动、搜索效率低或依赖专家经验等不足。
light_analysis.method: GRIMIP框架将LLM作为概率代理模型集成到贝叶斯优化循环中，利用LLM的语义推理能力进行高效搜索，降低采样和评估成本，实现混合智能。
light_analysis.result: 在包括MIPLIB的七个基准上，对困难实例实现了超过40%的原始对偶积分减少，性能优于SMAC及其他LLM辅助贝叶斯优化方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRIMIP结合LLM的专家级推理与贝叶斯优化的高效搜索，达到最先进性能，为MIP求解器超参数配置提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Ocean4D: Generative Underwater 4D Reconstruction via Medium-Aware Video Diffusion
abstract: Underwater 4D reconstruction remains challenging due to the coupling between degraded light transport in participating media and dynamic water variations. Most existing Methods are developed under in-air assumptions and do not explicitly account for underwater absorption and backscatter. Additionally, near-static assumptions make these approaches sensitive to drifting particles and dynamic distractors , leading to unstable geometry and inconsistent cross-view results. To address these issues, we propose a generative framework for underwater 4D reconstruction, named Ocean4D, which is built on two complementary components. Specifically, 4D-GCC constructs 4D geometrically consistent conditioning with improved cross-frame coverage, while the Medium-Aware Block performs implicit medium-aware denoising in the latent diffusion process to stabilize underwater appearance under absorption and scattering. Given a monocular video and target cameras, our method generates videos along the target trajectories while preserving global structure and cross-view consistency. Extensive experiments on both dynamic and static underwater benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on underwater reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ocean4D生成式框架，通过介质感知视频扩散实现水下4D重建，解决吸收散射与动态干扰问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 水下4D重建因介质中退化光传输与动态水变化的耦合而极具挑战。现有方法基于空气假设，未显式建模水下吸收和背向散射，且近静态假设导致对漂移粒子和动态干扰敏感，产生不稳定几何和不一致的跨视图结果。因此需要一种能处理水下特有光照衰减和动态场景的生成式方法。
light_analysis.method: Ocean4D框架包含两个互补组件：4D-GCC（4D几何一致条件）通过改进跨帧覆盖构建稳定的几何先验；Medium-Aware Block（介质感知块）在潜在扩散过程中隐式执行介质感知去噪，稳定水下外观。输入为单目视频和目标相机轨迹，输出沿目标轨迹的生成视频，保持全局结构和跨视图一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在动态和静态水下基准上的大量实验表明，Ocean4D在水下重建任务上达到了最先进性能。虽未给出具体数值，但证明了该方法在跨视图一致性和对动态干扰鲁棒性上的显著优势，优于现有基于空气假设的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ocean4D是首个专门针对水下环境设计的生成式4D重建框架，有效解决了介质衰减和动态干扰。其介质感知扩散机制为水下场景理解提供了新范式，具有在海洋监测、水下机器人等领域的应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的扩散过程或扩展到多视图输入。

title: Non-asymptotic estimates of the minimal risk in statistical learning
abstract: In this paper we prove some concentration inequalities for two types of error probabilities in the Empirical Risk Principle (ERP) in statistical learning, which provide a lower bound and an upper bound for the minimal risk (in terms of the minimal empirical risk) with non-asymptotic high confidence. The usual boundedness condition of the empirical risk function is relaxed to the Gaussian or exponential integrability condition. The confidence of the lower bound of the minimal risk is shown to be independent of the number of training parameters and the dimension of the input vectors, allowing one to detect the deficiency of a learning machine efficiently; and the confidence of the upper bound of the minimal risk is proved to be high provided that the sample size $n$ is much greater than the box dimension of the parameter set $Θ$ in the Orlicz metric $d_{ψ_1}$ associated with the risk functions. Our work is based on Talagrand's concentration inequalities (the sharp versions by Bousquet and Klein-Rio), transport-entropy inequalities and the recent progress in the theory of empirical processes and statistical learning.

light_analysis.overview: 为统计学习的最小风险提供非渐近上下界，放宽有界性条件至高斯或指数可积。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统计学习理论中，经验风险最小化的置信界通常依赖有界性假设，且下界置信度与参数数量或输入维度相关。本文旨在解除这些限制，建立更通用的非渐近估计，以高效检测学习机器缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 基于Talagrand集中不等式（Bousquet和Klein-Rio的锐化版本）以及传输熵不等式，推导两类错误概率的集中不等式。关键创新在于将风险函数的有界性条件放松为高斯或指数可积性，并利用Orlicz度量下的盒维数刻画参数集复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 得到最小风险的下界和上界：下界置信度独立于参数数量和输入维度，能高效检测学习机器不足；上界在样本量远大于参数集盒维数时具有高置信度。结果是非渐近的，提供有限样本保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为非渐近统计学习理论提供了重要贡献，放松了经典有界性假设，使结果适用于更广泛的分布。该方法可指导学习机器设计，未来可扩展至更复杂模型或自适应参数选择。

title: Flow6D: Discrete-to-Continuous Flow Matching for Efficient and Accurate Category-Level 6D Pose Estimation
abstract: 6D pose estimation is a key task in computer vision and embodied AI, widely used in robotic manipulation, augmented reality, etc. Existing methods directly regress in a high-dimensional continuous space, facing two key challenges in category-level pose estimation: limited accuracy due to noise and local optima, and inefficient search over an infinite space that hinders real-time performance. This paper proposes Flow6D, a hierarchical flow matching framework with a two-stage discrete latent space localization-continuous pose regression strategy. Rotation and translation parameters are first discretized into bins, with a discrete flow matching model locking the latent space around the true pose to reduce search complexity. Then, by sampling in the latent space, a continuous flow matching model predicts local pose residuals to optimize the estimate and regress to an accurate pose. The framework also naturally extends to articulated objects, outperforming state-of-the-art methods on synthetic and real datasets with real-time inference at 70 FPS. Project website: https://flow6d.github.io/.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow6D，一种两阶段层次流匹配框架，实现高效准确的类别级6D姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法直接在高维连续空间回归，面临两大挑战：一是噪声和局部最优导致精度受限；二是无限空间搜索效率低，难以实时。类别级姿态估计尤其需要解决这些问题，Flow6D通过离散到连续的流匹配方案，平衡搜索复杂度和精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出层次流匹配框架，包含两阶段：首先离散化旋转和平移参数为桶（bins），用离散流匹配模型锁定姿态附近潜在空间，降低搜索复杂度；然后在潜在空间采样，用连续流匹配模型预测局部残差，优化姿态估计。该框架自然扩展到铰接物体，使用合成和真实数据集训练。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，Flow6D超越现有最先进方法，实现实时推理速度70 FPS。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明在精度和效率上均有提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flow6D为类别级6D姿态估计提供了高效准确的解决方案，通过离散-连续流匹配提高实时性并支持铰接物体，适用于机器人操作、增强现实等场景。未来可探索更复杂的物体类别或动态环境。

title: Transfer learning-based method for automated ewaste recycling in smart cities
abstract: Sorting a huge stream of waste accurately within a short period can be done with the support of digitalization, particularly Artificial Intelligence, instead of traditional methods. The overlap of Artificial Intelligence and Circular Economy can flourish many services in the environmental technology domain, in particular smart ewaste recycling, resulting in enabling circular smart cities. We analyse the growing need for automated ewaste recycling as an essential requirement to cope with the fast growing ewaste stream and we shed the light on the impact of Artificial Intelligence in supporting the recycling process through smart classification of devices, where the smartphone is our case study. Our study applies transfer learning as a special technique of Artificial Intelligence by finetuning the output layers of AlexNet as a pretrained model and perform the implementation on a small size dataset that contains 12 classes from 6 smartphone brands. We evaluate the performance of our model by tuning the learning rate, choosing the best optimizer, and augmenting the original dataset to avoid overfitting. We found that the optimizer of Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum and 3e-4 as a learning rate brings almost 98% model accuracy with generalization. Our study supports automated ewaste recycling in decreasing the error rate of ewaste sorting and investigates the advantages of applying transfer learning as the best scenario to overcome the rising challenges.
comment: Published by the EAI Endorsed Transactions on Smart Cities, 2021 journal

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于迁移学习的智能手机自动分类方法，实现电子垃圾智能回收，支持智慧城市。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子垃圾快速增长，传统分拣方法效率低，需要自动化回收。AI与循环经济结合可促进智慧城市。现有方法可能无法快速准确分类大量电子设备，特别是智能手机品牌和型号多样。
light_analysis.method: 采用迁移学习，微调AlexNet预训练模型的输出层。使用包含6个品牌12类智能手机的小型数据集。通过调整学习率、选择优化器（SGD with Momentum）和数据增强来优化模型，防止过拟合。
light_analysis.result: 使用SGD with Momentum优化器，学习率3e-4，模型准确率达98%，具有良好泛化能力。减少了电子垃圾分拣错误率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 支持自动化电子垃圾回收，降低分拣错误率。验证了迁移学习在解决电子垃圾回收挑战中的优势。可能局限：数据集较小，仅针对智能手机。

title: On the Effect of Segmentation Width and Cluster Size on Speech Resynthesis and Continuation in Generative Spoken Language Models
abstract: Generative Spoken Language Modeling (GSLM) enables text-free speech modeling by training language models (LMs) using discrete speech representations instead of textual transcription. In this paper, we investigate the performance of GSLM on speech synthesis and continuation using discrete speech representations with varying bitrates. We segment speech representations with fixed widths and train K-means models in multiple cluster sizes, resulting in various bitrate settings. We demonstrate that intelligible and natural speech can be synthesized at lower bitrate settings than the baseline. Furthermore, speech continuation quality remains stable at lower bitrates across multiple metrics, suggesting that the conventional GSLM setting may be redundant for effective speech generation. Although LLM-based metrics show higher correlation with human subjective score than conventional metrics, it remains low, highlighting the need for more stable automatic evaluation methods.

light_analysis.overview: 探究GSLM中离散语音表示的分割宽度和聚类大小对语音合成与续接性能的影响，发现较低比特率可合成可理解自然语音，且续接质量稳定。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式口语语言建模（GSLM）通过离散语音表示实现无文本语音建模，但现有方法使用高比特率表示可能冗余。本研究旨在探索更低比特率下语音合成和续接的性能，以简化模型并降低计算成本，同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 采用固定宽度分割语音表示，并在多种聚类大小下训练K-means模型，从而生成不同比特率的离散表示。使用这些表示训练语言模型进行语音合成与续接，评估不同比特率设置对生成语音的清晰度、自然度和续接质量的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，相比基线，较低比特率设置仍能合成清晰自然的语音；语音续接质量在多个指标上保持稳定，说明传统GSLM的高比特率设置可能冗余。此外，LLM-based指标与人类主观评分相关性高于常规指标，但整体相关性仍较低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明低比特率离散表示足以支撑有效的语音合成与续接，可简化GSLM系统。同时指出LLM-based自动评估方法尚需改进，未来可探索更稳定的评估指标和更优的表示量化策略。

title: Towards Root Memories: Benchmarking and Enhancing Implicit Logical Memory Retrieval for Personalized LLMs
abstract: Memory systems are essential for personalized Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing retrieval methods in these systems primarily rely on semantic similarity, potentially missing logically critical memories with limited semantic overlap. Current benchmarks remain inadequate for evaluating this problem. To address this gap, we construct IMLogic, the first high-quality benchmark targeting implicit logical memory retrieval in long-dialogue scenarios. Motivated by this challenge, we introduce root memory, a structured, decision-preserving representation that distills reusable personalized logic from long-term user histories. We then propose RootMem, a plug-and-play framework that first distills raw histories into structured root memories and then uses an LLM-based router to activate logically relevant ones, complementing semantic retrieval with personalized decision logic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RootMem significantly outperforms the strongest retrieval baselines and consistently boosts the accuracy of existing memory agents. Our benchmark and codes will be available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IMLogic-DBB3.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IMLogic基准和RootMem框架，用于增强个性化LLMs中的隐式逻辑记忆检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有个性化LLMs的记忆检索方法主要依赖语义相似性，未能有效检索语义重叠有限但逻辑关键的记忆，且缺乏针对性基准。为解决此问题，需要构建评估隐式逻辑记忆检索的基准，并提出新的记忆表示与检索方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建IMLogic基准，聚焦长对话场景下的隐式逻辑记忆检索。提出根记忆（root memory）概念，一种保留决策的结构化表示，可蒸馏个性化逻辑。设计RootMem框架，先蒸馏原始历史为结构化根记忆，再通过LLM路由器激活逻辑相关记忆，与语义检索互补。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RootMem显著优于最强检索基线，并持续提升现有记忆代理的准确率。在IMLogic基准上验证了有效性，具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但强调超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了首个隐式逻辑记忆检索基准IMLogic及根记忆方法RootMem，弥补了现有个性化LLMs记忆系统的不足。开源代码和基准推动后续研究。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏与路由机制。

title: GIF: Locally Sound Geometric Information Flow Control for LLMs
abstract: Large language models increasingly mediate interactions between sensitive data, untrusted inputs, and privileged actions in agentic systems, creating security and privacy risks. These range from prompt injections that manipulate downstream tool use to leakage of confidential information through model outputs. Recent Information Flow Control (IFC)-based defenses show promise but lack a principled semantic foundation for reasoning about information flow through the model itself. Since any input token may influence any output token in an autoregressive LLM, existing approaches suffer from severe taint explosion.   We present Geometric Information Flow (GIF), a semantic framework for tracking information flow from input tokens to outputs. GIF uses the LLM Jacobian and local output geometry to upper-bound the Shannon mutual information between perturbed input spans and model outputs, yielding a scalable measure computable on large models via automatic differentiation and low-rank approximation. Unlike attention-based or correlational attribution heuristics, GIF satisfies local geometric soundness, and we provide a fully mechanized Lean 4 proof that it upper-bounds the true information flow induced by a given prompt under local regularity assumptions.   We evaluate GIF on integrity and confidentiality tasks across multiple prompt-injection and privacy-leakage benchmarks. GIF achieves near-perfect recall even without a downstream declassifier, outperforming attention-based baselines. Combined with lightweight LLM-based declassifiers, it matches or exceeds the F1 of direct LLM-as-judge baselines such as GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning while using up to 81x lower token cost. GIF flows detected with small surrogate models transfer to larger state-of-the-art models and other model families, even when the surrogate is up to 200x smaller, suggesting black-box deployment without gradient access.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Geometric Information Flow (GIF)框架，利用雅可比矩阵和局部几何上界香农互信息，实现LLM信息流的可扩展且精确追踪。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在代理系统中处理敏感数据时面临安全隐私风险，现有基于信息流控制（IFC）的防御缺乏原则性语义基础，且自回归模型任意输入影响任意输出导致污染爆炸。亟需一种可扩展且语义完备的信息流度量方法。
light_analysis.method: GIF利用LLM雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何形状，通过自动微分与低秩逼近计算香农互信息上界，衡量输入扰动跨度对输出的影响。满足局部几何合理性，并用Lean 4形式化证明其在上界真实信息流。无需注意力或相关性启发式。
light_analysis.result: 在提示注入和隐私泄露基准上，GIF无需解分类器即达近完美召回，优于注意力基线。结合轻量LLM解分类器，F1匹配GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning等LLM-as-judge基线，而令牌成本降低81倍。小代理模型检测可迁移至大模型，代理模型小200倍仍有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: GIF为LLM信息流控制提供了原则性的语义框架，具有可扩展性和理论保证。实际应用可降低安全防御成本，但依赖局部正则假设。未来可探索无需梯度的黑盒部署或跨模态扩展。

title: Exposing the Illusion of Erasure in Knowledge Editing for LLMs
abstract: Knowledge Editing (KE) has emerged as a frontier for updating specific facts in LLMs without costly retraining, but its reliability and underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we examine KE from an adversarial elicitation perspective, revealing that edited knowledge is often not fully erased and continues to surface, with consistent failures observed across diverse model architectures. To explain this behavior, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of popular KE methods. We show that low-rank updates do not overwrite existing knowledge but instead redistribute it within the model's representation space. Furthermore, we find that these methods act as targeted suppression mechanisms that reduce the likelihood of expressing original facts, rather than removing them from the model. Analysis of the loss landscape reveals that edited knowledge lies in narrow, anisotropic regions that are highly sensitive to perturbations, making them highly vulnerable to indirect prompting and adversarial attacks. By exposing these profound architectural vulnerabilities, our work proves that KE algorithms are inherently bypassable and motivates a fundamental reevaluation of how we deploy post-hoc updates in several LLM applications.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示知识编辑在LLMs中仅是假性擦除，知识实际上重新分布且易受攻击，证明其本质可绕过。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识编辑（KE）旨在无需昂贵重训练即可更新LLMs中的特定事实，但其可靠性和底层机制尚不明确。现有方法可能产生虚假的安全感，实际上编辑后的知识并未完全擦除，而是继续浮现。理解这种“擦除幻觉”对于评估KE在实际应用中的安全性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 从对抗性引出视角系统评估KE方法，对多种模型架构进行一致失败测试。通过机制分析，证明低秩更新不覆盖知识而将其重新分布，且表现为目标抑制而非移除。进一步分析损失景观，发现编辑知识位于狭窄各向异性区域，对扰动高度敏感，易受间接提示和对抗攻击。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明所有测试的KE方法均存在系统性失败，编辑后的知识在对抗性引出下持续浮现。机制分析揭示知识重新分布而非擦除，且损失景观显示编辑后的知识位于脆弱区域，大大降低了模型对直接和间接提示的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作揭示了知识编辑的内在脆弱性，证明当前KE算法本质上可被绕过。研究呼吁重新评估在LLM应用中部署事后更新机制，强调了开发更鲁棒知识管理方法的必要性。未来工作可探索更安全的更新策略或检测编辑痕迹。

title: Scaling LLM Knowledge Boundaries via Distribution-Optimized Synthesis
abstract: Knowledge injection via synthetic data is crucial for enhancing Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current synthesis methods simply stop at preset token counts or fixed data ratios, lacking awareness of knowledge distribution. This results in some domains being sparse while others are redundant, limiting LLM knowledge boundaries. We revisit knowledge injection from a distribution perspective and hypothesize that an optimal knowledge distribution exists to maximize knowledge boundary expansion. We propose KDoS (Knowledge Distribution-optimized Synthesis), a framework that introduces knowledge density to drive synthesis through a three-stage feedback mechanism, shifting from blind generation to distribution-optimized synthesis. We construct Wikipedia-based synthetic data with varying knowledge distributions and conduct experiments on models from 0.6B to 16B (Qwen, Ling, LLaMA) and data scales from 1B to 5B tokens. Our key findings are: (1) an optimal knowledge distribution consistently maximizes boundary expansion; (2) this distribution is stable across backbones and scales; (3) KDoS outperforms baselines across six knowledge benchmarks. Our work offers a new perspective and practical framework for synthetic data-driven knowledge injection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KDoS框架，通过分布优化合成数据，最大化LLM知识边界扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前合成数据方法仅关注预设token数量或固定数据比例，缺乏对知识分布的感知，导致某些领域稀疏而另一些冗余，限制了LLM的知识边界。本文从分布角度重新审视知识注入，假设存在最优知识分布能最大化边界扩展，旨在解决无导向合成数据的低效问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出KDoS（Knowledge Distribution-optimized Synthesis）框架，引入知识密度概念，通过三阶段反馈机制驱动合成，从盲目生成转向分布优化。基于Wikipedia构建不同知识分布的合成数据，在0.6B至16B的多种模型（Qwen, Ling, LLaMA）以及1B到5B token数据规模上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 关键发现：（1）最优知识分布持续最大化边界扩展；（2）该分布在多种骨干网络和规模下稳定；（3）KDoS在六个知识基准上超越基线方法。实验覆盖从0.6B到16B模型及1B到5B token数据，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了合成数据驱动知识注入的新视角和实用框架，证明了分布优化的重要性。未来可探索更细粒度的知识密度度量及动态调整机制，局限性在于需预定义知识分布空间，可能不适用于完全未知的领域。

title: BoxCtrl: 3D-Aware Visual Prompting for Geometric Image Editing
abstract: As instruction-based editing models and multimodal large language models advance, diverse image editing tasks have become feasible. However, achieving precise and consistent geometric image editing, such as translating, scaling, and rotating in 3D space, remains a major challenge. In this work, we introduce BoxCtrl, a 3D-aware visual prompting framework. Unlike text-only or coarse 2D-guided approaches, our method introduces informative RGB 3D bounding boxes projected onto 2D images as visual prompts. The three orthogonal faces of each box are painted with distinct RGB colors, simultaneously encoding position, size, and orientation to provide a compact, intuitive in-context visual example. The key to BoxCtrl's success lies in these well-designed bounding boxes, which decouple geometric control from appearance control. This enables the model to learn consistent correspondences between faces of the same color in the latent space, leading to a precise understanding of geometric intentions and accurate editing results. We introduce a two-stage training paradigm: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) followed by Reinforcement Learning (RL). To address paired data scarcity, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset for SFT, equipping the model with fundamental editing capabilities. To bridge the synthetic-to-real domain gap, we incorporate an online RL stage leveraging unpaired real-world data. Guided by a reward function evaluating geometric accuracy and visual fidelity, our SFT-RL strategy significantly enhances geometric precision while maintaining photorealistic quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BoxCtrl achieves state-of-the-art performance across translation, rotation, scaling, and composite editing tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了BoxCtrl，一种通过RGB彩色三维框作为视觉提示，实现精确3D几何图像编辑（平移、旋转、缩放等）的框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于指令的图像编辑模型在精确的3D几何变换（如平移、旋转、缩放）方面表现不佳。文本或2D引导的方法缺乏对三维空间位置、大小和方向的精细控制。本文旨在解决这一挑战，实现一致且准确的几何编辑。
light_analysis.method: BoxCtrl将带有不同RGB颜色的三维正交面投影到2D图像上作为视觉提示，解耦几何与外观控制。采用两阶段训练：首先在大规模合成数据集上进行监督微调（SFT），使模型学习基本编辑能力；然后通过强化学习（RL）利用无配对真实数据优化，奖励函数评估几何准确性和视觉逼真度，缩小合成到真实的域差距。
light_analysis.result: 在平移、旋转、缩放和复合编辑任务上，BoxCtrl均达到最先进性能。合成数据预训练保证了基础能力，强化学习微调显著提升了几何精度，同时保持照片级真实感。实验验证了该方法在多种几何操作上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BoxCtrl通过创新的3D感知视觉提示和两阶段训练策略，成功实现了精确的几何图像编辑，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的场景和更细粒度的控制。

title: Safe Few-Step Generation via Velocity Editing
abstract: Flow matching has recently emerged as a strong paradigm for state-of-the-art text-to-image (T2I) generation, enabling high-quality generation with a small number of sampling steps. As these models are increasingly integrated into real-world applications, ensuring safe and non-sensitive content generation has become a critical requirement. However, adapting safety and concept removal methods to this new generation framework remains an open challenge. Specifically, prior methods largely rely on iterative trajectory steering across a number of denoising steps or on CLIP-centric prompt embedding manipulation. These design assumptions pose fundamental bottlenecks for safety in flow matching-based T2I generation, where limited sampling steps constrain iterative correction and modern context-aware text encoders diminish the effectiveness of embedding-level interventions. In this paper, we propose VESFlow, a training-free safety method tailored to flow matching with extremely few sampling steps. Leveraging the fact that flow matching models learn the marginal velocity, we directly edit the velocity field via a safe-conditional posterior. VESFlow steers the trajectory toward safe outputs while leaving the conditioning prompt unchanged. Building on the observation that VESFlow leaves outputs unchanged under benign prompts, we further introduce a risk score-based filtering that bypasses velocity editing to reduce computational cost while preserving benign prompt generation. Based on this filtering, we propose VESFlow+, a stronger variant of VESFlow that not only edits the velocity toward the safe direction, but also pushes it away from the unsafe direction. Experimental results show that VESFlow+ removes the target concept, reducing the attack success rate by NudeNet to 6.3% on Ring-A-Bell and 6.8% on MMA-Diffusion on the 4-step MeanFlow model, while preserving fidelity on benign prompts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VESFlow和VESFlow+，用于流匹配模型的安全少步生成，通过速度编辑实现训练-free安全控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型在少步采样下实现高质量文本到图像生成，但其安全性需求日益迫切。现有安全方法依赖迭代轨迹修正或CLIP嵌入操作，在少步采样下效果受限。现代上下文感知文本编码器也削弱了嵌入层干预的有效性。因此，需要针对流匹配模型设计训练-free的安全方法。
light_analysis.method: VESFlow利用流匹配模型学习边际速度的特点，直接通过安全条件后验编辑速度场，引导轨迹向安全输出，同时保持提示不变。进一步提出风险分数过滤，对良性提示跳过速度编辑以降低计算成本。VESFlow+在滤波基础上同时推动速度远离不安全方向。方法无需训练，适用于极少数采样步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在4步MeanFlow模型上，VESFlow+将目标概念的攻击成功率降至6.3%（Ring-A-Bell）和6.8%（MMA-Diffusion），同时保持良性提示的生成保真度。与基线方法相比，有效降低了不安全内容生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: VESFlow系列为流匹配T2I模型提供了有效的训练-free安全生成方法，通过速度编辑实现概念移除。该方法在少步采样下表现优异，且不改变输入提示。未来可探索扩展到更多安全场景和模型架构。

title: Dynamic multi-agent deep reinforcement learning-based pricing and incentivization approach in multimodal transportation networks
abstract: In multimodal transportation systems, shared mobility services (SMSs) are promoted for their potential to enhance flexibility and reduce congestion. However, SMS demand is often concentrated in high-density areas, which can limit the effectiveness and accessibility for various commuter groups. This uneven integration challenges transportation system efficiency, especially in terms of emissions and spatial equity. Addressing these issues requires coordination among multiple stakeholders whose objectives frequently conflict. Whereas authorities aim to ensure sustainable and equitable mobility, SMS providers focus on revenue maximization, and travelers seek to minimize personal travel costs. This paper proposes a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that captures these interactions through dynamic pricing and incentivization strategies for SMSs and public transport. The framework integrates two reinforcement learning (RL) agents: (i) a public authority that allocates spatio-temporal public transport incentives to improve equity, emissions, and efficiency, and (ii) an SMS provider that dynamically adjusts fares to optimize revenue. The agents interact with the transportation system and adapt strategies in response to evolving demand, congestion, and network conditions. Numerical experiments conducted over a three-hour morning peak period show that dynamic incentivization effectively reduces congestion peaks, lowers commuters' costs by around 20% and emissions by approximately 10%, while nearly doubling public transport profit and supporting a more equitable distribution of benefits. When combined with dynamic SMS pricing, the two RL agents demonstrate the ability to balance conflicting objectives between private providers and public authorities. The proposed approach provides a decision-support tool for sustainable and equitable multimodal mobility planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体深度强化学习框架，通过动态定价与激励策略协调多模式交通网络中公共机构、服务提供商和出行者的冲突目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模式交通系统中共享出行服务需求集中于高密度区域，导致效率降低、空间不公平和排放问题。现有方法难以协调公共部门（追求可持续与公平）、服务提供商（追求利润最大化）和出行者（追求成本最小化）之间的冲突目标，缺乏动态协调策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建多智能体深度强化学习框架，包含两个RL智能体：公共机构智能体分配时空公共交通激励以改善公平、排放和效率；SMS提供商智能体动态调整票价以优化收入。智能体根据实时需求、拥堵和网络条件自适应调整策略。实验在早高峰三小时时段中进行。
light_analysis.result: 动态激励有效降低拥堵峰值，使通勤者成本下降约20%、排放减少约10%，同时公共交通利润几乎翻倍，收益分配更公平。结合动态定价后，两个RL智能体成功平衡了私人供应商与公共机构的冲突目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为可持续与公平的多模式出行规划提供了决策支持工具。未来可扩展至更多利益相关者参与，并在实际交通网络中验证其鲁棒性与可部署性。

title: P-JEPA: Procedural Video Representation Learning via Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
abstract: The increasing maturity of embodied AI platforms has driven a growing interest in procedural video representation learning to support intelligent assistance systems for complex, multi-step tasks. Leveraging large-scale latent predictive training, video foundation models capture video dynamics, enabling downstream tasks such as activity understanding, spatiotemporal localization, and predictive control.
