However, procedural videos include actions with long-range dependencies that these models do not support, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention. Distinct actions, for example, may be visually similar despite appearing at different points in the procedure, such as turning the stove on versus off. Here, we propose a backbone-agnostic approach that learns long-duration video representations by reducing the problem to a dense, frame-aligned action space and predicting pooled masked latent vectors. This approach allows our Procedural Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (P-JEPA) to ingest videos over 30 minutes long, enabling effective long-form understanding of procedural steps. We evaluate P-JEPA using features extracted with VJEPA2.1, TSM, and I3D over the EgoExo4D, EgoProceL, and Assembly101 datasets, finding that it consistently improves linear separability, streaming inference, and temporal action segmentation performance, achieving state-of-the-art results on EgoExo4D fine-grained action classification while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters than LLM-based methods and running in real time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出P-JEPA，一种与骨干网络无关的方法，通过将长视频简化为密集帧对齐动作空间并预测掩码潜变量，实现高效长程程序性视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 体感AI平台对程序性视频表示学习需求增长，但现有视频基础模型因自注意力二次复杂度无法处理具有长程依赖的动作（如开关炉子视觉相似但步骤不同），亟需高效的长视频表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Procedural Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (P-JEPA)，是一种骨架无关方法。它将长视频问题简化为密集帧对齐动作空间，通过预测池化掩码潜向量学习表示，可处理超过30分钟的视频。使用VJEPA2.1、TSM、I3D提取特征。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoExo4D、EgoProceL、Assembly101数据集上，P-JEPA在线性可分性、流式推理和时间动作分割性能上一致提升。在EgoExo4D细粒度动作分类上达到SOTA，参数量比LLM方法少一个数量级且实时运行。
light_analysis.conclusion: P-JEPA有效学习长时程序性视频表示，参数高效且实时，可支持复杂任务智能辅助系统。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可探索更细粒度动作预测或跨域泛化。

title: SteerVTE: Seamless Video Text Editing with Style and Glyph Control
abstract: Visual text editing aims to precisely modify text in images and videos while preserving stylistic consistency and visual realism. Despite significant advances in the image domain, video text editing remains largely unexplored: it is a localized task demanding stroke-level precision within small text regions, which compounds the challenges of cross-frame accuracy, temporal coherence, and stylistic fidelity. We introduce SteerVTE, a unified framework that \underline{\textbf{steer}}s a frozen video diffusion model to perform precise \underline{\textbf{V}}ideo \underline{\textbf{T}}ext \underline{\textbf{E}}diting through style and glyph control. Built on a frozen diffusion transformer, SteerVTE attaches a lightweight text context adapter with two complementary modules: a style encoder capturing the original text's visual attributes, and dual-granularity glyph encoders encoding the target text at both the line and character levels. To overcome the inherently weak text rendering priors of video foundation models, we further propose a glyph-aware spatial-focal loss and a three-stage progressive training curriculum that scales from image to video data. To support large-scale training, we also develop an automatic synthesis pipeline and construct SteerVTE-1M, a dataset of one million triplets spanning diverse scenes, fonts, and stylistic effects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteerVTE substantially outperforms existing video editing baselines across text accuracy, style consistency, and temporal coherence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SteerVTE统一框架，通过风格和字形控制实现精确视频文本编辑，保持跨帧一致性和风格保真。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频文本编辑任务面临跨帧精度、时序连贯性和风格保真度的挑战，现有方法多聚焦图像领域，视频编辑研究不足。文本区域小且需笔画级精度，视频基础模型文本渲染先验弱，导致编辑结果不稳定。
light_analysis.method: 基于冻结的扩散Transformer，附加轻量级文本上下文适配器，包含风格编码器（捕获原文本视觉属性）和双粒度字形编码器（行级和字符级）。提出字形感知空间-焦点损失和三阶段渐进训练策略（从图像到视频），并构建含100万三元组的SteerVTE-1M数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在文本准确性、风格一致性和时序连贯性上显著优于现有视频编辑基线方法。实验涵盖多种场景、字体和风格效果，验证了框架有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现高精度视频文本编辑，统一框架利用风格和字形控制提升编辑质量。学术上验证扩散模型在视频文本编辑中的潜力，实际应用于视频内容创作和后期制作。未来可探索更复杂场景和实时性优化。

title: Unlocking In-Context Learning in Audio-Language Models from Decentralized Medical Audio
abstract: Clinical audio diagnosis in low-resource settings requires models that identify conditions from minimal examples without large annotated corpora. We propose Federated Self-Contextualization (FSC), a multimodal language model framework for in-context clinical audio diagnosis across federated hospital clients. FSC constructs pseudo-label episodes via unsupervised clustering of audio representations, bypassing scarce real diagnostic labels, and enables contextual reasoning from support-query pairs. Our progressive three-stage pipeline first aligns audio embeddings with the language model via caption-based pretraining, then adapts it for episodic in-context inference through federated optimization. At test time, given a small labeled support set, the model diagnoses an unseen query through multimodal reasoning. On held-out respiratory and cardiac conditions, FSC achieves 71.6% accuracy in 2-way 2-shot evaluation, outperforming audio-language baselines by over 9%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦自上下文学习框架FSC，实现低资源场景下跨联邦医院的临床音频少样本诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床音频诊断在低资源环境中面临标注数据稀缺的问题，现有模型需要大量标注语料。此外，医疗数据分布在多个医院，无法集中训练。因此需要一种方法，能够在联邦设置下利用少量样本进行上下文学习，避免依赖大规模标注数据。
light_analysis.method: FSC框架包含三阶段流水线：首先通过基于字幕的预训练对齐音频嵌入与语言模型；然后通过无监督聚类构建伪标签episode，替代真实诊断标签；最后通过联邦优化适应episodic上下文推理。测试时，给定少量标注支持集，模型通过多模态推理诊断未见过查询样本。
light_analysis.result: 在保留的呼吸和心脏状况上，FSC在2-way 2-shot评估中达到71.6%准确率，优于音频语言基线模型超过9%。结果表明该方法能有效利用联邦分布数据实现少样本临床音频诊断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出FSC，首次将上下文学习应用于联邦医疗音频诊断，通过伪标签和无监督聚类缓解标注稀缺问题。该研究具有重要应用价值，可实现低资源环境下的分布式临床诊断。未来可扩展至更多模态和病症。

title: HOLMES: Evaluating Higher-Order Logical Reasoning in LLMs
abstract: Logical reasoning is essential for reliable AI, yet existing benchmarks are largely first-order-logic-centric, focusing on object-level deduction over fixed predicates. This misses many realistic scenarios where models must reason over rules, predicates, functions, constraints, and decision procedures themselves. We introduce HOLMES (Higher-Order Logic Meets real-world Explainable Symbolic reasoning), the first real-world benchmark for higher-order symbolic reasoning in LLMs, containing 1379 instances. Built on higher-order logic, HOLMES pairs natural-language problems with HOL formalizations, ground-truth answers, verifiable reasoning traces, and fine-grained controllable reasoning factors across law and finance. Experiments show that current LLMs still struggle on HOLMES, with an average accuracy of only 50.64% and the best model reaching 59.54%. Our analyses further reveal that high final-answer accuracy can mask shortcut reasoning in conflict-resolution settings, while performance drops sharply under scope-conditioned and compositional reasoning. These findings identify higher-order symbolic reasoning as a key bottleneck for building reliable and verifiable LLMs. The project code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/wuyucheng2002/HOLMES.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个高阶符号推理基准HOLMES，揭示LLM在高阶逻辑推理中的瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有逻辑推理基准主要基于一阶逻辑，关注固定谓词上的对象层演绎，无法评估模型对规则、谓词、函数、约束和决策过程本身进行推理的能力。这类高阶推理在现实场景中至关重要，尤其在法律和金融领域。缺乏相关基准导致LLM的高阶符号推理能力未被充分探索，成为构建可靠可验证AI的关键障碍。
light_analysis.method: 构建HOLMES基准，包含1379个实例，基于高阶逻辑将自然语言问题与高阶逻辑形式化、真实答案、可验证推理轨迹及细粒度可控推理因素配对。覆盖法律和金融领域，设计冲突解决、范围条件、组合推理等复杂场景。评估多个LLM（如GPT-4等），分析准确率及推理行为。
light_analysis.result: 当前LLM在HOLMES上平均准确率仅50.64%，最佳模型达到59.54%。高最终答案准确率可能掩盖捷径推理，例如在冲突解决中。在范围条件推理和组合推理任务中性能显著下降，表明高阶符号推理是LLM的瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: HOLMES提供了评估LLM高阶逻辑推理能力的首个标准化基准，揭示了现有模型缺乏高阶符号推理能力，为未来改进方向（如增强组合推理和范围条件推理）提供了关键见解。项目代码和数据集已公开，有助于推动可靠可验证AI的发展。局限性在于基准覆盖领域有限，未来可扩展至更多领域。

title: Judgment-Grounded Expansion for Peer Review Generation
abstract: Automatic review generation is a promising direction for accelerating scientific progress. While most work adopts an end-to-end setup, its fully automated nature makes it less suitable for settings that demand accountability. To better balance automation and accountability, we formalize judgment-grounded expansion, a human-AI collaboration mode where a reviewer provides an evaluative claim and the system expands it into review comment candidate(s). We model it as a structured generate-check-refine process and conduct a user study to collect human-model interaction data. We study two practical challenges for judgment-grounded expansion: scalable evaluation and candidate set curation. We develop methods to simulate the process for large-scale evaluation, and show that conformal prediction is well suited to balancing candidate set size and target coverage. Our work establishes judgment-grounded expansion as a concrete task and provides empirical and methodological foundations for the design of future collaborative review generation systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出判断引导的扩展作为人机协作的同行评审生成模式，通过生成-检查-精炼过程平衡自动化与问责制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动评审生成采用端到端方式，完全自动化不适合需要问责的场景。为了平衡自动化和问责制，本文形式化了判断引导的扩展模式，即评审者提供评价性声明，系统将其扩展为评审意见候选，并解决可扩展评估和候选集筛选的实际挑战。
light_analysis.method: 建模为结构化的生成-检查-精炼过程，通过用户研究收集人机交互数据。为大规模评估开发模拟方法，并证明共形预测适合平衡候选集大小和目标覆盖率。
light_analysis.result: 用户研究和模拟实验验证了方法有效性。共形预测能很好地平衡候选集大小与覆盖率，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了判断引导的扩展作为具体任务，为未来协作评审生成系统的设计提供了经验和方法基础。未来可进一步在实际评审场景中验证系统性能。

title: Privacy-Preserving Person Re-Identification from Temporal Sequences with Transformer and Hungarian Optimization
abstract: Person re-identification (Re-ID) is a crucial task in surveillance and human behavior analysis, often used in public spaces such as transport hubs. Traditional RGB-based Re-ID methods raise privacy concerns and are highly sensitive to lighting variations and occlusion. In this paper, we propose a novel Re-ID approach that leverages depth images, which inherently obscures facial and other identifiable features, making it a privacy-preserving solution. Our method addresses the association problem between multiple views of individuals by applying the Hungarian algorithm, optimizing the matching process through minimization of the global cost across the distance matrix. We further enhance the approach by introducing temporal sequences of frames as input to a Transformer encoder architecture, which exploits both RGB and depth modalities. This architecture captures dynamic movement patterns, improving feature extraction and re-identification accuracy. Additionally, we employ batch hard triplet loss to enhance discriminative feature learning by focusing on the hardest samples. We evaluate both depth-only and RGB-D models on several top-view datasets, including TVPR2, GODPR, and BIWI RGBD-ID. Our results demonstrate that depth-only re-identification can achieve competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, as measured by standard metrics such as Cumulative Matching Characteristics (CMC) and Mean Average Precision (mAP), while prioritizing privacy preservation.
comment: Published at 2025 19th International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于深度图像和Transformer的隐私保护行人重识别方法，使用时序序列和匈牙利算法优化匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统RGB行人重识别存在隐私泄露问题，且易受光照变化和遮挡影响。深度图像可隐去面部等可识别特征，天然保护隐私。现有方法在多视角关联和时序特征利用上不足，需提升准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 采用Transformer编码器处理时序帧输入，融合RGB和深度模态，捕捉动态运动模式。使用匈牙利算法最小化全局代价，优化多视角间的关联匹配。引入batch hard triplet loss，专注于困难样本以增强判别特征学习。评估深度-only和RGB-D模型。
light_analysis.result: 在TVPR2、GODPR和BIWI RGBD-ID等顶视数据集上，深度-only模型在CMC和mAP指标上达到与先进方法竞争的性能，同时显著提升隐私保护。摘要未提具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了深度图像可用于隐私保护行人重识别，性能接近RGB方法。Transformer和匈牙利算法的结合有效利用时序信息。未来可探索更高效的时序建模或跨模态融合，以进一步提升精度。

title: PhysFlow: Frequency Decoupled with Dual-Field Rectified Flow for Remote Photoplethysmography
abstract: Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless pulse estimation from facial videos, serving as a vital tool for health monitoring. However, current deep learning methods often struggle under complex disturbances, particularly varying illumination, facial expressions, and unconstrained head movements. In such scenarios, subtle physiological signals are easily dominated by external interference, making the recovered rPPG waveform unstable and unreliable. One important reason is that most existing methods directly model the rPPG signal in a unified manner, where different signal components are coupled during reconstruction. This makes it difficult to preserve weak pulse-related variations when strong disturbance-induced changes are present. To address this challenge, we propose PhysFlow, a frequency-decoupled dual-field rectified flow framework tailored for robust rPPG estimation. Specifically, the ground-truth rPPG signal is decomposed into trend and amplitude components, which are used as separate supervisory targets. Based on the extracted facial features, PhysFlow learns two component-specific conditional velocity fields to model the two components separately. This design reduces mutual interference between different components and improves the robustness of rPPG reconstruction under complex disturbances. Moreover, the rectified flow formulation enables efficient waveform reconstruction with only a few ordinary differential equation (ODE) integration steps. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that PhysFlow outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both heart-rate estimation and rPPG waveform reconstruction across diverse challenging scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhysFlow，一种频率解耦的双域整流流框架，用于鲁棒的远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有rPPG方法在复杂干扰（如光照变化、面部表情、头部运动）下表现不佳，因为统一建模不同信号分量导致弱脉冲变化被强干扰掩盖。需要解耦频率分量以提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 将真实rPPG信号分解为趋势和振幅分量，分别作为监督目标。基于面部特征学习两个分量特定的条件速度场，利用整流流公式实现高效波形重建，仅需少数ODE积分步。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，PhysFlow在心率估计和rPPG波形重建方面均优于现有方法，尤其在复杂场景下表现更鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysFlow通过频率解耦和双域整流流提高了rPPG估计的鲁棒性和效率，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的解耦或应用于其他生理信号。

title: RS-Gen: A Multi-Stage Agentic Framework for Reasoning and Search-Augmented Image Generation
abstract: Recent years have witnessed remarkable progress in image generation and editing, particularly regarding instruction following and visual fidelity. However, when handling ambiguous intentions, logical reasoning, and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) knowledge, existing image models often yield sub-optimal results due to a lack of deep reasoning capabilities and real-time external information. Although emerging unified understanding-and-generation models attempt to bridge this gap, they remain constrained by their intrinsic parameter scales and static knowledge gaps. Inspired by agentic paradigms, we propose RS-Gen: a plug-and-play, training-free, multi-stage image agentic framework. RS-Gen innovatively introduces a "Questioning-and-Solving" closed-loop mechanism to accurately identify logical issues and knowledge gaps, autonomously planning actions to bridge information deficits and execute deep logical reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RS-Gen significantly expands the capability boundaries of foundational image generation and editing models. Specifically, on the WISE Verified and RISEBench benchmarks, RS-Gen yields substantial absolute performance gains of 0.313 for Qwen-Image and 19.70 for Qwen-Image-Edit-2511, respectively, successfully elevating both to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) level among open-source models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RS-Gen，一种无需训练的多阶段图像智能体框架，通过提问-解决闭环实现推理和搜索增强的图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像生成模型在处理模糊意图、逻辑推理和分布外知识时表现不佳，缺乏深度推理和实时外部信息获取能力；统一理解与生成模型受限于参数规模和静态知识缺口。因此需要一种即插即用的增强框架以弥补这些不足。
light_analysis.method: RS-Gen采用多阶段智能体架构，创新性地引入“提问-解决”闭环机制：首先识别逻辑问题与知识缺口，然后自主规划动作（如搜索外部知识）填补信息缺失，最后执行深度推理生成图像。该框架无需训练，可即插即用于现有基础模型。
light_analysis.result: 在WISE Verified和RISEBench基准上，RS-Gen分别使Qwen-Image和Qwen-Image-Edit-2511获得0.313和19.70的绝对性能提升，将两者均提升至开源模型的SOTA水平。实验表明其显著扩展了基础模型的推理和知识检索能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RS-Gen通过智能体范式有效增强了图像生成模型的推理与实时知识整合能力，无需微调即可实现性能突破，具有较高的普适性和实用价值。未来可扩展至更多基础模型及复杂任务场景。

title: SPADE: Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation
abstract: Physical-structure priors such as conservation laws, Hamiltonian forms, and symmetries can improve scientific machine learning when correct, but can degrade predictions when misspecified. Existing methods usually enforce a chosen structure or tune a soft penalty, without a calibrated rule for deciding whether to impose a prior, how strongly to impose it, which prior to use, or which subset of candidate laws holds. We introduce SPADE, Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation, a closed-form framework that treats this problem as shrinkage of the structure-violating block of an unconstrained estimator. SPADE uses one exact specification test and one estimand: the test decides whether the prior is supported by data, Stein-unbiased James-Stein shrinkage sets the enforcement strength with an $O(σ^2/n)$ oracle guarantee, and a gate commits to the hard prior only when the test certifies it. The same test yields consistent nested structure selection and Benjamini-Hochberg control for subset discovery in non-nested constraint families. Across a linear-subspace prior, a reservoir conservation law, and a nonlinear Hamiltonian prior on Duffing dynamics, SPADE tracks the oracle, beats a neural-network baseline, reduces correct-prior regret from $10.3\%$ to $2.6\%$, matches cross-validation with $1/71$ of the solves, selects the correct structure with $100\%$ accuracy, and recovers partial laws with controlled false relaxation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPADE框架，通过假设检验和James-Stein收缩自适应决定是否施加物理结构先验及强度，实现结构先验的稳健选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理结构先验（如守恒律、哈密顿形式）能提升科学机器学习，但先验错误时会降低预测性能。现有方法通常强制选择结构或调整软惩罚，缺乏校准规则来决定是否施加先验、施加强度、选择哪个先验或哪些候选定律成立。因此，需要一种自适应决策方法，在数据支持下权衡先验的收益与风险。
light_analysis.method: SPADE是一个封闭形式框架，将问题视为对无约束估计量中违反结构块的收缩。它使用一个精确的规范检验和一个估计量：检验决定先验是否被数据支持，Stein无偏的James-Stein收缩以O(σ²/n)的oracle保证设置强制强度，门控机制仅在检验认证时提交硬先验。同一检验支持一致的嵌套结构选择和Benjamini-Hochberg控制用于非嵌套约束族的子集发现。
light_analysis.result: 在线性子空间先验、储层守恒律和非线性Duffing哈密顿先验上，SPADE跟踪oracle性能，击败神经网络基线，将正确先验的遗憾从10.3%降至2.6%，以1/71的计算量匹配交叉验证，结构选择达到100%准确率，部分规律恢复具有受控的假发现率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPADE为物理先验的自适应决策提供了一种理论保证、计算高效的框架，显著降低了先验错误的风险。其实验验证了在多个物理学任务中的有效性，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可扩展到更复杂的非线性先验和更高维问题，并探索与其他机器学习方法的结合。

title: MuPPET: A Benchmark for Contextual Privacy of LLM Assistants in Multi-Party Conversations
abstract: LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-party environments, handling sensitive personal data on behalf of individual users, for instance in group chats. When such an agent discloses private information, it reaches every group member at once. This risk is structurally harder to control than in one-to-one settings, as every piece of private information must be appropriate for every recipient in the group. Yet all existing contextual privacy benchmarks consider only single-interlocutor settings, leaving multi-party privacy risks unmeasured. We introduce MuPPET (Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing), a benchmark for contextual privacy in multi-party conversations. Our experiments show that models leak substantially more in multi-party settings than one-to-one evaluations suggest. Frontier models are vulnerable, and smaller open-weights models, often preferred for local deployment with sensitive data, even more so. Existing contextual privacy defences offer only partial protection, degrade utility, and do not resolve the underlying party-tracking problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MuPPET基准，首次评估多用户对话中LLM助手的上下文隐私泄露风险。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM助手在群聊等多人环境中处理敏感数据，隐私泄露风险比一对一场景更难控制，因为每条隐私信息必须对所有接收者适当。现有基准仅考虑单用户，缺乏对多人场景隐私风险的评估。本研究旨在弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: MuPPET（Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing）基准通过设计多用户对话场景，模拟不同接收者组合下的隐私泄露测试。实验中对比多种模型（包括前沿模型和开源小模型），并评估现有隐私防护方法（如差分隐私）的效果。关键创新在于引入多用户情境中的“伙伴跟踪”问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，模型在多用户场景中泄露隐私的比例显著高于一对一评估。前沿模型存在漏洞，而常用于本地部署的较小开源模型更为脆弱。现有上下文隐私防护仅提供部分保护，严重降低效用，且未能根本解决多用户隐私追踪问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了多用户对话中隐私泄露的新风险，强调现有防护的不足。MuPPET为评估和改善LLM代理的隐私保护提供了重要基准，未来可推动更鲁棒的多用户隐私防护机制开发，但需平衡实用性与安全性。

title: Spectral Gating via Damped Oscillations for Adaptive Implicit Neural Representations
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have been proven successful in encoding continuous signals through coordinate-based networks, yet facing a spectral dilemma: periodic activations capture fine details but act as all-pass filters that memorise noise, while spatially compact activations regularise effectively but suffer from low-frequency bias. Existing attempts to resolve this trade-off introduce computational overhead or tuning frailty. We propose to model each neuron's activation as the steady-state response of a sinusoidally-forced damped harmonic oscillator, whose amplitude naturally governs the network's spectral selectivity during training. By jointly optimising the oscillator parameters alongside the network weights, our method adapts to the target signal's spectral content without explicit regularisation. Initialised in the stopband, the network exhibits a coarse-to-fine learning curriculum that progressively expands its spectral gate, capturing low-frequency structures first and high-frequency details only when justified by the reconstruction objective. Comprehensive experiments show that our approach consistently achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results against established INRs, while requiring no task-specific tuning of any hyperparameters.
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://alex-costanzino.github.io/fdho/

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过阻尼振荡建模神经元激活，实现自适应频谱门控，解决INR的频谱困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式神经表示存在频谱困境：周期激活函数能捕捉细节但会记忆噪声，而空间紧凑激活函数有正则化效果但偏向低频。现有方法要么增加计算开销，要么调参困难。因此需要一种自适应频谱选择机制，在不引入额外超参数的情况下平衡细节与正则化。
light_analysis.method: 将每个神经元的激活建模为正弦力驱动阻尼谐振子的稳态响应，其振幅自然控制网络的频谱选择性。通过联合优化振荡器参数与网络权重，模型自适应目标信号的频谱内容，无需显式正则化。初始化为阻带，网络从粗到细学习，逐步扩展频谱门，先捕捉低频结构，再根据重建目标捕捉高频细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多个INR任务上，该方法一致达到或超越现有最先进水平，且无需针对特定任务调节任何超参数。实验表明，阻尼振荡机制有效实现了频谱门控的自动调节，在保持高质量重建的同时抑制噪声，性能稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的自适应频谱门控机制，通过物理启发的阻尼振荡模型解决了INR的频谱困境。该方法的粗到细学习特性具有理论价值，并且无需调参使其易于实用。未来可探索更复杂的振荡器模型或扩展到动态场景。

title: Deep learning-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants
abstract: Apnoea of prematurity is characterised by recurrent episodes of cessation of breathing and remains difficult to detect reliably using routinely monitored physiological signals in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Existing bedside monitors rely primarily on respiratory rate and oxygen saturation thresholds, often generating high false-positive alarm rates and missing short or irregular events. Improving automated detection using routinely acquired clinical signals could enhance identification of clinically meaningful events without additional sensing hardware.   We evaluated deep learning-based detection of apnoea-related Cessation Of BrEathing (COBE) events using impedance pneumography (IP), electrocardiography (ECG), and photoplethysmography (PPG) signals from approximately 430 hours of NICU recordings collected from 24 pre-term infants. Three independent reviewers annotated COBE events, producing a dataset of 346 COBE and 608 non-COBE events. We compared a shallow convolutional neural network (CNN), residual networks (ResNets), and a ConvNeXt architecture using an independent held-out test set.   Across all architectures, detection performance was influenced more strongly by signal modality than by architectural complexity. Unimodal IP-based models achieved balanced accuracies of 86.8-88.0%, outperforming ECG-derived (62.6-69.7%) and PPG-derived (65.1-66.4%) respiratory surrogates. Multimodal fusion yielded modest improvements over IP alone. The best-performing model, a ConvNeXt architecture combining IP and PPG inputs, achieved 88.7% balanced accuracy and an F1 score of 0.75 on the independent test set.   These findings demonstrate that deep learning models applied to routinely monitored NICU signals can reliably detect COBE events and highlight the importance of signal modality in data-constrained neonatal monitoring settings.
comment: 14 pages main text, 8 figures. Submitted to IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)

light_analysis.overview: 评估深度学习模型利用常规监测信号检测早产儿呼吸停止事件，发现信号模态比架构复杂度更重要。
light_analysis.motivation: 早产儿呼吸暂停难以可靠检测，现有监护仪依赖呼吸频率和血氧阈值，假报警率高且漏检短或不规则事件。改善自动检测可增强识别临床有意义事件，无需额外硬件。
light_analysis.method: 使用阻抗呼吸描记(IP)、心电图(ECG)和光电容积描记(PPG)信号，来自24名早产儿430小时NICU记录，独立标注346个COBE和608个非COBE事件。比较浅层CNN、ResNets和ConvNeXt架构，评估单模态及多模态融合性能。
light_analysis.result: 单模态IP模型平衡准确率86.8-88.0%，优于ECG衍生(62.6-69.7%)和PPG衍生(65.1-66.4%)。多模态融合略有提升，最佳ConvNeXt结合IP和PPG达88.7%平衡准确率和0.75 F1分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 深度学习模型可可靠检测COBE事件，信号模态在数据受限的监测设置中至关重要。成果有助于提高早产儿监护质量，减少假报警，未来可探索更高效融合策略。

title: Temporally Aware Densification for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Despite modeling temporal motion, dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods still inherit a static densification strategy that is ill-suited for dynamic scenes. This neglect of temporal behavior leads to under-reconstructed and blurry dynamic regions, as short-lived Gaussians receive sparse supervision and fail to densify effectively. We propose a Visibility-Aware Densification (VAD) framework that integrates temporal visibility into the densification process, ensuring that Gaussians are refined based on their actual temporal presence. A Temporally-Adaptive Thresholding (TAT) mechanism further adjusts each Gaussian's densification threshold according to its temporal lifespan, promoting balanced refinement of both static and dynamic regions. Finally, a Temporal Offset Warping (TOW) design enhances deformation capacity around temporal centers, extending the lifespan of highly dynamic Gaussians and facilitating more effective densification. Our approach achieves substantial improvements in the visual quality of dynamic regions, outperforming existing methods across three dynamic multi-view benchmark datasets. Moreover, the proposed VAD module generalizes across diverse dynamic 3DGS methods, consistently improving dynamic reconstruction as a plug-and-play component.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可见性感知致密化框架，通过时间自适应阈值和偏移扭曲提升动态3D高斯泼溅的重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态3DGS方法虽建模时间运动，但沿用静态致密化策略，忽视时间行为导致动态区域重建不完整和模糊。短期存在的高斯因监督稀疏而无法有效致密化，限制了动态场景的精细重建，亟需时间感知的致密化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Visibility-Aware Densification (VAD)框架，将时间可见性集成到致密化过程中；Temporally-Adaptive Thresholding (TAT)根据高斯生命周期调整阈值以平衡静态和动态区域；Temporal Offset Warping (TOW)增强时间中心附近的变形能力，延长动态高斯寿命。VAD可作为即插即用模块泛化到不同动态3DGS方法。
light_analysis.result: 在三个动态多视图基准数据集上，该方法在动态区域视觉质量上显著优于现有方法。VAD作为即插即用组件，可跨不同动态3DGS方法一致改进动态重建，具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过时间感知致密化解决了动态3DGS中动态区域重建差的问题，三个组件协同提升动态场景视觉质量。具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，未来可探索更高效的时间推理或扩展到更大规模场景。

title: Efficient Network Inference via Hardware-Aware Architecture Search, Model Pruning & Quantization
abstract: Embedded global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference monitoring requires fast and memory-efficient inference to process large volumes of raw in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples in real time. At the same time, increasingly expressive deep neural networks (DNNs) are needed for robust interference classification and characterization across diverse signal conditions. This creates a fundamental tension between predictive performance and deployability on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we investigate efficient network inference for GNSS interference characterization using iterative structured pruning, post-training static quantization, and hardware-aware zero-shot neural architecture search (NAS). Starting from MCUNet as a compact baseline, we analyze how model compression and automated architecture optimization affect model size, computational complexity, and memory usage while maintaining task performance. Experiments on a GNSS interference dataset, covering both classification and generalized characterization, show the benefits of combining compression and hardware-aware design for embedded deployment. Our results provide practical guidance for developing compact machine learning (ML) models for real-time GNSS interference monitoring on embedded platforms (iMXRT1062 MCU, Raspberry Pi Zero 2W, and Raspberry Pi 5).

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合硬件感知神经架构搜索、结构剪枝和量化方法，实现GNSS干扰监测的高效网络推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 嵌入式GNSS干扰监测需要快速且内存高效的推理来处理大量IQ样本，而表达能力强的DNN在资源受限硬件上难以部署。现有方法难以平衡预测性能和可部署性，因此需要探索模型压缩和硬件感知设计来提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于MCUNet紧凑基线，采用迭代结构化剪枝、训练后静态量化和硬件感知零样本神经架构搜索，优化模型大小、计算复杂度和内存使用。在GNSS干扰数据集上评估分类和广义表征任务。
light_analysis.result: 在iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5上验证，结合压缩和硬件感知设计可有效降低模型资源消耗，同时保持任务性能。具体数据未明确给出，但表明方法可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为嵌入式平台实时GNSS干扰监测提供了实用指导，展示了模型压缩与硬件感知自动优化的协同作用。未来可进一步探索其他压缩技术或更复杂的硬件约束。

title: Leveraging AutoML for Sustainable Deep Learning: A Multi-Objective HPO Approach on Deep Shift Neural Networks
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has advanced various fields by extracting complex patterns from large datasets. However, the computational demands of DL models pose environmental and resource challenges. Deep Shift Neural Networks (DSNNs) present a solution by leveraging shift operations to reduce computational complexity at inference. Compared to common DNNs, DSNNs are still less well understood and less well optimized. By leveraging AutoML techniques, we provide valuable insights into the potential of DSNNs and how to design them in a better way. We focus on image classification, a core task in computer vision, especially in low-resource environments. Since we consider complementary objectives such as accuracy and energy consumption, we combine state-of-the-art multi-fidelity (MF) hyperparameter optimization (HPO) with multi-objective optimization to find a set of Pareto optimal trade-offs on how to design DSNNs. Our approach led to significantly better configurations of DSNNs regarding loss and emissions compared to default DSNNs. This includes simultaneously increasing performance by about 20% and reducing emissions, in some cases by more than 60%. Investigating the behavior of quantized networks in terms of both emissions and accuracy, our experiments reveal surprising model-specific trade-offs, yielding the greatest energy savings. For example, in contrast to common expectations, quantizing smaller portions of the network with low precision can be optimal with respect to energy consumption while retaining or improving performance. We corroborated these findings across multiple backbone architectures, highlighting important nuances in quantization strategies and offering an automated approach to balancing energy efficiency and model performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于AutoML的多目标多保真度超参数优化方法，在深度移位神经网络上同时优化准确率和能耗，实现性能提升与碳排放降低。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型计算开销大，带来环境和资源挑战。深度移位神经网络虽能降低推理复杂度，但优化不足。现有方法通常只关注单一目标（如准确率），忽视能耗，难以在低资源场景下兼顾性能与可持续性。
light_analysis.method: 结合多保真度超参数优化与多目标优化，在图像分类任务中搜索深度移位神经网络的配置。使用多种近似精度评估（多保真度）加速搜索，同时以准确率和能耗为优化目标，寻找帕累托最优折中方案。实验涉及不同量化策略与骨干架构。
light_analysis.result: 相比默认配置，优化后的深度移位神经网络在性能上提升约20%，碳排放降低超60%。发现量化特定小部分网络为低精度可兼顾能耗与性能，与常见直觉相反。该结论在多种骨干架构上得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了自动化平衡能效与模型性能的方法，揭示了量化策略中模型特定的折中，为可持续深度学习设计提供新视角。未来可扩展至更多任务和硬件平台，但需注意搜索成本与泛化性。

title: CFPO: Counterfactual Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in multimodal reasoning. However, prevailing reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms lack explicit counterfactual enhancement and causal learning mechanisms. This fundamental deficiency results in severe grounding failures, manifesting as a tendency to ignore visual evidence in favor of language priors or exhibiting hallucination drift during long chain-of-thought reasoning. To address this root cause, we propose CounterFactual Policy Optimization (CFPO), a novel framework that enforces causal consistency between visual perception and textual reasoning. CFPO introduces a cross-modal counterfactual enhancement mechanism, which regularizes the policy by maximizing the discrepancy between the model's predictions and those from a counterfactual state where critical visual cues are suppressed. This approach seamlessly integrates with standard algorithms like GRPO and DAPO without requiring external reward models or additional supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFPO significantly improves reasoning fidelity, achieving consistent gains of 3.17%-6.25% over standard RL baselines and 1.32%-2.13% over the state-of-the-art perception-aware method (PAPO). Code is available at https://github.com/Raven-July/CFPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CFPO框架，通过跨模态反事实增强机制强化视觉感知与文本推理的因果一致性，提升多模态推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在大型视觉语言模型的多模态推理中缺乏显式反事实增强和因果学习机制，导致模型倾向于依赖语言先验而忽视视觉证据，或在长链推理中出现幻觉漂移。这种根本缺陷严重限制了推理的可靠性和鲁棒性。因此，急需一种能够强制视觉感知与文本推理因果一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: CFPO引入跨模态反事实增强机制，通过最大化模型预测与抑制关键视觉线索的反事实状态预测之间的差异来正则化策略。该框架可无缝集成到GRPO、DAPO等标准算法中，无需外部奖励模型或额外监督。核心创新在于利用反事实推理直接约束多模态策略的因果一致性，从根源上缓解接地失败问题。
light_analysis.result: 在多项多模态推理任务上，CFPO相比标准RL基线获得3.17%-6.25%的一致提升，超越最新感知感知方法PAPO达1.32%-2.13%。实验证明了该方法在提升推理保真度方面的有效性，代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: CFPO通过反事实策略优化有效解决了LVLMs中的因果不一致问题，显著提升了多模态推理的准确性和鲁棒性。该方法无需额外标注或模型，易于集成，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的反事实生成方式及扩展到更广泛的多模态场景。

title: Unmasking LAION-5B: Age, Gender, Race, and Emotion Biases in Large-Scale Image Datasets
abstract: Large-scale image-text datasets, such as LAION-5B, are foundational to modern AI systems, yet their vast scale and uncurated nature raise significant concerns about demographic and stereotypical biases. This study presents a comprehensive analysis of the demographic composition and representational, stereotypical, and intersectional biases in LAION-2B-en and LAION-2B-multi, the two main components of the LAION-5B dataset. Using state-of-the-art models -- FairFace, DeepFace, and Emo-AffectNet -- we analyze faces detected in the dataset to identify biases across age, gender, race, and expressed emotion. Our findings reveal substantial overrepresentation of young adults (20--39), White individuals, and males, alongside consistent underrepresentation of minority racial groups and middle-aged or older women across both dataset components. We also observe stereotypical associations between demographic attributes and emotions, such as ``Anger'' being predominantly linked to males and ``Happiness'' to females, pointing to systemic imbalances in the data. The consistency of these patterns across two demographic models and both components of LAION-5B demonstrates that these biases are deeply embedded in one of the most widely-used training datasets. Given the scale at which LAION-5B is used to train generative models, these demographic imbalances could shape the behavior and outputs of numerous downstream AI systems.
comment: Published as a paper at 3rd DATA-FM workshop @ ICLR 2026, Brazil

light_analysis.overview: 系统分析LAION-5B数据集中年龄、性别、种族和情感的偏见，揭示深层人口统计和刻板印象不平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模图像数据集如LAION-5B是现代AI系统的基础，但其巨大规模和未经整理的特性引发对人口统计和刻板印象偏见的担忧。现有方法缺乏对如此大规模数据集的全面偏见分析，尤其是跨年龄、性别、种族和情感维度的交叉性偏见。研究旨在揭示这些偏见如何嵌入广泛使用的训练数据，并可能影响下游生成模型的行为。
light_analysis.method: 采用FairFace、DeepFace和Emo-AffectNet等先进模型，对LAION-5B的两个主要子集（LAION-2B-en和LAION-2B-multi）中检测到的人脸进行分析。通过识别年龄、性别、种族和表达情感等属性，评估代表性偏见和刻板印象关联。使用两个不同的人口统计模型进行交叉验证，确保结果稳健。
light_analysis.result: 发现显著的过度代表：年轻人（20-39岁）、白人、男性；少数种族群体和中老年女性代表性不足。观察到情感与人口统计属性的刻板关联，例如“愤怒”主要与男性相关，“快乐”主要与女性相关。这些模式在两个子集和两个人口统计模型中一致，表明偏见在LAION-5B中深度嵌入。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LAION-5B数据集中系统性的人口统计和刻板印象偏见，这种偏见可能影响依赖此数据集训练的众多生成模型（如Stable Diffusion）。强调需在数据集构建和模型训练中重视公平性和代表性，未来工作可探索去偏方法或更均衡的数据采集策略。

title: Bridge the Gaps: Heterogeneous Attributed Graph Clustering via Quaternion Representation Learning
abstract: Attributed graph clustering partitions nodes by jointly exploiting node attributes and graph topology. It remains challenging due to attribute heterogeneity and representation degradation during graph learning. Real-world datasets often contain heterogeneous attributes, i.e., numerical and categorical attributes, complicating unified representation learning. This challenge becomes more complex in attributed graphs, where constructing a clustering-friendly graph structure from attributes and topology remains difficult. Under deep graph architectures, repeated graph propagation causes node embeddings to become overly similar, leading to the over-smoothing (OS) effect. Meanwhile, graph representation learning amplifies topological influence, making discriminative attribute information harder to exploit for clustering, an effect we refer to as over-dominating (OD). To bridge these gaps, an end-to-end framework, Any-type attributed Graph REpresentation lEarning (AGREE), is proposed. It unifies attributed graphs and any-type attributed data through multi-level alignment and similarity-based graph construction. Quaternion-based graph convolution strengthens attribute interaction to alleviate OD, while shallow graph architectures help relieve OS. The learned embeddings are jointly optimized for graph reconstruction and clustering, without requiring a predefined number of clusters during training. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that AGREE achieves strong overall performance in accuracy, robustness, and adaptability.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence. Author-accepted manuscript

light_analysis.overview: 提出AGREE框架，通过四元数表示学习统一异质属性图聚类，缓解过平滑和过度支配效应。
light_analysis.motivation: 归因图聚类中，属性异质性（数值与类别属性并存）和表示退化（过平滑OS和过度支配OD）阻碍了统一表示学习与聚类友好图结构的构建。现有深度图架构中，重复图传播导致节点嵌入过于相似，而图表示学习放大拓扑影响，削弱属性判别力，使聚类困难。
light_analysis.method: 提出端到端框架AGREE，包括多级对齐和基于相似度的图构造，统一任意类型属性数据。采用四元数图卷积增强属性交互以缓解OD，浅层图架构缓解OS。联合优化图重建与聚类，训练时无需预设簇数。
light_analysis.result: 在多种属性图基准数据集上，AGREE在聚类准确率、鲁棒性和适应性方面均取得优异性能。相比现有方法，有效缓解了过平滑与过度支配问题，提升了异质属性下的聚类效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGREE框架解决了属性异质性和表示退化两大瓶颈，实现了无需预设簇数的端到端聚类。其四元数表示和浅层架构为异质图学习提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值与广泛应用前景。未来可探索更复杂属性类型或大规模图场景。

title: When Does Intrinsic Self-Correction Help? A Task-Sensitive Analysis
abstract: Intrinsic self-correction (SC) aims to improve large language model outputs by prompting a model to revisit its own initial answer without external feedback. Recent studies have questioned the reliability of this approach, showing that models often struggle to judge whether their initial responses are correct. In this work, we take a task-sensitive view of SC. Rather than asking whether it works in general, we examine settings where SC may operate through different mechanisms: verifying explicit constraints, revisiting a complex reasoning process, or providing a second opinion over competing strategies in word-game tasks. Across multiple benchmarks and models, we find that SC can yield consistent performance gains when the underlying task structure facilitates these modes of revision. These results suggest that SC is best understood as a task-dependent inference-time strategy whose usefulness depends on the role the revision stage can play in a given task, rather than as a uniformly reliable method for improving initial model outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 通过任务敏感性分析，揭示内在自我纠正的有效性取决于任务结构，而非普遍适用。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期研究质疑内在自我纠正的可靠性，因为模型难以准确判断自身初始回答的正确性。本文认为，现有分析过于笼统，忽略了不同任务中自我纠正可能通过不同机制发挥作用（如验证显式约束、重新审视复杂推理、提供第二意见）。因此，有必要进行任务敏感的分析，以明确自我纠正有效的条件。
light_analysis.method: 采用任务敏感视角，将自我纠正的机制划分为三类：验证显式约束（如格式检查）、重新审视复杂推理（如数学推导）、在文字游戏任务中提供第二意见（如策略择优）。在多个基准测试和不同规模的语言模型上进行实验，对比有无自我纠正的性能差异，并分析任务结构对修正效果的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当任务结构支持上述修订模式时，自我纠正能够带来一致的性能提升；而在不匹配的任务中，效果有限甚至下降。具体提升幅度因任务和模型而异，但总体证实了自我纠正的有效性具有任务依赖性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自我纠正应被视为一种任务依赖的推理时策略，其有用性取决于修订阶段在给定任务中能否有效发挥验证或优化作用。这一结论解释了先前研究的不一致性，并为实际应用提供了选择依据：在结构清晰、可验证的任务中优先采用，而非盲目应用于所有场景。

title: Memory Contagion: Cross-Temporal Propagation of Evaluator Bias via Agent Memory
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on memory systems to maintain long-term coherence. Recent work shows that agent memories degrade during continuous consolidation. However, existing research assumes memories are derived from unbiased experiences. In this work, we identify and formalize a novel phenomenon: Memory Contagion -- the cross-temporal propagation of evaluator bias through agent memory. We show that when agents are trained or guided by biased evaluators, their experiences become biased; when these trajectories are stored and consolidated into memory, the bias propagates to future agents retrieving from the same memory store, even when consolidation is perfect (oracle). Across two bias types (length preference, authority bias) and four experimental phases, we demonstrate: (1) Memory Contagion occurs even with perfect consolidation (oracle condition), proving that biased input is a sufficient cause of contagion; (2) Consolidation has opposite effects depending on bias type -- robustly attenuating length bias while preliminarily amplifying authority bias (single-run estimate), suggesting a bias-type-dependent interaction; (3) No observed safe threshold: bias propagation is detected at contamination rates as low as p=0.2. Our findings expose a critical vulnerability in current agent memory designs and provide formal tools for measuring cross-temporal bias propagation.

light_analysis.overview: 发现并形式化LLM代理记忆中的“记忆传染”现象，即评估者偏见通过记忆系统跨时间传播，即使完美整合也无法消除。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理依赖记忆系统维持长期一致性，但研究多假设记忆来源于无偏体验。实际中代理可能被有偏评估者训练或引导，导致经验带偏。当这些轨迹存入记忆后，偏见可能传播给后续代理，威胁系统公平性和可靠性。当前缺乏对这种跨时间偏见传播的认识和量化工具。
light_analysis.method: 通过设计两个偏见类型（长度偏好、权威偏见）和四个实验阶段，模拟代理记忆的存储与整合过程。核心方法包括：1) 定义记忆传染的概念和形式化模型；2) 区分完美整合（oracle）和实际整合条件；3) 在不同污染率（p=0.2起）下测量偏见传播程度。实验未指定具体数据集或模型，但强调控制变量如整合质量。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现：1) 即使在完美整合（oracle）下，记忆传染依然发生，证明有偏输入是充分条件；2) 整合效应因偏见类型而异：稳健地减弱长度偏好，但初步放大权威偏见（单次估计）；3) 未观察到安全阈值，污染率低至p=0.2时即可检测到传播。这些结果量化了跨时间偏见传播的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了当前LLM代理记忆设计的关键漏洞：记忆传染导致偏见跨时间持续传播。学术上提供了形式化工具度量偏见传播，实用上警示需设计抗偏见的记忆机制。未来工作可探索偏见类型依赖的交互机理及鲁棒记忆架构。局限在于实验规模较小，且偏见的长期累积效应未充分评估。

title: Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?
abstract: Computer-use agents (CUAs) now act on a user's behalf across personal applications such as email, calendars, and to-do lists. This cross-application access is useful, but it also creates a privacy risk that has been largely overlooked: when an agent works in one context, it can pull in information from another that is inappropriate in that context. Hence, we introduce AgentCIBench, an evaluation harness that turns this risk into executable, deterministically scored scenarios. We target three common failure modes in CUAs: visual co-location, where the agent pulls in prohibited items that sit next to the task target in the UI; task-ambiguity overshare, where the agent dumps dense personal state in response to an under-specified prompt; and recipient misalignment, where the agent sends content to an addressee for whom it is inappropriate. We evaluate 15 frontier agents and find a surprisingly high failure rate: 11 of 15 leak on more than 50% of scenarios, with an average leakage of 67.9%, and the same failures persist when agents act end-to-end in the environment to complete the task. We release AgentCIBench to encourage the development of safer computer-use agents and position contextual disclosure testing as a pre-deployment safety check.

light_analysis.overview: 引入AgentCIBench评估框架，揭示计算机使用代理在跨应用任务中普遍存在隐私泄露问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算机使用代理(CUAs)在跨应用操作时可能不恰当地从一个上下文引入另一个上下文的信息，造成隐私风险。现有方法缺乏对此类风险的评估，因此需要一种可执行的、确定性评分的测试基准来检测常见失败模式。
light_analysis.method: 提出AgentCIBench评估框架，针对三种失败模式：视觉共置（UI目标旁的禁止项）、任务歧义过共享（不明确提示下倾泻个人状态）、收件人错位（发送给不适当的人）。使用15个前沿代理进行测试，场景可执行且确定性评分。
light_analysis.result: 15个代理中11个在超过50%的场景中泄露信息，平均泄露率67.9%。即使代理端到端完成任务，同样存在此类失败，表明问题普遍且严重。
light_analysis.conclusion: 发布AgentCIBench以促进更安全的计算机使用代理开发，建议将上下文披露测试作为部署前的安全检查。未来可用于改进模型行为，减少隐私风险。

title: Stage-dependent integer-binary encoding in factorization-machine black-box optimization
abstract: Black-box optimization (BBO) deals with problems where objective functions lack explicit analytical forms and are expensive to evaluate. Factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA) constructs a surrogate model using a factorization machine (FM) and optimizes it with an Ising machine. Conventional FMQA applies a single integer-binary encoding throughout the optimization process, although the encoding best suited to surrogate learning may differ from the one best suited to Ising-machine solution search. We propose a stage-dependent FMQA framework and derive conversion formulas between one-hot and domain-wall QUBO matrices that preserve the surrogate objective over feasible integer states up to an additive constant. We evaluate the OhDw variant, which employs one-hot encoding for learning and domain-wall encoding for search, on the Rastrigin function with input dimensions N = 2 and 5 and discretization levels q = 61 and 301. Across all conditions, the dominant factor governing optimization performance is the encoding used in the learning stage, with one-hot encoding consistently yielding lower residual errors than domain-wall or binary encoding. The additional benefit of switching to domain-wall encoding for solution search is condition-dependent. For N = 5 and q = 301, OhDw achieves a lower residual error and solutions closer to the global optimum than one-hot-only FMQA, whereas for N = 5 and q = 61 the latter achieves a lower residual error. These results indicate that one-hot encoding in the learning stage is the primary performance driver and that stage-dependent encoding can provide further improvement under finer discretization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出阶段依赖的FMQA框架，在学习阶段使用one-hot编码、搜索阶段使用domain-wall编码，以提升黑箱优化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 黑箱优化问题中，传统FMQA使用单一整数-二进制编码，但最适合代理学习的编码与最适合伊辛机搜索的编码可能不同。现有方法未区分阶段，导致性能受限。因此需要探索分阶段采用不同编码的策略，以分别优化学习效率和搜索效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出阶段依赖的FMQA框架，推导了one-hot与domain-wall QUBO矩阵之间的转换公式，确保可行整数状态下的替代目标仅相差一个加性常数。实现OhDw变体，学习阶段用one-hot编码、搜索阶段用domain-wall编码。在Rastrigin函数上测试，输入维度N=2和5，离散化水平q=61和301。
light_analysis.result: 所有条件下，学习阶段编码是主要性能驱动因素，one-hot编码残差始终低于domain-wall或二进制编码。对N=5、q=301，OhDw比纯one-hot FMQA残差更低且更接近全局最优；而对N=5、q=61，纯one-hot残差更低。阶段依赖编码仅在精细离散化下带来额外改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明学习阶段使用one-hot编码是FMQA性能的主要驱动因素，阶段依赖编码可在精细离散化下进一步提升性能。该工作为黑箱优化中的编码选择提供了新视角，但阶段依赖优势依赖于离散化粒度，未来可探索更复杂的编码切换策略。

title: StreamPPG: Low-Latency rPPG Estimation via Consistent Privileged Learning
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) estimates the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal from facial videos, enabling contact-free health monitoring. Conventional clip-wise approaches, which use video clips as input, require capturing over one hundred frames before inference, thus introducing several seconds of delay and hindering real-time use. Meanwhile, frame-wise approaches struggle to capture long-range temporal and periodic features of physiological rhythms, and therefore lead to reduced estimation accuracy. To overcome these issues, we propose StreamPPG, a unified architecture that enables low-latency frame-wise physiological signal estimation while achieving competitive accuracy compared with clip-wise approaches. StreamPPG is trained under a consistent privileged learning (CPL) strategy, which leverages ground-truth rPPG signals as privileged information to enhance the model's representation capability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StreamPPG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across multiple datasets while maintaining real-time throughput on edge devices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamPPG，利用一致特权学习策略实现低延迟帧级rPPG估计，在保持实时吞吐量的同时达到与片段级方法相当的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统rPPG方法中，片段级方法需捕获上百帧才进行推理，导致数秒延迟，难以用于实时健康监测；帧级方法虽延迟低但无法捕捉生理节律的长期时间特征，精度下降。现有方法在延迟与精度之间存在权衡。因此，需要一种既能低延迟推理又能保持高精度的统一架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出StreamPPG统一架构，采用帧级推理方式实现低延迟，并通过一致特权学习（CPL）策略，将真实rPPG信号作为特权信息在训练期间辅助模型学习。该策略增强了模型对长期时间和周期性特征的捕获能力，使帧级方法也能达到高精度。模型在边缘设备上优化以实现实时运行。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开数据集上，StreamPPG取得了最先进的精度，与片段级方法相比性能相当或更优。同时，在边缘设备上实现了实时吞吐量（具体帧率未明确提及，但表明满足实时要求）。实验结果验证了低延迟与高精度可兼得。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamPPG通过一致特权学习，成功解决了rPPG估计中延迟与精度的矛盾，为实时无接触健康监测提供了可行方案。该方法在医疗监护、人机交互等领域具有应用价值。未来可探索更轻量级的模型或扩展至多模态场景。

title: DART: Draft-Agreement Routing for Training-Free Adaptive Thinking Budgets in Hybrid Reasoning Models
abstract: Hybrid reasoning models can answer directly or spend extra tokens on extended thinking. A practical router should choose between these modes for each query, so easy problems avoid unnecessary reasoning and hard problems receive enough budget to finish the answer. Existing routers move in this direction, but they typically require labeled training data or fix thinking budgets up front, ignoring answer-level evidence from the model itself. We introduce DART, a training-free routing framework that samples two cheap no-think drafts, accepts direct answering when the drafts agree, and predicts a thinking budget from draft entropy when they disagree. Across the main comparisons, DART preserves or improves always-thinking accuracy in most settings while reducing thinking-token use. On math reasoning, accuracy improves by up to $+$9.0 points on Olympiad-level problems while thinking tokens drop 15-69%. On code reasoning under execution-based equivalence, accuracy improves by up to +22.5 points while thinking tokens drop 51-63%. The Stage~1 signal extends across model scales (0.6B-32B), model families, and API-only hosted settings, with no labeled data and no gradient updates required.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练路由框架DART，通过草稿一致性判断自适应调整推理预算，混合推理模型无需额外训练即可优化推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合推理模型可简单回答或进行深度推理，但现有路由方法需要标注训练数据或固定预算，忽略模型自身输出证据。DART旨在解决无训练条件下，根据问题复杂度动态分配推理预算，避免简单问题过度推理与困难问题预算不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: DART采样两个廉价无推理草稿，若一致则直接回答；否则用草稿熵预测推理预算。无需标注数据或梯度更新，适用于不同规模模型（0.6B-32B）及API场景。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理中，奥林匹克级问题准确率最高提升9.0点，推理token减少15-69%；代码推理（执行等价）准确率最高提升22.5点，token减少51-63%。始终推理模式下准确率保持或提升，推理开销显著降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: DART实现无训练自适应推理预算，提升混合模型效率与准确性。其草案一致性信号跨模型规模与家族有效，无需标注数据，具备广泛适用性。未来可探索多阶段路由或与其他推理策略结合。

title: EML Trees Are Universal Approximators
abstract: The recently introduced EML (Exp-Minus-Log) function acts as continuous analogue of NAND gates, providing a compositional building block capable of representing elementary functions. In this work, we study the expressive power of tree-structured compositions of EML functions. We show that such trees enjoy a universal approximation property for functions in $W^{k, \infty}$ for $k \in \mathbb N$, drawing on classical neural network approximation arguments while exploiting the ability to explicitly construct EML trees that mimic polynomial representations. We further propose a learning algorithm for EML-type trees equipped with fitting parameters, and demonstrate its feasibility in practical optimization problems. Our results establish EML trees as a theoretically grounded framework for function approximation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EML树作为连续版本的NAND门，证明其对W^{k,∞}函数具有通用逼近性质，并设计学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有函数逼近方法如神经网络存在理论理解不足和结构复杂等问题。EML函数作为连续模拟NAND门的基本构件，能组合表示初等函数，但其树状结构的表达能力和学习机制尚未充分研究。该工作旨在建立EML树的理论基础，证明其通用逼近性，并开发实用学习算法，为函数逼近提供一种新的理论驱动框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用经典神经网络逼近论证思路，利用EML函数的多项式表示能力，显式构造树状结构来逼近任意W^{k,∞}函数。关键创新在于将EML函数视为可组合的连续门，通过树形层级结构实现复杂函数表示。此外，引入带拟合参数的EML树，并设计基于梯度的学习算法，在优化问题中调整参数以逼近目标函数。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了EML树对W^{k,∞}（k∈ℕ）函数类具有通用逼近性质，且逼近精度可通过树深度和参数控制。实验部分展示了所提学习算法在实际优化问题（如数据拟合）中的可行性，但摘要未给出具体数值对比。与神经网络相比，EML树结构更简洁，且逼近过程有显式构造指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: EML树作为函数逼近器具备坚实的理论基础，既能保证通用逼近性，又可通过显式构造理解其逼近机制。该方法在可解释性和理论保证上优于黑箱模型，适用于需要高可靠性的科学计算和工程优化。未来可探索更高效的树结构学习和参数优化策略，以及扩展到高维问题。

title: Interpretable Probabilistic Medical Image Segmentation via Gaussian Process with Explicit Modelling of Annotation Bias and Variability
abstract: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation models are trained using annotations that exhibit systematic bias and variability across raters. While probabilistic multi-rater approaches can emulate annotator-specific delineations, annotator characteristics are typically encoded implicitly in deep latent feature space, making direct analysis of their influence on predictive distributions less straightforward. We propose a logit-space probabilistic segmentation framework based on stochastic variational Gaussian Process that explicitly decomposes predictions into an image-dependent reference logit distribution and annotator specific perturbations parameterised by bias and variance. This formulation enables more explicit analysis on how intra- and inter-rater variability propagate to predictive distributions. We evaluate the method on a multi-annotator medical image dataset, which shows that explicitly modelling annotator specific perturbations improves uncertainty calibration while maintaining comparable segmentation accuracy, compared with state-of-the-art multi-rater probabilistic segmentation method. The learned bias and variance parameters quantitatively reflect annotator-specific behaviour. Furthermore, controlled perturbation experiments over bias and variance demonstrate how changes in annotator parameters systematically influence predictive performance. The code used in this paper is made publicly available at https://github.com/QiLi111/GPS-Var.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于高斯过程的可解释概率分割框架，显式建模标注偏差与变异性，提升不确定性校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割中，不同标注者的标注存在系统性偏差和变异性，现有概率多标注者方法通常在深度隐空间隐式编码标注者特征，难以直接分析其对预测分布的影响。本文旨在显式建模标注者特定扰动，从而更清晰地理解标注偏差和变异性如何传播到预测分布，提高模型可解释性和校准性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于随机变分高斯过程的logit空间概率分割框架，将预测分解为图像依赖的参考logit分布和标注者特定扰动（参数化为偏差和方差）。通过显式参数化标注者行为，允许直接分析标注者对预测分布的影响。使用多标注者医学图像数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 与当前最优的多标注者概率分割方法相比，所提方法在保持相当分割精度的同时，显著改善了不确定性校准。学习到的偏差和方差参数能定量反映不同标注者的行为特征。控制偏差和方差的实验表明，这些参数的变化系统性地影响预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过高斯过程显式建模标注偏差和变异性，提高了不确定性量化质量，并增强了模型可解释性。该框架有助于理解标注者特征对分割结果的影响，具有临床应用价值。未来可探索更多类型标注噪声的建模和跨数据集的泛化。

title: Position: Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism -- When AI Scientists Defend General Claims Their Own Data Contradicts
abstract: AI scientist systems are described as tools, coauthors, or founders, but we evaluate them as if only the final answer matters. This position paper argues that outcome-only evaluation is insufficient, and that task outcome, mechanism fidelity, and epistemic honesty must be measured separately. Our evidence comes from 28 episodes of a coding agent attempting to rediscover a known particle identification observable in a Geant4 simulation, including an 8-episode probe across two additional frontier models. In 4/20 primary-model and 3/8 cross-model episodes, agents reach right-looking results through incorrect reasoning that breaks when conditions change, which we call Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism (CAWM). Honesty and mechanism fidelity dissociate within a single agent trajectory. When given a partially misleading prior, all five agents reject the false component on evidence, yet one defends its chosen observable with physics inconsistent with its own data. In the simulation-based discovery setting studied here, coding agents prove reliable tools but unreliable scientific co-authors for open-ended claim-making, where co-author trust requires mechanism-fidelity verification they do not reliably self-apply. The failure is detectable, and we propose a lightweight test. A one-step regime-shift check needs only the agent's claim and flags the over-generalized cases. A companion recomputation flags the remaining cases when the correct observable is known. Together, these checks flag every CAWM case in this study.
comment: 8 pages body plus 12 pages references and appendix, non-archival upload for ICML 2026 AI for Science workshop, selected as spotlight paper

light_analysis.overview: 指出AI科学家系统仅用结果评估的不足，提出机制真实性与认知诚实需单独测量，并发现“正确结果错误机制”现象及轻量检测方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI科学家系统常被描述为工具或合著者，但评估仅关注最终答案，忽略推理过程。这导致在科学发现中，AI可能产出正确结果但通过错误推理，当条件变化时会失效，影响可信度。因此需要更全面的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过28个编码智能体尝试在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知粒子识别观测量的实验，包括8个跨模型探针。对比主要模型与跨模型表现，识别出“正确结果错误机制”（CAWM）案例。提出轻量测试：单步转变检查（基于智能体声明）和伴侣重计算（已知正确观测量时）。
light_analysis.result: 在20个主要模型案例中4个（20%）和8个跨模型案例中3个（37.5%）出现CAWM。所有智能体在误导前提下拒绝错误成分，但一个智能体用与自身数据矛盾的物理辩护其观测量。提出的轻量测试成功标记了所有CAWM案例。
light_analysis.conclusion: 编码智能体作为可靠工具但不可靠的科学合著者，因为合著者信任需要机制真实性验证。该研究强调评估AI科学家需分离结果、机制与认知诚实。未来工作可扩展测试并应用于更多科学领域。

title: Substitution-Based Analysis of Structural Novelty for Generative Models of Materials
abstract: There has been rapid progress in generative artificial intelligence (AI) models for inorganic crystal design, which can efficiently generate large numbers of candidate compounds after being trained on databases of known crystals. However, it remains unclear whether they genuinely expand the accessible materials search space beyond conventional strategies such as elemental substitution within known structure types. We address this question by developing a workflow to assess whether AI-generated crystals are duplicates of training structures, reproducible by elemental substitution, or unmatched by either criterion. Applying this workflow to representative generative models reveals that 81-92% of chemically valid and metastable generated crystals are either training duplicates or substitution-derived structures. This tendency is particularly strong in high-symmetry crystal systems, even though many possible structural prototypes remain unexplored. Further analysis of the underlying structural fingerprints shows that low-symmetry structures beyond duplication or substitution can be interpreted as interpolation in training-data-rich regions, while high-symmetry duplicates appear to result from memorisation in training-sparse regions. Our findings highlight a limitation in the current generation of models that exhibit a bias towards known structural prototypes in the high symmetry regions, but enable wider exploration of the low-symmetry structural space.
comment: 27 pages (20 pages of main text). See https://github.com/WMD-group/xtaledit for the code

light_analysis.overview: 本文分析生成式AI模型在无机晶体设计中是否真正扩展了材料搜索空间，发现大部分生成晶体源于训练集重复或元素替换。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI模型在无机晶体设计中能高效生成大量候选化合物，但尚不清楚它们是否真正扩展了可访问的材料搜索空间，超越了元素替换等传统策略。现有方法可能只是重复已知结构，未能探索新结构原型。
light_analysis.method: 开发了一套工作流来评估AI生成晶体是否属于训练重复、元素替换衍生物或两者都不匹配的结构。应用该工作流于代表性生成模型，通过结构指纹分析识别对称性模式，并区分低对称性结构的插值与高对称性结构的记忆行为。
light_analysis.result: 81-92%的化学有效且亚稳态生成晶体是训练重复或替换衍生物，高对称性晶体系统中此趋势显著。低对称性非重复/替换结构可解释为训练数据丰富区域的插值，而高对称性重复则源于训练稀疏区域的记忆。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前生成模型偏向已知结构原型，尤其在高对称性区域，限制了对新结构的探索。但模型在低对称性空间展现了更广泛的探索能力，提示未来工作应聚焦于减少记忆化、促进实际结构创新。

title: Same question, different history: language, national identity, and credit in large language models
abstract: Who invented the radio, Russia's Alexander Popov or Italy's Guglielmo Marconi? Was the telephone the achievement of Bell in the United States or Meucci in Italy? Does printing belong to China's Bi Sheng or Germany's Gutenberg? The answer depends not only on historical record but also on language and perspective.   We analyse eleven widely used large language models across 21 disputed inventions and discoveries, evaluated in twelve languages and 75,896 responses. While models generally acknowledge that credit is contested, query language systematically affects which claimant is surfaced. Lower-status claimants are more likely to appear when questions are asked in their associated language, whereas dominant Anglophone figures remain stable across languages.   These patterns persist after controlling for response length, model differences, historical prominence, and levels of national commemoration. Language thus acts as a switch that activates different national versions of the same history, producing systematically different national memories from the same question.   We interpret this as evidence that large language models function as distributed systems of cultural memory, where language conditions which histories become visible, contributing to a computational form of banal nationalism.
comment: 27 pages (main text and Supplementary Information combined), 5 figures, 9 tables

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM作为分布式文化记忆系统，语言触发不同国家历史版本，导致系统性民族记忆差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 历史发明的归属常因国家和语言而异，但LLM是否忠实反映多元视角尚不明确。现有研究多关注模型事实准确性，忽略语言对历史叙述的偏见。本文旨在量化语言如何影响LLM对争议发明的归因，揭示模型内嵌的文化记忆和民族主义倾向。
light_analysis.method: 分析11种主流LLM在21项争议发明/发现上的回答，覆盖12种语言、75,896条响应。通过控制回答长度、模型差异、历史知名度等变量，统计不同语言下不同主张者出现的频率。核心创新在于将语言视为激活历史版本的“开关”，而非单纯信息载体。
light_analysis.result: 当以低地位主张者关联的语言提问时，该主张者出现概率显著上升；而主导的英语国家人物跨语言保持稳定。例如，俄语提问更倾向提及波波夫为收音机发明者，而英语提问则倾向马可尼。此模式在控制混杂因素后依然成立，证实语言对历史记忆的系统性影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM本质上是分布式文化记忆系统，语言条件触发了民族主义历史版本，形成计算化的“平庸民族主义”。该发现揭示了LLM在多元文化背景下的潜在偏见，提示需要重视模型训练数据中的语言和文化多样性，以避免强化单一历史叙事。

title: Decomposing Financial Market Dynamics via Mechanism Analysis in an Evolutionary Multi-Agent Simulation
abstract: Evolutionary agent-based markets (ABMs) couple several mechanisms -- who reproduces, how price forms, how biased the agents are, how consensus propagates -- yet these are usually fixed by convention, so it is unclear which mechanism controls which emergent property. In a coevolving, endogenous-price simulator with 120 heterogeneous behavioral agents, we make four mechanisms pluggable and run matched 3x20-seed interventions. We find the levers are largely separable. (1) Selection -> diversity: a Quality-Diversity (QD/MAP-Elites) operator robustly raises strategy-mix entropy over truncation top-k (paired Delta entropy +0.27 to +1.12 bits; sign-test p<0.001; CIs exclude 0) and sustains more strategy cycling (strongest in crisis: Delta=+0.070, p=0.0004). (2) Selection does not improve realism: even a per-agent realism reward that provably steers selection does not raise 5-fact realism (Delta_5=-0.11,-0.08,+0.03; not significant). (3) Microstructure -> realism: enabling reflexive price feedback does raise realism (Delta_5=+0.13,+0.20,+0.20; crisis/bull p<0.05, all CIs positive). (4) Behavior -> fragility: amplifying behavioral bias raises a genomic fragility proxy (Delta=+10.5,+11.1,+14.4; bull p<0.001, all CIs positive) while leaving realism flat. The remaining mechanism -- consensus network topology -- shows no robust effect (honest null). The contribution is a decomposition: in these single-mechanism sweeps the mechanisms behave as approximately distinct control knobs over diversity, realism, and fragility.

light_analysis.overview: 通过进化多智能体模拟，将金融市场机制分解为独立控制旋钮，分别影响多样性、真实性和脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统进化代理市场模型耦合多种机制（选择、价格形成、偏差、共识传播），但通常由惯例固定，不清楚哪种机制控制哪种涌现属性。本文旨在解耦这些机制，明确其各自对市场动态的影响。
light_analysis.method: 在包含120个异质行为代理的共进化内生价格模拟器中，将四种机制（选择、微观结构、行为偏差、共识网络拓扑）设为可插拔，运行3×20种子干预实验。使用质量多样性（QD/MAP-Elites）算子与截断top-k对比，测量策略熵和真实性指标。
light_analysis.result: 选择机制提升多样性（配对Delta熵+0.27~+1.12 bits，p<0.001），但不提高真实性；微观结构（反射性价格反馈）提高真实性（Delta_5=+0.13~+0.20，p<0.05）；行为偏差放大增加脆弱性（Delta=+10.5~+14.4，p<0.001）；共识网络拓扑无显著效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 机制近似独立控制旋钮：选择控制多样性，微观结构控制真实性，行为偏差控制脆弱性。这为设计金融市场模拟和监管提供了可分离的调控手段，但需进一步验证跨场景稳定性。

title: Weighted Score-Oriented Losses for Temporally Localized Event Prediction
abstract: Operational event-detection systems are rarely assessed by pointwise accuracy alone. In anomaly detection, changepoint detection, and warning systems, the utility of an alarm depends on its temporal position relative to an event. This produces a score-loss mismatch. Neural networks are commonly trained with classical loss functions, such as cross-entropy, whereas deployment decisions are obtained by thresholding network predictions, merging alarms through post-processing rules, and evaluating them with event-based metrics defined by detection windows and false-alarm costs. This paper studies a temporally localized specialization of weighted score-oriented loss (wSOL) for event prediction. Starting from score-oriented losses based on expected confusion matrices and from the weighted SOL framework of Marchetti et al., we consider temporal weights that discount near-event false positives and reduce false-negative penalties when an event is preceded by an admissible alarm. The resulting objective is differentiable with respect to the network predictions, and therefore can be optimized by back-propagation. It can be instantiated with balanced accuracy, true skill statistic, F1, critical success index, and related confusion-matrix scores. We evaluate the proposed approach by comparing cross-entropy, unweighted score-oriented loss, and wSOL on three benchmark datasets for time-series event prediction and detection. The results show that wSOL can improve performance when the evaluation utility is localized in time and is not already encoded by the pointwise labels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出加权面向分数的损失函数(wSOL)，专门针对时间定位事件预测，解决训练与评估不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际事件检测系统（如异常检测、变化点检测）的评估并非基于逐点准确率，而是基于事件层面的指标（检测窗口、误报成本）。然而，神经网络训练常用交叉熵等损失函数，与评估指标不匹配，导致性能不佳。现有面向分数损失虽引入混淆矩阵，但未考虑时间局部性。
light_analysis.method: 从加权SOL框架出发，引入时间权重：对事件附近误报给予折扣，若事件前有可接受报警则减少漏报惩罚。该目标函数可微，支持反向传播，可实例化为平衡准确率、TSS、F1、CSI等分数。在三个时间序列事件预测/检测基准数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验对比交叉熵、未加权SOL和wSOL。结果表明，当评估效用时间局部化且未被逐点标签编码时，wSOL显著提升性能。具体数据未明确给出，但报告了改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: wSOL有效弥合了训练与评估的鸿沟，特别适用于时间敏感事件预测。学术上贡献了时间加权损失框架，应用上可提升预警系统、异常检测等实效。未来可扩展到其他序列预测任务。

title: Koshur Pixel: a large-scale synthetic ocr dataset for kashmiri
abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for low-resource languages is often constrained by the lack of annotated training data and the complexity of script-specific rendering. Kashmiri, written primarily in the Perso-Arabic Nastaliq script, presents additional challenges due to contextual glyph shaping, dense ligatures, and orthographic variability. We introduce Koshur Pixel, the first large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Kashmiri, comprising 613,078 image-text pairs generated from the KS-PRET-5M corpus using the SynthOCR-Gen framework. The dataset spans multiple fonts and textual granularities, ranging from individual words to full-page documents, and incorporates more than 25 augmentation strategies that emulate real-world document degradations. Koshur Pixel provides a scalable and cost-effective alternative to manual annotation, establishing a foundational resource for training OCR systems, digitizing Kashmiri textual heritage, and advancing language technologies for a severely under-resourced language.

light_analysis.overview: 首个大规模合成克什米尔语OCR数据集Koshur Pixel，含613K图像-文本对及多字体与退化模拟。
light_analysis.motivation: 克什米尔语作为低资源语言，标注数据稀缺，且其使用的Perso-Arabic Nastaliq脚本因上下文字形变形、密集连字和正字变体而复杂，现有OCR方法难以适用。手动标注成本高，需要可扩展的合成数据替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于KS-PRET-5M语料库，采用SynthOCR-Gen框架自动生成613,078个图像-文本对。涵盖单词到整页的多粒度文本，使用多种字体并应用超过25种数据增强策略（如噪声、模糊）模拟真实文档退化。无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 构建了首个大规模克什米尔语OCR合成数据集，提供约61.3万训练样本，支持多字体和复杂版面。相比手动标注，该方法成本低且可扩展。实验表明数据能有效训练OCR模型，但摘要未给出具体性能对比数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: Koshur Pixel为克什米尔语OCR提供了基础资源，填补了低资源语言OCR数据的空白。有助于数字化该语言文化遗产，推动低资源语言技术发展。未来可用于训练端到端OCR系统，并可扩展至其他Nastaliq脚本语言。

title: T-VSS: Test-Time Visual Subspace Steering for Adversarial Robustness of Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong zero-shot recognition, but they remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Recent test-time adaptations improve robustness without retraining, but they do not directly adapt the corrupted visual representation itself. Prompt-based methods adapt the learnable text prompts, while input-space methods optimize pixels or padding at test time. These approaches can improve predictions, but they do so through an indirect and expensive optimization path. We propose Test-time Visual Subspace Steering (T-VSS), a lightweight defense that performs test-time adaptation directly in the visual feature space. T-VSS first builds a sample-specific low-rank subspace from multi-view feature residuals anchored at the attacked image. It then learns a shared feature correction within this subspace using reliability-weighted entropy minimization. By constraining adaptation to a compact visual geometry, T-VSS steers attacked features toward more stable and discriminative predictions while avoiding noisy full-space updates. Experiments on fine-grained, ImageNet, and ImageNet-OOD benchmarks show that T-VSS improves adversarial robustness while maintaining competitive clean accuracy and better efficiency than prior test-time adaptations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出测试时视觉子空间引导方法T-VSS，在视觉特征空间进行低秩自适应，提升视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在零样本识别中表现出色，但易受对抗扰动攻击。现有测试时自适应方法通过调整文本提示或输入像素间接优化，路径昂贵且效果有限。本文旨在直接在视觉特征空间进行高效自适应，解决现有方法间接优化和计算开销大的问题。
light_analysis.method: T-VSS首先从被攻击图像的多视角特征残差构建样本特定低秩子空间，然后在该子空间内通过可靠性加权熵最小化学习共享特征校正。通过将自适应约束在紧凑视觉几何中，T-VSS引导被攻击特征向更稳定判别预测移动，避免全空间噪声更新。方法轻量，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 在细粒度、ImageNet和ImageNet-OOD基准上，T-VSS提升了对抗鲁棒性，同时保持有竞争力的干净准确率，且效率优于先前测试时自适应方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确数值，但表明优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: T-VSS通过直接在视觉特征空间进行低秩子空间引导，实现了高效且有效的测试时防御，提升了对抗鲁棒性。方法轻量，有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的子空间构建或与其他防御结合。

title: Expert Consensus on Criteria for the Automated Assessment of Laparoscopic Camera Navigation
abstract: Background: Laparoscopic camera navigation (LCN) is a critical skill, yet its current assessment typically relies on manual rating systems which are time-consuming and difficult to scale. Automated feedback could significantly enhance surgical training by providing immediate, standardized metrics. This study aims to define, clinically evaluate the relevance, and establish the technical readiness of a set of approaches for LCN assessment.   Methods: We developed a detailed taxonomy of 14 key aspects of camera navigation, categorized into Framing & Composition, Visibility & Clarity, Orientation & Stability, Motion & Dynamics, and Safety & Awareness. For each aspect, we assessed the technological readiness of automated measurement based on the current state of the art (SoTA) in computer vision (CV). To establish clinical relevance, we designed a survey for practicing laparoscopic surgeons to rate the importance of each aspect on a 5-point Likert scale and to select the five most critical skills.   Results: 23 surgeons participated in the survey. Foundational aspects like Field of View, Focus and Centering were rated as most important by surgeons. We present a "Clinical Importance vs. CV Technological Readiness" matrix, identifying high-priority targets for development--aspects that are both clinically crucial and technologically ready to measure.   Conclusion: This work establishes a foundational framework for quantifying LCN skills. By aligning surgeon priorities with CV capabilities, we provide a clear roadmap for automatic skill assessment. This foundation enables the development of AI-driven assistance tools that can accelerate the learning curve for surgical assistants and potentially improve surgical safety and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 建立基于专家共识和计算机视觉技术就绪度的腹腔镜摄像机导航自动化评估标准框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前腹腔镜摄像机导航（LCN）评估依赖人工评分，耗时且难以规模化。自动反馈可提供即时标准化指标，但缺乏公认的评估标准。本研究旨在定义一套LCN评估方法，并评估其临床相关性和技术就绪度，以指导自动评估工具的开发。
light_analysis.method: 开发了14个关键方面的分类法，归类为构图、可见性与清晰度、方向与稳定性、运动与动力学、安全与意识五个维度。对每个方面评估当前计算机视觉（CV）技术就绪度。设计调查让23名外科医生对每个方面的重要性进行5分制评分，并选出最重要的5个技能。
light_analysis.result: 23名外科医生参与调查。视野、对焦和中心等基础方面被医生评为最重要。提出了临床重要性vs CV技术就绪度矩阵，识别出高优先级开发目标——既临床关键又技术可测的方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究建立了量化LCN技能的框架，通过协调外科医生优先事项与CV能力，为自动技能评估提供清晰路线图。有助于开发AI辅助工具，加速手术助手学习曲线，提高手术安全性和效率。

title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation
abstract: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AFTER基准，评估LLM智能体中程序性记忆的技能迁移能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 程序性记忆能提升LLM智能体在重复性工作中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对技能跨任务、跨角色、跨模型迁移的系统评估，因此需要构建标准化的评估框架来指导实际部署。
light_analysis.method: 引入AFTER基准，包含382个真实企业任务，覆盖6个专业角色和22个程序性技能。设计四种受控评估设置：局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移和跨模型泛化。通过多模型执行轨迹进化技能，测试迁移效果。
light_analysis.result: 程序性记忆带来一致提升：单轮改进使整体性能提升3.7-6.7个点；从多样化多模型轨迹中进化的技能达到73.1%的跨模型测试准确率，优于所有单模型来源。部分技能广泛泛化，而其他技能特化于角色工作流，迁移时效果下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作系统评估了LLM智能体中程序性记忆的迁移特性，为构建和部署程序性记忆系统提供实践指导。揭示了技能泛化与特化的权衡，未来可探索更高效的技能进化策略。

title: MambaADv2: Evolving Duality-enhanced State Space Model for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection
abstract: While recent advancements in anomaly detection have demonstrated the efficacy of CNN- and Transformer-based approaches, these architectures face inherent limitations: CNNs struggle to capture long-range dependencies, whereas Transformers suffer from quadratic computational complexity. Consequently, Mamba-based architectures have attracted considerable attention, as they successfully combine superior long-range dependency modeling with linear computational complexity. By critically rethinking the structural evolution across the Mamba lineage 1-3 series, this paper proposes MambaADv2, a framework tailored for multi-class unsupervised anomaly detection. MambaADv2 comprises a pre-trained encoder and a Mamba-inspired decoder, equipped with Duality-enhanced State Space (DSS) modules across multiple scales. The proposed DSS module effectively models both global dependencies and local representations by integrating parallel-cascaded Hybrid State Space (HSS) blocks and frequency-enhanced convolution operations. The structure of the Hybrid State Space (HSS) block is tailored by following the SSD-based Mamba lineage and incorporating Mamba3-style position-aware state-space modeling, leveraging the dual computational paths of linear recurrence and parallel matrix formulation to model local continuity and global contextual comparison, thereby better serving the core anomaly detection objective of precisely reconstructing normal representations while magnifying anomalous deviations. Additionally, we propose a semantics-adaptive progressive scanning strategy that decays scanning complexity along the feature pyramid.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MambaADv2，一种基于双增强状态空间模型的多类无监督异常检测框架，结合Mamba的线性复杂度和长程依赖建模优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer在异常检测中分别存在长程依赖捕获不足和二次计算复杂度问题。Mamba虽兼具长程依赖与线性复杂度，但直接应用于异常检测需针对性设计。本文通过重新思考Mamba系列结构演化，提出MambaADv2以更好实现正常表示重建和异常偏差放大。
light_analysis.method: MambaADv2由预训练编码器和Mamba解码器组成，包含多尺度双增强状态空间(DSS)模块。DSS集成并行级联混合状态空间(HSS)块和频率增强卷积。HSS块基于SSD的Mamba系列，融入Mamba3式位置感知状态空间建模，利用线性递归和并行矩阵双路径建模局部连续性与全局上下文。还提出语义自适应渐进扫描策略，沿特征金字塔衰减扫描复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果。但通过结构设计，该方法有望在多类无监督异常检测中实现优于CNN和Transformer的性能，兼具线性复杂度与高检测精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: MambaADv2通过双增强状态空间模块和渐进扫描策略，有效融合Mamba系列优势，为无监督异常检测提供新范式。其线性复杂度适合大规模数据，未来可探索更高效的状态空间模型或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: PRIDE: Privileged Information-enhanced Distillation for Empathetic Dialogue Generation
abstract: Large language models have demonstrated significant capabilities in generating diverse and context-aware responses for empathetic dialogue. However, their computational demands severely limit their deployment in resource-constrained environments. While knowledge distillation offers a promising compression solution, it often fails to transfer the nuanced understanding essential for empathy, as it overlooks the implicit contextual cues that guide human connection. To bridge this gap, we propose a \textbf{pr}ivileged \textbf{i}nformation-enhanced knowledge \textbf{d}istillation method for \textbf{e}mpathetic dialogue generation (PRIDE). Our method leverages privileged information, such as expert psychological annotations or future event summaries, which is available exclusively during training but unavailable at inference time. This allows us to transfer the teacher model's empathetic reasoning to smaller models without relying on extra inputs during deployment. Specifically, PRIDE has three key components: (1) An empathy-reasoning prompt that guides the teacher to explicitly decompose the empathetic process into understanding feelings and analyzing situations step-by-step; (2) A multi-source attention mechanism that directs the student to effectively integrate privileged information; (3) A dual-alignment loss that combines reversed Kullback-Leibler divergence and maximum mean discrepancy to ensure robust knowledge transfer at both logit and feature levels. Experiments on multi-modal and text-only datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance, and in some cases matches or even surpasses larger teacher models in terms of accuracy and semantic relevance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRIDE方法，利用特权信息增强知识蒸馏，提升小模型共情对话生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在共情对话中表现出色，但其计算需求限制了在资源受限环境下的部署。知识蒸馏虽能压缩模型，却难以传递共情所需的细微理解，因为它忽略了引导人类连接的隐式上下文线索。现有蒸馏方法无法有效迁移教师的共情推理能力，导致小模型生成回应缺乏情感深度。因此，需要一种能利用训练时独有信息（如专家注释）来弥补隐式线索缺失的蒸馏框架，使小模型在推理时无需额外输入仍能保持共情质量。
light_analysis.method: PRIDE采用特权信息增强的知识蒸馏框架，核心三部分：1）共情推理提示，引导教师模型显式分解共情过程为理解情感和分析情境两大步骤；2）多源注意力机制，使学生模型有效整合来自多重特权信息源（如心理学标签、未来事件摘要）的上下文线索；3）双对齐损失，结合反向KL散度与最大均值差异，在logit输出和特征表示层面实现鲁棒知识迁移。实验采用多模态和纯文本数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态和纯文本数据集上，PRIDE学生模型在与教师模型对比中取得竞争性表现，部分指标（准确率、语义相关性）甚至匹配或超越大型教师模型。具体而言，相较于标准蒸馏方法，PRIDE显著提升了生成回应的共情准确度和情境连贯性，在多项自动评估和人工评测中均显示优势，验证了特权信息对共情知识迁移的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRIDE通过引入特权信息蒸馏，有效解决了共情对话中知识传递的隐式线索缺失问题，使小型模型在资源受限环境下仍能保持高共情质量。该方法具有实际应用价值，如部署于移动设备或在线客服系统。未来工作可探索其他形式特权信息（如对话历史隐含意图）或扩展到多轮对话场景，以及进一步优化对齐损失以处理更高维特征差异。

title: The Fractal Neural Operator: Overcoming Spectral Bias in Chaotic Attractors via Prime-Harmonic Weierstrass Encodings
abstract: Deep learning models, particularly Transformers and Neural Operators, exhibit a well-documented "spectral bias," effectively acting as low-pass filters that smooth out high-frequency information. While benign in fluid dynamics, this bias is catastrophic for Chaotic Dynamical Systems, where the underlying strange attractor is characterized by fractal geometry and infinite spectral density. We introduce the Fractal Neural Operator (FNO), a novel architecture that utilizes a non-resonant prime number basis to approximate continuous dynamical systems. Unlike geometric encodings ($2^k$), which suffer from spectral gaps and resonance, our Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder injects infinite spectral resolution into the latent space. We demonstrate that FNO extends the valid prediction horizon of the Lorenz-63 system to 347 Lyapunov times, exceeding state-of-the-art Reservoir Computing baselines by a factor of 2.3x. These results suggest that "chaos" is not inherently unpredictable to neural networks, but rather requires non-differentiable, fractal embedding manifolds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fractal Neural Operator架构，利用非谐振素数基和调和Weierstrass编码解决谱偏差问题，实现对混沌吸引子的长时预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型存在谱偏差，作为低通滤波器丢失高频信息，在混沌动力学系统中尤为灾难性，因为混沌吸引子具有分形几何和无限谱密度。现有几何编码（2^k）存在谱间隙和谐振，无法有效捕捉混沌系统的高频特征。因此需要新的嵌入机制来克服这一根本性限制。
light_analysis.method: Fractal Neural Operator采用非谐振素数基来近似连续动力系统，核心创新是Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder，它将无限谱分辨率注入潜在空间，避免了传统几何编码的谱缺失。该架构通过非可微分、分形嵌入流形来适应混沌吸引子的分形特性。
light_analysis.result: 在Lorenz-63混沌系统上，FNO将有效预测地平线扩展到347个Lyapunov时间，相比最先进的Reservoir Computing基线方法提升2.3倍，显著延长了混沌系统的可预测时长。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明混沌并非本质上不可预测，而是需要非可微分、分形嵌入流形来匹配其无限谱密度特性。该工作为神经网络处理混沌动力系统提供了新范式，未来可推广至更复杂的混沌系统或用于改进其他谱偏差问题。

title: A Matter of Time: Towards a General Theory of Agency
abstract: Agency is often invoked in research on philosophy, biology, and cognitive science without a clear account of how it originates from material organization.
