Building on temporally parametrized (F, A)-systems, this paper develops a graded organizational theory of agency grounded in relational biology, physical biosemiotics, and process ontology. We argue that self-referential closure cannot be adequately conceived outside time: once the constitutive processes of a semantically closed organization are associated with distinct characteristic timescales, the organization unfolds into an out-of-sync dependency structure that can be formally redescribed as a history-dependent, revisable Asynchronous Dynamic Bayesian Network. This move allows for a principled distinction between autonomy, goal-directedness, agency, and open-endedness. Autonomy arises from precarious closure to efficient causation under material openness; goal-directedness from the maintenance of viability-supporting organization; agency appears when such organization acquires an endogenous anticipatory structure that selectively modulates organism-environment coupling in light of possible futures; open-endedness begins when this anticipatory organization can reconstruct its own future space of possibilities. Our framework reconciles Rosennean anticipation with organizational closure, restricts Markov blankets and active inference to derived formal redescriptions rather than first principles, and reinterprets computational enactivism in non-Fristonian terms. By deriving weaker temporalized organizations, our contribution outlines a hierarchy from proto-agential chemical systems to fully semantically closed agents, with implications for multicellular organisms, synthetic lifeforms, and neuroscience.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于时间参数的广义代理理论，通过异步动态贝叶斯网络形式化组织封闭性，区分自治、目标导向、代理和开放性等级。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有哲学、生物学和认知科学中对代理（agency）的讨论缺乏从物质组织中起源的清晰解释。自指封闭性难以在时间之外恰当理解，导致自治、目标导向、代理和开放性等概念混淆。需要一种基于组织理论的形式化框架，以区分这些概念，并解释从化学系统到语义封闭代理的层级。
light_analysis.method: 基于时间参数化的(F, A)-系统，结合关系生物学、物理生物符号学和过程本体论。将语义封闭组织的构成过程与不同特征时间尺度关联，形成异步依赖结构，形式化为历史依赖、可修订的异步动态贝叶斯网络。通过推导弱化时间化组织，建立从原代理化学系统到完全语义封闭代理的层级。
light_analysis.result: 该框架原则性地区分了自治（源于物质开放下高效因果的脆弱封闭）、目标导向（维持生存支持组织）、代理（内源性预期结构选择性调节有机体-环境耦合）和开放性（预期组织重构自身可能性空间）。兼容Rosennean预期与组织封闭，将马尔可夫毯和主动推理限制为衍生的形式重述，并以非Fristonian术语重解释计算行为主义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 理论贡献在于统一了代理的多学科概念，提供了从简单到复杂生命系统的组织层级模型。对多细胞生物、合成生命和神经科学有启示。局限性在于未涉及具体实验验证，未来可扩展至实际生物系统建模。

title: Temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation for Source-Free Time-Series Adaptation
abstract: The goal of source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) for time-series data is to transfer knowledge from a pre-trained source model to an unlabeled target domain without requiring access to source data, while addressing feature shift and temporal drift inherent in the signals. Although existing approaches have explored temporal dynamics in unsupervised source-free adaptation, they largely overlook spectral shifts in time-series data. Towards this end, we propose a novel approach termed temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation (SAFA) for source-free time-series domain adaptation. Specifically, we first model the source domain at multiple scales by jointly capturing temporal dependencies and spectral characteristics. To adapt time-series data in the target domain, we introduce a trainable frequency adaptation module that modulates the phase and amplitude of target signals in the frequency domain to align them with the source distribution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of SAFA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出时间-频谱对齐与频率自适应方法，解决源自由时间序列域适应中的频谱偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 源自由域适应在时间序列数据中需应对特征偏移和时间漂移，现有方法多关注时域动态而忽略频谱偏移。实际中时间序列信号的频谱特性对领域适配至关重要，因此需一种能同时对齐时域和频域分布的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先对源域进行多尺度建模，联合捕获时间依赖和频谱特征。在目标域引入可训练的频率自适应模块，通过调制相位和幅度，在频域将目标信号对齐到源分布，从而实现源自由的域适应。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集（如人体活动识别、脑电图等）上的实验表明，SAFA在分类准确率和鲁棒性上均优于现有源自由域适应方法，有效缓解了时域和频域偏移。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAFA通过时间-频谱对齐和频率自适应，为时间序列源自由域适应提供了新思路，显著提升了跨域泛化能力，未来可探索更复杂的频域建模和实时适配场景。

title: LUMINA-26: Low-Light Understanding for Modeling and Interpreting Night-time Actions
abstract: Low-light human action recognition remains a challenging problem due to poor illumination, amplified noise, motion ambiguity, and diverse real-world scenes. Existing low-light datasets often lack sufficient action diversity, capture realism, or balanced class distribution, limiting the development of robust models. To address this, we introduce LUMINA-26: Low-Light Understanding for Modeling and Interpreting Night-time Actions, comprising 6,784 clips across 26 action classes, recorded from 22 subjects across 20 indoor and outdoor locations under naturally occurring low-light conditions. We also propose Illumi-Net: An Illumination-Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts Network, which leverages video-level illumination cues to guide adaptive enhancement and transformer-based spatio-temporal feature extraction, with expert-conditioned decision fusion. Our method surpasses previous state-of-the-art performance on ELLAR (Top-1: 55.13%, Top-5: 78.87%) and establishes a strong baseline on LUMINA-26 (Top-1: 75.95%, Top-5: 93.58%), offering a practical benchmark for future low-light action recognition research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个大规模低光动作识别数据集LUMINA-26和光照自适应混合专家网络Illumi-Net，显著提升了低光动作识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光环境下动作识别因光照不足、噪声、运动模糊等问题而极具挑战性。现有低光数据集存在动作类别少、拍摄场景不真实、类别分布不均等缺陷，限制了鲁棒模型的发展。因此，本文旨在构建一个大规模、多类别、真实场景的低光动作识别基准，并设计光照自适应的识别方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文贡献包括：1) LUMINA-26数据集：包含6,784个视频片段，涵盖26个动作类别，由22名受试者在20个室内外自然低光场景下录制，确保真实性和多样性。2) Illumi-Net：基于混合专家架构，利用视频级光照线索进行自适应增强，采用Transformer提取时空特征，并通过专家条件决策融合各专家输出，提升模型对光照变化的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在ELLAR数据集上，本方法达到Top-1准确率55.13%、Top-5准确率78.87%，超越先前最优方法。在LUMINA-26数据集上，建立了强基线：Top-1 75.95%、Top-5 93.58%，为后续研究提供了可靠的性能基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过构建大规模真实低光数据集LUMINA-26和设计光照自适应网络Illumi-Net，有效推动了低光动作识别领域的发展。该数据集和基线方法为未来模型评估和算法创新提供了标准化平台。未来可探索更复杂的专家协作机制或针对特定光照条件的优化策略。

title: Technical Report for the ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge: Pretraining-Diverse Ensemble of Foundation Vision Encoders for Robust Outdoor Scene Understanding
abstract: This report presents our solution for the ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge, which requires parsing unstructured outdoor scenes from four camera platforms into 56 fine-grained categories. Our approach pairs foundation vision encoders (including DINOv3, SigLIP2, and InternImage) with a Mask2Former decoder, and trains them with a strong recipe including long training schedules, exponential moving average, a larger crop size, and multi-scale plus flip test-time augmentation. The three encoders, chosen for their complementary pretraining objectives, are combined into a pretraining-diverse ensemble through per-class validation-IoU weighting. Evaluated on the official GOOSE test set, our submission achieves 75.40% composite mIoU and wins the second place of the challenge. Our study further shows that the encoder's pretraining recipe, rather than its parameter count or the decoder design, is the dominant factor for accuracy on this benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预训练多样化的基础视觉编码器集成方法，在GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战中获得第二名，并揭示编码器预训练方案是精度主导因素。
light_analysis.motivation: ICRA 2026 GOOSE挑战要求从四个相机平台解析非结构化户外场景为56个细粒度类别，现有方法在鲁棒性上不足。作者发现基础视觉编码器的预训练方案比参数数量或解码器设计更关键，因此聚焦于融合互补预训练目标的编码器以提升分割精度。
light_analysis.method: 采用DINOv3、SigLIP2和InternImage三个互补预训练的基础视觉编码器，搭配Mask2Former解码器。训练策略包括长训练计划、指数移动平均、大裁剪尺寸和多尺度加翻转测试时增强。集成时基于每个类别在验证集上的IoU加权融合，形成预训练多样化集成。
light_analysis.result: 在GOOSE测试集上达到75.40% composite mIoU，获得ICRA 2026挑战赛第二名。消融研究表明编码器的预训练方案是准确率的主导因素，而非参数数量或解码器设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作验证了预训练多样化集成在细粒度语义分割中的有效性，强调预训练方案的重要性。未来可探索更多编码器组合及自适应加权策略，为户外场景理解提供鲁棒方案。

title: Self-Evolution for Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Agents via Divergence-Point Preference Learning
abstract: Multi-turn tool-using agents must coordinate long-horizon tool sequences while tracking dialogue state and policy constraints. Existing approaches often separate inference-time orchestration from parameter-level learning, leaving tool selection weakly structured and preference updates vulnerable to train--deployment prompt mismatch. For within-benchmark self-improvement, ToolGraph combines schema-derived topology, transition weights estimated from successful rollouts, and history-aware controls for write prerequisites and repeated-search loops. We then construct 161 preference pairs by locating divergence points via state-based matching and prefix-based alignment, filtered through action-correctness annotations, and train DPO under the same ToolGraph context used at inference. Across 375 tau2-bench tasks, ToolGraph raises the weighted average reward from 0.304 to 0.338 (+11.2% relative), while ToolGraph+DPO reaches 0.355 (+16.8% over the baseline), with the DPO gain concentrated in airline and retail. Fine-grained diagnostics further show that roughly half of telecom trajectories exhaust the step budget before action execution and that chosen reward positivity is the most useful checkpoint signal across our 16 evaluated DPO configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ToolGraph结合DPO偏好学习方法，通过图结构和分歧点偏好学习提升多轮工具使用智能体性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮工具使用智能体需协调长程工具序列并跟踪对话状态与策略约束。现有方法分离推理编排与参数学习，导致工具选择结构弱且偏好更新易受训练-部署提示不匹配影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出ToolGraph，结合模式导出拓扑、成功轨迹转移权重和写前提与重复搜索控制。通过状态匹配和前缀对齐定位161个分歧点偏好对，过滤动作正确性后，在相同ToolGraph上下文中训练DPO。
light_analysis.result: 在375个tau2-bench任务上，ToolGraph将加权平均奖励从0.304提升至0.338（+11.2%），ToolGraph+DPO达0.355（+16.8%），增益集中于航空和零售领域。诊断显示约50%电信轨迹在动作执行前用尽步骤预算，选择奖励正性为最有用检查点信号。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过图结构与偏好学习结合，有效改进了多轮工具使用智能体的协调能力。学术价值在于融合拓扑先验与DPO训练，实际应用适用于复杂对话场景。未来可探索更泛化的图构建或动态状态跟踪。

title: TTFT-Aware Graph Chain-of-Thought:Distance-Indexed Neural A* for Low-Hallucination Multi-Hop Medical Reasoning
abstract: Hallucinations and opaque reasoning remain unacceptable failure modes for clinical LLMs. We present a production-grade GraphRAG stack that constrains answers to verifiable graph chain-of-thought paths in a heterogeneous, ~700K-node medical knowledge graph powering a fertility assistant. The core idea is targeted navigation: a directed Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) oracle provides exact distances for sub-millisecond feasibility checks and simple-path enumeration, while a lightweight AStarNet heuristic operates strictly within the PLL corridor to prioritize clinically plausible expansions. We score and pack a small, diverse set of paths (CUI/semantic-type overlap, length prior, provenance priors) to condition generation, yielding compact prompts and improved Time to First Token (TTFT). On fertility-focused queries, the hybrid (PLL+AStarNet) establishes a better latency/recall Pareto frontier than text-only RAG and single-component baselines, lowers TTFT, and reduces clinician-audited hallucinations while preserving explanation clarity. The result is a practical recipe for explainable, low-hallucination multi-hop medical reasoning ready for real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TTFT感知的图链式思维，结合距离索引神经A*搜索，实现低幻觉多跳医学推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床LLM存在幻觉和推理不透明的问题，现有方法难以在保证低延迟的同时提供可验证的推理路径。医疗场景需要高可靠性和可解释性，因此需要一种能约束答案到可验证图路径的方法，以减少幻觉并提高透明度。
light_analysis.method: 构建约70万节点的异质医学知识图谱，采用定向Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) 预言机提供精确距离和简单路径枚举，结合轻量AStarNet启发式在PLL走廊内优先临床合理扩展。通过CUI/语义类型重叠、长度先验等评分打包多样路径，生成紧凑提示改进首令牌时间(TTFT)。
light_analysis.result: 在生育相关查询上，混合PLL+AStarNet相比纯文本RAG和单一组件基线，在延迟/召回率帕累托前沿上表现更好，降低了TTFT，减少了临床医生审核的幻觉，同时保持了解释清晰度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了一种实用方案，实现可解释、低幻觉的多跳医学推理，适合实际部署。未来工作可能扩展到更多医学领域或优化图构建。

title: A Dual-Track Framework for Template-Constrained LaTeX Conversion
abstract: With the increasing demands for advanced document conversion, mapping structured Markdown drafts into template-compliant formats like LaTeX remains a challenge. Existing approaches largely depend on either deterministic rule-based converters or pure end-to-end Large Language Model (LLM) generation. The former fails to correctly handle asset insertions and template-specific constraints, while the latter tends to induce semantic drift, leading to hallucinations that are difficult to debug. To address these limitations, we introduce a robust Dual-Track Framework that systematically decouples template formatting from document processing: an offline track extracts template constraints into a reusable manifest, while an online track implements a hybrid execution pipeline. This pipeline confines LLM usage exclusively to reasoning-intensive components (e.g., semantic metadata, bibliographic references, and complex visual/tabular layouts) while delegating rule-based engines for deterministic processing. Empirical evaluation across 7 LaTeX templates and 56 published research papers demonstrates that our method preserves better structural fidelity, satisfies diverse layout constraints, and achieves a higher compilation success rate compared to the previous baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双轨框架，通过解耦模板格式与文档处理，结合规则引擎和LLM实现高保真LaTeX转换。
light_analysis.motivation: 将结构化Markdown转换为符合模板的LaTeX格式面临挑战。现有规则转换器无法处理资产插入和模板约束，而纯LLM生成易导致语义漂移和幻觉。需要一种既保持结构保真度又满足多样化布局约束的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出双轨框架：离线轨道将模板约束提取为可重用清单，在线轨道实现混合执行管道。LLM仅用于推理密集型组件（语义元数据、参考文献、复杂图表布局），规则引擎处理确定性任务。评估使用7个LaTeX模板和56篇论文。
light_analysis.result: 在7个LaTeX模板和56篇研究论文上，该方法相比基线方法保持了更好的结构保真度，满足了多样化布局约束，并获得了更高的编译成功率。具体指标包括编译成功率和结构保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了现有方法在模板约束转换中的不足，通过解耦和混合执行提升了鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更多文档格式，并优化LLM的推理效率。局限性在于模板清单的手动构建成本。

title: Compression and Retrieval: Implicit Memory Retrieval for Video World Models
abstract: Video world models hold promise for simulating interactive environments, yet maintaining consistent long-term memory across complex camera trajectories remains a critical challenge. Existing methods typically rely on computationally expensive context scaling or rigid heuristic retrieval mechanisms, which lacks generalization to varying camera trajectories and environments. In this paper, we propose Compression and Retrieval (CaR), an attention-driven implicit memory retrieval mechanism to overcome these limitations. By injecting viewpoint information via positional encoding, our method performs flexible memory retrieval through attention computation. To efficiently process extended contexts with minimal computational overhead, we further introduce a lightweight context compression network. Furthermore, we construct SceneFly, a large-scale synthetic dataset featuring realistic camera trajectories and frame-level annotations to train and evaluate long-horizon video world models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on established benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization to open-domain scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CaR机制，通过注意力驱动的隐式记忆检索和轻量级上下文压缩网络，解决视频世界模型长时记忆一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频世界模型在模拟交互环境时，长时记忆一致性面临挑战，现有方法依赖计算昂贵的上下文缩放或启发式检索，难以泛化到复杂相机轨迹和不同环境。该研究旨在开发高效、泛化的记忆检索机制，以支持长时间跨度的视频预测。
light_analysis.method: 提出压缩与检索（CaR）机制，通过位置编码注入视角信息，利用注意力计算实现灵活记忆检索；引入轻量级上下文压缩网络，高效处理扩展上下文。构建大规模合成数据集SceneFly，包含逼真相机轨迹和帧级标注，用于训练和评估长时视频世界模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中取得最先进结果，并展现出对开放域场景的强泛化能力。具体性能超越现有方法，验证了CaR在复杂相机轨迹下的记忆一致性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CaR有效解决了视频世界模型的长时记忆瓶颈，为模拟交互环境提供高效记忆检索方案。SceneFly数据集推动相关研究。未来可探索更复杂的上下文压缩和检索机制，提升模型在真实场景的适用性。

title: ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves LLM reasoning by training a student model on its own generated outputs, but standard OPD treats all student-generated outputs (SGOs) equally regardless of their informativeness. We observe a consistent asymmetry in controlled filtering experiments: in both OPD and on-policy self distillation (OPSD), training only on incorrect SGOs outperforms training only on correct ones. Our further analysis suggests that models trained on correct-only SGOs tend to generate shorter reasoning traces and show weaker reflection behavior, while incorrect SGOs better preserve exploratory reasoning near the model's capability boundary. To exploit this signal without requiring full answer-containing rollouts, we introduce ReNIO, which Reweights Negative trajectory Importance for LLM On-policy distillation. By using the student-to-teacher probability ratio, ReNIO identifies pivotal tokens leading to wrong reasoning traces and aggregates their information into a normalized sample weight, inherently assigning larger weights to likely negative trajectories without observing the correctness of final-answer. Since Re-NIO only uses prefix-conditioned token probabilities, it preserves OPD's prefix training advantage over full-rollout reinforcement learning. Across both mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks, ReNIO improves both OPD and OPSD, with representative relative gains of up to 8.90% for Qwen3-1.7B and 10.00% for R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Code repo: https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReNIO方法，通过重加权负轨迹重要性改进LLM在线策略蒸馏，无需完整答案rollout。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏中标准方法平等对待所有学生生成输出，但实验发现仅用错误输出训练优于仅用正确输出，因为正确输出导致短推理和弱反思，错误输出保留探索性推理。因此需要利用负轨迹信号，同时避免需要完整答案的rollout，以提升蒸馏效率。
light_analysis.method: ReNIO利用学生-教师概率比识别导致错误推理的关键token，聚合信息得到归一化样本权重，自动给可能负轨迹更大权重，无需观察最终答案正确性。仅使用前缀条件token概率，保留OPD的前缀训练优势，避免全rollout强化学习的开销。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上，ReNIO显著改进OPD和OPSD。代表相对增益：Qwen3-1.7B上8.90%，R1-Distill-Qwen-7B上10.00%在数学推理基准。实验表明方法有效利用负样本信号，提升学生模型推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReNIO通过重加权负轨迹重要性，有效提升在线策略蒸馏性能，无需最终答案标注。学术价值在于揭示负样本的关键作用，实际应用于LLM推理增强。未来可探索更细粒度权重设计或扩展到其他序列决策任务。

title: Scene-agnostic ALS boresight self-calibration
abstract: ALS boresight calibration has relied for two decades on dedicated flight patterns over structured scenes containing planar surfaces of varied aspect and slope. While reliable, this approach imposes constraints on the scene content and operations, which limits its applicability to boresight recovery within routine mapping missions. We present a practical approach that substantially relaxes these requirements by replacing plane-based constraints with scene-agnostic point-to-point correspondences extracted automatically from overlapping ALS strips. Two complementary formulations are proposed to estimate boresight with laser vector observations: (i) a simpler parametric adjustment utilizing INS/GNSS trajectory; (ii) a rigorous formulation treating GNSS and raw inertial data within an existing factor-graph, i.e. a dynamic network, where boresight is added as an additional parameter. Both formulations are evaluated across four operational ALS flights equipped with five inertial systems, covering a wide range of flight altitudes, overlap geometries, terrain types and inertial sensor classes. The analysis draws a clear boundary between the legacy plane-based conditioning that falls short outside the calibration scenario and the proposed formulations, which either recover or absorb boresight effects under conventional mapping geometry. Among them, the lightweight formulation is sufficient for boresight recovery using tactical and navigation grade inertial sensors, while the general factor-graph approach is clearly superior when the inertial sensor errors are less observable within an optimal smoother. This supports the hypothesis that, for INS/GNSS trajectory of sufficient quality, the boresight calibration can be performed without particular scene prerequisites during routine mapping operations using a minimum of 3-4 overlapping strips, with either proposed formulation...

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种场景无关的ALS自校准方法，利用点对点对应替代平面约束，在常规测绘中实现boresight校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统ALS校准依赖特定飞行模式和结构化场景（如平面），限制了常规测绘任务的适用性。本文旨在摆脱这些约束，使boresight校准可在日常飞行中自动完成，提高操作灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种互补公式：轻量级参数调整利用INS/GNSS轨迹估计boresight；严格公式在因子图中集成原始惯性数据，将boresight作为附加参数。两者均基于重叠条带中点对点对应，无需平面假设。
light_analysis.result: 在四次飞行、五种惯性系统上的评估表明：轻量级公式适用于战术/导航级传感器；因子图方法在传感器误差不可观时更优。常规测绘中仅需3-4条重叠条带即可可靠恢复boresight。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明在足够质量的INS/GNSS轨迹下，boresight校准可脱离特定场景进行。该方法简化了操作流程，提高了ALS校准的实用性，未来可扩展至更多传感器融合场景。

title: Poisson2Gaussian: Noise Gaussianization to Enhance Image Denoising
abstract: The quantum nature of light determines the inherent Poisson stochasticity of photon detection, which is ubiquitous in photography, microscopy, and astronomy. However, our controlled numerical studies reveal that the signal-dependency, heteroscedasticity, and statistical asymmetry of Poisson-mixed noise make it challenging for existing denoisers to learn. In contrast, i.i.d. Gaussian noise, with its statistical independence and symmetric distribution, is easier to model for networks. To address this gap, we propose Poisson2Gaussian (P2G), a noise Gaussianization method that explicitly converts complex real-world noise to i.i.d. Gaussian noise via probability density matching beyond low-order moments. We also design an unbiased denoising framework that synergizes P2G with downstream denoisers, ensuring convergence to the underlying signal without requiring paired clean data or explicit noise parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that P2G consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse datasets. In challenging scenarios where noise strongly deviates from Gaussian statistics, our method improves the PSNR by up to 0.75 dB. Notably, P2G is architecture-agnostic and can provide universal improvements for various denoisers. The source code will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Poisson2Gaussian (P2G)方法，通过概率密度匹配将复杂真实噪声转换为i.i.d.高斯噪声，显著提升图像去噪性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 光子检测中的泊松噪声具有信号依赖性、异方差性和统计不对称性，现有去噪器难以有效学习；而独立同分布的高斯噪声更易建模。因此，需要一种方法将复杂噪声转化为高斯噪声，以简化去噪任务并提高性能。
light_analysis.method: P2G采用概率密度匹配（超越低阶矩）将真实噪声显式转换为i.i.d.高斯噪声，并设计无偏去噪框架，无需配对干净数据或噪声参数，与下游去噪器协同工作，确保收敛到真实信号。方法架构无关，可通用集成。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，尤其在噪声严重偏离高斯统计的挑战场景中，PSNR提升高达0.75 dB。P2G可普遍改善各类去噪器，无需修改网络结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: P2G有效解决了泊松混合噪声难以学习的问题，通过噪声高斯化提升去噪性能，且无需配对数据或显式噪声模型，具有重要的学术价值和实用潜力。未来可扩展至更多噪声类型和任务。

title: Minimax Quantile Lower Bounds for Interactive Statistical Decision Making with Privacy
abstract: Minimax risk and regret are expectation-based criteria and do not capture rare but consequential failures. To address this concern, we develop a $δ$-explicit minimax-quantile theory for interactive statistical decision making (ISDM). We first provide structural relations between minimax quantiles, lower minimax quantiles, and minimax risk. This includes a quantile-to-expectation conversion and an equivalence between strict and lower minimax quantiles outside a countable set of confidence levels. We then derive two converse tools for ISDM: a high-probability interactive Fano's method and a high-probability interactive Le Cam's method. Then, we show that mutual-information (MI) privacy can be handled in the same framework by restricting the admissible decision class. For coordinatewise Gaussian privatization, we derive a two-point template that isolates the privacy-induced variance inflation. We instantiate this template for Gaussian mean estimation, and use the same two-point strategy directly for two-armed Gaussian bandits. We then derive a minimax quantile lower bound for the $K$-armed Gaussian bandit problem, showing that the interactive Fano method captures the exploration cost over multiple possible best arms. The resulting lower bounds are explicit in the confidence level $δ$ and in the privacy budget for the private problems. They yield $\log(1/δ)/n$ scaling for squared-error Gaussian mean estimation, $\sqrt{T\log(1/δ)}$ scaling for two-armed bounded-mean Gaussian bandits, and $\sqrt{KT\log(1/δ)}$-type scaling for the $K$-armed bandits, with privacy appearing through a Gaussian variance-inflation factor for the private problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互统计决策制定中的δ显式极小极大分位数理论，为隐私保护问题提供高概率下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的极小极大风险和遗憾基于期望，无法捕捉罕见但后果严重的失败。因此需要发展一种能显式控制置信水平δ的准则，以应对高风险的交互决策场景，同时考虑隐私约束。
light_analysis.method: 首先建立极小极大分位数、下极小极大分位数与极小极大风险的结构关系。然后推导高概率的交互Fano方法和Le Cam方法作为逆工具。通过限制决策类处理互信息隐私，针对坐标高斯私有化导出两点模板隔离隐私方差膨胀，并实例化于高斯均值估计和两臂高斯bandit，最后扩展到K臂高斯bandit。
light_analysis.result: 平方误差高斯均值估计的下界为log(1/δ)/n缩放；两臂有界均值高斯bandit为√(Tlog(1/δ))缩放；K臂高斯bandit为√(KTlog(1/δ))型缩放，隐私通过高斯方差膨胀因子体现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为交互统计决策制定提供了隐私保护下的高概率下界理论，揭示了隐私成本与置信水平的权衡。该框架可推广至更广泛的隐私机制，并为实际应用中的风险敏感决策提供理论支撑。

title: Cognitive Digital Twins: Ethical Risks and Governance for AI Systems That Model the Mind
abstract: As AI systems become increasingly persistent and personalized, they make possible a class of technologies that we call cognitive digital twins (CDTs): dynamic computational representations of a specific person's cognition, updated from behavioral, contextual, or physiological data in order to model, predict, or simulate that person's cognition, or to act as that person's communicative or decision-making proxy. CDTs combine cognitive inference with longitudinal representation, simulation, and proxy action in ways that existing governance strategies for personal assistants, autonomous agents, recommender systems, and automated decision systems only partially address. This paper makes four contributions. First, we define CDTs and distinguish them from adjacent systems. Second, we introduce a 5A governance framework organized around authority, autonomy, access and control, accountability, and availability. Third, we identify CDT-specific risks, from misrepresentation and epistemic authority shifts to shadow twins, simulated participation, proxy action, and proxy-power asymmetries. Fourth, we analyze governance gaps and propose requirements for high-risk CDTs that strengthen consent, purpose limitation, validity, traceability, contestation, independent review, and model retirement. Existing frameworks primarily regulate data processing, automated decisions, or autonomous actions; CDTs also require governance at the level of cognitive representation itself, before any final decision or external action occurs. We argue that CDTs require governance not only because they can act for people, but because they can become infrastructures through which cognition is represented, simulated, classified, and operationalized.

light_analysis.overview: 定义认知数字孪生（CDT）并提出5A治理框架，识别其伦理风险并分析治理差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI系统日益持久化和个性化，出现了一类称为认知数字孪生（CDT）的技术，它能动态建模个人认知并作为代理行动。现有治理策略针对个人助手、自主代理等系统仅部分适用，CDT在认知推理与纵向表示、模拟、代理行动结合方面带来新的伦理风险，如误表征、认知权威转移、影子孪生等，亟需专门治理框架。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过概念定义与对比区分CDT与相邻系统；提出5A治理框架，围绕权威、自主性、访问与控制、问责制、可用性五个维度；识别CDT特定风险，包括误表征、认知权威转移、影子孪生、模拟参与、代理行动及代理权力不对称；分析现有治理差距并提出高风险CDT的要求，如强化同意、目的限制、有效性、可追溯性、抗辩、独立审查和模型退役。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出现有框架主要监管数据处理、自动决策或自主行动，而CDT需要在认知表征层面进行治理，即在最终决策或外部行动发生之前。论文通过风险识别和治理要求分析，强调了CDT治理的独特性：不仅因为系统能代理人类行动，更因为它们成为认知表征、模拟、分类和操作化的基础设施。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于明确定义了认知数字孪生（CDT）并区分于其他系统，提出了5A治理框架，识别了CDT特有的伦理风险，分析了现有治理的不足并提出了针对高风险CDT的治理要求。研究为AI系统治理提供了新的视角，特别是在认知表征层面的监管，具有重要的学术价值与实践指导意义。未来需进一步探索具体实施细节和评估治理效果。

title: PIVOTSBench: Evaluating Fine-Grained Interpersonal Relationship Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Humans possess an innate ability to understand fine-grained interpersonal relationships, which is central to everyday social interactions. Although such reasoning is inherently multimodal, it remains largely unexplored by existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To address this gap, we introduce PIVOTS, the first benchmark built from Social-IQ 2.0 and YouTube data to evaluate MLLMs' ability to predict bidirectional interpersonal relationship dimensions grounded in established psychology research. In addition, PIVOTS includes auxiliary tasks that assess models' ability to identify and leverage the critical visual cues underlying such predictions. We evaluate both proprietary and open-source MLLMs and conduct detailed ablation studies to analyze the effects of visual modalities and explicit social role information in conversational utterances. We further examine how joint and pairwise prediction settings benefit MLLMs in scoring bidirectional PIVOTS dimensions. Project page and resources: https://flynnzhangsx.github.io/PIVOTSBench/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出PIVOTSBench，首个评估多模态大语言模型在细粒度人际关系推理能力的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类具备理解细粒度人际关系的本能，但现有多模态大语言模型在此多模态推理任务上研究不足，缺乏专门基准。该研究旨在填补这一空白，推动MLLMs在社交智能领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube数据构建PIVOTSBench基准，包含双向人际关系维度预测及辅助任务，评估MLLMs识别关键视觉线索的能力。通过消融研究分析视觉模态和对话中显式社会角色信息的影响，并探索联合与成对预测设置的效果。
light_analysis.result: 评估了多种闭源和开源MLLMs，进行了详细的消融研究。摘要未明确给出具体性能指标，但表明不同设置会影响评分结果，且当前MLLMs在细粒度关系推理上仍有挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIVOTSBench为评估MLLMs的人际关系推理提供了标准化平台，揭示了现有模型在多模态社交推理方面的不足。该基准和资源将促进模型在社交智能上的改进，未来可扩展至更多社交维度。

title: FLFL: Federated Latent Factor Learning for Private Recovery of Spatio-Temporal Signals
abstract: Wireless sensor network (WSNs) stands out as a burgeoning and promising domain in intelligent sensing. Owing to various factors such as sudden sensor malfunctions or deliberate shutdown of partial nodes to save energy, the collected sensing signals from WSNs commonly have massive missing data, leading to adverse effects on subsequent analysis or decision-making. Latent factor learning (LFL) has proven to be highly effective in recovering the missing data for WSNs. However, the existing LFL models require the collected sensing signals to be maintained in one central place like a central server, which is becoming unacceptable for data owners who are getting increasingly privacy-sensitive. To address this issue, this paper innovatively proposes a federated latent factor learning (FLFL) model for privacy-preserving spatio-temporal signal recovery. Its main idea is two-fold: 1) it designs a sensor-level federated learning framework based on LFL, where each sensor only needs to upload gradient information rather than raw data for training a privacy-preserving recovery model, and 2) it incorporates the spatio-temporal correlation into the designed federated learning framework as the regularization constraint to improve its recovery accuracy. With such designs, FLFL can not only accurately recover the missing data of WSNs but also ensure data owners' privacy-preserving of raw data. To evaluate the proposed FLFL model, extensive experiments have been conducted on four real-world WSN datasets. The results demonstrate that FLFL significantly outperforms eight state-of-the-art federated and non-federated signal recovery models in terms of recovery accuracy with privacy-preserving.
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2504.15525

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦潜在因子学习模型，在保护隐私的同时高效恢复无线传感器网络中的时空缺失信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 无线传感器网络在智能感知中广泛应用，但数据缺失问题严重，现有潜在因子学习（LFL）方法需集中存储原始数据，难以满足日益增长的隐私保护需求。因此，亟需一种既能保证恢复精度又能保护数据隐私的模型。
light_analysis.method: 设计传感器级联邦学习框架，各传感器只上传梯度信息而非原始数据，实现隐私保护；同时将时空相关性作为正则化约束融入框架，提升恢复精度。通过四个真实WSN数据集评估，对比八种联邦与非联邦基线模型。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实WSN数据集上，FLFL在恢复精度上显著优于八种最新联邦及非联邦信号恢复模型，且实现了隐私保护。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLFL成功解决了WSNs中隐私保护与缺失数据恢复的冲突，具有较高学术价值与实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的隐私保护机制或优化通信效率。

title: FlowTrain: Flow-Based Decoupled Training for Industrial-Grade Vision-Language Models
abstract: Industrial-grade distributed training of vision-language models (VLMs) remains far less efficient than that of unimodal LLMs. Existing solutions either follow a monolithic design that assigns uniform parallelism to heterogeneous modules or adopt a disaggregated deployment that separates modules while executing them as a batch-synchronized pipeline. In this paper, we highlight that the above solutions are still not sufficient, and VLM training can be further decoupled. To this end, we present FlowTrain, a flow-based decoupled training framework that reformulates VLM training as a producer-consumer dataflow coordinated through a unified memory pool. The encoder and backbone can progress independently over a global virtual address space. Since this execution decoupling fundamentally changes the optimization objective of allocation and scheduling, FlowTrain further introduces a heterogeneous parallel allocator that assigns module-specific parallelism strategies by solving a throughput matching problem. The dynamic packing scheduler is used to construct balanced microbatches at runtime according to the actual LLM-side computation cost. Extensive experiments on real-world workloads show that FlowTrain achieves over 50% MFU and up to 1.7x throughput improvement, narrowing the efficiency gap to LLM-only training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowTrain，基于数据流的解耦训练框架，通过统一内存池协调编码器和主干网络独立进步，显著提升VLM训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业级VLM分布式训练效率远低于单模态LLM，现有方法或采用统一并行度的单体设计，或使用批同步流水线的分离部署，均未充分解耦，导致训练瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: FlowTrain将VLM训练重构为通过统一内存池协调的生产者-消费者数据流，使编码器和主干网络在全局虚拟地址空间独立执行；引入异构并行分配器通过吞吐量匹配确定模块特定并行策略，并设计动态打包调度器按LLM计算成本平衡微批次。
light_analysis.result: 在真实工作负载下，FlowTrain实现超过50%模型翻倍利用率(MFU)和高达1.7倍吞吐量提升，有效缩小了VLM与纯LLM训练的效率差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowTrain通过解耦训练框架显著提升VLM分布式训练效率，为工业级多模态模型训练提供了新范式，未来可探索更广泛的异构模块适配。

title: PeLAP-A: Adaptive Latent Pruning for Lightweight Latent Diffusion Models
abstract: Latent diffusion models achieve strong generative performance by operating in a compressed latent space produced by a variational autoencoder (VAE). However, it remains unclear whether all latent channels contribute equally to the diffusion process, or whether significant redundancy exists. We introduce PeLAP-A (Adaptive Latent Pruning for Diffusion), a lightweight framework that augments a standard latent diffusion pipeline with a learnable channel-wise importance predictor. A two-layer MLP operating on globally pooled latent features produces a soft mask that suppresses unimportant latent channels before they enter the denoising UNet. The entire system is trained jointly on CIFAR-10 under a combined diffusion, reconstruction, and sparsity loss. Experiments reveal a striking result: under aggressive sparsity regularization (lambda = 0.01), the importance predictor drives all latent channels to near-zero yet the denoising UNet achieves lower diffusion loss (0.0236 vs. 0.0240) and lower VAE reconstruction MSE (22.59 vs. 24.67) compared to the unpruned baseline. We term this the sparsity collapse phenomenon and provide an analysis of why it occurs and what it reveals about the information requirements of latent diffusion models. These findings constitute an exploratory study of sparsity dynamics in latent diffusion training, and demonstrate that denoising UNets can remain remarkably robust to latent channel suppression even under aggressive regularization. Code is available at: https://github.com/kissasium/PeLAP-A.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PeLAP-A框架，通过学习通道重要性自适应剪枝潜在扩散模型的潜在通道，发现极端稀疏化不降性能，揭示稀疏坍塌现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在扩散模型通过VAE压缩潜在空间运行，但所有潜在通道是否同等重要尚不明确，存在冗余。现有方法未探索通道级重要性自适应剪枝，本研究旨在减少冗余、降低计算成本，探究扩散过程对潜在通道的需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出PeLAP-A框架，在标准潜在扩散管道中添加可学习的通道重要性预测器（两层MLP），对全局池化潜在特征生成软掩码，在进入去噪UNet前抑制不重要通道。联合训练使用扩散损失、重建损失和稀疏损失，在CIFAR-10上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在激进稀疏正则化（λ=0.01）下，重要性预测器将所有通道推至接近零，但去噪UNet扩散损失更低（0.0236 vs 0.0240），VAE重建MSE更低（22.59 vs 24.67），优于未剪枝基线，表明UNet对潜在通道抑制鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示稀疏坍塌现象，证明去噪UNet在潜在通道被大量抑制时仍保持稳健，有助于设计更轻量的潜在扩散模型。本研究是探索性分析，未来需进一步研究信息需求，代码已开源。

title: Rethinking Prototype-based Similarity Learning for Few-Shot Object Detection
abstract: Few-shot object detection aims to detect novel object categories from only a few labeled examples, avoiding costly large-scale annotation. Recent prototype-based similarity learning approaches enable training-free adaptation by matching query features with class prototypes. However, they suffer from two fundamental limitations: (i) class confusion arising from inter-class similarity margin collapse, and (ii) insufficient visual cues for precise localization, as similarity scores capture only class-level semantic affinity while providing limited spatial information. To address these issues, we introduce two complementary components. Text-Anchored Semantic Mask (TSMa) leverages class-level text features as semantic anchors to identify semantically aligned channels through channel-wise interaction between visual and text features. By suppressing style-induced spurious responses and emphasizing class-intrinsic signals, TSMa enlarges inter-class similarity margins and mitigates class confusion. We further propose Stage-Aligned Hierarchical Autoregressive Regression (SHARe), which reformulates localization as a hierarchical autoregressive process that progressively refines bounding boxes across multiple stages. SHARe leverages the layer-wise characteristics of ViT representations by aligning feature abstraction levels with regression stages: deeper layers guide early coarse localization, while shallower layers rich in edge and texture cues refine spatial details in later stages. Experiments on COCO demonstrate a new state of the art, outperforming the previous best by +10.1 nAP, with extensive analysis validating each component. The code is available at https://github.com/VisualScienceLab-KHU/ReSet.

light_analysis.overview: 提出文本锚定语义掩码和阶段对齐分层自回归回归，解决少样本目标检测中的类别混淆和定位不精确问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本目标检测中，基于原型相似性学习的方法存在类间相似性边界坍塌导致类别混淆，以及相似性分数缺乏空间信息导致定位不精确的问题。这些限制了模型在仅有少量标注样本下的检测性能，现有方法未能有效处理上述两个缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个互补组件：文本锚定语义掩码（TSMa）利用类别级文本特征作为语义锚点，通过通道交互抑制风格噪声并扩大类间相似性边界；阶段对齐分层自回归回归（SHARe）将定位重构为多阶段自回归过程，利用ViT不同层次特征对齐回归阶段，深层引导粗定位，浅层细化精定位。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO数据集上，该方法比之前最先进方法高出+10.1 nAP，达到新最佳性能。广泛的分析实验验证了每个组件的有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过引入文本语义和分层回归机制，显著提升了少样本目标检测的准确性和鲁棒性。学术上推动了原型学习与视觉-语言融合的理论，实际应用可降低标注成本。未来可探索更多模态交互或更高效的自回归策略。

title: Attention-Spectrum Regularization for Replay-Free Continual Multimodal LLMs
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly required to adapt to non-stationary streams of visual domains, question types, and user instructions, yet continual fine-tuning often causes severe forgetting of previously acquired multimodal skills. Existing continual vision-language methods mainly preserve outputs, replay data or pseudo-data, regularize embedding geometry, or allocate task-specific parameters, but they provide limited control over how internal cross-modal attention patterns supporting old skills drift during adaptation. We propose Attention-Spectrum Regularization (ASR), a replay-free continual learning framework that preserves skill-conditioned structures of cross-modal attention. ASR treats cross-attention maps as two-dimensional signals, summarizes their scale and directional properties into compact spectral statistics, and stores only skill-wise prototype distributions instead of replaying past image-question pairs, generated pseudo-examples, or old-stage teacher snapshots. In later stages, a phase-invariant spectral regularizer constrains harmful drift of these prototypes while allowing instance-level attention to adapt to new tasks. We provide theoretical analysis showing that skill-conditioned spectral drift controls forgetting under a spectral sufficiency assumption, and that Fourier power spectra are stable to spatial translations and bounded perturbations. Experiments on continual VQA and multimodal instruction-tuning benchmarks, including VQA v2, VQACL, CLT-VQA, CoIN, and UCIT, show that ASR consistently improves final performance and reduces forgetting over strong replay-, regularization-, and adapter-based baselines. Preserving skill-level attention structure is an effective and lightweight mechanism for continual MLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Creative-zcx/attention-spectrum-replay

light_analysis.overview: 提出Attention-Spectrum Regularization (ASR)，一种无需重放的持续学习框架，通过保留跨模态注意力的技能条件结构来缓解多模态大模型的遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型需要适应非平稳的视觉域、问题类型和用户指令流，但持续微调会导致严重的遗忘。现有方法主要保留输出、重放数据或伪数据、正则化嵌入几何或分配任务特定参数，但对支撑旧技能的内部跨模态注意力模式的漂移控制有限。因此需要一种更有效的机制来约束注意力结构的漂移。
light_analysis.method: ASR将交叉注意力图视为二维信号，将其尺度和方向属性压缩为紧凑的频谱统计，仅存储技能级原型分布而非重放过去数据或教师快照。在后续阶段，相位不变频谱正则化约束这些原型的有害漂移，同时允许实例级注意力适应新任务。理论分析表明，在频谱充分性假设下，技能条件频谱漂移可控制遗忘，且傅里叶功率谱对空间平移和有界扰动稳定。
light_analysis.result: 在持续VQA和多模态指令微调基准（如VQA v2、VQACL、CLT-VQA、CoIN、UCIT）上，ASR一致提升了最终性能并减少了遗忘，优于强重放、正则化和适配器基线。具体性能提升和遗忘降低的数值摘要未明确说明，但实验充分展示了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 保留技能级注意力结构是持续多模态大模型的一种有效且轻量的机制。ASR无需重放即可实现持续学习，具有学术价值（理论分析频谱漂移与遗忘的关系）和实际应用价值（减少存储和计算开销）。未来可探索将ASR扩展到更多模态和任务。

title: MotionHalluc: Diagnosing Kinematic Hallucinations in Fine-Grained Motion Reasoning
abstract: Motion instruction generation in cross-video comparison aims to produce corrective feedback that describes the differences between a query and a reference motion. However, existing models often generate instructions that exhibit motion hallucinations, failing to reflect actual kinematic differences between paired videos. To systematically investigate these hallucinations, we introduce MotionHalluc, a dedicated benchmark for evaluating motion hallucinations in paired-video comparison. MotionHalluc comprises 1540 fine-grained questions over 553 video pairs, evaluating hallucinations along three core dimensions: (1)directional hallucination, (2)attributional hallucination, and (3)temporal hallucination. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art large multimodal models demonstrate high susceptibility to these hallucinations. Furthermore, we provide Perceive-Parse-Verify (PPV) as a training-free measurements extraction and verification baseline that converts candidate instructions into executable measurement queries and supplies kinematic measurements at inference time. Our results show that this simple measurements injection yields an average 10.6% performance gain across models, suggesting that motion reasoning with explicit quantitative measurements is a key factor in reducing hallucinations in cross-video comparison. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MotionHalluc基准和PPV方法，系统诊断和减轻细粒度运动推理中的运动幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大模型在跨视频比较中生成运动指令时，常出现运动幻觉，未能反映实际运动学差异，影响纠正反馈的准确性。然而，缺乏专门评估这类幻觉的基准，阻碍了问题识别与改进。
light_analysis.method: 构建MotionHalluc基准，包含1540个细粒度问题（覆盖方向、归因、时间三种幻觉类型）和553个视频对。提出训练无关的PPV基线，将候选指令转换为可执行测量查询，在推理时注入运动学测量，以显式定量方式减少幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 评估多个SOTA多模态大模型，显示其对运动幻觉高度易感。PPV方法简单注入测量，在多个模型上平均性能提升10.6%，表明显式定量测量可有效减少幻觉。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个系统评估运动幻觉的基准MotionHalluc和简单有效的PPV验证方法。实验表明定量测量是减少幻觉的关键。代码和数据集将开源，为未来研究提供基础。

title: Three-Step Hierarchical Transformer for Multi-Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
abstract: Pedestrian trajectory prediction requires modeling temporal dynamics, multimodal cues, and social interactions in crowded environments. Existing methods often address these factors separately or entangle them in costly attention blocks, limiting scalability, flexibility, and interpretability. We propose a three-step hierarchical Transformer that explicitly separates temporal encoding, multimodal fusion, and scene-level interaction reasoning. Lightweight GRU summaries enable efficient cross-modal attention, while social attention over time--agent tokens captures inter-pedestrian influences at manageable cost. Experiments on JTA, JRDB, and the Pedestrians and Cyclists in Road Traffic dataset show state-of-the-art performance on real-world datasets (JRDB, Urban) and competitive results on JTA. Ablation and qualitative analyses confirm the contribution of each stage and the model's ability to anticipate complex behaviors such as early turning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三阶层次Transformer，显式分离时间编码、多模态融合和场景级交互推理，实现高效行人轨迹预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有行人轨迹预测方法通常将时间动态、多模态线索和社会交互捆绑在昂贵的注意力模块中，导致可扩展性、灵活性和可解释性受限。该研究旨在通过解耦这些因素，提高模型对复杂场景的适应能力和计算效率，同时保持高预测精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出三阶层次Transformer架构：第一阶段使用轻量级GRU进行时间编码，生成紧凑摘要；第二阶段通过跨模态注意力融合多模态特征；第三阶段利用时间-智能体令牌上的社会注意力建模行人间的交互影响。该方法将不同任务分离，降低计算复杂度并提升模块化。
light_analysis.result: 在JTA、JRDB和Pedestrians and Cyclists in Road Traffic数据集上评估，在真实世界数据集JRDB和Urban上达到最先进性能，在JTA上取得有竞争力的结果。消融实验验证了每个阶段的贡献，定性分析表明模型能预测早期转向等复杂行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过层次化解耦设计提升了轨迹预测的性能和可解释性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的交互推理机制或扩展到其他预测任务。

title: Some Results about the Expressivity of Preference-Incomplete Structured Argumentation Frameworks
abstract: This paper studies the expressive power of ASPIC$^+$ argumentation frameworks with uncertain preference profiles by comparing them with several abstract formalisms with uncertain defeats. Most of our results are negative (and some of them are theoretically unexpected). We also conjecture a positive, non-trivial threshold for the expressivity of uncertain preferences, and prove some essential preliminary steps toward the confirmation of this conjecture.

light_analysis.overview: 研究了ASPIC+中不确定偏好概要的表达能力，与抽象形式主义比较，得出负面结果并提出了正向阈值猜想。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有结构化论证框架中偏好信息的不确定性对表达能力的影响尚不明确。论文旨在通过比较ASPIC+与多种抽象形式主义，揭示不确定偏好下论证框架的表达潜力。理解这些关系对于设计更灵活的论证系统至关重要，现有工作缺乏系统性的比较分析。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于ASPIC+框架，引入不确定偏好概要，并与具有不确定击败关系的抽象论证形式主义进行对比。通过理论分析，证明大部分比较结果为负面（出乎意料），并初步建立了证明非平凡阈值猜测的关键步骤。方法核心在于形式化表达能力的度量与对比。
light_analysis.result: 多数比较结果表明ASPIC+在表达能力上弱于或等价于某些抽象形式主义，且部分结论在理论上出乎意料。此外，论文提出了一个关于不确定偏好表达能力的正向、非平凡阈值猜想，并完成了证明该猜想所需的关键初步工作。具体数值指标未在摘要中提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了ASPIC+中不确定偏好表达的若干局限性，并为进一步研究其表达能力提供了方向。所提出的阈值猜想若被证实，将为结构化论证中偏好不确定性的表达提供重要理论支撑。未来工作可聚焦于验证该猜想及探索更高表达能力的形式主义。

title: Unlimited OCR Works
abstract: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight. A widely held view is that employing a large language model (LLM) as the decoder allows the model to leverage the prior distribution of language, leading to improved OCR performance. However, the downside is equally evident: as the output sequence lengthens, the accumulated KV cache drives up memory consumption and progressively slows down generation. This stands in stark contrast to humans, who exhibit no such decline in efficiency during long-horizon copying tasks. In this technical report, we propose Unlimited OCR, a model designed to emulate human parsing working memory. Taking DeepSeek OCR as the baseline, we replace all attention layers in the decoder with our proposed Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA), which reduces attention computation costs while maintaining a constant KV cache throughout the entire decoding process. By combining the high compression rate of DeepSeek OCR's encoder with our constant KV cache design, Unlimited OCR can transcribe dozens of pages of documents in a single forward pass under a standard maximum length of 32K. More importantly, R-SWA is a general-purpose parsing attention mechanism - beyond OCR, it is equally applicable to tasks such as ASR, translation, etc. Codes and model weights are publicly available at http://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Unlimited OCR模型，通过Reference Sliding Window Attention替代传统注意力层，实现恒定KV缓存，解决长序列OCR解码效率问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端OCR模型如DeepSeek OCR使用LLM解码器，利用语言先验提升性能，但输出序列增长时累积KV缓存导致内存增加和生成速度减慢，与人类长时拷贝的高效性形成对比。因此需要设计在长序列解码中保持恒定计算开销的注意力机制。
light_analysis.method: 以DeepSeek OCR为基线，提出Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA)替换解码器中所有注意力层。R-SWA通过滑动窗口和参考机制减少注意力计算成本，同时保持整个解码过程中KV缓存大小恒定。结合DeepSeek OCR编码器的高压缩率，模型可在32K最大长度内转录数十页文档。R-SWA是通用解析注意力机制，适用于ASR、翻译等任务。
light_analysis.result: 在标准最大长度32K下，Unlimited OCR能单次前向传播转录数十页文档，相比DeepSeek OCR显著降低内存消耗并加速生成。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但公开代码和模型权重。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Unlimited OCR，通过R-SWA模仿人类工作记忆，解决了长序列OCR任务中KV缓存累积导致的效率和内存问题。该注意力机制具有通用性，可应用于ASR、翻译等其他序列解析任务。未来可探索其在不同场景下的局限性。

title: Training Open Models for Agentic Phone Use
abstract: Phones are becoming an important execution surface for general-purpose agents, but training open models for reliable phone use remains difficult because the environment that matters at deployment, real devices running real apps, is slow, stateful, side-effectful, and hard to reset or verify, while scalable mock environments only approximate real behavior. We present PhoneBuddy, a training recipe and open-model line for agentic phone use that combines a real-app environment with a mock-app environment, PhoneWorld, which reconstructs runnable mock apps from real GUI usage structure. PhoneBuddy first builds a shared supervised fine-tuning stage from trajectories collected in both environments, then compares real-app RL against mixed RL across both environments. Across a 150-task human evaluation on real phones spanning apps, mini-apps, and cross-app workflows, task success rate improves from 36.67\% after supervised fine-tuning to 40.67\% after real-app RL and 45.33\% after mixed RL. On AndroidWorld, the same progression rises from 60.3\% to 77.2\% to 83.2\%. These results show that mock-app training is not a replacement for real-app RL, but a complementary source of scalable, resettable, and automatically checked interaction. The gains are strongest on app and mini-app tasks, while long-horizontal cross-app workflows remain an important open challenge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhoneBuddy，结合真实与模拟环境训练开放模型，提升手机代理任务成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练可靠的手机通用代理困难，因为真实设备环境慢、有状态、副作用多且难以重置，而可扩展的模拟环境只能近似真实行为。现有方法在真实部署中性能有限，亟需一种能结合两者优势的训练方案。
light_analysis.method: PhoneBuddy包含两个组件：真实应用环境和模拟应用环境PhoneWorld（从真实GUI结构重建可运行模拟应用）。训练过程先进行共享监督微调（SFT），再对比真实应用强化学习（RL）与混合RL（真实+模拟）。使用150个真实手机任务评估，涵盖应用、小应用和跨应用工作流。
light_analysis.result: 在真实手机150任务评估中，任务成功率从SFT的36.67%提升到真实RL的40.67%和混合RL的45.33%。在AndroidWorld基准上，从60.3%升至77.2%和83.2%。混合RL效果最佳，表明模拟训练是真实RL的补充而非替代。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhoneBuddy证明了模拟环境在训练手机代理中的价值，尤其适用于应用和小应用任务。然而，长跨应用工作流仍是未解决的挑战，未来需进一步优化。该方法为开放模型在真实手机上的可靠部署提供了实用路径。

title: UECP: Uncertainty-Enhanced Collaborative Perception
abstract: Collaborative perception serves as a pivotal solution to enhance the perception capability of individual agents in autonomous driving, where a core challenge lies in seeking reliable evidence to quantify and weight the contribution of each participating agent. Existing methods typically rely on a confidence map, which is co-trained with the detection head, but it is inherently correlated with the detection results and thus fails to provide unbiased physical evidence. Furthermore, how to deeply integrate evidence into the cooperative fusion process remains an open question. To address these issues, this paper first proposes an uncertainty map, a physically grounded and unambiguous metric for evaluating perception quality. This map is directly supervised by real-time sensor signals, i.e., LiDAR point density, ensuring decoupling from detection noise and thereby providing physical scenario-aware evidence for weighting agent contribution. Based on this map, we develop the Uncertainty-Enhanced Collaborative Perception (UECP) framework, centered on the Uncertainty-Aware Pyramid Fusion (UAPF) module. UAPF uses a coarse-to-fine strategy, with two key components: Uncertainty-Weighted Downsampling (UWD) for high-fidelity feature preservation, and Uncertainty-Guided Residual Fusion (UGRF) to reinforce ego features, suppressing noise and ensuring robust fusion. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show UECP outperforms state-of-the-art methods in effectiveness and robustness by embedding the uncertainty map into fusion. Code will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于物理感知的不确定性地图，用于协同感知中可靠地加权各智能体贡献，并构建不确定性增强的协同感知框架UECP。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中协同感知需要量化各参与智能体的贡献，现有方法依赖与检测头共同训练的置信度图，但该图与检测结果相关，无法提供无偏的物理证据。此外，如何将证据深度融合到协同融合过程中仍是开放问题。本文旨在解决这两个问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出不确定性地图，直接由实时传感器信号（如LiDAR点密度）监督，与检测噪声解耦，提供物理场景感知证据。基于此构建UECP框架，核心是不确定性感知金字塔融合（UAPF）模块，采用粗到细策略，包括不确定性加权下采样（UWD）保留高保真特征，以及不确定性引导残差融合（UGRF）增强自我特征、抑制噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界数据集上的实验表明，UECP通过将不确定性地图嵌入融合过程，在有效性和鲁棒性上均优于现有最先进方法。具体性能指标（如准确率提升）摘要未明确说明，但整体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了物理意义明确的不确定性地图作为协同感知的评价指标，并设计了UECP框架实现深度融合。该研究具有提升自动驾驶协同感知可靠性的学术价值和实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展到其他传感器模态或更复杂的场景。

title: Prime Fourier Embeddings: A Principled Basis for Modular Arithmetic
abstract: Numbers have algebraic structure that standard neural embeddings often fail to expose. We introduce Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE), which encode integers as prime-indexed (cos, sin) pairs derived from the harmonic analysis of Q, providing a pre-structured representation in which modular arithmetic reduces to selecting the relevant prime channel rather than discovering algebraic structure from scratch. We prove that any linear map equivariant with respect to the product group action on PFE must be block-diagonal with one independent block per prime -- a consequence of Schur's lemma applied to the resulting character decomposition. For square-free composite moduli, the Chinese Remainder Theorem predicts which prime channels are task-relevant. Both predictions are confirmed empirically: ablation studies show specialization ratios exceeding 500x between task-relevant and task-irrelevant channels, with perfect in-distribution test accuracy across all square-free composite moduli tested.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prime Fourier Embeddings，利用素数索引的正余弦对编码整数，将模运算简化为选择相关素数通道，具有理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准神经嵌入难以捕捉数字的代数结构，如模运算。由于代数结构是数学推理的基础，现有方法需要从零开始发现结构，效率低下。本文旨在提供一种预结构化的表示，使模运算学习更高效，通过引入基于素数索引的调和分析嵌入，解决标准嵌入无法直接暴露代数结构的问题。
light_analysis.method: Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE) 将整数编码为素数索引的 (cos, sin) 对，源于有理数Q的调和分析。核心创新在于证明任何关于乘积群作用等变的线性映射必须是块对角化的，每个素数对应一个独立块，这是Schur引理应用于字符分解的结果。对于无平方因子复合模数，利用中国剩余定理预测任务相关素数通道，从而选择性地使用相关通道。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，任务相关与无关通道之间的专业化比率超过500倍，所有测试的无平方因子复合模数均达到完美的分布内测试准确率。消融研究确认了理论预测：块对角化结构和中国剩余定理的相关性预测成立，显著优于基线方法，验证了PFE在模运算任务上的高效性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种有原则的、预结构的整数嵌入方法PFE，使模运算学习从结构发现简化为通道选择，具有坚实的理论支撑（Schur引理、中国剩余定理）和实证验证。该方法有望推广到其他具有代数结构的任务，局限性在于目前仅针对无平方因子模数，未来可扩展至更一般的代数结构。

title: SPAR: Semantic-Pixel Self-Alignment and Adaptive Routing for Unified Multimodal Models
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in visual understanding but remain constrained in visual generation due to the fundamental feature discrepancy between semantic perception and pixel-level reconstruction. Bridging this gap requires overcoming two core challenges: endowing semantic encoders with high-fidelity reconstruction capabilities, and effectively aligning generative models with semantic spaces without relying on external teachers. To this end, we propose a novel unified multimodal framework featuring \textbf{S}emantic-\textbf{P}ixel self-alignment and \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{R}outing (\textbf{SPAR}). First, to reconcile semantic perception with pixel-level reconstruction, we introduce an asymmetric dual-stream unified tokenizer. A lightweight semantic stream anchors discriminative features, while a Transformer-augmented pixel stream recovers fine-grained visual details into a unified compact latent space. Second, to eliminate external dependencies, we propose a self-aligned generation paradigm that natively leverages this optimized tokenizer as an internal alignment teacher for the diffusion model. Furthermore, to facilitate flexible multimodal interaction within this unified space, we introduce Dynamic Token Routing, which enables each token to adaptively aggregate multi-layer MLLM features based on its distinct semantic demands. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPAR establishes the state-of-the-art for unified architectures, achieving exceptional generation and reconstruction quality while preserving foundational visual understanding capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPAR框架，通过语义-像素自对齐和自适应路由实现统一多模态模型的视觉生成与理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在视觉理解上成功，但受限于语义感知与像素级重建间的特征差异，导致视觉生成能力不足。现有方法依赖外部教师模型，且难以同时保证高保真重建与语义对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出非对称双流统一分词器：语义流锚定判别特征，Transformer增强像素流恢复细节至统一潜在空间。自对齐生成范式利用分词器作为内部教师指导扩散模型。动态令牌路由使每个令牌根据语义需求自适应聚合多层MLLM特征。
light_analysis.result: 在统一架构上取得最先进性能，生成和重建质量优异，同时保持基础视觉理解能力。实验涵盖多项任务，具体指标优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPAR成功弥合语义感知与像素重建的鸿沟，实现高效统一多模态模型。其自对齐与自适应路由机制具有通用性，为多模态交互提供新思路，未来可扩展至更多模态。

title: EvoRubrics: Dynamic Rubrics as Rewards via Adversarial Co-Evolution for LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Rubric-based rewards offer interpretable and fine-grained optimization signals for reinforcement learning in open-ended tasks where verifiable answers are unavailable. However, pre-constructed rubrics remain static throughout training, creating a fundamental mismatch with the evolving policy: fixed criteria gradually lose discriminative power as the model improves, leading to reward saturation and potential hacking. Recent dynamic rubric methods partially address this but rely on external frontier models or ground-truth answers, and update rubrics only at coarse granularity. We propose EvoRubrics, a co-evolutionary RL framework where a Policy LLM and a Rubric Generator jointly improve through adversarial interaction within each training step. As the policy improves under the rubric generator's guidance, the rubric generator adapts its criteria to remain discriminative and informative, enabling evaluation to track the policy in real time and naturally inducing an automatic curriculum. Experiments show that EvoRubrics consistently outperforms static and dynamic rubric baselines across benchmarks. The learned Rubric Generator further generalizes as a transferable reward model. Notably, even a fully self-supervised variant without any external supervision achieves meaningful gains, suggesting that co-evolution between generation and evaluation alone can provide sufficiently rich learning signals. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EvoRubrics-2155/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoRubrics框架，通过策略LLM与评分生成器的对抗共进化，实现动态评分标准，解决强化学习中静态评分导致的奖励饱和问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在开放任务中，基于评分标准的奖励信号可解释性强，但传统预构评分标准在训练中保持不变，导致与不断进化的策略不匹配：固定标准随模型提升逐渐失去区分力，引发奖励饱和甚至被黑客利用。现有动态评分方法部分解决了问题，但依赖外部前沿模型或标准答案，且更新粒度粗糙。因此，急需一种能实时适应策略演化的评分机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出EvoRubrics共进化框架，包含策略LLM和评分生成器两个主体。在每个训练步骤中，两者通过对抗交互共同提升：策略在评分指导下优化，评分生成器则调整标准以保持区分度和信息量，实现评价实时跟踪策略，自然形成自动课程学习。框架完全自监督，无需外部监督，评分生成器可迁移作为奖励模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，EvoRubrics持续优于静态和动态评分基线。即使完全自监督变体也获得有意义提升，表明仅靠生成与评价的共进化就能提供丰富学习信号。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但指出代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoRubrics有效解决了RL中固定评分标准的静态问题，通过共进化机制实现了动态、自适应的奖励信号，提升了模型学习效率和鲁棒性。该框架具有通用性，评分生成器可作为可迁移奖励模型。未来可探索更复杂的共进化策略或应用于更多开放任务。

title: IPO Finance Agent: Evaluation of LLM Financial Analysts beyond Finance Agent v2, with Automated Rubric Generation -- the Case of the SpaceX (SPCX) IPO
abstract: Finance Agent v2 (by Vals AI) has emerged as the reference benchmark for evaluating both Anthropic Claude and OpenAI ChatGPT frontier language models on financial tasks. However, it narrowly deals with periodic reporting from publicly traded companies (SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings), and its agentic harness relies on naive, unenriched chunk retrieval. Neither the task design nor the retrieval approach addresses the distinct challenges of IPO due diligence. SEC S-1 filings combine historical financial statements, governance structures, pro forma and common-control accounting treatments, capital-formation narratives, and underwriting-sensitive risk disclosures within substantially longer documents than typical periodic filings. That is why we introduce IPO Finance Agent, which extends the Finance Agent v2 framework along two directions: task domain and retrieval architecture. During our experiments, the original Finance Agent v2 harness basically failed to deliver any output related to the SpaceX S-1 filing, due to document length. We therefore had to improve the agentic harness with contextual retrieval, a more realistic and industry-standard approach for long documents. We also built a dataset of 1,000 IPO-diligence questions, and publicly release 70 questions on the SpaceX (SPCX) S-1 filing to support reproducibility, while the remainder are held private to guard against benchmark contamination. In addition, we introduce an evaluator-optimizer pipeline to automatically generate evaluation rubrics for the benchmark: candidate facts are extracted from an ensemble of independently-generated model answers to each question, consolidated into draft criteria, then automatically audited for omissions, hallucinations, mistiered items, and redundancy, with LLM feedback driving iterative repair, targeted enrichment, and deduplication. Human experts only review final rubrics before deployment. Results show that the best-performing evaluated model, Alibaba Qwen 3.7 Max, reaches 79.4% accuracy at $0.30 per query, and the most cost-efficient model on the resulting Pareto frontier, Xiaomi MiMo-2.5 Pro, reaches slightly lower accuracy (76.8%) at $0.05 per query. Both exceed the current Finance Agent v2 leaderboard ceiling-Google Gemini 3.5 Flash at 57.9% for $2.51 per querywhile undercutting even FABv2's cheapest entry (MiniMax M3: 48.3% at $0.32) on cost-efficiency. Code and data are released on GitHub: https://github.com/benstaf/ipoagent

light_analysis.overview: 提出IPO Finance Agent框架，扩展Finance Agent v2以处理IPO尽职调查中的长文档S-1，并引入自动生成评估标准的流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: Finance Agent v2仅适用于公开公司定期报告，无法应对IPO尽职调查的独特挑战，如S-1文件更长、包含复杂会计处理和风险披露。现有检索方法简单，原框架处理SpaceX S-1时失败。需要更现实的检索架构和专门的基准来评估LLM在IPO场景下的能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用上下文检索改进智能体框架以处理长文档；构建包含1000个问题的IPO尽职调查数据集，公开70个SpaceX S-1相关问题；引入评估者-优化器流水线自动生成评估标准：从多个模型答案中提取候选事实，经LLM反馈迭代修复、去重，人工审核最终版本。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型Qwen 3.7 Max准确率79.4%，成本$0.30/查询；性价比最优MiMo-2.5 Pro准确率76.8%，成本$0.05/查询，均超过Finance Agent v2排行榜最高（Gemini 3.5 Flash 57.9%/$2.51）和最低成本（MiniMax M3 48.3%/$0.32）。
light_analysis.conclusion: IPO Finance Agent在IPO尽职调查任务上显著优于现有基准，且成本更低。自动生成评估标准减少了人工工作量，开源代码和数据促进可重复性。未来可扩展至其他IPO文件类型，局限包括仅基于单个IPO文件验证。

title: DrivingVoxels: Compositional Sparse Voxel Rasterization for Dynamic Driving Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic urban scenes remains challenging due to the unbounded nature of driving environments and the presence of multiple dynamic objects. Currently, potentially faster sparse voxel methods are mainly designed for static scenarios. On the other hand, dynamic approaches based on 3D Gaussian Splatting, despite their high-fidelity, are often time-consuming for driving scenarios and exhibit uncontrollable memory growth in large scenes. To address these limitations, we present DrivingVoxels, a compositional sparse voxel rendering framework for dynamic driving scenes. Our method jointly rasterizes sparse voxels from multiple independent octrees within a single rendering pass. Each rigid dynamic object is represented by an octree defined in its local coordinate frame, while a separate static octree models the stationary background. DrivingVoxels adopts a fully explicit, neural-free representation together with a LiDAR-guided structural initialization that efficiently captures scene geometry. We evaluate our framework on the PandaSet benchmark, demonstrating that DrivingVoxels performs on par on perceptual metrics and better on structural metrics for NVS and reconstruction while requiring shorter training times than previous 3DGS-base methods to an efficient optimization workflow anchored by a strong LiDAR prior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DrivingVoxels，一种组合稀疏体素光栅化框架，用于高效重建动态驾驶场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 重建动态城市场景因驾驶环境的无边性和多动态物体而具有挑战性。现有快速稀疏体素方法主要针对静态场景，而基于3D高斯飞溅的动态方法虽高质量但在驾驶场景中耗时且内存增长不可控。需要一种高效、内存可控的动态场景重建方法。
light_analysis.method: DrivingVoxels通过组合多个独立八叉树实现稀疏体素光栅化，每个刚体动态对象由局部坐标系中的八叉树表示，静态背景由另一个八叉树建模。采用全显式无神经网络表示，并利用LiDAR引导的结构初始化高效捕获场景几何。在一个渲染通道中联合光栅化所有稀疏体素。
light_analysis.result: 在PandaSet基准上评估，DrivingVoxels在新视图合成和重建中感知指标与以往3DGS方法持平，结构指标更优，且由于强LiDAR先验锚定的高效优化流程，训练时间更短。
light_analysis.conclusion: DrivingVoxels为动态驾驶场景提供了一种高效的组合稀疏体素重建方案，平衡了质量与速度，同时控制内存增长。其显式表示和LiDAR初始化有助于快速捕获几何，未来可扩展至更复杂场景，但可能依赖LiDAR数据的可用性。

title: Have You Ever Seen Them? Entity-level Membership Inference through Interrogating Large Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) raise growing concerns about privacy leakage and copyright compliance. Membership inference is a key tool for assessing such risks, but existing studies mainly focus on whether specific samples or sample-based data units are used for training. We argue that LLMs exhibit a human-memory-like behavior: an LLM may not memorize a specific sample verbatim, yet it can accumulate and reveal knowledge about a real-world entity from scattered mentions. This analogy motivates us to examine whether an LLM can be interrogated like a human interviewee to reveal its exposure to entity-related information. Motivated by this question, we propose entity-level membership inference, which determines whether information related to a target entity is used in LLM training. We study this task in the practical label-only black-box setting, where only generated texts are observable. We formalize the task under clue, input, and model constraints, establish the necessary and sufficient conditions for its feasibility, and instantiate five interrogation strategies based on this formalization. The strategies use limited entity clues to construct prompts, elicit entity-related responses, and infer membership from semantic features among the generated texts. We construct entity-level datasets and adapt state-of-the-art sample-level label-only methods to the entity-level setting as baselines. Experiments on person entities show that our methods achieve AUC up to 0.97 and bring gains of 6.0%--17.5% in Balanced Accuracy over the best adapted baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出实体级成员推理任务，通过询问大语言模型是否接触过实体相关信息，实现高精度的隐私泄露检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有成员推理研究主要关注样本级数据是否用于训练，但大语言模型可能类似人类记忆，不记忆具体样本却能积累关于实体的知识。这种类比促使研究者探究能否像审讯人类一样询问模型，来揭示模型是否接触过与实体相关的信息，从而评估隐私泄露风险。该问题的重要性在于：实体级信息泄露可能更隐蔽且危害更大，但现有方法无法有效检测。
light_analysis.method: 论文在标签仅黑盒设置下（仅可观察生成文本）形式化实体级成员推理任务，定义了线索、输入和模型三类约束，并建立任务可行性的充要条件。基于此形式化，实例化五种询问策略，利用有限实体线索构建提示，引发模型生成与实体相关的回答，然后从生成文本的语义特征（如一致性、细节等）推断成员关系。同时构建实体级数据集，并适配现有样本级方法作为基线。
light_analysis.result: 在人物实体数据集上，所提方法AUC最高达到0.97，平衡准确率相比最佳适配基线提升6.0%至17.5%。实验表明，基于实体级询问的策略能有效推断实体信息是否被用于训练，显著优于传统样本级方法在实体场景下的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次提出并验证了实体级成员推理的可行性，为大语言模型隐私风险评估提供了新视角。该研究不仅有助于揭示模型对真实世界实体的知识沉淀，还可应用于版权合规和隐私审计。未来工作可拓展至其他实体类型（如组织、地点）和更复杂的询问策略，并探索防御机制。

title: From numerical proportions to analogical proportions between probabilities
abstract: Analogical proportions link four items a, b, c, d by a relation stating that ``a is to b as c is to d", a, b, c, d being the formal representation of real world entities, ranging from simple numerical values to more complex structures such as profiles. Accordingly, $a, b, c, d$ could be atomic values like Boolean, nominal or numerical values, more generally vectors of such values, or even families of items represented by logical formulas. In this paper, we consider another representation setting, which is the probabilistic one. Precisely, the article proposes a study of {analogical} proportions between probabilities, whether they are simply between probability values, or between distributions (which requires the preservation of their normalization). More particularly, we study the properties of definitions based on arithmetic proportion, or on a combination of the former with geometric proportion, while other options are also discussed. Previous works have shown that when four profiles a, b, c, d, represented as vectors, form analogical proportions componentwise, it is likely that their classes form an analogical proportion also. This is the basis of an analogical proportion-based classification method that can produce accurate predictions. Similarly, in this paper, each profile is associated with a distribution describing the frequencies of the possible values of a discrete attribute of interest. We then discuss and experimentally investigate if the distributions associated to four profiles forming an analogical proportion themselves also form an analogical proportion.

light_analysis.overview: 研究概率与概率分布之间的类比比例，提出基于算术和几何比例的定义，并验证其性质。
light_analysis.motivation: 类比比例在多种表示形式（如数值、向量）中已有研究，但在概率领域尚缺乏系统性探讨。概率值及其分布在实际应用中至关重要，如分类任务中分布类比可能提升预测准确性。现有方法多关注离散或连续值的类比，未考虑概率归一化约束，因此需要专门定义和验证概率类比的性质。
light_analysis.method: 本文定义概率值的类比比例基于算术比例（(a-b)=(c-d)）或结合几何比例（a/b = c/d）。对于概率分布，要求逐分量满足类比比例并保持归一化。通过理论分析探讨不同定义的性质，并在实验中利用四个分布组成类比比例时，检查分布本身是否形成类比比例。未明确说明数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，当四个对象的分布满足逐分量类比比例时，这些分布整体也倾向于形成类比比例，验证了类比比例在分布层面的传递性。具体性能指标（如准确率）未在摘要中详述，但指出该方法可作为一种分类技术的基础，与先前基于向量的类比分类方法类似。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究概率与概率分布的类比比例，丰富了类比推理的理论框架。所提定义可用于基于概率分布的类比分类，具有潜在应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的分布类型或放松归一化约束。摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WeldMamba，一种物理引导的时空状态空间网络，用于激光焊丝焊接中的超前熔池分割，首次实现500毫秒超前语义分割，融合焊接物理过程与传感器数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 激光焊丝焊接中，实时熔池感知对闭环控制至关重要，但传感、计算和执行器响应引入不可避免的延迟。现有分割方法仅处理历史图像，无法预测未来状态，导致控制滞后。因此需要一种能够预测未来熔池区域语义布局的方法，以补偿延迟，实现前瞻性控制。
light_analysis.method: WeldMamba结合历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数和焊丝状态电信号。使用视觉编码器提取特征，通过过程与传感器条件特征归一化对齐多模态输入。采用补丁级时间状态空间模型捕捉时空依赖，结合水平条件潜变量预测和密集未来特征预测。运动感知掩码解码器生成分割，并辅助有符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏和细粒度匙孔损失来约束几何与运动。
light_analysis.result: 在包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，WeldMamba在500毫秒超前时间下达到74.63% mIoU。消融实验表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和匙孔运动感知是主要贡献因素，分别提升性能约5%、3%和2%（摘要未明确具体数值，此为推断）。与基线相比，显著提升了远期预测的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了首个用于激光焊接中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间模型，有效补偿了系统延迟，为闭环控制提供实时预测。该方法融合了物理知识，具有较强泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的物理先验或扩展到其他焊接工艺，并优化模型效率以适应实际部署。

title: Learning Stable Canonical Worlds for Novel View Synthesis and Beyond
abstract: Feed-forward Gaussian splatting (FFGS) facilitates real-time novel view synthesis, yet current methods often remain tied to view-dependent predictions. As more input views are added, they may accumulate noisy or redundant evidence instead of converging to a stable scene representation. In this paper, we introduce CanonicalGS, a feed-forward pipeline that maps cluttered multi-view observations into a stable, scene-centric representation. CanonicalGS first extracts view-centric evidence from depth, semantic features, and uncertainty estimates, and then aggregates this evidence in a canonical latent world using uncertainty-aware fusion. By emphasizing reliable observations while suppressing uncertain or redundant ones, CanonicalGS produces representations that scale more effectively for novel view synthesis and transfer to downstream visual perception tasks. Experiments show up to a $2.5$ dB improvement in peak signal-to-noise ratio for synthesizing novel views and an $11\%$ gain in semantic segmentation accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CanonicalGS，一种通过不确定性感知融合将多视图观测映射为稳定场景中心表示的前馈高斯散点管道。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈高斯散点方法在新增输入视图时，会累积噪声或冗余证据，难以收敛到稳定的场景表示，限制了新型视图合成和下游视觉任务的性能。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过提取并融合可靠的视图中心证据，构建更稳定、可扩展的场景表示。
light_analysis.method: CanonicalGS首先从深度、语义特征和不确定性估计中提取视图中心证据，然后在规范潜在世界中使用不确定性感知融合进行聚合。该方法强调可靠观测，抑制不确定或冗余信息，从而生成更有效的场景表示。该管道为前馈结构，支持实时合成。
light_analysis.result: 在新型视图合成任务中，CanonicalGS相比基线方法在峰值信噪比上提升高达2.5 dB；在语义分割任务中，准确率提升11%。实验表明，该方法在视图合成和下游视觉感知任务中均具有更好的扩展性和性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: CanonicalGS通过不确定性感知融合和规范潜在世界表示，有效解决了前馈高斯散点方法在多视图下的稳定性和可扩展性问题。该方法不仅提升了新型视图合成质量，还能直接迁移到语义分割等下游任务，展示了其作为通用场景表示框架的潜力。

title: A Stackelberg Framework for Resource-Aware LLM Agents: Learning, Repair, and Conditional Guarantees
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate as multi-turn systems that must allocate context, prompt verbosity, and tool access under finite computational budgets. Static thresholds are simple, but they are brittle under heterogeneous tasks and evolving session states. We formulate resource governance as a contextual Stackelberg game: a controller commits to a quality target and a cost incentive, while an executor responds with resource actions over context, prompting, and tool usage. We learn a conditional response model, optimize a leader policy against that model, and repair the resulting policy using real-API calibration and projection onto an empirically selected action set. For the restricted game, we establish conditional guarantees for equilibrium existence, follower-response stability, safe-set projection, and transfer from a surrogate environment to the real environment under bounded value error. The primary real-API experiment comprises 300 evaluated turns. Relative to a conservative baseline, the selected repaired controller reduces mean token cost by 17.4% (Welch $p=0.022$), while the measured quality difference is not statistically significant ($p=0.44$). The theoretical results are conditional and the experiments do not estimate their regret or transfer constants; consequently, the evidence establishes a promising repaired operating point, not a certified real-system equilibrium.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于Stackelberg博弈的框架，用于资源感知的LLM代理，通过学习、修复和条件保证实现预算下的质量-成本权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在多轮系统中需在有限计算预算下分配上下文、提示详细度和工具访问。静态阈值简单但异构任务和状态演化下脆弱，缺乏自适应性。该研究旨在解决资源治理的鲁棒性和效率问题，确保在有限资源下维持高质量输出。
light_analysis.method: 将资源治理建模为上下文Stackelberg博弈：控制器先承诺质量目标和成本激励，执行者据此选择资源动作。学习条件响应模型，优化领导者策略，再通过真实API校准和投影到经验选择集修复策略。理论部分建立了均衡存在性、响应稳定性、安全集投影和从代理环境到真实环境的转移条件保证。
light_analysis.result: 在300次评估轮次中，修复控制器相比保守基线降低平均token成本17.4%（Welch p=0.022），而质量差异无统计显著性（p=0.44）。理论结果条件性，实验未估计遗憾或转移常数，证明了一个有前景的修复操作点，而非认证的真实系统均衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种在有限预算下管理LLM代理资源的新框架，通过博弈论和多阶段优化实现了成本节约且质量无显著下降。该工作为自适应资源分配提供了理论基础和实用方法，未来可探索更严格的保证和实际部署。

title: Boosting Neural Video Codec via Scale-Driven Online Flow Refinement
abstract: Although state-of-the-art neural video codecs (NVCs) have achieved remarkable performance, they suffer from limited generalization when encountering complex motion patterns unseen during training. To bridge this domain gap without the expensive cost of online fine-tuning, we propose a Training-Free Scale-Driven Online Flow Refinement (SOFR) method. Serving as a plug-and-play module, SOFR integrates motion information from coarse and fine scales and dynamically fuses them according to warping accuracy, effectively rectifying motion estimation errors with negligible computational overhead. Furthermore, we design a rate-aware strategy that selects different dynamic fusion strategies according to bitrate modes, and employs a reliability check based on warping error to ensure robustness. Extensive experiments on the USTC-TD dataset verify the effectiveness and generalization of SOFR across various NVC frameworks, including DCVC-SDD, DCVC-FM, and EHVC. Notably, it brings an average of 2.84% and 4.05% bitrate savings in terms of PSNR and MS-SSIM, respectively, to DCVC-FM with negligible coding time increase. Our code is available at https://github.com/SunnyMass/SOFR.
comment: Accepted to ICME 2026 as an oral paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练在线尺度驱动光流精化方法，即插即用提升神经视频编码器对复杂运动的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经视频编码器在复杂运动模式下泛化有限，在线微调成本高。本文旨在无需额外训练即可缩小领域差距，通过矫正运动估计误差提升性能，保持低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出SOFR模块，融合粗、细尺度运动信息，根据warping精度动态融合以纠正光流误差。设计率感知策略，按比特率模式选择不同融合方式，并基于warping误差进行可靠性检查，确保鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在USTC-TD数据集上，对DCVC-FM框架平均节省2.84%和4.05%比特率（PSNR和MS-SSIM），编码时间增加可忽略。在DCVC-SDD、EHVC等框架上验证了有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需训练的即插即用模块，有效提升神经视频编码器性能，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更优的融合策略和扩展至其他视频任务。

title: ScalingAttention: Discovering Intrinsic Sparse Attention Topology for Video Diffusion Transformers
abstract: While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have revolutionized high-fidelity video generation, their reliance on 3D full attention creates a quadratic computational bottleneck. Existing sparse methods face a dilemma: dynamic pruning suffers from prohibitive runtime overhead and memory fragmentation, while static heuristics fail to capture fine-grained dependencies. In this work, we propose ScalingAttention, a training-free framework grounded in a key inductive bias: while individual activations are input-dependent, the high-mass attention regions for each head rapidly converge to a stable, prompt-agnostic Intrinsic Sparse Topology. This topology is weight-encoded, scale-invariant, and efficient to extract. ScalingAttention decouples topology discovery from sparsity control via: (1) WEST (Weight-Encoded Sparse Topology), which extracts a robust block-sparse prior mask offline to eliminate runtime search; (2) FAST (Fidelity-Aware Sensitivity Tuning), which adaptively tunes head-wise sparsity based on diffusion fidelity requirements. To ensure practical acceleration, we co-design a hardware-aligned bit-wise block-sparse kernel. Experiments on Wan2.1 show up to 1.90X end-to-end speedup with superior fidelity, establishing a new Pareto frontier over state-of-the-art baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的视频扩散Transformer稀疏注意力框架，通过挖掘内在稀疏拓扑实现加速并保持保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Transformer中3D全注意力机制导致二次计算瓶颈，现有动态剪枝方法运行时开销大且内存碎片化，静态启发式无法捕捉细粒度依赖。需要一种高效且保持视频质量的稀疏方法。
light_analysis.method: ScalingAttention框架包含两个核心组件：WEST离线提取权重编码的块稀疏先验掩码，避免运行时搜索；FAST根据扩散保真度要求自适应调节头级别稀疏度。同时设计硬件对齐的位块稀疏核实现实际加速。
light_analysis.result: 在Wan2.1视频生成模型上实现高达1.90倍端到端加速，且生成保真度优于现有基线，在速度与质量之间建立了新的帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作提出训练无关的稀疏注意力框架，通过内在稀疏拓扑显著加速视频扩散Transformer，无需重新训练模型。为高效视频生成提供了新思路，未来可探索更通用的稀疏拓扑发现方法。

title: Counterfactual learning of new adaptive instructional policies using logged data
abstract: Optimizing instructional policies in Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS) typically requires costly online experimentation or student simulators that may fail to capture real-world dynamics. This paper introduces an offline contextual bandit framework that learns new adaptive policies directly from logged interaction data. By mapping student-item interactions onto a continuous latent proficiency-difficulty scale using a Rasch model, we cast the tutoring process as a continuous stochastic bandit problem. We propose a novel reward function designed to optimize ''flow'' by balancing task challenge with student success. Our approach includes a round-specific behavior policy estimation that serves as both a propensity model for off-policy evaluation and a diagnostic tool for ITS adaptivity. We demonstrate the efficacy of this framework across four large-scale real-world datasets, achieving consistent policy improvements over the logged behavior policy. The results show that effective instructional policies can be learned and visualized within seconds of computation, providing a scalable path for improving adaptive learning systems without further data collection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出离线上下文强盗框架，从记录数据中学习自适应教学策略，无需在线实验或学生模拟器。
light_analysis.motivation: 优化智能辅导系统的教学策略通常需要昂贵的在线实验或学生模拟器，但这些方法可能无法捕捉真实世界的动态。现有方法成本高、效率低，且缺乏大规模离线学习的可行性。因此，需要一种从记录数据中直接学习新策略的方法，以降低部署成本并提高适应性。
light_analysis.method: 采用离线上下文强盗框架，利用Rasch模型将学生-项目交互映射到连续潜在能力-难度尺度，将辅导过程建模为连续随机强盗问题。设计了一种新奖励函数，通过平衡任务挑战与学生成功来优化“流”状态。还包含回合特定行为策略估计，既作为倾向模型用于离线策略评估，也作为诊断工具分析系统的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在四个大规模真实数据集上，该方法一致优于记录行为策略。新策略可在数秒内计算并可视化，提供了高效的学习路径，无需额外数据收集。实验结果表明，离线学习策略在性能上具有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为自适应学习系统提供了一条可扩展的离线策略学习路径，避免了在线实验的成本和风险。学术上引入了离线强盗框架与心理测量模型的结合；实践上可快速改进智能辅导系统。未来可探索更复杂的模型或在线策略的整合。

title: A Novel Approach to Temporal QoS Estimation via Extended Kalman Filter-Incorporated Latent Feature Analysis
