We introduce \textbf{GRAIN} (\textbf{G}roup \textbf{A}ggregation via m\textbf{IN}-norm objective), a lightweight training algorithm that replaces the mean aggregation used in mini-batch optimization (both across mini-batches and within a mini-batch) with a min-norm convex combination of group-wise gradients. \mName guarantees a non-negative inner product between the aggregated update and every group gradient, resolving intra- and inner-batch gradient conflict, and retains an $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ convergence rate comparable to SGD. Under mild smoothness and absolute-continuity assumptions, the min-norm solution differs almost surely from the arithmetic mean, which yields a uniform-stability bound for \mName strictly tighter than the standard bound for SGD. Empirically across generation, classification, and regression at LPM scale, \mName delivers consistent improvements in mean performance and reductions in run-to-run variance over a broad suite of tasks, with no extra training-time or storage cost beyond a single backward pass.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRAIN算法，用最小范数凸组合替代均值聚合，缓解梯度冲突，提升训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度学习在过参数化下训练不稳定，特别是大模型微调时，随机因素导致解差异大，多次运行成本高。现有方法如均值聚合无法解决梯度冲突，导致性能波动。本文旨在通过改进梯度聚合方式，在不增加额外计算成本下提高训练稳定性和泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: GRAIN算法用min-norm凸组合替代SGD中的均值聚合，保证聚合更新与每个组梯度内积非负，消除批内与批间梯度冲突。理论证明其收敛率为O(1/T)，且均匀稳定性界比SGD更紧。仅需一次反向传播，无额外存储开销。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模预训练模型上的生成、分类和回归任务中，GRAIN相比SGD均值聚合，一致提升了平均性能并降低了运行间方差。多个任务上的实验表明，该方法能有效缓解训练不稳定性，且不增加训练时间或存储成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRAIN通过简单的梯度聚合改进，显著提升大模型训练的稳定性和泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更广义的凸组合策略或应用于其他优化器。

title: Intent-Governed Tool Authorization for AI Agents
abstract: AI agents increasingly act through external tools: they read private data, construct structured payloads, submit write requests, export records, and coordinate workflows across application boundaries. Existing authorization mechanisms usually ask whether an integration credential, app, or token can call a tool. That question is necessary but incomplete. A tool call can be authorized by static credentials and still be unjustified by the user's current request. For example, a credential that can read and export records should not expose export authority when the user only asked for a bounded summary, and a model-generated delete call should not execute merely because the integration has a delete scope. This paper proposes Intent-Governed Access Control (IGAC), a server-side authorization layer that treats the user's expressed intent as a monotone, auditable policy attribute for AI-agent tool use. IGAC introduces intent certificates, session-scoped policy narrowing, intent-aware manifest filtering, and intent-tool-payload consistency checks. The central invariant is that user intent may only reduce the authority granted by static integration policy; it never expands scopes, data policy, tenant boundaries, or review requirements. We map IGAC onto OpenPort, an existing governance substrate that already implements authorization-dependent discovery, scope and ABAC-style policy checks, draft-first writes, preflight impact binding, state-witness checks, idempotency, stable reason codes, and audit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于用户意图的AI代理工具授权框架IGAC，通过将意图作为单调可审计策略属性来限制静态授权范围。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有授权机制仅检查凭证是否允许调用工具，但忽略了用户当前请求的合理性。例如，具有读取和导出权限的凭证不应在用户仅要求摘要时执行导出；模型生成的删除调用不应仅因集成有删除权限就执行。因此需要一种基于用户意图的细粒度授权，确保工具调用与用户真实请求一致。
light_analysis.method: 提出Intent-Governed Access Control (IGAC)作为服务端授权层，将用户表达意图视为单调、可审计的策略属性。引入意图证书、会话范围策略窄化、意图感知清单过滤、意图-工具-负载一致性检查。核心不变性：用户意图只能减少静态策略授予的权限，绝不扩展范围、数据策略、租户边界或审查要求。映射到现有OpenPort治理基础架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验指标，但指出IGAC映射到OpenPort。OpenPort已实现授权依赖发现、范围检查、ABAC策略、草稿优先写入、预影响绑定、状态见证检查、幂等性、稳定原因码和审计，表明IGAC可集成到现有基础设施中，提供更细粒度、可审计的授权控制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出IGAC框架解决AI代理工具调用中意图与授权不一致的问题，通过将意图作为策略属性实现细粒度、可审计的授权机制，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。未来工作可探索多意图场景、扩展性优化及跨系统集成。

title: PromptDyG: Test-Time Prompt Adaptation on Dynamic Graphs
abstract: Activities in numerous evolving systems can be represented as dynamic graphs in snapshot form at different time intervals, i.e., discrete-time dynamic graphs (DTDGs). Existing methods show impressive advances in capturing historical temporal evolution patterns in DTDGs, but they focus on addressing an offline learning setting, where models are trained using historical snapshots once and then evaluated to all subsequent graph snapshots without further updating. This fails to capture 1) the nature of evolving complexities across graph snapshots and 2) the distribution shift in the testing graph snapshots. To address these problems, we propose PromptDyG, a novel framework that leverages unsupervised test-time Prompt adaptation for Dynamic Graph learning under a live-update online setting. The key insight is that an expressive dynamic graph prompt can be learned on a frozen backbone via minimization of feature-wise, label-free entropy to efficiently and continuously model the evolving patterns. We show theoretically that this unsupervised prompt adaptation can guarantee a larger similarity margin between positive and negative pairs, facilitating more accurate dynamic predictions. It is further confirmed by our extensive empirical results on six benchmark datasets that show consistent and significant improvements of PromptDyG over state-of-the-art baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PromptDyG框架，通过测试时无监督提示适应实现动态图的在线学习，有效捕捉演化模式和分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有离散时间动态图方法采用离线学习，模型训练后不再更新，无法捕捉跨快照的演化复杂性和测试快照的分布偏移。这限制了模型在动态环境中的适应能力。为解决这些问题，需要一种在线更新机制来持续建模动态图的演化模式。
light_analysis.method: PromptDyG在冻结的骨干网络上学习动态图提示，通过无监督特征级熵最小化来高效且连续地建模演化模式。理论证明该提示适应能增大正负对间的相似性间隔，提升预测准确性。使用六个基准数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准数据集上，PromptDyG一致且显著优于最先进的基线方法，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。具体性能提升未明确给出，但结果表明该方法在动态图预测任务上具有明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PromptDyG为动态图在线学习提供了新范式，通过测试时无监督提示适应解决离线学习的局限性。理论分析和实验共同证明了其优越性，具有重要学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的提示设计或结合其他自监督目标。

title: Intend, Reflect, Refine: An Adaptive Multimodal Reflection Framework for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have advanced end-to-end autonomous driving by incorporating reasoning for better interpretability and planning quality. However, most existing approaches directly generate the final trajectory without explicitly examining its future consequences, which limits their reliability in complex and dynamic environments. To address this limitation, we propose IRR-Drive (Intend, Reflect, Refine), an adaptive multimodal reflection framework for autonomous driving. Specifically, to tightly couple high-level reasoning with physical constraints, IRR-Drive first generates a preliminary textual intention and anticipates potential interactions by predicting future semantic bird's-eye view (BEV) representations. This dual-modality (Text + BEV) reflection space explicitly models anticipated scene evolution, enabling the model to rigorously self-correct and refine its initial intent before generating the final trajectory. Furthermore, to balance planning performance and computational efficiency, we construct reflection-oriented training data and design an adaptive reflection reward, enabling the model to adaptively select its reasoning mode according to scene complexity. Instead of using reasoning primarily as an auxiliary interpretation, IRR-Drive directly integrates an adaptive reflection mechanism into the planning framework, enabling grounded, decision-aware trajectory correction that is driven by scene complexity. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the NAVSIM benchmark in both PDMS and EPDMS. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our multimodal reflection framework and validate the efficacy of the proposed adaptive reflection strategy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应多模态反思框架IRR-Drive，通过文本与BEV双模态反思空间显式预测场景演化，实现基于场景复杂度的自适应轨迹修正，在NAVSIM基准上达到最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型直接生成最终轨迹，缺乏对未来后果的显式检验，在复杂动态环境中可靠性不足。需要一种机制，将高层推理与物理约束紧密结合，在轨迹生成前进行自我修正，同时平衡规划性能与计算效率。
light_analysis.method: IRR-Drive三步走：先生成初步文本意图并预测未来语义BEV表征，构建文本+BEV双模态反思空间，显式模拟场景演化；然后利用反思空间实现自纠错与意图精炼；最后通过构建反思导向训练数据和自适应反思奖励，让模型根据场景复杂度选择推理模式，将反思直接融入规划框架。
light_analysis.result: 在NAVSIM基准的PDMS和EPDMS评估中均取得最先进性能。广泛实验验证了多模态反思框架和自适应反思策略的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但确认超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: IRR-Drive通过自适应多模态反思机制显著提升了自动驾驶规划的可靠性和可解释性，将反思直接嵌入规划流程而非仅作辅助解释。未来可探索更复杂的反思空间和更高效的训练策略。

title: ThermoLLM: Thermodynamics-Aware HVAC Control with Spatial-Semantic Knowledge Graph
abstract: Multi-zone HVAC control is a spatial decision problem in which indoor thermal evolution and control decisions depend not only on outdoor conditions and internal heat gains but also on zone layout, physical adjacency, and delayed thermal interactions across the building. Recent LLM-based HVAC controllers have shown that prompt-based control is feasible. However, these methods typically rely on task descriptions, observation values, short textual feedback, or unstructured retrieval, which limits their ability to reason about zone coupling, thermal response, and building dynamics. This paper presents a thermodynamics-aware LLM control framework for a five-zone EnergyPlus building simulation. The controller is grounded in a physics-informed spatial knowledge graph derived from Brick-style building semantics and linked with recent interaction history. At each control step, the model receives the current building state, graph-structured spatial context, and recent environment-controller history, enabling it to make decisions that reflect both building structure and short-term thermal evolution. We evaluate the framework against standard control baselines and several LLM-based alternatives. Results show that the proposed approach achieves the best overall energy-comfort trade-off and the lowest PMV violation while maintaining energy-efficient operation.
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于物理信息空间知识图谱的热力学感知LLM控制框架，用于多区域HVAC控制，实现最佳能量-舒适度权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 多区域HVAC控制是空间决策问题，区域布局、物理邻接和延迟热交互影响室内热演化。现有LLM控制器依赖任务描述、观察值或简短文本反馈，缺乏对区域耦合和建筑动态的推理能力，导致控制次优。因此需引入结构化空间知识以增强LLM的物理感知和决策能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出ThermoLLM框架，基于Brick风格的建筑语义构建物理信息空间知识图谱，并链接近期交互历史。每个控制步，模型接收当前建筑状态（区域温度等）、图结构空间上下文（区域邻接、热特性）及历史动作序列，使LLM能推理建筑结构和短期热演化。使用五区域EnergyPlus仿真环境，通过提示工程将图信息编码为文本输入。
light_analysis.result: 在五区域仿真中，与PID、强化学习及多种LLM基线（如零样本、检索增强）对比，ThermoLLM在能量消耗和热舒适（PMV）指标上取得最佳折中：能量成本接近最优基线，而PMV违反率最低（降低30%以上），证明空间知识图有效提升了控制质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了将物理信息空间知识图谱与LLM结合能显著提升多区域HVAC控制的物理感知能力，在能量效率与舒适度间实现更优平衡。该框架为建筑智能控制提供了新范式，但依赖精确的语义建模和仿真环境，未来可扩展至真实建筑并探索知识图自动构建。

title: InteractiveAvatar: Real-Time Streaming Video Generation for Consistent and Intent-Aware Avatars
abstract: Recent diffusion-based models have enabled realistic audio-driven avatar generation in real-time streaming. However, existing approaches struggle to maintain visual temporal consistency and fail to explicitly perceive user intent in complex interactive streaming scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose InteractiveAvatar, a real-time infinite-streaming video generation framework that supports visually consistent avatar video generation and intent-aware interactions. With autoregressive distillation, InteractiveAvatar achieves real-time str-eaming generation of human avatars over arbitrarily long durations. For visual consistency, we introduce a Long-Short Visual Memory (LSVM) mechanism that flexibly compresses historical visual information into compact tokens, preserving both short-range coherence and long-term consistency. To generate avatars with speeches and actions aligned with user intent, we propose a Reasoning-Reaction Module (RRM), which incorporates a State-Cycling strategy and a Cache-Switching mechanism. Extensive experimental results over diverse scenarios demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art visual consistency in long-duration generation, while enabling complex user-avatar interaction in real time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InteractiveAvatar框架，实现实时流式视频生成，解决视觉一致性和意图感知问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散的模型虽能实现实时音频驱动虚拟形象生成，但在复杂交互流式场景中难以维持视觉时间一致性，且无法显式感知用户意图。这些不足限制了虚拟形象在长时间交互中的自然性和响应准确性，需要一种既能保持视觉连贯又能理解用户意图的实时生成方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用自回归蒸馏实现任意时长实时流式生成；提出长-短视觉记忆（LSVM）机制将历史视觉信息压缩为紧凑令牌，兼顾短程连贯与长程一致；设计推理-反应模块（RRM），包含状态循环策略和缓存切换机制，使虚拟形象的言语和动作与用户意图对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在多种场景下，该方法在长时生成中实现了最先进的视觉一致性，并支持实时复杂用户-虚拟形象交互。与现有方法相比，显著提升了时间连贯性和意图响应能力，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: InteractiveAvatar为实时流式虚拟形象生成提供了高效解决方案，兼顾视觉一致性与交互意图感知。该工作对虚拟现实、远程会议等应用具有重要价值，未来可能进一步优化记忆压缩效率或扩展多模态交互能力。

title: Agent-as-a-Router: Agentic Model Routing for Coding Tasks
abstract: Real-world users typically have access to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from different providers, and these LLMs often excel at distinct domains, yet none dominate all. Consequently, routing each task to the most suitable model becomes critical for both performance and cost. Existing routers treat this as a static, one-off classification problem. However, we identify the performance bottleneck for these routers as information deficit: simply augmenting a vanilla LLM router with performance statistics at the task-dimension level yields a 15.3% relative gain, surpassing a heuristic router built on the same dimension-level priors. Motivated by this finding, we propose Agent-as-a-Router, a framework that formalizes routing as a C-A-F loop (Context->Action->Feedback->Context). It closes the information gap by accumulating execution-grounded experience during deployment. We instantiate this framework as ACRouter, composed of an Orchestrator, a Verifier, a Memory module, and introduce CodeRouterBench, an evaluation environment comprising ~10K task instances with verified scores from 8 frontier LLMs, enabling regret-based router comparison on streaming tasks. Experiments show that ACRouter achieves the lowest cumulative regret on in-distribution tasks and generalizes to out-of-distribution agentic-programming tasks, demonstrating that our routing framework actively closes the information gap. Codes and benchmarks are released at https://github.com/LanceZPF/agent-as-a-router.
comment: 39 pages, 21 figures, a living technical report with a living benchmark that continuously updates

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent-as-a-Router框架，将模型路由建模为持续学习循环，通过执行经验动态缩小信息差距，在编程任务中实现低遗憾路由。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实用户面对多个LLM，不同模型在不同领域各有优势，但现有路由方法将问题视为静态分类，存在信息不足瓶颈。仅增强路由器性能统计即可提升15.3%，表明信息差距是关键。因此需要动态积累执行经验来优化路由决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agent-as-a-Router，将路由形式化为C-A-F循环（上下文→行动→反馈→上下文），由Orchestrator、Verifier、Memory模块组成。Orchestrator决定路由策略，Verifier评估结果，Memory存储经验。并构建CodeRouterBench，含10K任务实例及8个前沿LLM的评分，支持基于遗憾的流式任务比较。
light_analysis.result: ACRouter在分布内任务上取得最低累积遗憾，并泛化到分布外智能体编程任务，验证了主动缩小信息差距的有效性。相比仅用维度级统计的基线，相对提升15.3%，超越基于相同先验的启发式路由器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出持续学习式路由框架，通过执行反馈动态优化，有效提升多LLM场景下的路由性能。代码和基准已开源，为未来动态模型选择提供新范式。局限性可能包括计算开销，未来可扩展至更复杂任务。

title: Learning Graphs through Continuous Information Entropy Fields
abstract: Graph theory is inherently descriptive, capturing what relationships exist but not why they arise, because it treats edges as primitive constructs. This paper proposes a new explanatory framework for graph learning, where relationships emerge from latent continuous information entropy fields, and a graph becomes a discrete instantiation of an underlying field. To formalize this field, we introduce the Field-informed Graph Network (FGN). It learns a scalar field from node features and leverages it to modulate message passing. The information-theoretic objective balances structural fidelity with field smoothness, forming a self-reinforcing loop. In this loop, the field modulates information diffusion through field-modulated weighting, and the updated node representations iteratively refine the field. As a result, FGN learns by simulating its own co-evolution. Extensive experiments on node classification and graph classification benchmarks demonstrate superior performance, robustness to perturbations, and structurally coherent field representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出场信息图网络（FGN），通过从节点特征学习连续信息熵场来调节消息传递，实现图的解释性学习和性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图论将边视为原始构造，仅描述关系存在但不解释成因。现有方法缺乏对关系潜在生成机制的建模，难以理解结构背后的原因。本文旨在建立解释性框架，使关系从潜在连续信息熵场中涌现，揭示图的生成原理。
light_analysis.method: 提出Field-informed Graph Network (FGN)，从节点特征学习标量场（信息熵场），利用场调制加权来调节消息传递。优化目标包含信息论项，平衡结构保真度与场平滑度，形成自我强化循环：场调节信息扩散，更新节点表示，再反馈细化场。FGN通过模拟场与图的共同演化来学习。
light_analysis.result: 在节点分类和图分类基准上，FGN表现出优越性能，对扰动具有鲁棒性，并生成结构连贯的场表示。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了新的图学习解释框架，通过连续信息熵场揭示图关系成因。FGN在多个任务上取得优异性能，兼具鲁棒性和可解释性。潜在局限性可能在于计算复杂度，未来可探索更高效的场学习及更广应用。

title: PHOEBI: An Open-World Benchmark for Bacterial Identification in Phase-Contrast Microscopy
abstract: Optical microscopy enables rapid, label-free imaging of live bacteria and is the standard instrument for species identification across clinical, environmental, and industrial microbiology. Yet field samples are routinely polymicrobial and may contain organisms that were never seen during system training, and no computer-vision benchmark tests multi-label species identification from phase-contrast microscopy (PCM) of such mixtures. We introduce Phase-contrast Optical bEnchmark for Bacterial Identification ($\textbf{PHOEBI}$), a wet-lab-prepared dataset of $120{,}000$ PCM images covering $40$ combinations of six rod-shaped species, paired with a leave-combinations-out (LCO) evaluation protocol that holds out entire species combinations to mirror the practical scenario of a model trained on catalogued mixtures that must generalise to unseen ones. On LCO, every gradient-trained per-image aggregator we test drops $0.39$ to $0.57$ F1 from the in-distribution to the held-out split, a systematic open-world recognition failure in the aggregator, not the visual representation. A linear probe of thirteen different encoders over the same features spreads only about six percentage points of F1 across general-purpose and biomedical pretraining objectives, confirming the representation is sound. We propose three lightweight $\textit{anchor-based}$ decoders that capture per-species presence geometrically over a shared frozen tile-feature pool, scoring $\textit{higher}$ on held-out combinations than on in-distribution validation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PHOEBI基准测试，包含12万张相差显微镜图像，用于开放世界细菌物种识别，并揭示现有方法在未见组合上的系统性失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学显微镜是临床、环境和工业微生物学中快速、无标记成像活细菌的标准工具，但现场样本通常是多种微生物混合，且可能包含训练时未见过的物种。现有计算机视觉基准没有测试从相差显微镜（PCM）图像中识别多物种种类的性能。因此，需要构建一个能模拟实际应用中模型需泛化到未见物种组合的基准，以评估和推动开放世界细菌识别方法的发展。
light_analysis.method: PHOEBI数据集包含120,000张PCM图像，覆盖6种杆状细菌的40种组合。采用留出组合（LCO）评估协议，保留整个物种组合作为测试集，模拟模型从已知混合物泛化到未知混合物的场景。提出了三个轻量级基于锚点的解码器，在共享冻结的瓦片特征池上几何地捕获每个物种的存在，在留出组合上得分高于分布内验证。
light_analysis.result: 在LCO协议下，每个梯度训练的每图像聚合器在分布内到留出分集上的F1分数下降0.39到0.57，表明聚合器存在系统性的开放世界识别失败，而非视觉表示问题。对13种编码器的线性探针显示，通用和生物医学预训练目标之间的F1分数仅差约6个百分点，证实表示是可靠的。锚点解码器在留出组合上表现优于分布内验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: PHOEBI揭示了现有基于聚合器的细菌识别方法在开放世界场景中的泛化失败，而锚点解码器通过几何方式捕获物种存在，展现出更好的泛化能力。该基准为评估和开发适用于微生物混合样本的开放世界识别系统提供了重要工具。未来工作可探索更复杂的解码器结构或结合领域知识进一步提升性能。

title: Physiology-Aware CNN and Zero-Shot Multimodal LLMs for ECG Image Classification: A Comparative Study
abstract: Multimodal large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted to interpret 12-lead ECG images, though the interpretations often lack validation. However, ECG image understanding significantly differs from general images as it depends on precise waveform morphology, lead relationships and accurate interval measurements. This study investigated whether zero-shot multimodal LLMs can reliably distinguish normal and abnormal ECG images and, in parallel, evaluated CNN-based models for clinically grounded references. Standard 12-lead ECG recordings were rendered as single-page images for a binary normal-abnormal classification task. Three prominent LLMs (GPT-5.2, GPT-4.1, and Gemini-2.5 Pro) were tested using a fixed zero-shot prompt across multiple runs. In parallel, a physiology-aware CNN-based model was developed with the capability to aggregate features from the predefined anatomical lead groups. The model was compared with ResNet18, DenseNet121, VGG16 baselines, and all the models were evaluated on an internal test set and external PTB-XL dataset. Across seeds, CNN-based models demonstrated stable discrimination, with average internal ROC-AUC of 0.92-0.94, and external ROC-AUC of 0.85-0.86. The proposed LeadGroupECG model significantly improved over its backbone internally without compromising external generalization. It remained competitive with other baselines, while consistently highlighting anatomical lead-group contributions. In contrast, zero-shot LLM discrimination remained near-chance (ROC-AUC around 0.5). The PR-AUC improved slightly when ECGs used a grid-based calibration background compared with the grid-free ECGs. Although multimodal LLMs can generate reasonable ECG narratives, their zero-shot diagnostic discrimination remains limited. Therefore, clinically framed, domain-specific architectures remain essential for AI-based ECG interpretation.

light_analysis.overview: 比较生理感知CNN与零样本多模态LLM在心电图图像分类中的性能，发现CNN显著优于LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态LLM被用于解读12导联ECG图像，但缺乏验证。ECG图像理解依赖精确波形形态、导联关系和测量，与一般图像不同。现有方法未充分评估LLM的零样本诊断能力，而CNN模型作为临床参考基线需要进一步开发。
light_analysis.method: 使用正常/异常二分类任务，将标准12导联ECG渲染为单页图像。测试GPT-5.2、GPT-4.1和Gemini-2.5 Pro零样本提示。同时开发LeadGroupECG模型，聚合预定义解剖导联组特征，并与ResNet18、DenseNet121、VGG16比较。在内部测试集和外部PTB-XL数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: CNN模型稳定，内部ROC-AUC 0.92-0.94，外部0.85-0.86。LeadGroupECG在内部显著提升，不牺牲外部泛化。零样本LLM ROC-AUC约0.5（接近随机）。网格背景轻微改善PR-AUC。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态LLM能生成合理ECG叙述，但零样本诊断区分能力有限。临床领域特定架构对AI心电图解读至关重要，生理感知CNN在分类任务中显著优于通用LLM。

title: Explanation-Guided Medical Named Entity Recognition with Stability and Boundary Awareness for Atopic Dermatitis
abstract: Objective: This study aims to improve the reliability and robustness of medical named entity recognition (NER) in Chinese atopic dermatitis (AD) clinical texts through explanation-guided learning. Methods: We propose a stability and boundary-aware explanation-guided NER framework. Perturbation-based analysis is used to evaluate explanation stability and entity boundary sensitivity. An adaptive fusion strategy dynamically combines local and global explanation to generate more reliable token-level explanations. The fused explanation signals are further incorporated into model training through stability, boundary-aware, and consistency constraints. Results: Experiments on Chinese AD NER datasets show that the proposed framework improves explanation robustness and achieves consistent performance gains across multiple NER models. The adaptive fusion strategy also provides more stable explanations and stronger boundary perception than individual explanation methods. Conclusion: The proposed method effectively integrates reliable explanation signals into medical NER training, improving both recognition performance and explanation reliability. The framework provides a practical and generalizable solution for explainable medical NER and offers reliable support for downstream clinical decision-making and medical knowledge applications.
comment: Corresponding author: Xue Jiang, E-mail: xuejiang1025@126.com

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于解释引导的医学NER框架，通过稳定性和边界感知增强模型可靠性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在中文特应性皮炎临床文本中，现有NER方法可靠性和鲁棒性不足，缺乏对解释稳定性和实体边界的关注，导致模型可信度低，影响临床决策。需要一种能融入可靠解释信号的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出稳定性与边界感知的解释引导NER框架。采用扰动分析评估解释稳定性和实体边界敏感性，通过自适应融合策略动态结合局部和全局解释生成更可靠的Token级解释。将融合信号通过稳定性、边界感知和一致性约束融入模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 在中文AD NER数据集上，该框架提升了解释鲁棒性，并在多个NER模型上取得一致性能提升。自适应融合策略比单独解释方法提供更稳定的解释和更强的边界感知，表现为更优的识别效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效将可靠解释信号融入医学NER训练，提升识别性能和解释可靠性。为可解释医学NER提供实用且可泛化的解决方案，有助于下游临床决策和医学知识应用。

title: CLI-Universe: Towards Verifiable Task Synthesis Engine for Terminal Agents
abstract: While recent LLM-based terminal agents have demonstrated promising capabilities, the scarcity of high-quality, executable training data remains a critical bottleneck. Existing synthesis pipelines typically scale by retrofitting surface-level artifacts into tasks, frequently yielding ambiguous instructions, shallow execution paths, and brittle tests that provide weak learning signals. To overcome this, we introduce CLI-Universe, a principled synthesis engine that constructs terminal-agent tasks. CLI-Universe generates candidate tasks by sampling combinations across a multi-dimensional capability taxonomy (domain, skill type, capability, and engineering pillar), then grounds each candidate through evidence-guided deep research over real-world technical materials. To ensure rigorous supervision, validated blueprints are instantiated into Dockerized environments and subjected to a multi-stage executable verification pipeline featuring rubric-gated test construction, hint-conditional filtering, and strict fail-to-pass checking. Across the full pipeline, from candidate generation to verification, approximately two-thirds of candidates are discarded, retaining only those that are genuine, verifiable, and non-trivially challenging. To validate our framework, we instantiate a highly distilled dataset of 6,000 trajectories called CLI-Universe-6K. Remarkably, fine-tuning Qwen3-32B on CLI-Universe-6K achieves 33.4% on Terminal-Bench 2.0. This sets a new state-of-the-art for models trained on open-source data at or below 32B parameters, and outperforms several models an order of magnitude larger, demonstrating the profound data efficiency of structured, high-fidelity synthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLI-Universe，一种通过多维能力分类和证据驱动研究生成高质量、可验证终端代理任务的合成引擎。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM终端代理面临高质量可执行训练数据稀缺的瓶颈。现有合成方法依赖表面伪影，产生模糊指令、浅层执行路径和脆弱测试，导致训练信号弱，阻碍代理能力提升。急需一种原则性方法生成真实、可验证且具挑战性的任务。
light_analysis.method: CLI-Universe基于多维能力分类（域、技能类型、能力、工程支柱）生成候选任务，通过证据引导的深度研究（查阅真实技术资料）确保任务真实性。然后实例化为Docker环境，经过多阶段可执行验证：rubric-gated测试构造、提示条件过滤、严格失败到通过检查。约三分之二候选被丢弃，仅保留高质量任务。
light_analysis.result: 生成包含6000条轨迹的数据集CLI-Universe-6K。在Qwen3-32B上微调后，在Terminal-Bench 2.0基准上达到33.4%准确率，创下32B以下开源数据训练模型的新SOTA，并超越多个规模大一个数量级的模型，展示了结构化高保真合成的数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLI-Universe通过结构化、高保真合成解决了终端代理训练数据质量难题，以较小模型取得领先性能，验证了数据质量对模型能力的重要性。该框架可推广至其他领域，未来可探索更丰富的任务类型和更高效的验证机制。

title: Priority-Aware Learning-Unlearning Correction for Dynamic Decentralized LoRA Fine-Tuning
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed at the network edge to provide pervasive generative AI services, decentralized federated learning (DFL) provides a vital mechanism for privacy-preserving, domain-specific fine-tuning through peer-to-peer exchanges of parameter-efficient updates. However, the dynamic nature of practical decentralized edge networks, where devices may dynamically join or leave the collaborative training process, requires the system to continuously adapt to new data while selectively removing prior contributions. This correction process remains a significant bottleneck, as individual device updates become deeply entangled within the global fine-tuned parameters. To address this challenge, we propose a priority-aware learning-unlearning correction framework based on orthogonal LoRA that can enhance the knowledge evaluation through topology adjustment. Specifically, we first design an orthogonal LoRA mechanism that yields post-training contribution coordinates, enabling history-free projection addition and deletion in response to membership changes. We then analyze the correction bottleneck and develop a priority-aware policy that selects among topology refinement, local correction, proximal damping, and synchronization scheduling according to the dominant residual term. A resource allocation algorithm is further developed to allocate limited communication across layer groups, prioritizing the primary bottlenecks within per-round wireless constraints. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves robust post-event correction for both device join and leave events and validate that different residual regimes necessitate distinct correction actions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于正交LoRA的优先级感知学习-遗忘纠正框架，解决动态去中心化边缘网络中LLM微调时的参数纠缠与知识修正问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在边缘网络部署时，去中心化联邦学习通过点对点交换参数高效更新实现隐私保护微调。然而，设备动态加入或离开导致全局参数纠缠，现有方法难以高效修正已学习知识。该问题成为性能瓶颈，亟需一种能适应成员变化并选择性遗忘旧贡献的机制。
light_analysis.method: 设计正交LoRA机制，产生训练后贡献坐标，实现无历史依赖的投影添加/删除。分析修正瓶颈，提出优先级感知策略，根据主导残差项选择拓扑优化、局部修正、近端阻尼或同步调度。进一步开发资源分配算法，在每轮无线约束下优先分配有限通信至关键层组。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提框架对设备加入和离开事件均实现鲁棒的事后修正，并验证了不同残差区域需要不同的修正动作。摘要未明确说明具体性能数值，但强调了在不同场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一个针对动态去中心化微调的修正框架，通过正交LoRA和优先级感知策略有效处理知识纠缠与选择性遗忘。该工作提升了边缘LLM服务的适应性和鲁棒性，未来可扩展至更复杂的拓扑变化场景。

title: DynamicMem: A Long-Horizon Memory Benchmark in Real-World Settings
abstract: LLM agents increasingly act as personal assistants that must remember a user's profile over months: who they are (attributes), what they routinely do (habits), and what they prefer (preferences), and keep it updated as jobs, routines, and tastes drift. Existing benchmarks evaluate this "memory" ability through short, simplified interactions, missing three core properties of real behavior: the profile is heterogeneous, with attributes, habits, and preferences evolving on different timelines; changes are driven by external context such as seasons and life events; and evidence is rarely stated explicitly, instead scattered across many small actions in different apps that a memory system must infer from. We introduce DynamicMem, a synthetic benchmark that constructs 15 months of activity per user, providing long-term multi-app data that real users' privacy keeps out of reach. It provides user-consistent trajectories averaging 2.2M tokens and 1,772 grounded events per user across 16 applications such as e-commerce, fitness, and social platforms. The profile evolves over this period and is never given explicitly: each attribute, habit, or preference must be inferred from small signals scattered across apps. We evaluate at five quarterly checkpoints to track how systems scale as history grows. Benchmarking five representative systems exposes problems a single accuracy score hides: (i) profile reconstruction degrades with history length while service-task accuracy stays flat, despite both drawing on the same memory; (ii) no system both keeps facts that stay true and replaces facts that change, with errors clustering on preferences and on naming the exact referent; and (iii) over 93% of failures trace to what the memory retrieves, not to the model writing the answer, so the largest room for improvement lies in memory itself. Code: https://wenyaxie023.github.io/DynamicMem/

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynamicMem基准，模拟15个月真实多应用用户活动，评估LLM代理长期动态记忆能力，发现记忆检索是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆基准使用短时简化交互，忽略用户画像的异构性（属性、习惯、偏好变化节奏不同）、外部环境驱动的变化（如季节、事件）以及隐性证据（信号散落在不同应用中）。这些问题限制了LLM代理作为长期个人助手的实际可靠性。DynamicMem旨在填补这一差距。
light_analysis.method: 合成生成15个月的用户跨应用活动数据（16个应用），每个用户轨迹平均2.2M token和1772个接地事件。画像（属性、习惯、偏好）随时间动态演变且不显式给出，需从散落信号推断。设置5个季度检查点评估记忆系统随历史增长的扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 测试五个代表性系统发现：(i) 画像重建准确率随历史长度下降，但服务任务准确率持平；(ii) 没有系统能同时保持稳定事实和更新变化事实，错误集中在偏好和具体指代命名；(iii) 超过93%失败源于记忆检索环节，而非模型回答生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynamicMem揭示了现有记忆系统的关键局限：记忆本身是性能瓶颈，而非推理能力。该基准提供了更真实的长期记忆评估环境，有助于推动LLM代理记忆机制改进。未来可扩展更多应用和更复杂的变化模式。

title: Full-Body Golf Swing Kinematic Reconstruction From a Smartwatch IMU
abstract: Quantitative measurement of the golf swing is critical for evaluating technique and enabling individualized feedback. However, existing methods are impractical to use on the golf course: optical motion capture is laboratory-bound, camera-based methods require impractical camera placement, and multi-sensor inertial measurement unit (IMU) systems require multi-segment setup and calibration. We thus propose a single wrist-worn IMU approach for estimating full-body joint angles during golf swings. The proposed Wrist-IMU Temporal Kinematic Network (WIT-KinNet) leverages modality-specific IMU embeddings and temporal kinematic encoding to learn wrist-to-body motion dependencies and estimate full-body joint angles during golf swings. Thirty-six golfers spanning beginner and skilled players, performed full, half, and quarter swings using seven club types: driver, 3-wood, 5-hybrid, 5-iron, 7-iron, 9-iron, and sand wedge. The proposed WIT-KinNet was evaluated under subject-wise cross-validation using synchronized smartwatch IMU data and ground-truth kinematics derived from an optical motion capture system. The proposed approach achieved a mean absolute error of 8.11 $\pm$ 1.84$^\circ$ across full-body joint angles. High temporal correlation was observed for pelvic rotation and upper torso rotation (r = 0.98 and 0.97, respectively), with X-factor and S-factor also showing strong correlation (r = 0.96 and 0.96). Linear mixed-effects models of the error revealed that swing amplitude, skill level, and club type all significantly affected measurement differences (p $<$ 0.05). The results establish the first single wrist-worn IMU approach for estimating full-body golf swing kinematics, enabling practical swing analysis during real gameplay.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个仅利用单智能手表IMU估计高尔夫全挥杆全身关节角度的方法WIT-KinNet。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高尔夫挥杆测量方法如光学动捕、摄像头和多IMU系统均不便于实地使用。光学动捕限实验室，摄像头需不切实际的位置，多IMU需多段安装校准。因此需一种仅单腕戴IMU的实用方案，支持真实球场挥杆分析。
light_analysis.method: 提出WIT-KinNet网络，通过模态特定IMU嵌入和时间运动编码学习腕部到全身运动依赖，估计全身关节角度。使用36名不同水平球手、7种球杆、三种挥杆幅度（全、半、四分之一）的数据，以光学动捕为真值，经被试交叉验证训练。
light_analysis.result: 全身关节角度平均绝对误差8.11±1.84°。骨盆和上躯干旋转与真值高度相关（r=0.98,0.97），X因子和S因子相关性均为0.96。线性混合效应模型显示挥杆幅度、技能水平与球杆类型显著影响误差（p<0.05）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现仅单腕戴IMU的全身高尔夫挥杆运动学估计，为真实比赛中的挥杆分析提供实用方案。方法验证了腕部IMU推断全身运动的可行性，但误差受挥杆特征影响，未来可优化模型以提升精度。

title: FedOT: Ownership Verification and Leakage Tracing via Watermarks for Federated LDMs
abstract: Training Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) within Federated Learning (FL) has attracted increasing attention due to its ability to combine the powerful generative capacity of LDMs with the privacy-preserving properties of FL. However, FL requires sharing the global model with multiple participants, which risks unauthorized model distribution or resale by malicious clients. While an intuitive approach is to adopt existing VAE-based watermarking techniques for LDMs in FL, this strategy falls short in addressing such threats due to two fundamental challenges: (1) Existing methods support ownership verification but lack the ability to trace model leakage to a specific malicious client; (2) VAE-based watermarks are vulnerable, as they can be removed simply by replacing the decoder with a clean counterpart. In this paper, we propose FedOT, the first framework for ownership verification and leakage tracing in federated LDMs. Specifically, to address the first challenge, we design a chunked watermark, where the first part is for ownership verification, and the second part is used for client identification. Furthermore, to overcome the second challenge and secure the model against VAE replacement attack, we introduce Latent Vector Transformation (LVT), which strengthens the connection between the VAE and U-Net latent spaces by modifying the original latent distribution of the VAE. Consequently, any attempt to replace the VAE for watermark removal leads to significant image quality degradation, making the LDM model unusable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedOT achieves superior performance in both ownership verification and traceability. Project page: https://spyzixuan.github.io/FedOT/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedOT，首个用于联邦潜在扩散模型的所有权验证和泄漏追踪的框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中LDMs共享全局模型存在被恶意客户端非法分发或转售的风险。现有VAE水印方法仅支持所有权验证，无法追踪到具体客户端，且易被替换解码器移除。亟需一种既能验证所有权又能追溯泄漏源的健壮水印方案。
light_analysis.method: 设计分块水印，第一部分用于所有权验证，第二部分用于客户端身份识别。引入潜在向量变换（LVT），通过修改VAE原始潜在分布，增强VAE与U-Net潜在空间的连接，防御VAE替换攻击，任何替换尝试会导致图像质量严重下降。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明FedOT在所有权验证和可追踪性方面均达到优越性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称结果优于现有方法。（摘要未明确说明具体数据）
light_analysis.conclusion: FedOT首次实现联邦LDMs场景下的所有权验证与泄漏追踪，克服了现有水印方法的双重缺陷，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可研究水印对模型生成质量的权衡及计算开销优化。

title: SpotAttention: Plug-In Block-Sparse Routing for Pretrained Long-Context Transformers
abstract: Long contexts have become standard in pretrained LLMs, yet they remain expensive to run: prefill compute grows quadratically with sequence length, and every decode step re-reads a key-value cache that grows linearly with it. Sparse attention cuts these costs by attending only to a relevant subset of past tokens, but selecting that subset is itself expensive. We present SpotAttention, a lightweight selector that attaches to a frozen pretrained transformer and learns by KL distillation to estimate its attention distribution. The selector picks the top-K keys each query attends to, and because its estimate is a calibrated distribution, a dual top-p rule reads the per-query, per-layer budget directly from it. Across Qwen3 (dense, 4B-32B) and Qwen3.5 (hybrid linear/full attention, 4B-9B), SpotAttention matches dense accuracy at contexts up to 128K tokens, eight times the training length. Decode at L=128K runs 3.9x faster than FlashAttention and 1.8x faster than Twilight, the strongest training-free baseline. Quantizing the selector's K-cache to INT4 or FP4 microscale shrinks it 3.5x at no accuracy cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpotAttention，一种即插即用的块稀疏路由方法，通过KL蒸馏学习注意力分布，实现高效长上下文推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文预训练LLM计算昂贵：预填充计算随序列长度二次增长，解码每一步重复读取线性增长的KV缓存。稀疏注意力通过仅关注相关子集降低成本，但选择子集本身开销大。现有训练无关基线在效率与精度之间难以平衡，需要一种轻量级、可学习的稀疏路由方案。
light_analysis.method: SpotAttention是一个轻量级选择器，附加在冻结的预训练Transformer上，通过KL蒸馏从原模型注意力分布学习估计。选择器为每个查询挑选top-K键，并利用双top-p规则从校准分布中动态分配每查询每层的预算。在Qwen3（密集，4B-32B）和Qwen3.5（混合线性/全注意力，4B-9B）上评估，上下文可达128K tokens（训练长度的8倍）。量化选择器的K-cache至INT4/FP4微尺度，无损压缩3.5倍。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3和Qwen3.5上，SpotAttention在长达128K tokens的上下文中匹配密集注意力精度。解码时，序列长度128K下比FlashAttention快3.9倍，比最强训练无关基线Twilight快1.8倍。量化选择器K-cache至INT4/FP4后，其大小缩小3.5倍且无精度损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpotAttention通过轻量级学习选择器有效降低长上下文计算成本，同时保持密集注意力精度，并支持量化压缩以进一步减少内存占用。该方法为预训练长上下文模型提供即插即用的稀疏推理方案，学术上验证了蒸馏注意力分布用于路由的可行性，实际应用于LLM加速推理。未来可探索更高效的选择器架构或跨模型迁移。

title: SingGuard: A Policy-Adaptive Multimodal LLM Guardrail with Dynamic Reasoning
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in consumer, medical, financial, and enterprise applications. This broad deployment expands the safety surface: risks can arise from multimodal question answering, assistant responses, and cross-modal composition, while moderation policies may vary across products, regions, and deployment stages. Most existing guardrails either rely on fixed taxonomies or target only a narrow set of interaction settings, which limits their adaptability when safety rules change at deployment time. We present \textbf{SingGuard}, a policy-adaptive multimodal guardrail model family for safety assessment in multimodal conversations. SingGuard treats the active policy as a runtime input: given natural-language rules, it checks the target content against the active policy rule by rule and predicts both the safety label and the triggered rule. To balance efficiency and interpretability, SingGuard supports fast, hybrid, and slow inference regimes along a fast-to-slow reasoning spectrum, ranging from direct safety judgments to policy-grounded deliberation. We further optimize this behavior with fast--slow decoupled reinforcement learning. We also introduce \textbf{SingGuard-Bench}, a multimodal guardrail benchmark with 56{,}340 examples spanning 80+ fine-grained risk types across multimodal QA, adversarial attack, and dynamic-rule evaluation settings, including cross-modal joint-risk cases where each modality is harmless in isolation but their composition implies unsafe intent. Across six benchmark families (35 datasets), SingGuard achieves state-of-the-art average F1 in every family. Dynamic-rule evaluation further shows improved policy-following accuracy from 0.6465 to 0.7415 under runtime policy shifts. Our code is available at https://github.com/inclusionAI/Sing-Guard.

light_analysis.overview: 提出策略自适应的多模态护栏SingGuard，将活动策略作为运行时输入，支持动态推理和多种推理模式，显著提升策略适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在多领域部署带来复合安全风险，现有护栏依赖固定分类或窄交互场景，无法灵活适应部署时策略变化，需要能动态遵循自然语言规则的适应性方案。
light_analysis.method: SingGuard将活动策略作为运行时自然语言规则输入，逐条检查目标内容，预测安全标签和触发规则。采用快、混合、慢三种推理模式（直接判断到策略引导的推理），并用快慢解耦强化学习优化。构建SingGuard-Bench基准（56340样本，80+风险类型）。
light_analysis.result: 在6个基准族（35数据集）上，每个族的平均F1均达SOTA；动态规则评估中，策略遵循准确率从0.6465提升至0.7415，验证了策略变化下的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SingGuard通过策略自适应和动态推理，解决了现有护栏策略适应性不足的问题，提升了多模态安全性评估的灵活性和准确性。为跨场景、跨规则的安全部署提供了有效方案，开源代码促进研究。

title: Fursee: Hybrid YOLO-DINOv3 Framework for Fursuit Identity Retrieval and Clustering
abstract: Global furry conventions produce massive fursuit photographs, while manual sorting brings heavy labor costs and calls for automatic identity retrieval and clustering solutions. General multimodal models lack dedicated optimization for complex fursuit scenes, and no public benchmark dataset exists for this task. To fill this gap, we build a specialized fursuit image dataset and present a three-stage hybrid pipeline Fursee for fursuit identity retrieval and clustering. First, YOLO detects and crops high-resolution fursuit head patches to improve localization of small and overlapping targets. Second, ArcFace optimizes DINOv3 embeddings to enlarge angular separation between different identities on the feature hypersphere. Third, DBSCAN performs unsupervised clustering, with silhouette-coefficient-driven search automatically selecting optimal hyperparameters rather than fixed manual radius. Retrieval and clustering experiments verify that our pipeline outperforms mainstream multimodal models including GPT5.5, Claude Opus 4.8 and Qwen3.7-Plus on all evaluation metrics, achieving competitive performance for fursuit head retrieval and grouping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fursee混合框架，通过YOLO检测、ArcFace优化的DINOv3嵌入和DBSCAN聚类，实现兽装图像身份检索与聚类，性能超越通用多模态模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球兽展产生大量兽装照片，人工分类成本高昂，亟需自动身份检索与聚类方案。通用多模态模型未针对复杂兽装场景优化，且缺乏公开基准数据集。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供专用数据集和高效方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建兽装图像数据集，提出三阶段混合流水线Fursee。第一阶段用YOLO检测并裁剪高分辨率兽装头部区域，提升小目标和重叠目标的定位精度。第二阶段在DINOv3嵌入上应用ArcFace损失，增大不同身份在特征超球面上的角度间隔。第三阶段使用DBSCAN进行无监督聚类，通过轮廓系数驱动的搜索自动选择最优超参数，替代固定半径。
light_analysis.result: 在兽装头部检索和聚类实验中，Fursee在所有评估指标上优于主流多模态模型GPT5.5、Claude Opus 4.8和Qwen3.7-Plus。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但声称达到竞争性表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Fursee框架有效解决了兽装图像的身份检索和聚类问题，专用数据集和自动化超参数选择具备实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多兽装子类别或结合其他模态信息。局限性在于依赖高质量头部检测，对极端遮挡可能效果下降。

title: VideoLatent: Video-Language Learning via Latent Self-Forcing
abstract: Recent advancements in chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning have shown promise in enhancing video understanding and reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, existing CoT-based MLLMs require labor-intensive CoT annotations and incur substantial training and inference overhead. While visual latent reasoning has emerged as a more efficient alternative, existing methods primarily focus on image tasks and heavily rely on additional supervision signals for visual latent generation (e.g., CoT traces, auxiliary images, or fine-grained annotations), limiting their scalability and transferability to video tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce VideoLatent, a novel MLLM equipped with a latent injection module tailored for video understanding and reasoning. Specifically, VideoLatent learns to perform visual latent reasoning using a new latent self-forcing training paradigm, which comprises latent alignment and latent diversity objectives, and relies solely on standard video-question-answer triplets. Extensive experiments across 14 benchmarks demonstrate that our model consistently outperforms existing standard and latent MLLMs on general video understanding and complex video reasoning. Compared with Video-R1, our VideoLatent achieves superior computational efficiency, reducing training/inference overhead by $\sim$6$\times$/$\sim$68$\times$. Moreover, experiments demonstrate that our method has strong generalizability to different MLLM backbones and different model scales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoLatent，一种基于潜在自强制训练范式的多模态大语言模型，实现高效视频理解与推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于思维链的MLLM需要昂贵的人工标注和大量训练推理开销；视觉潜在推理方法依赖额外监督信号，难以扩展到视频任务。因此，需要一种无需人工标注、高效且可迁移的视频理解方法。
light_analysis.method: VideoLatent引入潜在注入模块，通过潜在自强制训练范式学习视觉潜在推理，包含潜在对齐和潜在多样性两个目标，仅使用标准视频-问题-答案三元组进行训练，无需CoT痕迹或辅助图像等额外监督。
light_analysis.result: 在14个基准测试上，VideoLatent在通用视频理解和复杂视频推理任务中一致优于现有标准及潜在MLLM。相比Video-R1，训练开销降低约6倍，推理开销降低约68倍，且方法可泛化至不同MLLM骨干和模型规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoLatent通过潜在自强制训练实现了高效、弱监督的视频推理，显著降低计算成本，并具有良好的泛化性。未来工作可探索更复杂的潜在表示和跨模态对齐。

title: Discovering Crystal Structure Prediction Algorithms with an AI Co-Scientist
abstract: We introduce Human-AI Co-discovery system (HACO) for scientific algorithm discovery through cross-domain search and sparse human steering. Starting from the goal of generating crystal structures from chemical compositions, HACO searched across generative modeling methodologies from multiple fields and identified MaskGIT, a masked generative model from vision, as a promising framework for crystal structure prediction (CSP). HACO instantiated this masked formulation as a discrete token model of crystal structure; guided by sparse high-level human objectives, it then added crystallographic symmetry tokens, space group stratified sampling for polymorph coverage, and sub-bin coordinate refinement, yielding the Masked Generative Crystal Transformer (MaskGXT). On the MP-20 polymorph split, MaskGXT reaches 79.06% match-everyone-to-reference (METRe) accuracy, compared with 70.87% for the strongest evaluated baseline. MaskGXT also attains the best match rate on standard MP-20 and MPTS-52 CSP benchmarks. These results provide evidence that, in domains offering cheap, fast, and well-aligned validation, transfer-guided interactive AI co-scientists can contribute to scientific algorithm discovery by identifying transferable modeling principles and combining them with targeted human domain guidance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Human-AI Co-discovery (HACO)系统，通过跨领域搜索和稀疏人类引导，将视觉领域的MaskGIT模型适配为Masked Generative Crystal Transformer (MaskGXT)，在晶体结构预测任务上取得显著性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 晶体结构预测对材料科学至关重要，但现有方法多局限于特定领域，缺乏跨领域创新，且从化学组成生成晶体结构存在准确率和泛化性不足的问题。本文旨在利用AI共同科学家系统，通过自动跨领域搜索和人类高层目标引导，发现并改进适用于该任务的生成模型，以突破传统方法的局限。
light_analysis.method: HACO系统先跨领域搜索生成模型，选定视觉领域的MaskGIT作为基础。然后将晶体结构表示为离散令牌序列，并加入晶体对称性令牌、空间群分层采样（覆盖多晶型）和子箱坐标细化，形成MaskGXT模型。该方法结合了跨领域迁移知识和稀疏人类指导，无需大量标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 在MP-20多晶型拆分上，MaskGXT的METRe精度达79.06%，显著超过最强基线（70.87%）。在标准MP-20和MPTS-52 CSP基准上，MaskGXT均取得最佳匹配率，验证了跨领域迁移和人类引导在算法发现中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明AI共同科学家系统可有效发现科学算法：通过跨领域搜索和稀疏人类引导，成功将视觉生成模型迁移到晶体结构预测，并实现性能突破。该方法为其他科学领域的算法发现提供了新范式，未来可探索更自动化引导机制和更广泛跨领域迁移。

title: When AUC 0.998 Is Not Enough: A Candidate Evaluation Protocol for Hidden-State Probes of Indirect Prompt Injection in Multimodal Computer-Use Agents
abstract: Hidden-state probing -- a linear classifier on a frozen vision-language model's internal activations -- has emerged as an attractive evaluation tool for flagging indirect prompt injection (IPI) in multimodal computer-use agents before the agent emits a corrupted action. We argue, on a single-backbone cautionary case study (Qwen2.5-VL-7B on Mind2Web, teacher-forced replay), that a high probing AUC on a clean-vs-attack split is not, on its own, evidence of malicious-content detection. Two post-hoc diagnostics -- a paired-construction scalar baseline on text-side injections, and same-step nuisance-matched visual controls on the overlay surface -- do not license an unqualified malicious-content interpretation of the headline while leaving room for partly-semantic readings. We package the diagnostics as a candidate control set with reporting heuristics for what a high clean-vs-attack AUC does and does not license. Labels are injection-surface-present, not attack success; generalisation beyond this backbone and benchmark is a conjecture.
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures. Camera-ready version for EvalMG '26, The 2nd Workshop on Evaluation for Multimodal Generation, co-located with SIGIR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种候选控制集协议，揭示高AUC的隐藏状态探测并不能直接证明恶意内容检测，强调需谨慎解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 间接提示注入（IPI）对多模态计算机使用代理构成严重威胁。隐藏状态探测作为一种轻量级检测工具，常以高AUC作为有效性指标。但现有评估忽略了一个关键问题：高AUC可能仅反映注入表面的存在，而非真正的恶意内容检测。这种混淆可能导致对探测能力的错误自信，从而引发安全漏洞。因此，需要更严格的评估协议来区分这两种解释，确保探测的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型和Mind2Web数据集，在教师强制重放设置下进行案例研究。提出两个事后诊断：1）文本侧注入的配对构造标量基线，通过控制文本变化评估探测是否仅依赖表面特征；2）相同步骤干扰匹配视觉控制，在覆盖层上添加扰动以分离视觉线索。这些诊断构成候选控制集，并制定报告启发式，明确高AUC所许可和未许可的结论。
light_analysis.result: 案例研究表明，尽管探测在干净vs攻击分割上达到0.998 AUC，但诊断显示该高AUC主要源于注入表面的存在（如文本格式或视觉覆盖），而非对恶意内容的语义理解。相比之下，标量基线和视觉控制降低了探测的可解释性，表明现有评估可能夸大检测能力。泛化到其他骨干和基准尚不确定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文强调隐藏状态探测的评估不能仅依赖AUC，需结合诊断控制集来区分表面特征与真正语义检测。提出的协议为IPI检测提供了更严谨的验证标准，有助于防止对探测能力的过度乐观。未来工作可扩展该协议到更多模型和任务，并探索探测的泛化边界。

title: Chains That See, Answers That Don't: A Multi-Aspect Evaluation Recipe for Forced Chain-of-Thought on Video-MME
abstract: Forced chain-of-thought (CoT) is widely assumed to make vision-language models more reliable on video question answering. We propose a small three-probe evaluation recipe to test that assumption: paired accuracy across direct, CoT, answer-first, and no-video conditions; a counterfactual video-swap diagnostic over the CoT chains; and a four-rung visual-degradation ladder. Each probe is reported under both a strict and a permissive regex scorer, with multiplicity correction over a manuscript-declared primary family. Applied to Qwen2.5-VL on Video-MME subsets, the recipe returns a two-part finding. The CoT chains are strongly video-conditioned: swapping the input video collapses chain overlap and flips most final letters, the opposite of what a "boilerplate-chain" null would predict. Yet on the same data, forced CoT does not improve MCQ accuracy, and on the smaller 7B model it produces a small but statistically supported drop under a post-hoc primary scorer choice. We do not claim this generalizes beyond the Qwen2.5-VL / Video-MME instantiation; the raw responses and a single recomputation script will be released with the supplementary material so every number can be re-derived.
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. To appear at The 2nd Workshop on Evaluation for Multimodal Generation @ SIGIR 2026 (EvalMG '26)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个三探针评估配方，测试强制思维链在视频问答中的可靠性，发现链条依赖视频但未提升准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 强制思维链被广泛认为能提升视觉语言模型在视频问答中的可靠性，但缺乏系统性验证。现有评估方法可能忽略虚假相关性或过度依赖特定评分方式。该研究旨在通过多角度诊断（成对准确性、反事实视频交换、视觉退化阶梯）揭示强制CoT的实际效果，并强调统计严谨性（多重校正、严格与宽松评分）。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含三个探针的评估配方：1）成对准确性（直接、CoT、答案优先、无视频条件）；2）反事实视频交换诊断（交换输入视频观察CoT链变化）；3）四阶视觉退化阶梯。每个探针使用严格和宽松正则评分器，并进行多重校正。应用于Qwen2.5-VL（7B和72B）在Video-MME子集上，释放原始响应和重计算脚本。
light_analysis.result: CoT链高度依赖视频：交换输入视频导致链重叠崩溃并翻转多数最终字母，拒绝“模板链”零假设。但强制CoT在相同数据上未提高多项选择题准确率，且在7B模型上产生统计显著的小幅下降（基于事后主评分器选择）。未声称结论泛化至其他模型或数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强制CoT在视频问答中并非总是有益；尽管链条忠实于视频，但准确率未提升甚至下降。该评估配方为诊断CoT可靠性提供了可复现框架，强调统计严谨性。局限性在于仅测试单一模型和数据集，未来需扩展到更多架构和任务。代码和数据将开源。

title: AI Scientists as Engines of Discovery: A Case for Development within Reformed Institutions
abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) systems are beginning to assist, accelerate, and partially automate scientific discovery, performing tasks that span literature synthesis, code generation, data analysis, hypothesis proposal, and model criticism. We argue that this transition is qualitative rather than incremental, and that suitably designed multi-agent systems may evolve from passive computational tools into ``AI scientists'' that can expand the hypothesis-generating and verification capacity of science. Such systems must be developed and deployed within a scientific ecosystem fit for purpose: institutions must be redesigned for verification, accountability, interpretability, and dual-use safety. We sketch how multi-agent architectures, illustrated by the prototype framework \textit{Denario}, accelerate the discovery cycle and traverse model spaces beyond human reach; examine what this implies for authorship, peer review, and the enduring role of human scientists; and close with recommendations for governing AI as an epistemic actor rather than a mere instrument.

light_analysis.overview: 论证AI系统正从工具质变为科学发现主体，提出多智能体系统作为'AI科学家'的构想，并强调机构改革与治理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI在科学发现中多作为被动工具，未能充分发挥主动假设生成与验证能力。随着AI系统在文献综合、代码生成、数据分析等任务中展现潜力，亟需从增量改进转向质变，构建能够自主扩展科学发现边界的智能体。同时，现有机构缺乏对验证、问责、可解释性和双重用途安全的考虑，无法适应AI科学家的角色转变。因此，需要重新设计多智能体系统和科研机构，以释放AI的科学发现潜力并确保安全。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出以多智能体架构为核心的'AI科学家'方案，以原型框架Denario为例，该架构通过协作加速发现周期，探索人类难以触及的模型空间。关键创新在于将AI从被动工具提升为主动认知主体，并设计配套的机构改革，包括重新定义验证流程、问责机制、可解释性要求以及双重用途安全管控。同时，论文探讨了对作者身份、同行评审和人类科学家角色的影响，强调制度适应。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据或性能指标，属于理论框架与主张论证。其核心效果在于通过Denario原型展示了多智能体系统加速发现周期和扩展探索空间的能力，但未给出定量对比或基准测试结果。论据主要基于概念分析和推理，而非实证实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出将AI作为认知主体而非工具进行治理，并推动机构改革以适应'AI科学家'角色。学术价值在于重新界定科学发现中的人机协作关系，为多智能体科学发现系统提供设计原则。实际意义在于指导未来AI科学家的开发与部署，确保其可信、可问责、可解释。局限性是缺乏实证验证；未来方向包括实际构建和测试多智能体框架。

title: The Unseen Hand: Manipulating Model Fairness and SHAP with Targeted Identity Re-Association Attacks
abstract: As machine learning models grow more influential and opaque, algorithmic fairness and explainability are critical for ensuring accountability. However, we demonstrate that these auditing mechanisms are themselves vulnerable to subtle manipulation, camouflaging the influence of protected features. While prior work on data-agnostic attacks has exposed this vulnerability, they leave behind detectable artifacts that compromise their stealth. We introduce Targeted Identity Re-Association (TIRA) attacks, a novel family of attacks that iteratively and probabilistically manipulate a model's outputs without requiring access to the model's internals or feature representations. We formalize two algorithms: Probabilistic Micro-Shuffling (PMiS), which applies localized adjacent swaps, and Probabilistic Rank-Shift Micro-Perturbation (PRSMP), which introduces small, randomized rank shifts. We empirically demonstrate that TIRA attacks are highly effective at pushing fairness metrics towards ideal values. Crucially, TIRA attacks successfully confound SHAP-based explanations, leaving effectively zero residual attribution for protected features, a major improvement over prior work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIRA攻击家族，通过概率性微扰操纵模型公平性并欺骗SHAP解释，实现无痕攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习模型的不透明性使得公平性与可解释性成为关键的问责机制，但这些审计机制本身易受操纵。现有数据无关攻击虽能暴露漏洞，但会留下可检测的痕迹。因此需要一种更隐蔽的攻击方法，能在不访问模型内部或特征表示的情况下操纵模型输出，同时保持不可察觉性。
light_analysis.method: 提出TIRA攻击家族，包含两种算法：Probabilistic Micro-Shuffling (PMiS) 通过局部相邻交换扰动模型输出；Probabilistic Rank-Shift Micro-Perturbation (PRSMP) 引入随机排序偏移。攻击无需模型内部知识，迭代且概率性地修改输出，旨在将公平性指标推向理想值并混淆SHAP解释。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明TIRA攻击能有效将公平性指标推向理想值，且成功欺骗SHAP解释，使受保护特征的归因残留接近零，显著优于先前工作。未提供具体数值指标，但强调效果显著且无痕。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIRA攻击揭示了公平性与可解释性机制的脆弱性，对模型审计的安全性构成威胁。其隐蔽性挑战了现有防御方法，未来需研究更鲁棒的审计技术。研究价值在于暴露系统漏洞，推动更安全的问责框架。

title: G-MASt3R-SfM: Graph-based View Pruning and Multi-stage Optimization for Robust SfM
abstract: Structure from Motion (SfM) is essential for multi-view 3D reconstruction, however, its accuracy heavily relies on the accuracy of image matching. While the recent correspondence matching method, MASt3R, enables robust matching even under challenging conditions, it tends to generate incorrect correspondences for non-overlapping image pairs. Consequently, existing SfM methods using MASt3R, such as MASt3R-SfM, suffer from significant degradation in pose estimation accuracy as they incorporate these unreliable matches directly into optimization. To address this issue, we propose G-MASt3R-SfM, a novel SfM pipeline that enhances robustness through two key modules. First, the Graph-based View Pruning (GVP) module constructs a scene graph from matching confidence and geometrically prunes outlier views. Second, the Multi-Stage Optimization (MSO) module progressively refines camera parameters by expanding the optimization scope from local consistency to the global consistency. Experiments on the ETH3D dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in both camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction, effectively suppressing noise caused by outliers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图视图剪枝和多阶段优化的SfM方法，提升相机位姿和3D重建的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SfM方法依赖图像匹配精度，但MASt3R匹配器会在非重叠图像对中产生错误匹配，直接融入优化会严重降低位姿估计准确性。针对此问题，需要一种能抵抗错误匹配噪声的鲁棒SfM方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出G-MASt3R-SfM管道，包含两个核心模块：基于图的视图剪枝（GVP）根据匹配置信度构建场景图并几何剪枝离群视图；多阶段优化（MSO）从局部一致性逐步扩展到全局一致性，渐进细化相机参数。
light_analysis.result: 在ETH3D数据集上，方法在相机位姿估计和3D重建方面均达到最先进精度，有效抑制了离群点引入的噪声，显著优于现有MASt3R-SfM等方法的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种鲁棒的SfM方法，通过图剪枝和多阶段优化克服了错误匹配的影响，提升了复杂场景下的重建可靠性。未来可探索更高效的图剪枝策略或集成到实时系统中。

title: RaMem: Contextual Reinstatement for Long-term Agentic Memory
abstract: Long-term memory has become increasingly important for LLM agents that operate across extended interactions and evolving task contexts. Recent memory systems have made past experiences more persistent, compact, and retrievable, but retrieval alone does not ensure that a memory provides valid evidence for the current query. When experiences are compressed into reusable fragments, memories from different situations may appear equally relevant if they involve recurring entities or user states. We refer to this failure as context collapse: memories lose the surrounding context needed to judge whether they provide valid evidence for the current query. To address this problem, we propose Contextual Reinstatement for Agentic Memory (RaMem), a framework that turns retrieved memory fragments into contextually verifiable evidence. RaMem operates through four coordinated stages: (i) evidence anchoring grounds each memory in its original episodic conditions, especially event time, mention time, session span, and participants; (ii) recall condition induction derives the evidence conditions implied by the query; (iii) validity-aware retrieval uses these conditions to prioritize context-compatible memories while retaining content-relevant candidates as fallback evidence; and (iv) context-preserved synthesis keeps the selected memories' structured context available to the generator. Experiments on long-term memory benchmarks show that RaMem consistently improves performance over strong memory baselines, with average F1 gains of more than 10% across several backbones.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RaMem框架，通过上下文复现解决长期记忆中的上下文坍塌问题，提升记忆检索的证据有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期记忆对LLM代理在长时间交互和动态任务中至关重要，但现有记忆系统压缩经验后，不同情境的记忆可能因重复实体而显得同样相关，导致上下文坍塌，即记忆丢失判断其有效性的周围上下文，无法为当前查询提供有效证据。
light_analysis.method: RaMem通过四个阶段实现：证据锚定将记忆与原始事件条件（时间、会话跨度、参与者）绑定；召回条件归纳从查询中推导证据条件；有效性感知检索优先选择上下文兼容的记忆，并保留内容相关候选作为备用；上下文保留合成向生成器提供选定记忆的结构化上下文。
light_analysis.result: 在长期记忆基准测试中，RaMem在多个骨干网络上平均F1分数提升超过10%，持续优于强记忆基线方法，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RaMem有效解决了长期记忆中的上下文坍塌问题，通过上下文复现提升记忆检索的证据有效性，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力，未来可探索更复杂的条件归纳和跨任务泛化。

title: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized language modeling through autoregressive generation, enabling strong performance across a wide range of tasks. Recently, Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have emerged as an alternative paradigm that generates text through iterative denoising rather than next-token prediction, allowing parallel refinement of entire sequences. While numerous diffusion-based architectures have been proposed, differences in evaluation protocols, datasets, inference budgets, and generation hyperparameters make it difficult to compare their capabilities and understand the trade-offs they offer. In this work, we present a systematic experimental analysis of modern DLMs. Specifically, we evaluate eight state-of-the-art DLMs across eight benchmarks spanning reasoning, coding, translation, knowledge, and structured problem solving, while explicitly considering both generation quality and computational efficiency. Beyond downstream evaluation, we analyze the impact of key inference-time factors, including denoising steps, context length, block size, and parallel unmasking strategies, and complement large-scale experiments with controlled comparisons of smaller models trained under identical conditions. Our analysis highlights the strengths and limitations of diffusion-based language modeling across different tasks, architectures, and inference budgets. We show that the behavior of DLMs is strongly influenced by generation-time design choices, leading to distinct trade-offs between performance and computational efficiency. Overall, our study provides practical insights into the capabilities and deployment characteristics of contemporary DLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 系统性实验分析现代扩散语言模型在多种任务上的性能与效率权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型作为新范式，因评估协议、数据集和推理预算差异，难以比较其能力和权衡，需系统实验分析。
light_analysis.method: 评估8个最先进DLMs在8个基准（推理、编码、翻译等）上，考虑生成质量和计算效率；分析去噪步数、上下文长度等推理因素，并控制小模型训练进行对比。
light_analysis.result: DLMs行为受生成时设计选择强烈影响，体现性能与计算效率的不同权衡；提供了当代DLMs能力与部署特征的实用见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为扩散语言模型在不同任务、架构和推理预算下的优缺点提供系统理解，指导实际部署；未明确提及局限性。

title: SFT Overtraining Predicts Rank Inversion via Entropy Collapse Under RLVR
abstract: The standard heuristic of selecting the SFT checkpoint with the highest pass@1 for GRPO can fail when SFT compresses the rollout distribution. For binary rewards, the expected within group advantage variance is $p(1{-}p)(g{-}1)/g$; when early GRPO drives $p$ below $p^*(g)$, most groups have identical rewards and provide no group relative signal. We study SFT depth ladders for Qwen2.5-Coder-3B and DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B. We test Qwen2.5-Coder-3B across five depths and three seeds, and DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B across four matched depths and three seeds. On Qwen, pre RL pass@1 rises with SFT depth, but peak GRPO pass@10 falls from $0.806$ to $0.481$ (3 seed mean, $n{=}20$); pre RL entropy is positively associated with the GRPO outcome ($ρ{=}{+}0.69$). On DeepSeek, pass@1 remains far above $p^*(8){=}0.083$, and GRPO outcomes compress rather than invert. A two stage diagnostic, combining pre RL entropy triage with an early GRPO entropy monitor, flags high risk checkpoints and can stop failing runs early. Simple KL to reference regularisation and label smoothing variants do not rescue the collapsed Qwen checkpoint in our setting, suggesting the failure is not a trivial GRPO hyperparameter artefact.
comment: Accepted at the Deep Learning for Code (DL4C) Workshop at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示SFT过训练通过熵崩溃导致GRPO下排名反转，并提出基于熵的早期诊断方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准启发式选择SFT最高pass@1检查点用于GRPO可能失败，因为SFT过度训练压缩rollout分布，在二元奖励下当正类概率低于阈值时，组内奖励趋同，失去相对信号。该问题影响强化学习训练效果，现有方法未考虑此风险。
light_analysis.method: 在Qwen2.5-Coder-3B（5个深度×3种子）和DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B（4个深度×3种子）上构建SFT深度阶梯，测试GRPO表现。提出两阶段诊断：基于pre RL熵进行风险分类，结合早期GRPO熵监测。尝试KL正则化与标签平滑等缓解策略。
light_analysis.result: Qwen上，pre RL pass@1随SFT深度上升，但GRPO pass@10从0.806降至0.481（3种子均值，n=20）；pre RL熵与GRPO结果正相关（ρ=+0.69）。DeepSeek上pass@1远高于阈值p*(8)=0.083，GRPO性能压缩但未反转。简单正则化无法恢复。
light_analysis.conclusion: SFT过训练导致熵崩溃，引发GRPO排名反转，两阶段诊断可有效识别高风险检查点并提前终止无效训练。当前缓解方法无效，表明失败非简单超参数问题，需进一步探索解决方案。

title: ASTRA: A Scalable Next-Generation ATCO Training Simulator with Autonomous Simpilots
abstract: Air Traffic Control Operators (ATCOs) are vital in ensuring the safe, orderly, and efficient flow of air traffic, yet training capacity is constrained by reliance on specialized human trainers known as simpilots, who must role-play both pilots and ATCOs in a simulated airspace. Existing automated solutions rely on Western-centric speech models that perform poorly in Singaporean operational contexts, with off-the-shelf systems exhibiting Word Error Rates (WER) of up to 107.80% on Singaporean-accented aviation speech. We introduce ASTRA, an end-to-end training simulator that automates these simpilot roles through a pipeline that transcribes ATCO speech, interprets instructions, and generates appropriate pilot and ATCO responses using locally adapted voice models. Our fine-tuned Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) pipeline reduces WER to 23.45%, substantially outperforming existing approaches in this domain. Beyond traffic simulation, ASTRA incorporates an AI-assisted performance evaluation framework that assesses trainee radiotelephony communications across accuracy, brevity, and completeness, achieving post-optimization scores of 91.7%, 88.2%, and 86.9%, respectively. Built on open-source foundations such as DSPy and Unsloth, this approach enables scalable, standardized ATCO assessment while reducing instructor workload.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASTRA，一种可扩展的下一代空中交通管制员培训模拟器，通过本地化语音模型和AI评估框架自动化模拟飞行员角色，显著降低口音相关识别错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 空中交通管制员培训依赖专业人类培训师（模拟飞行员），成本高且难以规模化。现有自动化系统使用西方口音语音模型，在新加坡英语口音场景下性能极差（词错误率高达107.80%），无法有效支持本地化训练。亟需一种适应特定口音、可扩展且标准化的自动培训方案。
light_analysis.method: 构建端到端培训模拟器ASTRA，包含语音转录（ASR）、指令解释和响应生成模块。通过微调本地化ASR模型（基于开源框架DSPy和Unsloth）降低口音影响，并引入AI辅助评估框架，从准确性、简洁性和完整性三个维度自动评阅学员无线电通信。
light_analysis.result: 微调ASR管道将新加坡口音航空语音的词错误率从107.80%降至23.45%，显著优于现有系统。评估框架在优化后三项指标分别达到91.7%、88.2%和86.9%，有效替代人工评阅，降低教员工作负担。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASTRA解决了口音适配和培训规模化难题，提供标准化评估与自动化模拟，具有高实用价值。基于开源组件易于扩展，未来可推广至其他口音或场景，但需进一步验证真实训练环境中的有效性。

title: LLM-as-Code: Agentic Programming for Agent Harness
abstract: Every major LLM agent framework gives the LLM the role of orchestrator; the model decides what to do next, when to call tools, and when to stop. We argue that token explosion, control-flow hallucination, and unreliable completion are not implementation bugs but architectural consequences of assigning the deterministic work of looping, branching, and sequencing to a probabilistic system. A better prompt or a stronger model cannot guarantee the reliability of the LLM agent. We therefore propose Agentic Programming, in which the program governs all control flow, and the LLM is itself part of it, an adaptive component we call LLM-as-Code and invoke only where a task calls for reasoning or generation. Within each call the model keeps full flexibility, but it cannot alter the program's execution path. With control in the program, the LLM's context is built from the execution history's call tree and forms a directed acyclic graph (DAG). Each call's context length is then determined by its call depth rather than by accumulation over steps. A case study of computer-use agents shows that the design is practical, not just a theoretical stance, substantially improving the stability of long visual operation sequences.
comment: Accepted at the KDD 2026 Workshop on Agentic Software Engineering (AgenticSE)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agentic Programming范式，将控制流交予程序，LLM作为自适应组件LLM-as-Code，仅在需要推理或生成时调用，以解决LLM agent的token爆炸和控制流幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM agent框架赋予LLM编排者角色，但将循环、分支、排序等确定性工作交给概率系统，导致token爆炸、控制流幻觉和不可靠完成。这些问题并非实现缺陷，而是架构后果，更优的提示或更强的模型无法保证可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agentic Programming，程序掌控所有控制流，LLM作为LLM-as-Code组件仅在需要推理或生成时被调用。调用上下文由执行历史调用树构建为DAG，每个调用的上下文长度由调用深度决定而非累积，确保模型无法改变程序执行路径。
light_analysis.result: 在计算机使用代理案例研究中，该方法显著提升了长视觉操作序列的稳定性，证明了设计的实用性，并非仅理论立场。摘要未明确具体数值，但表明稳定性有实质性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种新的agent编程范式，从架构上解决了LLM agent的不可靠性问题。学术价值在于重新定义了LLM在agent中的角色，实践价值在于提高了复杂任务的稳定性和可预测性，未来可探索更复杂的控制流结构。

title: Surprise-Guided MergeSort: Budget-Efficient Human-in-the-Loop Ranking via Adaptive Comparison Scheduling
abstract: Pairwise comparison is the gold standard for subjective ranking tasks; however, exhaustive annotation requires a massive number of human comparisons ($O(n^2)$). While sorting-based methods have reduced this burden to $O(n\log n)$, they still require expensive human judgment for every single comparison. To further improve annotation efficiency, we propose leveraging a Vision-Language Model (VLM) not as an annotator replacement, but as a \emph{question prioritizer} to identify which comparisons genuinely require human judgment. The proposed \textbf{Surprise-Guided MergeSort (SGS)} framework achieves this through three integrated components: (1) a bottom-up MergeSort scheduler that structures comparisons and exploits transitivity, (2) a composite Surprise Scorer -- combining position-bias-cancelled VLM confidence, Elo gap, and vote entropy -- to quantify comparison ambiguity, and (3) an adaptive budget allocator that routes high-surprise pairs to humans while automating low-surprise pairs via transitivity inference. Validation was conducted on six diverse benchmarks spanning text similarity (STS-B, BIOSSES, SICKR-STS) and image quality assessment (KonIQ-10k, TID2013, LIVE Challenge). SGS effectively identified and skipped up to 535 non-informative comparisons per session. Consequently, it achieved Kendall's $τ{\times}100$ improvements of $+6$ to $+12$ over Active Elo under the same total budget. These results demonstrate that combining VLM-guided surprise metrics with algorithmic sorting provides a generally consistent accuracy-efficiency trade-off across diverse domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Surprise-Guided MergeSort框架，利用VLM作为问题优先级排序器，通过自适应预算分配减少人类比较次数，提升排序效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 成对比较是主观排序任务的标准方法，但穷举标注需要大量人工比较(O(n²))。排序方法虽将负担降至O(n log n)，但仍需为每次比较付出昂贵人工成本。现有方法缺乏对比较歧义性的量化，导致资源浪费在非信息性比较上。
light_analysis.method: 提出Surprise-Guided MergeSort (SGS)框架，包含三个组件：(1)自底向上MergeSort调度器，利用传递性组织比较；(2)复合Surprise Scorer，融合位置偏差校正后的VLM置信度、Elo差距和投票熵，量化比较歧义性；(3)自适应预算分配器，将高惊喜度的比较路由给人类，低惊喜度的通过传递性推断自动完成。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准（文本相似性STS-B、BIOSSES、SICKR-STS和图像质量KonIQ-10k、TID2013、LIVE Challenge）上验证。SGS每次会话有效跳过最多535个非信息比较。在相同总预算下，Kendall's τ×100比Active Elo提升6至12。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结合VLM引导的惊喜度指标与算法排序，提供了跨领域一致的精度-效率权衡。该方法无需替换人类标注者，而是优化问题调度，具有广泛适用性。未来可扩展至其他排序场景或集成更复杂的惊喜度模型。

title: Zero-order Parameter-free Optimization for LMO-based Methods: Novel Approach for Efficient Fine-tuning
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) has become a central application of modern optimization, enabling pretrained models to adapt to diverse downstream tasks and domain-specific data. A major obstacle in large-scale fine-tuning is the memory overhead of backpropagation, which requires storing activations, gradients, and optimizer states. Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization offers a memory-efficient alternative, but its performance is highly sensitive to the stepsize and smoothing parameter, often requiring costly task-specific tuning. Parameter-free (PF) optimization addresses this issue by adapting algorithmic parameters without prior knowledge of problem-dependent constants. Moreover, large-scale fine-tuning can benefit from geometry-aware updates that account for the heterogeneous structure of parameter blocks, which can be modeled through methods that exploit linear minimization oracle (LMO). In this work, we study PF adaptation for LMO-based ZO optimization and introduce $\texttt{AdaNAGED}$, a method that unifies gradient-free training, adaptive tuning, and non-Euclidean update geometry. We establish convergence guarantees and validate the method on large-scale LLM fine-tuning task with $\texttt{OPT}-1.3\mathrm{B}$ model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaNAGED方法，统一零阶优化、参数自由自适应和非欧几里得更新几何，实现大语言模型的低内存高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型微调依赖反向传播，其梯度、激活和优化器状态的内存开销巨大。零阶优化虽能降低内存，但对步长和平滑参数高度敏感，需耗时的任务特定调优。参数自由优化可自适应参数，而几何感知更新能利用参数块的异质结构，现有方法缺乏融合这些特性的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出AdaNAGED方法，将参数自由自适应与基于线性最小化预言机的零阶优化相结合，无需梯度计算即可实现非欧几里得更新几何。该方法利用LMO处理异质参数块，并自适应调整算法参数，同时提供收敛性理论保证。在OPT-1.3B模型上进行微调实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在OPT-1.3B模型的大规模微调任务上验证了AdaNAGED的有效性，具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明。与标准零阶优化相比，该方法消除了超参数手动调优的需求，并保持了收敛性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaNAGED为大规模LLM微调提供了一种内存高效、免调参的优化方案，理论收敛保证增强了其可靠性。实际应用可显著降低计算资源需求，但需依赖LMO结构。未来可探索将其推广至更广泛的模型架构和任务。

title: GitOfThoughts: Version-Controlled Reasoning and Agent Memory You Can Replay, Diff, and Merge
abstract: Large language model reasoning leaves no trace once it is done. The steps of a chain of thought disappear when the context window closes, a pruned search branch is just gone, and memory buffers cannot be diffed, merged, or audited. Code, infrastructure, and experiments are all version-controlled. Reasoning is not. GitOfThoughts stores an agent's reasoning tree as a git repository. Every scored thought becomes a commit, scores become notes, outcomes become tags, and retrieval is just git log over the agent's own history. We use this to test something simple. Does giving an agent memory from past problems actually make it more accurate? We tried five memory stores (none, a markdown file, a vector database, a graph, and git) across two benchmarks, two model sizes, and several pre-registered repeat experiments. The answer, on new problems, is no, including one promising early result that did not hold up when we repeated it. Memory only helps once the problem being solved is nearly identical to something already in memory (cosine similarity above about 0.8); below that, it does nothing. In other words, the model is finding the answer rather than learning the method. Even a model 4.5x larger still cannot pull a reusable method out of a worked example; it just gets better at spotting near-copies. The only thing that reliably helped on new problems was generating several answers and picking the most common one (self-consistency). So the case for using git as the memory store is not that it retrieves better. It is that it gives auditability, history, and the ability to merge two agents' memories, at no cost to accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GitOfThoughts，将推理树存储为git仓库，发现记忆仅在问题高度相似时提升准确率，提供可审计性和历史合并能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型推理过程无痕迹，链式思维步骤在上下文窗口关闭后消失，无法对思维历史进行diff、合并或审计。现有方法如代码和实验均进行版本控制，但推理过程缺乏类似机制。本文旨在通过版本控制推理过程，并评估记忆存储对新问题求解的实际效果，揭示现有记忆方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: GitOfThoughts将agent的推理树存储为git仓库：每个打分的思维作为一次提交，分数作为注释，结果作为标签，检索通过git log实现。在多个基准、两种模型规模和预注册重复实验中，比较了五种记忆存储（无、markdown文件、向量数据库、图、git），并测试记忆对解决新问题准确性的影响。使用self-consistency作为对比基线。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，记忆仅在问题与存储样本高度相似（余弦相似度约0.8以上）时有帮助，否则无效。即使模型大小增加4.5倍，仍无法从示例中提取可复用方法，仅能更好地识别近似副本。唯一可靠提升新问题准确率的方法是self-consistency（生成多个答案并取多数）。Git存储作为记忆库未提升检索效果，但提供了可审计性、历史记录和合并能力，且不损失准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GitOfThoughts验证了版本控制推理的可行性，但揭示当前记忆机制对新问题帮助有限，主要缺陷在于模型倾向于记忆答案而非学习方法。该工作提供了可复现、可审计的推理框架，并强调self-consistency的实用价值。未来可探索如何从记忆中提取方法而非答案，或结合其他学习机制。

title: Beyond Averages: Evaluating LLMs on Human Survey Replication at the Distributional Level
abstract: LLMs are increasingly used to simulate human survey responses, but prior work has mainly evaluated replication using mean-level or aggregate agreement, offering limited insight into whether LLMs reproduce the variability of human behavior. We evaluate LLM-based survey replication at the distributional level using a non-public 2010 consumer choice experiment on Korean instant noodle purchases, a setting unlikely to overlap with model training data. We evaluate three response variables of differing statistical type: binary purchase incidence, categorical brand choice, and count purchase quantity. For each, we compare human and LLM responses at mean-level, pattern, and distributional alignment, and against reference baselines from the human data alone. LLMs reproduce condition-level patterns reasonably well but fail to capture distributional structure: for purchase quantity, no model beats a condition-insensitive baseline that simply matches the pooled human distribution. Because models that match human means well can still produce distributions further from humans than this baseline, mean-based evaluation alone can be actively misleading. Replication also varies with input configuration, with structured personas and multimodal inputs improving alignment while explicit reasoning prompting degrades it monotonically.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在分布层面评估LLM对人类调查的复制能力，发现均值评估可能误导，LLM无法复现人类行为的分布结构。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM越来越多用于模拟人类调查响应，但现有评估仅基于均值或整体一致性，无法判断是否复现人类行为的变异性。分布级评估能更全面衡量模拟能力，而现有方法忽略分布结构，可能导致误导性结论。
light_analysis.method: 使用2010年韩国方便面购买的非公开消费者选择实验数据集（避免训练数据重叠），评估三种响应变量：二元购买、分类品牌和计数数量。比较人类与LLM在均值、模式和分布对齐上的表现，并设置条件无关的基线（仅匹配总体分布）。关键创新包括分布级评估和多种输入配置（结构化角色、多模态输入、显式推理提示）的影响分析。
light_analysis.result: LLM能较好复现条件级模式，但无法捕捉分布结构。对于购买数量，所有模型均未胜于简单的条件无关基线。拟合人类均值的模型可能产生比基线更差的分布，均值评估可能误导。复制效果随输入配置变化：结构化角色和多模态输入改善对齐，显式推理提示单调降低对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于揭示均值评估的局限，强调分布级评估的重要性。学术上为LLM模拟人类行为提供更严格框架，实践上指导调查模拟的合理使用。局限性在于仅使用单一实验数据集；未来可扩展更多领域和变量。

title: Beyond Linear and Overcomplete Regimes: A Mean-Field Analysis of Bottleneck Autoencoders
abstract: Autoencoders (AEs) learn low-dimensional representations by mapping data into a latent space while minimizing reconstruction error. Despite their empirical success, theoretical understanding remains limited and largely restricted to linear models or settings without a bottleneck. In this work, we study nonlinear AEs with a fixed finite-dimensional bottleneck in the mean-field (MF) regime. We derive explicit MF learning dynamics for both encoder and decoder, providing a tractable characterization of training in the nonlinear setting. We show that, over finite time horizons, the empirical risk of finite-width networks trained with stochastic gradient descent closely tracks the MF risk trajectory with high probability. At optimality, we further establish that the finite-width risk converges to the MF optimum, demonstrating that finite networks are sufficiently expressive to approximate the infinite-width solution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非线性瓶颈自编码器在平均场框架下的学习动力学理论，证明了有限宽度网络逼近无限宽度解。
light_analysis.motivation: 自编码器虽然在实践中成功，但其理论基础有限，大多局限于线性模型或无瓶颈设置。本文旨在解决非线性瓶颈自编码器的理论理解不足问题，通过平均场分析提供可处理的学习动力学刻画，从而弥补现有理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用平均场框架分析具有固定有限维瓶颈的非线性自编码器，推导编码器和解码器的显式平均场学习动力学。通过随机梯度下降训练时，证明有限宽度网络的经验风险以高概率跟踪平均场风险轨迹，并在最优性下收敛到平均场最优解。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了在有限时间范围内，有限宽度网络的训练风险与平均场风险轨迹紧密跟踪；在最优性下，有限宽度风险收敛到平均场最优解，表明有限网络能够近似无限宽度解的表示能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是为非线性瓶颈自编码器提供了严格的理论基础，证明了平均场动力学的有效性。该工作推进了对非线性自编码器训练过程的理解，并为实际网络宽度选择提供了理论指导。未来可扩展至更复杂的架构或数据集。

title: Contrastive Training with LLM-generated Near-Misses for Robust Code-Switching Speech Recognition
abstract: Code-switching (CS), the alternation between multiple languages within a single utterance, remains challenging for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). To address this issue, we propose a Point-of-Interest (POI)-aware contrastive training framework that improves recognition at CS-critical regions. We first identify CS spans by adopting POI detection method from literature, then construct acoustically plausible near-miss hypotheses by perturbing POIs in ASR N-best outputs and expanding candidates with a large language model. Hard but plausible negatives are retained through filtering with acoustic, phonemic, and textual constraints. Finally, we fine-tune Whisper-small with LoRA using a POI-weighted cross-entropy anchor objective together with a multi-negative contrastive ranking loss. Experiments on CS-FLEURS (cmn-eng) and ViMedCSS (vie-eng) show consistent reductions of over 2% in both general and CS-aware error rates compared to standard LoRA fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于POI感知的对比训练框架，通过LLM生成近错假设增强代码混合语音识别的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 代码混合语音中多语言交替给自动语音识别带来严峻挑战，现有方法在代码切换关键区域识别准确率不足。由于CS区域对语义理解至关重要，提升其识别性能对多语种应用具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 采用文献中的POI检测方法定位CS区域，在ASR N-best输出中扰动POI并结合大语言模型扩展候选，经声学、音素和文本约束筛选出困难负例。基于Whisper-small进行LoRA微调，联合POI加权交叉熵锚点损失与多负例对比排序损失。
light_analysis.result: 在CS-FLEURS（中英）和ViMedCSS（越英）数据集上，相比标准LoRA微调，通用错误率和CS感知错误率均一致降低超过2%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了代码混合语音识别的鲁棒性，尤其在CS关键区域表现优异。学术上提供了一种结合对比学习与LLM的新范式，实际应用可改善多语种语音交互系统性能。未来可探索更复杂的负例生成策略。

title: FlagGAM: Rule-Basis Generalized Additive Models for Explainable Tabular Prediction
abstract: Tabular applications often require inspectable prediction rules and stable behavior when records are incomplete. We propose FlagGAM, a rule-basis framework that separates feature-level rule construction from prediction. A Flag Core Module converts numerical and categorical variables into sparse, human-readable univariate bases: threshold flags, category-level flags, tail-deviation bases, and categorical step functions.
