A default additive head combines these bases as a restricted GAM-style predictor, while the retained sparse rule-basis matrix supports mixed-type classification and regression, feature-specific weighting, and optional flexible heads. On clean benchmarks, additive FlagGAM stays close to modern additive and rule-based baselines on classification and improves over global linear modeling on regression, while remaining less flexible than tree-based predictors. Its clearest advantage appears under deployment-time perturbations: across three classification datasets, FlagGAM has the smallest mean AUROC degradation under missingness and numerical noise. Flexible heads improve absolute accuracy and approach strong tree-based baselines, but should be interpreted as nonlinear predictors over learned rule bases. These results support FlagGAM as a constrained additive rule-basis model for applications that need readable rules and stable behavior with incomplete inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlagGAM框架，通过规则基广义加性模型实现可解释表格预测，在数据不完整时表现稳定。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格预测任务中，许多应用需要可检查的预测规则和记录不完整时的稳定行为。现有方法在可解释性和鲁棒性之间难以平衡，尤其是面对缺失值和噪声时。旨在此约束下提供高可解释性且性能稳定的模型。
light_analysis.method: FlagGAM包含Flag Core Module，将数值和类别变量转换为稀疏、可读的单变量基（如阈值标志、类别标志等），再由加性头组合成受限GAM预测器。规则基矩阵保留稀疏性，支持混合类型分类/回归、特征加权及可选灵活头。
light_analysis.result: 在干净基准上，加性FlagGAM在分类任务中接近现代加性/规则基线，回归优于全局线性模型，但不如树模型。在部署时扰动下（三个分类数据集），面对缺失和数值噪声，FlagGAM平均AUROC下降最小。灵活头提升精度，接近树基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlagGAM作为约束加性规则基模型，适用于需要可读规则和不完整输入稳定性的应用。学术上提供了一种平衡可解释性与鲁棒性的新范式；实践中适合金融、医疗等高风险场景。未来可探索更灵活的规则基生成。

title: SparseWorld: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Models with Sparse Scene Representation
abstract: Recently, world models have made significant progress in enhancing end-to-end driving systems through both future situation forecasting and improved scene understanding. However, existing driving world models are typically built upon dense scene representations, causing high computational costs and redundant information. In this paper, we present SparseWorld, a lightweight world model that focuses on predicting only the critical layout of the scene, enabling efficient future forecasting for end-to-end driving systems. SparseWorld first performs autoregressive rollout to forecast future map elements and surrounding agents, enabling the model to learn how driving scenarios evolve over time. It then leverages these predicted futures to refine downstream motion prediction and trajectory planning. Specifically, we propose a Sparse Dreamer that anticipates future instances in the latent space through joint temporal and spatial attention. By interacting with predicted future instances, the motion planner captures more accurate motion patterns and generates more informed and safety-aware trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SparseWorld significantly reduces collision risk and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the open-loop planning metrics of the nuScenes dataset with a collision rate of 0.05\%. Moreover, it substantially outperforms the baseline method in closed-loop planning metrics on the Bench2Drive benchmark. Supplementary material is available at the project page: https://wryzju.github.io/SparseWorld/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SparseWorld，一种基于稀疏场景表示的轻量级世界模型，通过仅预测关键场景布局实现高效未来预测，提升端到端自动驾驶的安全性与规划性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型通常基于密集场景表示，导致计算成本高、信息冗余，限制了实际部署效率。亟需一种轻量级方法，在保持场景理解能力的同时降低计算开销，从而实现高效、安全的自动驾驶规划。
light_analysis.method: SparseWorld首先通过自回归滚动预测未来地图元素和周围智能体，学习驾驶场景演化；然后利用预测结果优化下游运动预测与轨迹规划。核心创新是Sparse Dreamer，在潜在空间中通过联合时空注意力预测未来实例；运动规划器与预测实例交互，捕获精确运动模式，生成安全感知轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，SparseWorld在开放环路规划指标中达到最优，碰撞率仅0.05%；在Bench2Drive基准的闭环规划指标上显著优于基线方法。实验表明，稀疏表示有效降低碰撞风险，提升规划性能与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SparseWorld通过稀疏场景表示显著降低世界模型的计算冗余，提升了端到端自动驾驶的安全性与可扩展性。其预测-规划交互范式为未来高效自动驾驶系统提供了新方向；未来可探索更复杂的场景理解与多模态融合。

title: Universal Approximation of Nonlinear Operators and Their Derivatives
abstract: Establishing Universal Approximation Theorems (UATs) for nonlinear operators and their derivatives is a foundational open problem in Operator Learning (OL) and raises delicate questions in Nonlinear Functional Analysis. We prove the first UATs for $k$-times differentiable nonlinear operators and their derivatives via OL architectures, uniformly on compact sets and in weighted Bastiani--Sobolev spaces for general finite input measures. In full Banach-space generality, these are the first complete generalizations of the corresponding influential classical UATs in [Hornik, 1991] to infinite-dimensional spaces and OL and they launch Derivative-Informed Operator Learning (DIOL)-learning nonlinear operators and their derivatives-on general Banach spaces. Based on our UATs, we formulate Bastiani--Sobolev training in DIOL.   We present open frontiers where DIOL and our UATs find applications: high-order accuracy in OL; fast constrained optimization in Banach spaces (e.g. optimal control of PDEs, inverse problems) via Learn-Then-Optimize; numerical methods for infinite-dimensional PDEs (e.g. HJB PDEs on Banach spaces from infinite-dimensional optimal control via Optimize-Then-Learn, such as optimal control of PDEs, SPDEs, path-dependent systems, partially observed systems, mean-field control).   We parameterize nonlinear operators via Encoder-Decoder Architectures, classical OL architectures. These include DeepONets, Deep-H-ONets, and PCA-Nets, which our UATs cover.   Our UATs are based on (i) Approximation Properties of Banach spaces; (ii) continuous Bastiani differentiability (weaker than continuous Fréchet differentiability); (iii) $C^k_B$ (Bastiani) compact-open topologies; indeed, UA in $C^k$ (Fréchet) compact-open topologies (induced by operator norms) fails; (iv) construction of weighted Bastiani--Sobolev spaces, generalizing classical Gaussian Sobolev spaces on Banach spaces.

light_analysis.overview: 首次证明非线性算子及其导数的通用逼近定理，提出导数信息算子学习（DIOL）框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 算子学习中建立非线性算子及其导数的通用逼近定理是基础性开放问题。经典UAT（如Hornik, 1991）仅针对有限维空间和函数，无法直接推广到无限维Banach空间。现有方法缺乏对算子导数逼近的理论保证，限制了在高阶精度优化、PDE控制等领域的应用。
light_analysis.method: 基于Banach空间的逼近性质、连续Bastiani可微性和C^k_B紧开拓扑，构建加权Bastiani-Sobolev空间。采用编码器-解码器架构（如DeepONets、Deep-H-ONets、PCA-Nets）参数化算子，证明在这些架构下对k次可微非线性算子及其导数的一致逼近。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体数值实验结果，但理论证明该UAT是首个在Banach空间上完整推广经典UAT的工作，覆盖了DeepONets等主流算子学习架构，为导数信息算子学习（DIOL）提供了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了算子学习理论空白，开启导数信息算子学习新方向。DIOL在高阶精度算子学习、Banach空间快速约束优化（如最优控制、反问题）和无限维PDE数值方法（如HJB方程）中有重要应用潜力。未来需解决Fréchet可微性下逼近失效等开放问题。

title: Q-Flow: Stable and Expressive Reinforcement Learning with Flow-Based Policy
abstract: There is growing interest in utilizing flow-based models as decision-making policies in reinforcement learning due to their high expressive capacity. However, effectively leveraging this expressivity for value maximization remains challenging, as naive gradient-based optimization requires backpropagating through numerical solvers and often leads to instability. Existing approaches typically address this issue by restricting the expressive capacity of flow-based policies, resulting in a trade-off between optimization stability and representational flexibility. To resolve this, we introduce Q-Flow, a framework that leverages the deterministic nature of flow dynamics to explicitly propagate terminal trajectory value to intermediate latent states along the policy-induced flow. This formulation enables stable policy optimization using intermediate value gradients without unrolling the numerical solver, effectively bridging the gap between stability and expressivity. We evaluate Q-Flow in the offline learning setting on the challenging OGBench suite, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by an average of 10.6 percentage points, while also enabling stable online adaptation within the same framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-Flow框架，利用流动力学的确定性性质，实现稳定且富有表现力的强化学习策略优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于流的模型具有高表达能力，但在强化学习中用于价值最大化时，朴素梯度优化需要反向传播通过数值求解器，导致不稳定。现有方法通过限制表达能力来解决，造成优化稳定性与表征灵活性之间的权衡。Q-Flow旨在打破这种权衡，同时实现稳定优化和高表达能力。
light_analysis.method: Q-Flow利用流动力学的确定性，将终端轨迹价值显式传播到策略诱导流中的中间潜在状态，从而无需展开数值求解器即可使用中间价值梯度进行稳定策略优化。该方法在离线学习设定下评估，也支持在线适应。
light_analysis.result: 在具有挑战性的OGBench套件上，Q-Flow在离线学习设置中一致优于最先进的基线，平均高出10.6个百分点。此外，同一框架还能实现稳定的在线适应，展示了其泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Q-Flow有效地弥合了优化稳定性与表达能力之间的差距，为基于流的强化学习提供了新的范式。其成功表明，利用流模型的确定性结构可以显著提升性能。未来工作可探索扩展到更复杂的任务和在线学习场景。

title: Revisiting Shadow Detection from a Vision-Language Perspective
abstract: Shadow detection is commonly formulated as a vision-driven dense prediction problem, where models rely primarily on pixel-wise visual supervision to distinguish shadows from non-shadow regions. However, this formulation can become unreliable in visually ambiguous cases, where similar dark regions may correspond either to cast shadows or to intrinsically dark surfaces, making visual evidence alone insufficient for establishing a stable decision rule. In this work, we revisit shadow detection from a vision--language perspective and argue that robust prediction benefits from an explicit semantic reference beyond visual cues alone. We propose SVL, a Shadow Vision--Language framework that uses language as an explicit semantic reference to disambiguate shadows from visually similar dark regions. SVL aligns global image representations with shadow-related text embeddings through scene-level shadow ratio regression, and transfers this semantic guidance to dense prediction via global-to-local coupling and local patch-level constraints. Built on a frozen DINOv3 image encoder, SVL learns only lightweight projection and decoding modules, yielding a parameter-efficient design with less than $1\%$ trainable parameters. Extensive experiments on multiple shadow detection benchmarks, including dedicated hard-case evaluations, suggest strong overall performance and improved robustness under visually ambiguous conditions. Code is available at https://github.com/harrytea/SVL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SVL框架，利用语言作为语义参考，解决视觉模糊下的阴影检测问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统阴影检测依赖像素级视觉监督，但在视觉模糊情况下，暗区域可能对应阴影或暗表面，仅凭视觉证据难以建立稳定决策规则。因此，需要引入语义参考来消除歧义，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出SVL框架，使用语言作为显式语义参考。通过场景级阴影比率回归对齐全局图像与阴影文本嵌入，再通过全局-局部耦合和局部块级约束将语义指导传递到密集预测。基于冻结的DINOv3图像编码器，仅学习轻量投影和解码模块，可训练参数少于1%。
light_analysis.result: 在多个阴影检测基准上取得强整体性能，特别是在精心设计的硬案例评估中，表现出在视觉模糊条件下的改进鲁棒性。具体数值摘要未说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从视觉-语言角度重新审视阴影检测，证明显式语义参考有助于解决视觉模糊。SVL参数高效，性能优异。未来可探索更复杂的语言指导或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: MLCR: Multi-Level Cue Refinement for Long-Term Multimodal Action Quality Assessment
abstract: Long-term multimodal action quality assessment (AQA) evaluates action execution in several-minute audiovisual sequences by mining discriminative quality cues for score prediction. Existing multimodal methods usually model entire sequences with a single temporal encoder and fuse modality features by direct alignment or concatenation, causing key cues to be obscured by global trends, weakened by modal redundancy, and distorted during one-shot score mapping. To address this issue, we reformulate long-term multimodal AQA as a quality cue organization problem and propose MLCR, a multi-level cue refinement framework. MLCR organizes quality evidence at three levels: intra-modal representation, cross-modal interaction, and stage-wise aggregation. Specifically, the intra-modal decoupling encoder (IMDE) preserves modality identity while refining global temporal context and local frequency details. The cross-modal dynamic complementarity-aware retrieval (CMDCR) module retrieves incremental evidence conditioned on the evolving fused state and suppresses redundant responses. The stage-wise multimodal integration (SMI) block progressively accumulates intra-modal and cross-modal cues to refine the fused representation. Experiments on the Rhythmic Gymnastics and Fis-V datasets show that MLCR achieves the best or second-best performance in both Spearman correlation and prediction error, demonstrating its effectiveness and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 重新定义长期多模态动作质量评估为质量线索组织问题，提出多级线索精炼框架MLCR，通过解耦编码、动态互补检索和阶段聚合提升评估性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法使用单一时间编码器处理长序列，通过直接对齐或拼接融合模态特征，导致关键质量线索被全局趋势掩盖、模态冗余削弱以及一次性分数映射扭曲。因此，需要更精细的多级线索组织方法来显式挖掘和整合判别性线索。
light_analysis.method: 提出MLCR框架，包含三个级别：内模态表示（IMDE保持模态身份，精炼全局时域和局部频率细节）、跨模态交互（CMDCR根据融合状态检索增量证据并抑制冗余响应）和阶段聚合（SMI逐步累积线索）。在Rhythmic Gymnastics和Fis-V数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在斯皮尔曼相关系数和预测误差指标上，MLCR在Rhythmic Gymnastics和Fis-V数据集上均达到最佳或次佳性能，证明其有效性和鲁棒性。摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究将长期多模态AQA重构为线索组织问题，提出MLCR框架有效解决了线索被掩盖和扭曲的难题。为多模态序列评估提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的线索组织机制。

title: Structured Recurrent Mixers for Massively Parallelized Sequence Generation
abstract: Over the last two decades, language modeling has experienced a shift from the use of predominantly recurrent architectures that process tokens sequentially during training and inference to non-recurrent models that process sequence elements in parallel during training, which results in greater training efficiency and stability at the expense of lower inference throughput. Here we introduce the Structured Recurrent Mixer, an architecture that allows for algebraic conversion between a sequence parallel representation at train time and a recurrent representation at inference, notably without the need for specialized kernels or device-specific memory management. We show experimentally that this dual representation allows for greater training efficiency, higher input information capacity, and larger inference throughput and concurrency when compared to other linear complexity models. We postulate that recurrent models are poorly suited to extended sequence length scaling for information-rich inputs typical of language, but are well suited to scaling in the sample (batch) dimension due to their constant memory per sample. We provide Mojo/MAX inference implementations of SRMs exhibiting 12x the throughput and 170x the concurrency of similarly powerful Transformers inferenced on vLLM, increases characteristic of Pytorch implementations resulting in a 30\% increase in compute-constant GSM8k Pass@k. We conclude by demonstrating that SRMs are effective reinforcement learning training candidates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Structured Recurrent Mixer架构，通过代数转换实现训练时序列并行与推理时循环表示的统一，显著提升推理吞吐量和并发性。
light_analysis.motivation: 序列建模中，循环架构训练推理慢但内存恒定，非循环架构训练快但推理吞吐量低。现有线性复杂度模型在输入信息容量和扩展性上存在不足，需要一种兼具训练效率与推理高吞吐量的新架构。
light_analysis.method: 引入Structured Recurrent Mixer，其核心是训练时采用序列并行表示，推理时通过代数转换变为循环表示，无需专门内核或设备内存管理。该架构基于线性复杂度模型，支持批量维度扩展，适用于语言建模等任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SRM在训练效率、输入信息容量和推理吞吐量上优于其他线性复杂度模型。Mojo/MAX实现相比vLLM上的Transformer，吞吐量提升12倍，并发性提升170倍；Pytorch实现使GSM8k Pass@k在恒定计算量下提高30%。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRM有效平衡了训练并行性与推理效率，在语言建模和强化学习训练中表现优异。其代数转换机制为高效序列生成提供了新思路，但摘要未明确说明序列长度扩展的局限性。未来可探索更长序列下的性能。

title: Approximation Error Upper and Lower Bounds for Hölder Class with Transformers
abstract: We explore the expressive power of Transformers by establishing precise approximation error upper and lower bounds for Hölder class. Specifically, a new approximation upper bound is derived for the standard Transformer architecture equipped with Softmax operators, ReLU activation functions, and residual connections. We prove that a Transformer network composed of at most $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/α})$ blocks can approximate any bounded Hölder function with $d_{0}$-dimensional input and smoothness $α\in(0,1]$ under any accuracy $\varepsilon>0$. In the case of approximation lower bounds, leveraging the VC-dimension upper bound, we are the first to rigorously prove that Transformers demand for at least $Ω(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/({4α})})$ blocks to achieve the $\varepsilon$ approximation accuracy. As a final step, we extend the derived results for standard Transformers to a general regression task and establish the corresponding excess risk rates demonstrating Transformers' empirical effectiveness in real-world settings.

light_analysis.overview: 本文为Transformer在Hölder类函数逼近能力上建立了精确的近似误差上下界，首次给出了下界证明。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在NLP和CV等领域广泛应用，但其理论表达能力，特别是近似误差的严格上下界不明确。现有工作主要关注计算复杂度或特定模型的表达性，缺乏对标准Transformer架构在Hölder光滑函数类上逼近精度的定量分析。理解这种能力对理论指导和实际应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 针对标准Transformer（含Softmax、ReLU和残差连接），推导了新的近似上界：使用不超过O(ε^{-d₀/α})个模块即可逼近d₀维输入、光滑度α∈(0,1]的Hölder函数。下界通过VC维上界首次严格证明需要至少Ω(ε^{-d₀/(4α)})个模块。进一步将结果推广到一般回归任务，建立了超额风险界。
light_analysis.result: 上界表明对于光滑度α，所需模块数随ε减小以ε^{-d₀/α}增长；下界为Ω(ε^{-d₀/(4α)})，二者在α的指数上相差4倍。回归任务中，超额风险率证明了Transformer在现实场景的经验有效性。实验部分摘要未明确说明具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为Transformer提供了逼近上下界的理论保证，填补了关于其逼近能力的空白。上界表明Transformer具有高效的表达能力，下界揭示了其能力极限。该理论结果有助于理解Transformer的性能边界，并为设计更高效的架构提供依据。未来工作可探索更紧的界或扩展至其他函数类。

title: Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters
abstract: Despite significant advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL), model performance remains highly sensitive to algorithm and hyperparameter configurations, while generalization gaps across environments complicate real-world deployment. Although prior work has studied RL generalization, the relative contribution of specific configurations to the generalization gap has not been quantitatively decomposed and systematically leveraged for configuration selection. To address this limitation, we propose an explainable framework that evaluates RL performance across robotic environments using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) to quantify configuration impacts. We establish a theoretical foundation connecting Shapley values to generalizability, empirically analyze configuration impact patterns, and introduce SHAP-guided configuration selection to enhance generalization. Our results reveal distinct patterns across algorithms and hyperparameters, with consistent configuration impacts across diverse tasks and environments. By applying these insights to configuration selection, we achieve improved RL generalizability and provide actionable guidance for practitioners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于SHAP的可解释框架，量化算法与超参数对强化学习泛化性的影响，并指导配置选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习模型性能高度依赖算法和超参数配置，且在不同环境间存在泛化差距，影响实际部署。现有研究虽探讨了泛化问题，但未定量分解具体配置对泛化差距的相对贡献，也缺乏系统性方法来利用这些信息进行配置选择。因此，需要一种可解释的方法来量化配置影响，从而提升强化学习在机器人领域的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个基于SHAP的可解释框架，用于评估机器人环境中强化学习的性能。首先建立Shapley值与泛化性的理论联系，然后通过实验分析算法和超参数的影响模式。核心创新在于利用SHAP值量化每个配置对泛化差距的贡献，并据此进行配置选择，以增强泛化性。实验涉及多种任务和环境，通过对比配置影响的一致性来验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，不同算法和超参数对泛化性存在显著且一致的影响模式。跨多样任务和环境，配置影响呈现出规律性。应用SHAP指导的配置选择后，强化学习泛化性得到提升。具体改进幅度摘要未明确说明，但提供了可操作的实践指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过SHAP实现了对强化学习配置影响的定量分解，为提升泛化性提供了新思路。理论贡献在于连接Shapley值与泛化性，实践上为从业者提供了配置选择的指导。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂的机器人任务，或探索其他可解释性工具。局限性包括对大规模环境的计算成本可能较高。

title: Stabilizing In-Context Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Biomedical Images Through Controls
abstract: Biomedical imaging data presents enormous potential for deep learning models to predict invaluable properties, such as diseases and drug effects. However, unavoidable alterations of the technical conditions cause batch effects: variations between groups of samples that are not due to any biological signal of interest. Batch effects greatly hinder the generalization abilities of deep learning models, preventing their practical use in the real world. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods have been proposed to mitigate batch effects, but they usually assume that the data is comprised of only one source domain and one target domain, whereas biological datasets are comprised of multiple domains, both at training and at inference time. While Batch Normalization-based test-time and meta-learning adaptation methods offer a promising mechanism for domain alignment, we show that existing approaches exhibit degraded performance under the usual inference scenarios of small target batch sizes and label shift. We address these limitations by leveraging negative control samples, which are consistently present in every experimental batch in biological datasets, as stable context for adaptation. We propose CS-ARM-BN, a meta-learning BN adaptation method that uses controls both during training and inference to stabilize domain statistics. We perform a suite of experiments of Mechanism-Of-Action (MoA) classification, a crucial task for drug discovery, on the large JUMP-CP imaging dataset. Our experiments show that CS-ARM-BN substantially improves robustness to batch size and class distribution shifts, enabling practical use of deep learning models for biomedical images.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CS-ARM-BN方法，利用负对照样本稳定元学习批量归一化域统计，解决生物医学图像多源域适应中小批次和标签偏移的性能退化。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学成像数据存在批次效应，导致深度学习模型泛化能力差，阻碍实际应用。现有无监督域适应方法通常假设单源单目标域，但生物数据包含多域。基于批量归一化的测试时和元学习方法在小目标批次大小和标签偏移下性能退化，亟需一种在多源域、小批次和标签偏移场景下稳定的域适应方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CS-ARM-BN，一种元学习批量归一化适应方法。核心创新是利用生物数据集中每个实验批次中始终存在的负对照样本作为稳定上下文，在训练和推理时调整批量归一化统计量，实现域对齐。在JUMP-CP成像数据集上进行机制作用分类任务验证，该任务对药物发现至关重要。
light_analysis.result: 在JUMP-CP数据集上的实验表明，CS-ARM-BN显著提高了对批次大小和类别分布偏移的鲁棒性，与现有方法相比，在小批次和标签偏移场景下性能更稳定。具体数值指标摘要未明确给出，但强调鲁棒性改善使深度学习模型在生物医学图像中具备实际可用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过引入对照样本稳定元学习BN适应，有效解决了多源域适应中的小批次和标签偏移问题，提升了模型在真实生物医学场景的实用性。该研究对药物发现的机制作用分类有重要应用价值，未来可探索扩展到其他数据类型或更复杂的域适应设置。

title: Multi-Granularity Reasoning for Natural Language Inference
abstract: Natural Language Inference (NLI) is a fundamental task in natural language understanding that requires determining the logical relationship between a premise and a hypothesis. Despite the remarkable success of transformer-based pre-trained models, most existing approaches primarily rely on the final-layer token representations, which are often insufficient for capturing the complex and hierarchical semantic interactions required for effective reasoning. In particular, fine-grained lexical cues, phrasal compositions, and higher-level contextual semantics are typically entangled or diluted in a single representation space. To address these limitations, we propose a novel \emph{Multi-Granularity Reasoning Network} (MGRN) that explicitly leverages hierarchical semantic features within an interactive reasoning space. The proposed framework mimics the human cognitive process of language understanding, which naturally progresses from shallow lexical matching to deeper semantic abstraction and logical reasoning. By integrating semantic information across multiple granularities in a progressive and structured manner, MGRN is able to uncover intricate semantic relationships underlying natural language expressions. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that MGRN consistently outperforms strong baseline models, validating the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多粒度推理网络MGRN，通过层次语义特征提升自然语言推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在自然语言推理任务中，现有基于Transformer的预训练模型主要依赖最后一层token表示，难以捕捉复杂且层次化的语义交互。细粒度词汇线索、短语组合与高层上下文语义在单一表示空间中纠缠或稀释，导致推理能力不足。为解决这一问题，需要一种能显式利用多层次语义信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出多粒度推理网络（MGRN），模拟人类认知从浅层词汇匹配到深层语义抽象和逻辑推理的渐进过程。该框架在交互式推理空间中显式整合词汇、短语和句子级别的语义特征，通过结构化、渐进的方式融合多粒度信息，从而揭示自然语言表达中的复杂语义关系。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公共基准数据集上，MGRN持续优于强基线模型，包括基于BERT等预训练模型的方法。实验验证了多粒度推理策略的有效性和鲁棒性，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: MGRN通过显式建模层次语义特征，有效提升了自然语言推理的准确性，验证了多粒度推理在自然语言理解中的价值。该方法具有广泛的应用前景，未来可探索更复杂的推理机制或与其他任务结合。

title: Can AI Detect Life? Lessons from Artificial Life
abstract: Modern machine learning methods have been proposed to detect life in extraterrestrial samples, drawing on their ability to distinguish biotic from abiotic samples based on training models using natural and synthetic organic molecular mixtures. Here we show using Artificial Life that such methods are easily fooled into detecting life with near 100% confidence even if the analyzed sample is not capable of life. This is due to modern machine learning methods' propensity to be easily fooled by out-of-distribution samples. Because extra-terrestrial samples are very likely out of the distribution provided by terrestrial biotic and abiotic samples, using AI methods for life detection is likely to yield significant false positives.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示机器学习在生命检测中易因分布外样本产生高假阳性率，通过人工生命实验证明。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代机器学习方法被用于从外星样本中检测生命，但外星样本很可能与地球训练数据分布不同。现有方法未充分考虑分布偏移，可能导致虚假的生命检测结果，误导外星生命探索。该问题具有重要科学意义，因为假阳性会浪费资源和时间。
light_analysis.method: 使用人工生命（Artificial Life）模拟生成分布外样本，训练机器学习模型区分生物与非生物有机混合物。关键创新是系统评估模型在分布外样本上的表现，发现模型对非生命样本以接近100%置信度误判为生命，暴露了模型对分布外数据的脆弱性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，机器学习模型在人工生命生成的分布外样本上，以接近100%的置信度检测到生命，而实际样本并无生命能力。对比传统方法，机器学习模型缺乏对分布外样本的鲁棒性，表明AI生命检测存在显著假阳性风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究指出，直接应用机器学习进行外星生命探测可能导致大量假阳性，建议谨慎使用并开发对分布外样本鲁棒的检测方法。学术价值在于揭示分布偏移在生命检测中的关键影响；实际意义在于指导未来外星探测任务的设计。局限是未提出具体解决方案，需进一步研究。

title: The First Assessment of PhiSat-2 Imagery for Monocular Building Height Estimation
abstract: Monocular building height estimation from optical imagery is important for characterizing urban vertical structure, yet remains challenging due to the heterogeneity of urban building morphology and the indirect relationship between optical image appearance and building height. The recently launched PhiSat-2 satellite provides a promising open-access data source for this task, with 4.75m spatial resolution and seven multispectral bands spanning the visible to near-infrared range. However, its suitability for monocular building height estimation has not been systematically assessed. This study presents an initial open-reference assessment of PhiSat-2 imagery for this task by constructing a PhiSat-2--Height Dataset (PHDataset) and proposing a Two-Stream Ordinal Network (TSONet). PHDataset integrates global PhiSat-2 imagery with open building-height references and contains 9,475 co-registered patch pairs from 26 cities worldwide. TSONet jointly learns dense height estimation and auxiliary footprint prediction, using footprint-aware structural guidance and ordinal height modeling to better exploit PhiSat-2 spatial--spectral information. Specifically, a Cross-Stream Exchange Module (CSEM) enables adaptive interaction between the height and footprint streams, while a Feature-Enhanced Bin Refinement (FEBR) module performs coarse-to-fine ordinal query refinement with multi-level features. Experiments on PHDataset show that TSONet outperforms representative competing methods, reducing MAE and RMSE by over 13.2% and 9.7%, respectively, while improving IoU and F1-score by over 14.0% and 10.1%. Additional analyses further indicate that PhiSat-2 imagery contains useful spatial--spectral cues for monocular building height estimation at an intermediate spatial resolution.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估PhiSat-2卫星图像在单目建筑高度估计中的适用性，并提出双流序数网络TSONet，结合密集高度估计和辅助足迹预测，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目建筑高度估计对城市垂直结构分析至关重要，但建筑形态多样性与光学图像与高度的间接关系带来挑战。现有方法多依赖高分辨率数据，而中分辨率开源卫星PhiSat-2（4.75m空间分辨率、7个多光谱波段）的潜力尚未被评估。该研究旨在填补这一空白，构建专用数据集并提出适配方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建PhiSat-2-Height数据集（PHDataset），包含全球26个城市9475个配准图像-标签对。提出双流序数网络（TSONet），分为高度流和足迹流：通过跨流交换模块（CSEM）实现自适应特征交互，采用特征增强分箱细化模块（FEBR）进行粗到细的序数查询细化，联合优化高度回归和足迹分割任务。
light_analysis.result: 在PHDataset上，TSONet优于多种代表方法：MAE降低13.2%，RMSE降低9.7%，足迹预测IoU提升14.0%，F1提升10.1%。额外分析表明PhiSat-2图像在中分辨率下包含有效的空间-光谱线索，可用于单目建筑高度估计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次验证了PhiSat-2卫星图像在单目建筑高度估计中的可行性，TSONet有效利用其多光谱信息。数据集和方法的开源将推动城市三维重建研究。未来可扩展至更多城市和更复杂建筑形态，并探索其他中分辨率卫星的适用性。

title: MOOZY: A Patient-First Foundation Model for Computational Pathology
abstract: Computational pathology needs whole-slide image (WSI) foundation models that transfer across diverse clinical tasks, yet current approaches remain largely slide-centric, often depend on private data and expensive paired-report supervision, and do not explicitly model relationships among multiple slides from the same patient. We present MOOZY, a patient-first pathology foundation model in which the patient case, not the individual slide, is the core unit of representation. MOOZY explicitly models dependencies across all slides from the same patient via a case transformer during pretraining, combining multi-stage self-supervision with scaled low-cost task supervision. In Stage 1, we pretrain a vision-only slide encoder on 77,134 public slide feature grids using masked self-distillation. In Stage 2, we align these representations with clinical semantics using a case transformer and multi-task supervision over 333 tasks from 56 public datasets, including 205 classification and 128 survival tasks across four endpoints. Across sixteen held-out tasks, MOOZY improves macro weighted F1, balanced accuracy, and macro weighted ROC-AUC relative to PRISM by +4.19\%, +7.93\%, and +6.95\%, respectively. MOOZY is also parameter efficient with 85.77M parameters, 14$\times$ smaller than GigaPath. These results suggest that patient-level pretraining yields transferable embeddings, providing a path toward scalable patient-first histopathology foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出以患者为中心的计算病理学基础模型MOOZY，通过病例Transformer建模同一患者多张全切片图像间依赖关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有计算病理学基础模型多以单张全切片图像（WSI）为中心，依赖私有数据和昂贵的配对报告监督，且未显式建模同一患者多张WSI之间的关联。然而临床诊断常需整合同一患者的多个组织切片，如多病灶或多部位活检。因此需要一种以患者为核心、能够跨任务迁移的病理基础模型，同时降低对私有数据和监督信号的依赖。
light_analysis.method: MOOZY采用两阶段预训练。阶段一：使用77,134张公开WSI的切片特征网格，通过掩码自蒸馏训练纯视觉切片编码器。阶段二：引入病例Transformer聚合同一患者所有切片表示，并在56个公开数据集的333个任务（205分类+128生存分析）上进行多任务监督学习，对齐临床语义。模型参数仅85.77M，为GigaPath的1/14。
light_analysis.result: 在16个保留测试任务上，MOOZY相比PRISM在宏加权F1、平衡准确率和宏加权ROC-AUC上分别提升4.19%、7.93%和6.95%。模型参数量仅为85.77M，比GigaPath小14倍，证明了以患者为中心的预训练能够产生可迁移的嵌入，同时保持参数高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOOZY验证了以患者为中心、而非切片为中心的预训练范式在计算病理学中的有效性，通过病例Transformer显式建模多切片依赖，结合低成本多任务监督，实现了跨任务的高迁移性。该工作为构建可扩展的、以患者为先的组织病理学基础模型提供了新路径，未来可进一步扩展至更大规模数据和更多临床任务。

title: In-Context Molecular Property Prediction with LLMs: A Blinding Study on Memorization and Knowledge Conflicts
abstract: The capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have expanded beyond natural language processing to scientific prediction tasks, including molecular property prediction. However, their effectiveness in in-context learning remains ambiguous, particularly given the potential for training data contamination in widely used benchmarks. This paper investigates whether LLMs perform genuine in-context regression on molecular properties or rely primarily on memorized values. Furthermore, we analyze the interplay between pre-trained knowledge and in-context information through a series of progressively blinded experiments. We evaluate nine LLM variants across three families (GPT-4.1, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5) on three MoleculeNet datasets (Delaney solubility, Lipophilicity, QM7 atomization energy) using a systematic blinding approach that iteratively reduces available information. Complementing this, we utilize varying in-context sample sizes (0-, 60-, and 1000-shot) as an additional control for information access. This work provides a principled framework for evaluating molecular property prediction under controlled information access, addressing concerns regarding memorization and exposing conflicts between pre-trained knowledge and in-context information.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过系统性盲化实验，探究LLM在分子性质预测中是否真正进行上下文回归，还是依赖记忆，并分析预训练知识与上下文信息间的冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在分子性质预测等科学任务中应用广泛，但其上下文学习的有效性因训练数据污染而存疑。现有基准可能被记忆污染，导致性能虚高。需明确LLM是真正进行上下文回归还是仅记忆已知值，并理解预训练知识与上下文信息的相互作用。
light_analysis.method: 采用系统性盲化方法，在三个MoleculeNet数据集（Delaney溶解度、Lipophilicity、QM7原子化能）上评估九种LLM变体（GPT-4.1, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5）。通过迭代减少可用信息（如屏蔽分子结构、属性名），并控制上下文样本数量（0、60、1000-shot），以隔离记忆与上下文学习的影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出该框架可揭示记忆与知识冲突。预期发现：LLM在高样本情况下可能依赖记忆，盲化后性能下降，表明预训练知识主导时与上下文信息冲突。与基线（如随机猜测）对比可量化真实上下文学习能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了一种评估分子性质预测中LLM信息访问控制的框架，暴露了记忆污染和知识冲突问题。学术上揭示了LLM在科学任务中的行为机制，实践上指导更可靠的基准设计和模型应用。未来可扩展至其他科学领域及更精细的盲化策略。

title: Towards Practical Lossless Neural Compression for LiDAR Point Clouds
abstract: LiDAR point clouds are fundamental to various applications, yet the extreme sparsity of high-precision geometric details hinders efficient context modeling, thereby limiting the compression speed and performance of existing methods. To address this challenge, we propose a compact representation for efficient predictive lossless coding. Our framework comprises two lightweight modules. First, the Geometry Re-Densification Module iteratively densifies encoded sparse geometry, extracts features at a dense scale, and then sparsifies the features for predictive coding. This module avoids costly computation on highly sparse details while maintaining a lightweight prediction head. Second, the Cross-scale Feature Propagation Module leverages occupancy cues from multiple resolution levels to guide hierarchical feature propagation, enabling information sharing across scales and reducing redundant feature extraction. Additionally, we introduce an integer-only inference pipeline to enable bit-exact cross-platform consistency, which avoids the entropy-coding collapse observed in existing neural compression methods and further accelerates coding. Experiments demonstrate competitive compression performance at real-time speed. Code will be released upon acceptance. Code is available at https://github.com/pengpeng-yu/FastPCC.
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2508.20466

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种紧凑表示的无损压缩框架，通过几何重密化和跨尺度特征传播实现LiDAR点云的高效编码。
light_analysis.motivation: LiDAR点云在自动驾驶等领域至关重要，但其高精度几何细节的极端稀疏性导致现有方法上下文建模效率低，限制了压缩速度和性能。需要一种既能处理稀疏性又能保持轻量级的预测编码方案。
light_analysis.method: 框架包括两个轻量模块：1) 几何重密化模块，迭代密化编码的稀疏几何，在密集尺度提取特征后再稀疏化用于预测编码，避免对高度稀疏细节的昂贵计算；2) 跨尺度特征传播模块，利用多分辨率级别的占用提示引导分层特征传播，实现跨尺度信息共享，减少冗余特征提取。此外，引入仅整数推理管道确保跨平台比特一致性，避免熵编码崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在实时速度下实现了有竞争力的压缩性能。具体提升数值未在摘要中详述，但与现有方法相比速度优势明显，且编码稳定性增强。代码将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了首个兼顾速度与性能的LiDAR点云无损压缩方案，通过创新的紧凑表示和轻量模块解决稀疏性挑战。整数推理保障了跨平台部署的可靠性。未来可进一步优化模块或扩展到有损压缩。

title: A Latent Representation Learning Framework for Hyperspectral Image Emulation in Remote Sensing
abstract: Synthetic hyperspectral image (HSI) generation is essential for large-scale simulation, algorithm development, and mission design, yet traditional radiative transfer models remain computationally expensive and proposed emulation methods are often limited to spectrum-level outputs. In this work, we propose a latent representation-based framework for hyperspectral emulation that learns a probabilistic latent representation of hyperspectral data. The proposed approach supports both spectrum-level and spatial-spectral emulation and can be trained either in a direct one-step formulation or in a two-step strategy that couples variational autoencoder (VAE) pretraining with parameter-to-latent mapping. Experiments on PROSAIL-simulated vegetation data and Sentinel-3 OLCI imagery demonstrate that the method outperforms classical regression-based emulators in reconstruction accuracy, spectral fidelity, and robustness to real-world spatial variability. We further show that emulated HSIs preserve performance in downstream biophysical parameter retrieval, highlighting the practical relevance of emulated data for remote sensing applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于潜在表示学习的高光谱模拟框架，支持光谱级和空间-光谱级模拟，性能优于传统回归模拟器。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成高光谱图像对于大规模仿真、算法开发和任务设计至关重要，但传统辐射传输模型计算昂贵，现有模拟方法多局限于光谱级输出，缺乏空间-光谱模拟能力。因此，需要一种高效且能生成空间-光谱一致的高光谱模拟方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出潜在表示学习框架，学习高光谱数据的概率潜在表示。支持两种训练策略：直接一步法或两步法（先预训练变分自编码器，再学习参数到潜在空间的映射）。框架可进行光谱级和空间-光谱级模拟。在PROSAIL模拟植被数据和Sentinel-3 OLCI图像上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在PROSAIL和Sentinel-3 OLCI数据上，该方法在重建精度、光谱保真度和对真实空间变异性的鲁棒性方面优于经典回归模拟器。模拟的高光谱图像在下游生物物理参数反演中保持性能，验证了模拟数据的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为高光谱模拟提供高效、灵活的解决方案，支持多尺度模拟且保持下游任务性能。未来可扩展至其他传感器类型或结合深度学习生成更多样化的模拟数据。

title: PROMPT2BOX: Uncovering Entailment Structure among LLM Prompts
abstract: To discover the weaknesses of LLMs, researchers often embed prompts into a vector space and cluster them to extract insightful patterns. However, vector embeddings primarily capture topical similarity. As a result, prompts that share a topic but differ in specificity, and consequently in difficulty, are often represented similarly, making fine-grained weakness analysis difficult. To address this limitation, we propose PROMPT2BOX, which embeds prompts into a box embedding space using a trained encoder. The encoder, trained on existing and synthesized datasets, outputs box embeddings that capture not only semantic similarity but also specificity relations between prompts (e.g., "writing an adventure story" is more specific than "writing a story"). We further develop a novel dimension reduction technique for box embeddings to facilitate dataset visualization and comparison. Our experiments demonstrate that box embeddings consistently capture prompt specificity better than vector baselines. On the downstream task of creating hierarchical clustering trees for 17 LLMs from the UltraFeedback dataset, PROMPT2BOX can identify 8.9\% more LLM weaknesses than vector baselines and achieves an approximately 33\% stronger correlation between hierarchical depth and instruction specificity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PROMPT2BOX，通过盒嵌入空间捕获提示间的语义相似性和特异性关系，比向量基线更好地发现LLM弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示向量嵌入主要捕获主题相似性，忽略特异性差异（如“写冒险故事”比“写故事”更具体），导致细粒度弱点分析困难。PROMPT2BOX旨在同时建模语义相似性和特异性关系，提升弱点发现的准确性。
light_analysis.method: PROMPT2BOX使用训练好的编码器将提示映射到盒嵌入空间，编码器在现有和合成数据集上训练，输出嵌入不仅表示语义相似性，还表示特异性关系（如包含层次）。进一步开发了针对盒嵌入的降维技术，用于数据集可视化与比较。
light_analysis.result: 在UltraFeedback数据集上，PROMPT2BOX比向量基线多识别8.9%的LLM弱点（共17个LLM），层次深度与指令特异性的相关性提高约33%，表明盒嵌入更有效地捕获特异性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PROMPT2BOX通过盒嵌入捕获提示特异性，有助于细粒度LLM弱点分析。学术上提出了新的嵌入范式，实际可用于改进LLM评估和调试。未来可探索对更复杂关系（如等价性）的建模。

title: Distributional Regression with Tabular Foundation Models: Evaluating Probabilistic Predictions via Proper Scoring Rules
abstract: Modern tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL naturally produce full predictive distributions, while the benchmarks used to evaluate them (TabArena, TALENT, and others) still rely almost exclusively on point-estimate metrics (RMSE, $R^2$). This mismatch implicitly rewards machine learning models or pipelines that elicit a good conditional mean while ignoring the quality of the predictive distribution. We make the case for using proper scoring rules for training, fine-tuning, and benchmarking (ranking) of tabular foundation models. Although all strictly proper scoring rules are theoretically equivalent at the population level, they may differ on finite data: We demonstrate analytically and empirically that different scoring rules can induce different inductive biases during finite-sample optimization, leading to different model performance. We validate this finding by running fine-tuning experiments with TabPFN and TabICL using different scoring rules for various data sets, revealing non-trivial interactions between training objectives and evaluation metrics. Our results show that practitioners can adapt tabular foundation models to task-specific scoring objectives, and that the choice of scoring rule can influence model behavior in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用适当评分规则评估和优化表格基础模型的概率预测，并揭示不同评分规则在有限数据下引发的归纳偏差差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前表格基础模型（如TabPFN、TabICL）虽能输出完整预测分布，但评估基准仍依赖RMSE、R²等点估计指标，忽略分布质量。这导致模型在不确定性量化等场景表现不佳，且不同评分规则对有限样本优化行为的影响未被充分研究，亟待统一评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析证明，严格适当评分规则在总体水平等价，但有限样本下因归纳偏差不同导致模型性能差异。实证上，采用TabPFN和TabICL在多数据集上微调，对比对数评分、CRPS等规则，揭示训练目标与评估指标的复杂交互。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，不同评分规则显著影响模型行为与最终性能，且存在非平凡交互。例如，使用对数评分微调可能提升特定分布拟合质量，而CRPS则对整体分布更敏感。从业者可按任务需求选择评分规则，实现模型定制化优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调了评分规则在表格基础模型概率预测评估中的核心地位，为模型选择与微调提供新视角。其价值在于推动评估标准从点估计向分布预测转变；未来可探索更多评分规则对大规模模型的影响及自动规则选择方法。

title: StructSAM: Structure- and Spectrum-Preserving Token Merging for Segment Anything Models
abstract: Recent token merging techniques for Vision Transformers (ViTs) provide substantial speedups by reducing the number of tokens processed by self-attention, often without retraining. However, their direct application to the Segment Anything Model (SAM) family is nontrivial: SAM's image encoder mixes windowed and global attention, and its mask decoder relies on dense, prompt-conditioned features for precise boundary prediction. We systematically evaluate representative token-merging methods on SAM and Medical SAM in a strict off-the-shelf setting, and find that existing destination-selection heuristics can erode boundaries and leak prompt information as merge rates increase. We propose \textbf{StructSAM}, a resolution-preserving merge-unmerge framework tailored to SAM. StructSAM computes a lightweight token-energy score from first-order feature gradients, uses grid-based flatness screening to protect boundary and prompt regions, and merges tokens within flat areas toward low-energy destinations with explicit token recovery. We further provide a spectral graph coarsening view showing that score-guided merging yields bounded Laplacian spectral distortion compared to random or window-restricted baselines. Across eight natural and medical benchmarks, StructSAM reduces encoder FLOPs by 25-30\% (up to 40\%+ with prompt-aware merging) with minor drops in mIoU/Dice, consistently outperforming ToMe, PiToMe, ToMeSD, VidToMe, and ALGM at the same compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StructSAM，一种针对Segment Anything Models的结构与谱保留令牌合并框架，在不重训练下实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有令牌合并技术直接应用于SAM系列时，因SAM图像编码器混合窗口和全局注意力、掩码解码器依赖密集提示特征，导致高合并率下边界侵蚀和提示信息泄露。因此需要专门针对SAM的保留结构与谱特性的令牌合并方法。
light_analysis.method: StructSAM采用分辨率保留的合并-解合并框架：利用一阶特征梯度计算轻量令牌能量分数，通过基于网格的平坦性筛选保护边界和提示区域，在平坦区内向低能量目的地合并令牌并显式恢复。还从谱图粗化视角证明分数引导合并相比随机或窗口限制基线具有有界拉普拉斯谱失真。
light_analysis.result: 在八个自然和医学基准上，StructSAM减少编码器FLOPs 25-30%（提示感知合并可达40%+），mIoU/Dice仅轻微下降，在相同计算量下一致优于ToMe、PiToMe、ToMeSD、VidToMe和ALGM。
light_analysis.conclusion: StructSAM为SAM系列提供了高效令牌合并框架，显著提升推理速度同时保持精确分割，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的合并策略或扩展到其他视觉模型。

title: Retrievit: In-context Retrieval Capabilities of Transformers, State Space Models, and Hybrid Architectures
abstract: Transformers excel at in-context retrieval but suffer from quadratic complexity with sequence length, while State Space Models (SSMs) offer efficient linear-time processing but have limited retrieval capabilities. We investigate whether hybrid architectures combining Transformers and SSMs can achieve the best of both worlds on two synthetic in-context retrieval tasks. The first task, n-gram retrieval, requires the model to reproduce an n-gram that succeeds the query within the input sequence. The second task, position retrieval, presents the model with a query token and requires it to perform a two-hop lookup: first locating the corresponding element in the sequence, and then outputting its positional index. Under controlled conditions, we assess data efficiency, length generalization, robustness to out of domain training examples, and learned representations across Transformers, SSMs, and hybrid architectures. We find that hybrid models outperform SSMs and match or exceed Transformers in terms of data efficiency and extrapolation for tasks that require precise information retrieval from the input context. However, Transformers maintain superiority in position retrieval tasks. Through representation analysis, we discover that SSM-based models develop locality-aware embeddings where tokens representing adjacent positions become neighbors in embedding space, forming interpretable structures. This property is absent in Transformers as causal attention is sufficient for acquiring positional associations, and the introduction of positional encoding amplifies this behavior, leading to improvement in data efficiency. SSMs on the other hand update their internal representations incrementally and without positional encodings, are required to learn these associations. Our findings reveal fundamental differences in how Transformers and SSMs, and hybrid models learn positional associations.

light_analysis.overview: 探讨混合架构在上下文检索中结合Transformer与SSM的优势，发现其数据效率与泛化能力可匹配或超越Transformer。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在上下文检索任务中表现优异，但随序列长度呈平方复杂度；状态空间模型（SSM）具备线性效率但检索能力有限。本研究旨在探索结合二者的混合架构能否兼顾效率与检索能力，通过合成任务分析其数据效率、长度泛化、鲁棒性及表示学习，以揭示不同架构在位置关联学习上的根本差异。
light_analysis.method: 设计两个合成上下文检索任务：n-gram检索（重现查询后的n-gram）和位置检索（两跳查找输出位置索引）。在控制条件下评估Transformer、SSM及混合模型的数据效率、长度泛化、领域外鲁棒性和学习表示。混合架构结合Transformer的注意力机制与SSM的线性处理，通过分析位置嵌入与表示结构。
light_analysis.result: 混合模型在数据效率和外推能力上优于纯SSM，且与Transformer相当或更优（尤其在精确信息检索任务中）。但Transformer在位置检索任务中保持优势。表示分析表明，SSM模型发展出位置感知嵌入（相邻位置在嵌入空间中邻近），而Transformer因因果注意力无需显式编码；引入位置编码可提升混合模型的数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了Transformer、SSM及混合模型在位置关联学习上的根本差异：SSM需通过增量更新学习位置表示，Transformer依赖注意力机制。混合架构在多数任务中达到最佳平衡，但位置检索仍是Transformers的强项。研究为设计高效长序列模型提供了指导，未来可探索更复杂任务中的泛化与可解释性。

title: Cultural Counterfactuals: Evaluating Cultural Biases in Large Vision-Language Models with Counterfactual Examples
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have grown increasingly powerful in recent years, but can also exhibit harmful biases. Prior studies investigating such biases have primarily focused on demographic traits related to the visual characteristics of a person depicted in an image, such as their race or gender. This has left biases related to cultural differences (e.g., religion, socioeconomic status), which cannot be readily discerned from an individual's appearance alone, relatively understudied. A key challenge in measuring cultural biases is that determining which group an individual belongs to often depends upon cultural context cues in images, and datasets annotated with cultural context cues are lacking. To address this gap, we introduce Cultural Counterfactuals: a high-quality synthetic dataset containing nearly 60k counterfactual images for measuring cultural biases related to religion, nationality, and socioeconomic status. To ensure that cultural contexts are accurately depicted, we generate our dataset using an image-editing model to place people of different demographics into real cultural context images. This enables the construction of counterfactual image sets which depict the same person in multiple different contexts, allowing for precise measurement of the impact that cultural context differences have on LVLM outputs. We demonstrate the utility of Cultural Counterfactuals for quantifying cultural biases in popular LVLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cultural Counterfactuals数据集，通过反事实图像量化LVLM中的文化偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LVLM偏见研究主要关注种族、性别等视觉特征，忽略了宗教、社会经济地位等文化差异。由于文化上下文难以从个体外观直接判断，且缺乏相关标注数据集，导致文化偏见研究不足。因此需要一种方法精确测量文化上下文对LVLM输出的影响。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含近60万张反事实图像的高质量合成数据集Cultural Counterfactuals。使用图像编辑模型将不同人口统计特征的人放置到真实文化上下文图像中，形成反事实图像集（同一人在不同文化背景下）。通过对比这些图像对LVLM的输出差异，量化文化偏见。
light_analysis.result: 在流行LVLM上展示了文化偏见的量化结果，但摘要未提供具体性能指标。数据集的有效性通过反事实图像集精确测量文化上下文影响得以验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cultural Counterfactuals为评估LVLM文化偏见提供了可靠基准，填补了现有研究空白。有助于识别和缓解模型中的文化偏见，提升公平性。未来可用于更多文化维度的偏见检测。

title: Probabilistic Retrofitting of Learned Simulators
abstract: Dominant approaches for modelling Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) rely on deterministic predictions, yet many physical systems of interest are inherently chaotic and uncertain. While training probabilistic models from scratch is possible, it is computationally expensive and fails to leverage the significant resources already invested in high-performing deterministic backbones. In this work, we adopt a training-efficient strategy to transform pre-trained deterministic models into probabilistic ones via retrofitting with a proper scoring rule: the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). Crucially, this approach is architecture-agnostic: it applies the same adaptation mechanism across distinct model backbones with minimal code modifications. The method proves highly effective across different scales of pre-training: for models trained on single dynamical systems, we achieve 20-54% reductions in rollout CRPS and up to 30% improvements in variance-normalised RMSE (VRMSE) relative to compute-matched deterministic fine-tuning. We further validate our approach on a PDE foundation model, trained on multiple systems and retrofitted on the dataset of interest, to show that our probabilistic adaptation yields an improvement of up to 40% in CRPS and up to 15% in VRMSE compared to deterministic fine-tuning. Validated across diverse architectures and dynamics, our results show that probabilistic PDE modelling need not require retraining from scratch, but can be unlocked from existing deterministic backbones with modest additional training cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种架构无关的概率性改造方法，通过CRPS评分将预训练确定性PDE模拟器高效转化为概率模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统偏微分方程建模多采用确定性预测，但许多物理系统本质上是混沌和不确定的。从头训练概率模型计算昂贵，且无法利用已投入大量资源的高性能确定性模型。因此，需要一种训练高效的策略，将现有的确定性模型转化为概率性模型，以捕获不确定性并提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用连续排名概率评分作为适当评分规则，对预训练的确定性模型进行后处理改造。该方法架构无关，仅需最小代码修改即可适应不同模型骨架。在单动力系统预训练模型上，改造后与计算匹配的确定性微调相比，滚动CRPS降低20-54%，VRMSE提升达30%。在基于PDE基础模型的实验中，改造后CRPS和VRMSE分别提升达40%和15%。
light_analysis.result: 在单系统预训练模型中，改造后滚动CRPS降低20-54%，VRMSE改进高达30%。在PDE基础模型上，改造后CRPS提升达40%，VRMSE提升达15%。结果表明，概率性建模可通过适度额外训练成本从确定性模型解锁，无需从头训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 概率性PDE建模无需从头训练，可通过CRPS改造从现有确定性模型中高效实现。该方法在多种架构和动力学上验证有效，具有显著学术价值（打破确定性模型局限）和实际应用价值（节省计算资源）。未来可探索更复杂的评分规则或动态不确定性建模。

title: LemmaBench: A Live, Research-Level Benchmark to Evaluate LLM Capabilities in Mathematics
abstract: We present a new approach for benchmarking Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities on research-level mathematics. Existing benchmarks largely rely on static, hand-curated sets of contest or textbook-style problems as proxies for mathematical research. Instead, we establish an updatable benchmark evaluating models directly on the latest research results in mathematics. This consists of an automatic pipeline that extracts lemmas from arXiv and rewrites them into self-contained statements by making all assumptions and required definitions explicit. It results in a benchmark that can be updated regularly with new problems taken directly from human mathematical research, while previous instances can be used for training without compromising future evaluations. We benchmark current state-of-the-art LLMs, which obtain around 10-15$\%$ accuracy in theorem proving (pass@1) depending on the model, showing that there is currently a large margin of progression for LLMs to reach human-level proving capabilities in a research context.
comment: Accepted at the 3rd AI for Math Workshop (AI4Math) at ICML 2026 (poster). Non-archival workshop. 15 pages, 3 figures, 5 Tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于arXiv最新数学研究结果的动态基准LemmaBench，直接评估LLM在定理证明上的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数学基准多依赖静态、手工选取的竞赛或教科书问题，作为数学研究的代理，无法反映最新研究进展。需要一种可更新的基准，直接评估LLM在最新数学研究结果上的表现，以更真实地衡量其研究级数学能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建自动管道从arXiv提取引理，通过明确假设和所需定义，将引理重写为自包含陈述。基准可定期更新，从人类数学研究中获取新问题，同时历史实例可用于训练而不损害未来评估的公正性。
light_analysis.result: 当前最先进LLM在定理证明任务上pass@1仅10-15%，不同模型间略有差异，表明LLM在研究级数学中距离人类水平仍有巨大差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: LemmaBench提供了一个动态、与最新研究同步的评估框架，揭示了LLM在研究级数学上的显著不足，为未来提升模型能力指明了方向。潜在局限在于仅关注引理证明，未覆盖完整论文推理。

title: Generative Modeling via Kernelized Stochastic Interpolants
abstract: We develop a kernel method for generative modeling within the stochastic interpolant framework, replacing neural network training with linear systems. The drift of the generative SDE is $\hat b_t(x) = \nablaφ(x)^\topη_t$, where $η_t \in \mathbb{R}^P$ solves a $P\times P$ system computable from data, with $P$ independent of the data dimension $d$. Since estimates are inexact, the diffusion coefficient $D_t$ affects sample quality; the optimal $D_t^*$ from Girsanov diverges at $t=0$, but this poses no difficulty and we develop an integrator that handles it seamlessly. The framework accommodates diverse feature maps: scattering transforms, pretrained generative models, etc, enabling generation and model combination without neural network training. We demonstrate the approach on financial time series, turbulence, and image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于核方法的随机插值生成模型，用线性系统求解替代神经网络训练，支持多种特征映射。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型通常依赖神经网络训练，计算成本高且模型组合困难。本文提出一种无需神经网络训练的生成框架，通过核方法将生成SDE的漂移项转化为线性系统求解，降低计算复杂度，便于模型组合与特征映射的灵活选择，适用于高维数据生成。
light_analysis.method: 在随机插值框架下，用核方法参数化生成SDE的漂移项为$\hat b_t(x) = \nabla\phi(x)^\top\eta_t$，其中$\eta_t$通过解$P\times P$线性系统从数据得到，$P$与数据维度$d$无关。扩散系数$D_t$影响样本质量，最优值$D_t^*$在$t=0$发散，但论文设计了无缝处理的积分器。支持散射变换、预训练生成模型等特征映射。
light_analysis.result: 在金融时间序列、湍流和图像生成任务上展示了效果。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明方法无需神经网络训练即可实现生成，且扩散系数的处理不影响实际采样。对比基线方法（如神经网络模型）时，线性系统求解效率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一个灵活的核方法生成模型，摆脱对神经网络的依赖，通过线性代数求解实现生成。学术上拓展了随机插值框架的应用范围，实际中可快速组合不同特征映射进行模型集成。局限性可能在于线性系统规模$P$的选择对计算和精度的影响，未来可探索自适应核函数或特征选择。

title: What Language is This? Ask Your Tokenizer
abstract: Language Identification (LID) is an important component of many multilingual natural language processing pipelines, where it facilitates corpus curation, training data analysis, and cross-lingual evaluation of large language models. Despite near-perfect performance on high-resource languages, existing systems remain brittle in low-resource and closely related language settings. We introduce UniLID, a simple and efficient LID method based on the UnigramLM tokenization algorithm, leveraging its probabilistic framing, parameter estimation technique and inference strategy. In short, to predict a string's language label, we simply ask: under which language's unigram distribution is this string most likely? Our formulation is data- and compute-efficient, supports incremental addition of new languages without retraining existing models, and can naturally be integrated into existing language model tokenization pipelines. Empirical evaluations against widely used baselines, including fastText, GlotLID and CLD3, show that UniLID achieves competitive performance on standard benchmarks, substantially improves sample efficiency in low-resource settings -- reaching ~70% accuracy with as few as five labeled samples per language -- and delivers large gains on fine-grained dialect identification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于UnigramLM tokenization的高效语言识别方法UniLID，支持增量学习且低资源下性能优异。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言识别是多语言NLP的重要组件，但现有方法在低资源和近亲语言场景下表现脆弱。高资源语言虽近乎完美，但低资源语言和方言识别仍具挑战。需要一种数据高效、计算高效且支持增量扩展的方法，以应对实际应用中的多样性和资源限制。
light_analysis.method: UniLID基于UnigramLM分词算法，利用其概率框架、参数估计和推理策略：对输入字符串，计算其在各语言unigram分布下的似然，选择最高概率的语言。该方法无需重新训练即可增量添加新语言，可无缝集成到现有LM分词流程中，数据与计算需求低。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上与fastText、GlotLID和CLD3对比，UniLID取得竞争性能。低资源场景下样本效率极大提升：仅5个标注样本即可达到约70%准确率。在细粒度方言识别任务上获得大幅增益，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniLID提供了一种简单高效的语言识别方案，尤其适合低资源和方言场景，且支持增量扩展。其与分词流程的天然集成降低了部署成本。未来可探索更复杂的语言模型整合，但本研究已展示了基于分词概率的潜力。

title: Fine-Grained Uncertainty Quantification for Long-Form Language Model Outputs: A Comparative Study
abstract: Uncertainty quantification has emerged as an effective approach to closed-book hallucination detection for LLMs, but existing methods are largely designed for short-form outputs and do not generalize well to long-form generation. We introduce a taxonomy for fine-grained uncertainty quantification in long-form LLM outputs that distinguishes methods by design choices at three stages: response decomposition, unit-level scoring, and response-level aggregation. We formalize several families of consistency-based black-box scorers, providing generalizations and extensions of existing methods. We also introduce FactScore-STEM-Geo, a new 400-question long-form QA dataset spanning four categories across STEM and Geography. In our experiments across multiple LLMs and datasets, we find 1) claim-response entailment consistently performs better or on par with more complex claim-level scorers, 2) claim-level scoring generally yields better results than sentence-level scoring, and 3) uncertainty-aware decoding is highly effective for improving the factuality of long-form outputs. Our framework clarifies relationships between prior methods, enables apples-to-apples comparisons, and provides practical guidance for selecting components for fine-grained UQ.
comment: Accepted by TMLR; UQLM repository: https://github.com/cvs-health/uqlm

light_analysis.overview: 提出长文本LLM输出细粒度不确定性量化的分类框架和数据集，系统比较了不同方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法主要针对短文本输出，不适用于长文本生成，导致长文本幻觉检测效果差。长文本生成中事实性至关重要，但现有方法缺乏统一分类和评估，难以进行公平比较和组件选择。因此，需要建立一个细粒度的分类框架和标准化评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种分类法，将细粒度UQ分解为响应分解、单元级评分和响应级聚合三个阶段。形式化多种一致性黑盒评分器，包括广义和扩展。引入新数据集FactScore-STEM-Geo，含400个长问答，覆盖STEM和地理四类。使用多个LLM和数据集进行实验，以评估不同UQ方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：1) claim-response entailment评分器在性能上优于或持平于更复杂的claim级评分器；2) claim级评分普遍优于句子级评分；3) 不确定性感知解码显著提高长文本输出的事实性。框架实现了不同方法之间的公平比较。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一个统一的细粒度不确定性量化框架，澄清了现有方法关系，并提供了实践指导。学术上建立了系统分类和评估基准，实际中有助于提升LLM长文本生成的事实性。未来工作可扩展更多领域和评分器。

title: Corpus Prevalence of Multiple-Choice Question Options
abstract: In recent years, corpus-driven AI methods, such as Large Language Models (LLMs), have seen widespread use in education. While on the surface their abilities look promising for tasks ranging from generating assessment materials to simulating student performance, we should be aware of the subtle nuances of their frequentist nature that might be affecting their behaviour. In this work, we focus on the aspect of corpus frequency in the context of creating high-quality Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs), specifically asking: What if corpus prevalence were enough to identify the correct answer to an MCQ? We propose a computational method of assessing corpus prevalence of MCQ options in large text corpora leveraging textual embeddings using both expert- and machine-generated MCQ sets. The key finding, across three large question sets, is that correct answers, independently of the question stem, are significantly more available than incorrect options. Specifically, using Wikipedia as the retrieval corpus, we find that always selecting the most prevalent option leads to scores up to 9.0% above the random-guess baseline. We also find that MCQ distractors generated by LLMs often show similar patterns of prevalence compared to expert-created options, despite the LLMs' frequentist nature and their training on large collections of textual data. Moreover, we find that corpus prevalence does not necessarily correlate with how recognisable terms are to humans. This highlights the need to better understand how corpora are used in AI-driven methods for education, whether applied directly or indirectly via LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过文本嵌入评估多选题选项的语料库普遍性，发现正确答案显著更普遍，影响AI教育应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型等语料驱动的AI方法在教育中广泛应用，但其频次主义特性可能影响行为。本研究聚焦多选题选项的语料库频率，探究语料普遍性是否足以识别正确答案，揭示现有AI方法在评估材料生成中的潜在偏差，强调理解语料库使用的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于文本嵌入的计算方法，评估多选题选项在大型语料库中的普遍性。使用专家和机器生成的多选题集，以维基百科为检索语料库，通过嵌入相似性度量选项的语料库频率。关键创新在于量化选项的普遍性差异，并比较LLM生成干扰项与专家创建选项的模式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个大型题集上，正确答案的语料库普遍性显著高于错误选项。始终选择最普遍选项的得分比随机基线高9.0%。LLM生成的干扰项与专家选项在普遍性模式上相似，但语料库普遍性与人类可识别性不相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语料库普遍性可作为识别正确答案的潜在信号，但需谨慎应用。研究揭示AI方法在教育中的频次主义偏见，强调理解语料库使用的必要性。未来需探索减少偏差的策略，并评估LLM生成内容的质量。

title: AD-Bench: A Real-World, Trajectory-Aware Advertising Analytics Benchmark for LLM Agents
abstract: While Large Language Model (LLM) agents have made remarkable progress on complex reasoning, evaluating them in real-world environments remains an open problem. Existing benchmarks are largely confined to idealized simulations and fail to capture specialized domains such as advertising and marketing analytics, where tasks require multi-round interaction with professional tools and where ground-truth answers quickly become obsolete as data and platform rules evolve. To address this, we propose AD-Bench, a benchmark built from real user marketing-analysis requests on a production advertising platform. AD-Bench introduces two key designs: (i) a dynamic ground-truth pipeline that replays expert tool-call trajectories to regenerate answers consistent with the current environment, mitigating answer obsolescence; and (ii) a trajectory-aware evaluation that jointly measures end-to-end answer correctness (Pass@k) and trajectory coverage. Requests are stratified into three difficulty levels (L1-L3) to probe multi-round, multi-tool collaboration. Experiments show that the best model, Claude-Opus-4.7, attains Pass@1 = 76.9% and Pass@3 = 80.4% with 82.7% trajectory coverage overall, yet drops sharply on L3 to Pass@1 = 61.4% and Pass@3 = 65.1%, revealing that even state-of-the-art agents have substantial gaps in complex advertising analytics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AD-Bench基准，用于评估LLM代理在真实广告分析环境中的多轮交互能力，通过动态真实标注和轨迹感知评估解决现有基准的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估基准多局限于理想化模拟，无法覆盖广告分析等专业领域，任务需要多轮与专业工具交互，且真实答案随数据与平台规则变化而快速失效。因此需要一个能反映真实环境、动态更新答案并评估中间轨迹的基准。
light_analysis.method: AD-Bench基于真实广告平台营销分析请求构建，包含动态真实标注管道：重放专家工具调用轨迹以生成与当前环境一致的答案，缓解答案过时问题；同时采用轨迹感知评估，联合衡量端到端答案正确性（Pass@k）和轨迹覆盖率。请求按难度分为三级（L1-L3），测试多轮多工具协作能力。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型Claude-Opus-4.7总体Pass@1=76.9%，Pass@3=80.4%，轨迹覆盖82.7%；但在L3级别大幅下降至Pass@1=61.4%，Pass@3=65.1%，表明当前顶尖代理在复杂广告分析任务中仍存在显著不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: AD-Bench提供了更贴近真实世界的评估环境，揭示了LLM代理在广告分析领域多轮、多工具协作任务中的性能瓶颈，为模型改进指明方向，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他专业领域。

title: ViMedCSS: A Vietnamese Medical Code-Switching Speech Dataset & Benchmark
abstract: Code-switching (CS), which is when Vietnamese speech uses English words like drug names or procedures, is a common phenomenon in Vietnamese medical communication. This creates challenges for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems, especially in low-resource languages like Vietnamese. Current most ASR systems struggle to recognize correctly English medical terms within Vietnamese sentences, and no benchmark addresses this challenge. In this paper, we construct a 34-hour Vietnamese Medical Code-Switching Speech dataset (ViMedCSS) containing 16,576 utterances. Each utterance includes at least one English medical term drawn from a curated bilingual lexicon covering five medical topics. Using this dataset, we evaluate several state-of-the-art ASR models and examine different specific fine-tuning strategies for improving medical term recognition to investigate the best approach to solve in the dataset. Experimental results show that Vietnamese-optimized models perform better on general segments, while multilingual pretraining helps capture English insertions. The combination of both approaches yields the best balance between overall and code-switched accuracy. This work provides the first benchmark for Vietnamese medical code-switching and offers insights into effective domain adaptation for low-resource, multilingual ASR systems.

light_analysis.overview: 构建越南语医疗代码切换语音数据集ViMedCSS，评估多种ASR模型，首次为低资源语言医疗代码切换提供基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 越南语医疗交流中频繁出现代码切换，混用英语医学术语，对ASR系统构成挑战。现有系统难以正确识别越南语句子中的英语术语，且缺乏针对此问题的基准测试。该问题在低资源语言中尤为突出，影响医疗领域的语音应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 构建ViMedCSS数据集，包含34小时、16,576条话语，每条至少含一个来自双语词表的英语医学术语，覆盖5个医疗主题。评估多种SOTA ASR模型，并探索不同微调策略以提升医学术语识别。
light_analysis.result: 越南语优化模型在一般语音片段上表现更优，而多语言预训练有助于识别英语插入词。结合两种策略可在整体准确率和代码切换准确率之间取得最佳平衡，具体指标未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次为越南语医疗代码切换语音识别提供了基准，揭示了领域自适应策略的有效性，对低资源多语言ASR系统开发具有参考价值。未来可扩展数据集规模或探索更多微调方法。

title: A Jointly Efficient and Optimal Algorithm for Heteroskedastic Generalized Linear Bandits with Adversarial Corruptions
abstract: We consider the problem of heteroskedastic generalized linear bandits (GLBs) with adversarial corruptions, which subsumes heteroskedastic linear bandits and logistic/Poisson bandits, in the presence of adversarial corruptions. We propose HCW-GLB-OMD, which consists of two components: an online mirror descent (OMD)-based estimator and Hessian-based confidence weights to achieve corruption robustness. This is computationally efficient in that it only requires ${O}(1)$ space and time complexity per iteration. Under the self-concordance assumption on the link function, we show a regret bound of $\tilde{O}\left( d \sqrt{\sum_t g(τ_t) \dotμ_{t,\star}} + d^2 g_{\max} κ+ d (g_{\max} + κ) C \right)$, where $\dotμ_{t,\star}$ is the slope of $μ$ around the optimal arm at time $t$, $g(τ_t)$'s are potentially exogenously time-varying dispersions (e.g., $g(τ_t) = σ_t^2$ for heteroskedastic linear bandits, $g(τ_t) = 1$ for Bernoulli and Poisson), $g_{\max} = \max_{t \in [T]} g(τ_t)$ is the maximum dispersion, and $C \geq 0$ is the total corruption budget of the adversary. We complement this with a lower bound of $\tildeΩ(d \sqrt{\sum_t g(τ_t) \dotμ_{t,\star}} + d C)$, unifying previous problem-specific lower bounds. Thus, our algorithm achieves, up to a $κ$-factor in the corruption term, instance-wise minimax optimality simultaneously across various instances of heteroskedastic GLBs with adversarial corruptions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HCW-GLB-OMD算法，首次在对抗性腐败下实现异方差广义线性bandits的计算高效与实例级最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 异方差广义线性bandits（如线性、逻辑、泊松bandits）在实际中常受对抗性腐败影响，现有方法要么计算复杂，要么无法同时处理异方差和腐败，缺乏统一的鲁棒高效算法。本研究旨在设计一种计算高效（每次迭代O(1)空间和时间）且遗憾界最优的算法，以应对腐败，填补该领域空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出HCW-GLB-OMD算法，融合两个组件：（1）基于在线镜像下降（OMD）的估计器，用于高效参数更新；（2）基于Hessian的置信权重，利用自协调假设构造时变方差鲁棒置信集。算法每轮仅需常数空间和时间，通过引入腐败预算C，在遗憾界中显式建模腐败影响，实现对抗鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在自协调链接函数假设下，导出遗憾界为Õ(d√∑_t g(τ_t) μ̇_{t,*} + d² g_max κ + d(g_max+κ)C)，其中g(τ_t)为时变分散度，C为腐败预算。同时给出下界Ω̃(d√∑_t g(τ_t) μ̇_{t,*} + dC)，证明算法在腐败项误差κ因子内达到实例级极小化最优，统一了多种异方差问题的下界。
light_analysis.conclusion: HCW-GLB-OMD算法首次实现了异方差广义线性bandits在对抗性腐败下的计算高效与理论最优性统一。其常数级空间时间开销和严格的遗憾界使其适用于在线广告、推荐系统等易受数据污染的场景。未来可探索放松自协调假设或扩展至更复杂反馈结构。

title: SoK: The Pitfalls of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cybersecurity
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has achieved remarkable success in domains requiring sequential decision-making, motivating its application to cybersecurity problems. However, transitioning DRL from laboratory simulations to bespoke cyber environments can introduce numerous issues. This is further exacerbated by the often adversarial, non-stationary, and partially-observable nature of most cybersecurity tasks. In this paper, we identify and systematize 11 methodological pitfalls that frequently occur in DRL for cybersecurity (DRL4Sec) literature across the stages of environment modeling, agent training, performance evaluation, and system deployment. By analyzing 66 significant DRL4Sec papers (2018-2025), we quantify the prevalence of each pitfall and find an average of over five pitfalls per paper. We demonstrate the practical impact of these pitfalls using controlled experiments in (i) autonomous cyber defense, (ii) adversarial malware creation, and (iii) web security testing environments. Finally, we provide actionable recommendations for each pitfall to support the development of more rigorous and deployable DRL-based security systems.

light_analysis.overview: 系统化识别并分析了深度强化学习在网络安全应用中的11个方法论陷阱，通过实验验证其影响并提出改进建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度强化学习在网络安全中潜力巨大，但实际部署常因环境建模、训练评估等阶段的陷阱而失败。现有文献缺乏系统性梳理，导致研究人员重复相同错误，阻碍了可信赖安全系统的开发。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过识别常见陷阱并量化其普遍性，推动更严谨的方法论。
light_analysis.method: 本文对2018-2025年间66篇DRL4Sec论文进行系统化分析，归纳出11个方法论陷阱，涵盖环境建模、智能体训练、性能评估和系统部署四个阶段。随后在自主网络防御、对抗性恶意软件生成和Web安全测试三种环境中设计控制实验，定量展示陷阱的实际影响。
light_analysis.result: 分析发现每篇论文平均包含超过5个陷阱，量化了各陷阱的普遍性。控制实验表明，这些陷阱会导致性能显著下降（如防御成功率降低、攻击效率减弱），验证了方法论缺陷的实践危害。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统化总结DRL4Sec中的方法论陷阱，提供可操作建议以提升研究严谨性和系统可部署性。该工作有助于推动DRL在网络安全领域的可靠应用，并为未来研究设立方法论标准。

title: Patches of Nonlinearity: Instruction Vectors in Large Language Models
abstract: Despite the recent success of instruction-tuned language models and their ubiquitous usage, very little is known of how models process instructions internally. In this work, we address this gap from a mechanistic point of view by investigating how instruction-specific representations are constructed and utilized in different stages of post-training: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Via causal mediation, we identify that instruction representation is fairly localized in models. These representations, which we call Instruction Vectors (IVs), demonstrate a curious juxtaposition of linear separability along with non-linear causal interaction, broadly questioning the scope of the linear representation hypothesis commonplace in mechanistic interpretability. To disentangle the non-linear causal interaction, we propose a novel method to localize information processing in language models that is free from the implicit linear assumptions of patching-based techniques. We find that, conditioned on the task representations formed in the early layers, different information pathways are selected in the later layers to solve that task, i.e., IVs act as circuit selectors.

light_analysis.overview: 发现指令向量兼具线性可分性和非线性因果交互，并提出一种免线性假设的信息定位方法，揭示其作为电路选择器的作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令微调语言模型虽广泛使用，但其内部如何处理指令尚不清楚。现有机械可解释性常依赖线性表示假设，无法解释非线性因果交互。本文旨在从因果中介视角揭示指令表示的构建和利用，弥补这一空白，并质疑线性假设的普适性。
light_analysis.method: 通过因果中介分析在SFT和DPO后训练阶段识别指令向量（IVs），发现其呈现线性可分与非线性因果交互并存的特性。为解耦非线性交互，提出一种无需线性假设的修补方法，定位信息处理路径。结果表明，IVs在早期层形成任务表示后，作为电路选择器引导后续层的信息通路。
light_analysis.result: 指令表示在模型中高度局部化；IVs同时具有线性可分性和非线性因果交互，挑战了线性表示假设。提出的方法成功定位了非线性因果交互，验证了IVs的电路选择功能，揭示了不同任务选择不同信息路径的机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究从机制上揭示了指令微调模型中指令表示的内在特性，提出了免线性假设的分析方法，为理解模型内部指令处理提供了新范式。成果可用于模型解释和编辑，但非线性交互的完全解耦仍需进一步探索。

title: Gradient Flow Through Diagram Expansions: Learning Regimes and Explicit Solutions
abstract: We develop a general mathematical framework to analyze scaling regimes and derive explicit analytic solutions for gradient flow (GF) in large learning problems. Our key innovation is a formal power series expansion of the loss evolution, with coefficients encoded by diagrams akin to Feynman diagrams. We show that this expansion has a well-defined large-size limit that can be used to reveal different learning phases and, in some cases, to obtain explicit solutions of the nonlinear GF. We focus on learning Canonical Polyadic (CP) decompositions of high-order tensors, and show that this model has several distinct extreme lazy and rich GF regimes such as free evolution, NTK and under- and over-parameterized mean-field. We show that these regimes depend on the parameter scaling, tensor order, and symmetry of the model in a specific and subtle way. Moreover, we propose a general approach to summing the formal loss expansion by reducing it to a PDE; in a wide range of scenarios, it turns out to be first-order and solvable by the method of characteristics. We observe a very good agreement of our theoretical predictions with experimental results.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图表展开的通用框架，分析梯度流缩放机制并得到高阶张量CP分解的显式解。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是理解大规模学习问题中梯度流的不同学习阶段和机制。现有方法缺乏统一框架来分析非线性梯度流的缩放行为，难以获得解析解。该问题重要因为梯度流驱动深度学习训练，揭示其缩放机制有助于理解模型泛化与优化动力学，但现有理论在分析复杂模型时存在局限。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是损失演化的形式幂级数展开，系数由类费曼图编码，在大尺寸极限下定义良好。聚焦高阶张量CP分解，分析参数缩放、张量阶数和对称性对梯度流机制的影响，包括自由演化、NTK、欠/过参数化平均场等极端惰性和丰富机制。此外，将损失展开归结为一阶PDE，利用特征法求解，实现显式解。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导揭示了不同梯度流机制依赖于参数缩放、张量阶数和对称性的微妙方式。通过将损失展开化为可解PDE，得到了非线性梯度流的显式解析解。实验结果与理论预测高度一致，验证了框架的有效性。具体数值指标未在摘要中给出，但表明良好匹配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作提出了一个统一的数学框架，用于分析大规模学习问题中梯度流的缩放机制并获取显式解。学术价值在于为理解深度学习训练动力学提供了新工具，特别是张量分解场景。实际应用可指导模型缩放和优化策略选择。未来可扩展至其他模型架构和初始化方案，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Efficient Training of Boltzmann Generators Using Off-Policy Log-Dispersion Regularization
abstract: Sampling from unnormalized probability densities is a central challenge in computational science. Boltzmann generators are generative models that enable independent sampling from the Boltzmann distribution of physical systems at a given temperature. However, their practical success depends on data-efficient training, as both simulation data and target energy evaluations are costly. To this end, we propose off-policy log-dispersion regularization (LDR), a novel regularization framework that builds on a generalization of the log-variance objective. We apply LDR in the off-policy setting in combination with standard data-based training objectives, without requiring additional on-policy samples. LDR acts as a shape regularizer of the energy landscape by leveraging additional information in the form of target energy labels. The proposed regularization framework is broadly applicable, supporting unbiased or biased simulation datasets as well as purely variational training without access to target samples. Across all benchmarks, LDR improves both final performance and data efficiency, with sample efficiency gains of up to one order of magnitude.

light_analysis.overview: 提出离策略对数色散正则化方法，高效训练Boltzmann生成器，样本效率提升达一个数量级。
light_analysis.motivation: 从非归一化概率密度中采样是计算科学的核心挑战。Boltzmann生成器可独立采样物理系统的玻尔兹曼分布，但其实际成功依赖于数据高效训练，因为模拟数据和目标能量评估成本高昂。现有训练方法需要大量样本，样本效率低，限制了应用。因此，需要一种能利用已有数据并减少额外样本需求的正则化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出离策略对数色散正则化（LDR），基于log-variance目标的一般化，在离策略设置下与标准数据训练目标结合，无需额外在策略样本。LDR通过目标能量标签作为额外信息，对能量景观进行形状正则化。该方法支持无偏或有偏模拟数据集，以及纯变分训练（无需目标样本），具有广泛适用性。
light_analysis.result: 在所有基准测试中，LDR均提升最终性能和样本效率，样本效率增益高达一个数量级。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确表示相比基线方法，LDR显著改善了数据利用效率，尤其在数据稀缺场景下效果突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: LDR是一种有效的正则化框架，能显著提升Boltzmann生成器的训练效率和样本质量。其离策略特性降低了对昂贵模拟数据的依赖，具有重要实际应用价值。未来可探索扩展到更复杂物理系统或与其他生成模型结合。潜在局限性包括对能量标签质量的敏感性。

title: Hierarchical Concept-to-Appearance Guidance for Multi-Subject Image Generation
abstract: Multi-subject image generation aims to synthesize images that faithfully preserve the identities of multiple reference subjects while following textual instructions. However, existing methods often suffer from identity inconsistency and limited compositional control, as they rely on diffusion models to implicitly associate text prompts with reference images. In this work, we propose Hierarchical Concept-to-Appearance Guidance (CAG), a framework that provides explicit, structured supervision from high-level concepts to fine-grained appearances. At the conceptual level, we introduce a VAE dropout training strategy that randomly omits reference VAE features, encouraging the model to rely more on robust semantic signals from a Visual Language Model (VLM) and thereby promoting consistent concept-level generation in the absence of complete appearance cues. At the appearance level, we integrate the VLM-derived correspondences into a correspondence-aware masked attention module within the Diffusion Transformer (DiT). This module restricts each text token to attend only to its matched reference regions, ensuring precise attribute binding and reliable multi-subject composition. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the multi-subject image generation, substantially improving prompt following and subject consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层级概念到外观引导框架(CAG)，通过VAE dropout和对应感知掩码注意力机制，实现多主体图像生成中身份一致性和精细组合控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多主体图像生成方法依赖扩散模型隐式关联文本提示和参考图像，导致身份不一致和有限的组合控制。用户期望生成图像能精确保持多个参考主体的身份特征并遵循文本指令，但现有方法难以平衡概念一致性和外观细节，尤其是在多个主体共存时容易出现属性混淆或主体丢失问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出CAG框架，包含两级引导：概念层采用VAE dropout训练策略随机丢弃参考VAE特征，迫使模型更依赖视觉语言模型的鲁棒语义信号，促进概念级一致性生成；外观层在DiT中集成对应感知掩码注意力模块，利用VLM导出的对应关系限制每个文本标记仅关注其匹配的参考区域，确保精确属性绑定。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明该方法在多主体图像生成任务上达到最优性能。与现有方法相比，显著提升了文本提示遵循程度和主体一致性，能够可靠地生成包含多个参考主体且与提示语义匹配的图像，减少了身份混淆和细节错误。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出层级概念到外观引导框架，从概念和外观两个层面提供显式结构化监督，有效解决了多主体生成中的身份一致性和组合控制问题。该方法为基于扩散的生成模型提供了新的范式，未来可扩展至更多参考主体和复杂场景，但计算成本和训练复杂度有待优化。

title: Chain-of-Goals Hierarchical Policy for Long-Horizon Offline Goal-Conditioned RL
abstract: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning remains challenging for long-horizon tasks. While hierarchical approaches mitigate this issue by decomposing tasks, most existing methods rely on separate high- and low-level networks and generate only a single intermediate subgoal, leaving several structural limitations in long-horizon decision-making. To address this limitation, we draw inspiration from chain-of-thought reasoning and propose the Chain-of-Goals Hierarchical Policy (CoGHP), a novel framework that reformulates hierarchical decision-making as autoregressive sequence modeling within a unified architecture. Given a state and a final goal, CoGHP autoregressively generates a sequence of latent subgoals followed by the primitive action, where each latent subgoal acts as a reasoning step that conditions subsequent predictions. To implement this efficiently, we introduce an MLP-Mixer backbone, which supports cross-token communication and captures structural relationships among state, goal, latent subgoals, and action. Across challenging navigation and manipulation benchmarks, CoGHP consistently outperforms strong offline baselines, demonstrating improved performance on long-horizon tasks. Project page: https://wlsdn9350.github.io/projects/coghp/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Chain-of-Goals分层策略，通过自回归序列建模统一架构，解决长期离线目标条件强化学习中的任务分解问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线目标条件强化学习在长时域任务中仍具挑战性。现有分层方法通常依赖独立的高低层网络且仅生成单个中间子目标，导致决策结构受限。受思维链启发，需要一种更灵活的序列化子目标生成方式，以提升长期决策能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Chain-of-Goals分层策略（CoGHP），将分层决策建模为统一架构中的自回归序列生成。给定状态和最终目标，模型依次生成一系列潜在子目标，最后生成原始动作，每个子目标作为推理步骤影响后续预测。采用MLP-Mixer骨干网络实现跨token通信，捕获状态、目标、子目标和动作之间的结构关系。
light_analysis.result: 在导航和操作基准任务上，CoGHP持续优于强离线基线方法，尤其在长时域任务中性能提升显著。具体性能指标如成功率或平均回报优于对比方法，表明其有效克服了现有分层方法的局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoGHP通过将分层决策转化为自回归子目标序列生成，显著提升了离线目标条件强化学习在长时域任务中的性能。其统一架构和MLP-Mixer设计为分层强化学习提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的子目标表示及在线微调扩展。

title: PISCES: Annotation-free Text-to-Video Post-Training via Optimal Transport-Aligned Rewards
abstract: Text-to-video (T2V) generation aims to synthesize videos with high visual quality and temporal consistency that are semantically aligned with input text. Reward-based post-training has emerged as a promising direction to improve the quality and semantic alignment of generated videos. However, recent methods either rely on large-scale human preference annotations or operate on misaligned embeddings from pre-trained vision-language models, leading to limited scalability or suboptimal supervision. We present $\texttt{PISCES}$, an annotation-free post-training algorithm that addresses these limitations via a novel Dual Optimal Transport (OT)-aligned Rewards module. To align reward signals with human judgment, $\texttt{PISCES}$ uses OT to bridge text and video embeddings at both distributional and discrete token levels, enabling reward supervision to fulfill two objectives: (i) a Distributional OT-aligned Quality Reward that captures overall visual quality and temporal coherence; and (ii) a Discrete Token-level OT-aligned Semantic Reward that enforces semantic, spatio-temporal correspondence between text and video tokens. To our knowledge, $\texttt{PISCES}$ is the first to improve annotation-free reward supervision in generative post-training through the lens of OT. Experiments on both short- and long-video generation show that $\texttt{PISCES}$ outperforms both annotation-based and annotation-free methods on VBench across Quality and Semantic scores, with human preference studies further validating its effectiveness. We show that the Dual OT-aligned Rewards module is compatible with multiple optimization paradigms, including direct backpropagation and reinforcement learning fine-tuning. Project page: https://roar-ai.github.io/pisces
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Project page and code: https://roar-ai.github.io/pisces/

light_analysis.overview: 提出PISCES，一种无需人工注释的文本到视频后训练算法，通过双最优传输对齐奖励模块，同时优化视觉质量和语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到视频生成需高视觉质量和时间一致性，现有后训练方法依赖大规模人工偏好注释或利用预训练模型的不对齐嵌入，导致可扩展性差或监督次优。PISCES旨在解决这些局限，实现无注释的高效后训练。
light_analysis.method: PISCES核心是双最优传输（OT）对齐奖励模块：分布级OT质量奖励捕捉整体视觉质量与时序一致性，离散令牌级OT语义奖励强制文本与视频令牌的语义时空对应。无需人工注释，兼容直接反向传播和强化学习微调。
light_analysis.result: 在短和长视频生成任务上，PISCES在VBench质量和语义评分上均超越基于注释和无注释方法；人类偏好研究进一步验证其有效性。该奖励模块可适配多种优化范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: PISCES首次通过最优传输改进无注释奖励监督，提升文本到视频生成质量，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的奖励组合与更大规模验证。

title: Learning More from Less: Unlocking Internal Representations for Benchmark Compression
abstract: The prohibitive cost of evaluating Large Language Models (LLMs) necessitates efficient alternatives to full-scale benchmarking. Prevalent approaches address this by identifying a small coreset of items to approximate full-benchmark performance. However, existing methods must estimate a reliable item profile from response patterns across many source models, which becomes statistically unstable when the source pool is small.
