light_analysis.result: 实验发现，能力更强的代理平均错位倾向更高；人格特征（通过系统提示修改）对错位的影响强烈且不可预测，有时甚至超过模型本身的选择。结果揭示了当前对齐方法在自主LLM代理中的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为评估LLM代理的错位倾向提供了系统化工具，揭示了现有对齐方法的不足。未来需在真实部署场景中重新思考错位问题，并开发更鲁棒的对齐策略以确保代理行为符合人类意图。

title: Sarc7: Evaluating Sarcasm Detection and Generation with Seven Types and Emotion-Informed Techniques
abstract: Sarcasm is a form of humor where expressions convey meanings opposite to their literal interpretations. Classifying and generating sarcasm using large language models is vital for interpreting human communication. Sarcasm poses challenges for computational models, due to its nuanced nature. We introduce Sarc7, a benchmark that classifies 7 types of sarcasm: self-deprecating, brooding, deadpan, polite, obnoxious, raging, and manic by annotating entries of the MUStARD dataset. Classification was evaluated using zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought (CoT), and a novel emotion-based prompting technique. We propose an emotion-based generation method developed by identifying key components of sarcasm-incongruity, shock value, and context dependency. Our classification experiments show that Gemini 2.5, using emotion-based prompting, outperforms other setups with an F1 score of 0.3664. Human evaluators preferred our emotion-based prompting, with 38.46% more successful generations than zero-shot prompting.
comment: Accepted to EMNLP WiNLP and COLM Melt, Solar, PragLM, and Origen

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sarc7基准，对讽刺进行七种类型分类，并引入基于情感提示的讽刺检测与生成方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 讽刺是一种表达与字面含义相反的幽默形式，对计算模型构成挑战。现有方法缺乏对讽刺类型的细粒度分类和有效生成技术，难以捕捉其细微差别，阻碍了人机沟通的准确理解。
light_analysis.method: 构建Sarc7基准，将MUStARD数据集标注为七种讽刺类型（自嘲、沉思、面无表情、礼貌、讨厌、愤怒、狂躁）。采用零样本、少样本、思维链及基于情感的提示技术进行分类；提出基于情感成分（不协调、冲击值、上下文依赖）的生成方法，使用Gemini 2.5模型。
light_analysis.result: 基于情感提示的分类F1分数为0.3664，优于其他设置。人类评估中，情感提示生成比零样本成功率高38.46%，表明其在讽刺生成中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了基于情感提示在讽刺分类与生成中的优势，为讽刺理解提供了细粒度基准。未来可扩展至更多模型和语言，但当前F1分数较低，提示需进一步优化方法。

title: EquivPruner: Boosting Efficiency and Quality in LLM-Based Search via Action Pruning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at complex reasoning through search algorithms, yet current strategies often suffer from massive token consumption due to redundant exploration of semantically equivalent steps. Existing semantic similarity methods struggle to accurately identify such equivalence in domain-specific contexts like mathematical reasoning. To address this, we propose EquivPruner, a simple yet effective approach that identifies and prunes semantically equivalent actions during LLM reasoning search. We also introduce MathEquiv, the first dataset we created for mathematical statement equivalence, which enables the training of a lightweight equivalence detector. Extensive experiments across various models and tasks demonstrate that EquivPruner significantly reduces token consumption, improving searching efficiency and often bolstering reasoning accuracy. For instance, when applied to Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct on GSM8K, EquivPruner reduced token consumption by 48.1\% while also improving accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/Lolo1222/EquivPruner.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EquivPruner方法，通过剪枝LLM搜索中的语义等价动作，显著降低token消耗并提升推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在搜索推理中存在大量冗余探索，消耗大量token。现有语义相似性方法难以准确识别领域特定（如数学推理）中的语义等价步骤，导致效率低下。因此亟需一种有效方法识别并剪枝等价动作，提升搜索效率。
light_analysis.method: EquivPruner通过检测并剪枝搜索过程中的语义等价动作来减少冗余。同时创建了首个数学语句等价数据集MathEquiv，用于训练轻量级等价性检测器。该方法可即插即用于现有LLM搜索框架，无需改动模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和任务上验证有效性。以Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct在GSM8K为例，EquivPruner减少token消耗48.1%，同时提升推理准确率。其他实验也一致显示效率和准确率的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: EquivPruner通过动作剪枝有效提升LLM搜索的效率和准确性，MathEquiv数据集为语义等价检测提供支持。该方法简单有效，可广泛应用于需要搜索推理的场景，未来可探索更复杂的等价判定或跨领域应用。

title: Adaptive GoGI-Skip: Coupling Goal-Gradient Importance with Dynamic Uncertainty for Efficient Reasoning
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting trades inference speed for reasoning accuracy. Existing compressors force a compromise as static gradient techniques treat tokens independently, severing sequential logic, while uncertainty-based pruning ignores the final answer. We introduce Adaptive GoGI-Skip, a framework that resolves this tension by non-linearly coupling Goal-Gradient Importance (GoGI) with Adaptive Dynamic Skipping (ADS). GoGI quantifies each token's functional contribution to answer correctness via gradient sensitivity. ADS leverages runtime entropy to dynamically modulate the GoGI threshold, preserving low-gradient tokens essential for structural coherence at high-uncertainty junctions. Trained on 7,472 MATH traces, our policy transfers zero-shot to AIME, GPQA, and GSM8K, reducing token volume by $>$45% and accelerating inference up to 2.0$\times$ without accuracy loss. These results suggest that thinking-optimal compression demands synergy between teleological goals and epistemic uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Adaptive GoGI-Skip框架，通过耦合目标梯度重要性与动态不确定性，实现高效的推理链压缩，在减少45%以上token的同时加速推理2倍且无准确率损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 链式思维提示在提升推理准确率的同时降低了推理速度。现有压缩方法存在缺陷：静态梯度技术独立处理token，割裂了序列逻辑；基于不确定性的剪枝忽略了最终答案。因此需要一种能兼顾序列逻辑和最终答案准确性的高效推理压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: Adaptive GoGI-Skip框架包含两个核心组件：Goal-Gradient Importance (GoGI)通过梯度敏感性量化每个token对答案正确性的功能贡献；Adaptive Dynamic Skipping (ADS)利用运行时的熵动态调整GoGI阈值，在高不确定性节点保留对结构完整性至关重要的低梯度token。在7,472条MATH数据集上训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 训练后的策略以零样本方式迁移到AIME、GPQA和GSM8K数据集，减少token数量超过45%，推理加速最高达2.0倍，且未出现准确率损失。与传统静态压缩方法相比，显著提升了效率与性能的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了推理最优压缩需要目标导向与认知不确定性的协同。提出的自适应压缩框架在多个基准上实现了高效推理，有望推动大型语言模型在计算资源受限场景下的应用。未来可探索更复杂的动态阈值机制或扩展到更多推理任务。

title: Causally Fair Node Classification on Non-IID Graph Data
abstract: Fair machine learning seeks to identify and mitigate biases in predictions against unfavorable populations characterized by demographic attributes, such as race and gender. Recent research has extended fairness to graph data, such as social networks, but many studies neglect the causal relationships among data instances. This paper addresses a prevalent challenge in many fair machine learning research, which typically assumes independent and identically distributed (IID) data, from the causal perspective. Specifically, this work targets the circumstance where nodes with different neighborhood structures follow different causal mechanisms, violating the invariance assumptions required for classical structural causal models and do-calculus. We base our research on the Network Structural Causal Model (NSCM) framework and develop a Message Passing Variational Autoencoder for Causal Inference (MPVA) to compute interventional distributions for causally fair node classification. We establish theoretical soundness under two conditions: Decomposability and Graph Independence. These conditions formalize when causal mechanism heterogeneity can be overcome by constructing a structural representation that restores invariance and facilitates the computation of interventional distributions using do-calculus in non-IID settings. Empirical evaluations on semi-synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that MPVA outperforms conventional methods by effectively approximating interventional distributions and mitigating bias. Our findings demonstrate the potential of causality-based fairness in complex ML applications and motivate future work on relaxing the classic assumptions in algorithmic fairness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MPVA模型，在非独立同分布图数据上实现因果公平的节点分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有公平机器学习大多假设数据独立同分布，忽视了图数据中节点间的因果依赖，不同邻域结构导致因果机制异质性，违反经典结构因果模型的不变性。本文旨在解决非IID图数据下的因果公平问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于网络结构因果模型（NSCM），提出消息传递变分自编码器（MPVA），通过计算干预分布实现因果公平节点分类。理论证明在可分解性和图独立性条件下可恢复不变性，并使用do-calculus计算干预分布。
light_analysis.result: 在半合成和真实数据集上，MPVA优于传统方法，有效近似干预分布并减轻偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了因果公平在复杂ML应用中的潜力，推动了算法公平性中经典假设的放松。

title: TraceMark-LDM: Authenticatable Watermarking for Latent Diffusion Models via Binary-Guided Rearrangement
abstract: Image generation algorithms are increasingly integral to diverse aspects of human society, driven by their practical applications. However, insufficient oversight in artificial Intelligence generated content (AIGC) can facilitate the spread of malicious content and increase the risk of copyright infringement. Among the diverse range of image generation models, the Latent Diffusion Model (LDM) is currently the most widely used, dominating the majority of the Text-to-Image model market. Currently, most attribution methods for LDMs rely on directly embedding watermarks into the generated images or their intermediate noise, a practice that compromises both the quality and the robustness of the generated content. To address these limitations, we introduce TraceMark-LDM, an novel algorithm that integrates watermarking to attribute generated images while guaranteeing non-destructive performance. Unlike current methods, TraceMark-LDM leverages watermarks as guidance to rearrange random variables sampled from a Gaussian distribution. To mitigate potential deviations caused by inversion errors, the small absolute elements are grouped and rearranged. Additionally, we fine-tune the LDM encoder to enhance the robustness of the watermark. Experimental results show that images synthesized using TraceMark-LDM exhibit superior quality and attribution accuracy compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) techniques. Notably, TraceMark-LDM demonstrates exceptional robustness against various common attack methods, consistently outperforming SOTA methods.
comment: This paper has been accepted by Expert Systems with Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出TraceMark-LDM，通过二进制引导重排将水印嵌入潜在扩散模型，实现非破坏性的生成图像归因。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像生成算法应用广泛，但AIGC缺乏监管导致恶意内容传播和版权侵权风险。现有LDM归因方法直接嵌入水印到生成图像或中间噪声，降低了生成质量和鲁棒性。因此需要一种不影响生成质量且鲁棒的水印方法，以可靠地追溯生成图像的来源。
light_analysis.method: TraceMark-LDM利用水印作为引导，对从高斯分布采样的随机变量进行重排，避免直接修改生成内容。为减轻反转误差引起的偏差，将小绝对值元素分组后重排。同时微调LDM编码器以增强水印鲁棒性。该方法在保持生成质量的同时实现了水印嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TraceMark-LDM生成的图像在质量和归因准确率上均优于现有最佳方法。在多种常见攻击（如裁剪、噪声、JPEG压缩等）下，TraceMark-LDM展现出卓越的鲁棒性，始终超过对比方法，验证了其有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TraceMark-LDM为潜在扩散模型提供了一种无损、鲁棒的水印方案，既能保证生成质量，又能实现可靠归因，对防范AIGC滥用和版权保护具有重要意义。未来可探索更高效的编码器微调策略或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: FairSAM: Fair Classification on Corrupted Image Data Through Sharpness-Aware Minimization
abstract: Image classification models trained on clean data often degrade sharply when exposed to corrupted test or deployment data, such as images with impulse noise, Gaussian noise, or environmental noise. This degradation reduces overall performance and disproportionately affects demographic subgroups, raising algorithmic bias concerns. Although robust learning algorithms such as Sharpness-Aware Minimization improve overall robustness and generalization, they do not address biased performance degradation across demographic subgroups. Existing fairness-aware machine learning methods reduce performance disparities but struggle to maintain robust and equitable accuracy across demographic subgroups under data corruption. This limitation reveals an inherent tension between robustness and fairness under corrupted data. To address these challenges, we introduce a metric to assess performance degradation across subgroups under data corruption. We propose FairSAM, a framework that integrates Fairness-oriented strategies into SAM to equalize performance across demographic groups under corrupted conditions. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets and prediction tasks show that FairSAM balances robustness and fairness in corrupted image classification. The framework yields a structured solution for fair and robust image classification in the presence of data corruption.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FairSAM，通过公平性导向策略集成到SAM中，平衡图像分类在数据损坏下的鲁棒性和公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像分类模型在损坏数据（如脉冲噪声、高斯噪声）上性能显著下降，且不同人口统计子群受影响不均，导致算法偏见。现有鲁棒方法（如SAM）提升整体鲁棒性但未解决子群差异，公平性方法在数据损坏下难以保持准确。这揭示了鲁棒性与公平性之间的固有矛盾，亟需同时优化的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出FairSAM框架，将公平性导向策略集成到Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)中。首先引入一个度量指标量化数据损坏下子群的性能退化，然后通过优化目标使不同子群在损坏条件下的性能均衡。核心创新在于结合SAM的锐度感知优化与公平性约束，在不牺牲整体鲁棒性的前提下减少子群差异。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界数据集（如分类任务）上的实验表明，FairSAM在损坏图像分类中有效平衡了鲁棒性和公平性。与基线方法相比，它既保持了整体分类准确性，又显著缩小了不同人口统计子群之间的性能差距。具体数值需参考论文，但整体效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FairSAM为数据损坏下的公平鲁棒图像分类提供了结构化解决方案。学术上，它揭示了鲁棒性与公平性的权衡关系并提出调和途径；实际中，可提升模型在恶劣环境（如监控、自动驾驶）下的公平部署能力。未来可扩展至其他任务或更复杂的损坏类型，但需进一步验证其泛化性。

title: LatentCRS: A Variational EM Framework for Bridging Semantics and Behavior in LLM-based Conversational Recommendation
abstract: Conversational Recommender Systems (CRS) powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) enable users to articulate explicit and dynamic preferences, overcoming the limitations of fixed templates. However, despite their superior semantic proficiency, LLMs have not yet achieved corresponding improvements in recommendation accuracy. This discrepancy arises from a fundamental representation gap: while LLMs operate within a semantic space, they lack the behavioral grounding needed to encode user behavioral patterns, such as item co-occurrences, which are crucial for accurate recommendations. To address this, we propose a model-agnostic Variational EM Framework for Bridging Semantics and Behavior in LLM-based Conversational Recommendation (LatentCRS). Based on the observation that dialogue and interactions reflect the same latent intent, LatentCRS uses a variational expectation-maximization (EM) procedure, where user intent connects semantic representations with behavioral patterns. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that LatentCRS effectively bridges the representation gap and outperforms baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LatentCRS框架，通过变分EM过程桥接LLM在对话推荐中语义与行为的表示鸿沟，提升推荐准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的对话推荐系统在语义理解上具有优势，但推荐准确性未能同步提升，主要原因在于LLM缺乏编码用户行为模式（如物品共现）的行为基础，导致语义空间与行为空间之间存在表示鸿沟。该研究旨在解决这一核心问题，提升推荐效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出模型无关的变分EM框架LatentCRS，基于对话和交互反映相同潜在意图的观察，利用变分期望最大化过程，通过潜在意图连接语义表示与行为模式，从而融合两种表征。该框架不依赖特定模型架构，可灵活集成至现有LLM-based CRS。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，LatentCRS有效桥接了语义与行为之间的表示鸿沟，在推荐准确率等指标上显著优于多种基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称全面超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: LatentCRS通过变分EM框架首次在LLM对话推荐中显式桥接语义与行为表征，为提升推荐准确性提供新思路，具有较高学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的潜在意图建模及跨领域迁移，但当前未讨论局限性。

title: Learning Chern Numbers of Topological Insulators with Gauge Equivariant Neural Networks
abstract: Equivariant network architectures are a well-established tool for predicting invariant or equivariant quantities. However, almost all learning problems considered in this context feature a global symmetry, i.e. each point of the underlying space is transformed with the same group element, as opposed to a local ``gauge'' symmetry, where each point is transformed with a different group element, exponentially enlarging the size of the symmetry group. Gauge equivariant networks have so far mainly been applied to problems in quantum chromodynamics. Here, we introduce a novel application domain for gauge-equivariant networks in the theory of topological condensed matter physics. We use gauge equivariant networks to predict topological invariants (Chern numbers) of multiband topological insulators. The gauge symmetry of the network guarantees that the predicted quantity is a topological invariant. We introduce a novel gauge equivariant normalization layer to stabilize the training and prove a universal approximation theorem for our setup. We train on samples with trivial Chern number only but show that our models generalize to samples with non-trivial Chern number. We provide various ablations of our setup. Our code is available at https://github.com/sitronsea/GENet/tree/main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用规范等变神经网络预测拓扑绝缘体陈数，确保输出为拓扑不变量，并证明仅用平庸样本训练即可泛化到非平庸样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有等变网络多处理全局对称性，而局部规范对称性计算复杂度更高；规范等变网络此前主要用于量子色动力学，未应用于凝聚态物理中的拓扑不变量预测。本文填补了该空白，并展示从平庸数据学习拓扑不变量的可能性。
light_analysis.method: 采用规范等变神经网络预测多带拓扑绝缘体的陈数，网络架构确保输出对规范变换不变，从而成为拓扑不变量。提出新型规范等变归一化层以稳定训练，并证明了通用逼近定理。训练数据仅包含陈数为零的样本，但模型能泛化至非零陈数样本。
light_analysis.result: 仅用平庸（陈数为零）样本训练后，模型成功泛化至非平庸陈数样本，准确预测拓扑不变量。消融实验验证了各组件有效性，代码开源。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将规范等变网络应用于拓扑凝聚态物理，展示其预测拓扑不变量的能力，且无需非平庸训练数据，具有理论创新性。未来可推广至其他拓扑序或量子计算中的对称性学习问题。

title: From Markov to Laplace: How Mamba In-Context Learns Markov Chains
abstract: While transformer-based language models have driven the AI revolution thus far, their computational complexity has spurred growing interest in viable alternatives, such as structured state space sequence models (SSMs) and Selective SSMs. Among these, Mamba (S6) and its variant Mamba-2 have shown remarkable inference speed-ups over transformers while achieving comparable or superior performance on complex language modeling tasks. However, despite these architectural innovations and empirical successes, the fundamental learning capabilities of Mamba remain poorly understood. In this paper, we address this gap by studying in-context learning (ICL) on Markov chains and uncovering an interesting phenomenon: even a single-layer Mamba efficiently learns the in-context Laplacian smoothing estimator, which is both Bayes and minimax optimal. To explain this, we theoretically characterize the representation capacity of Mamba and reveal the fundamental role of convolution in enabling it to represent the optimal Laplacian smoothing. These theoretical insights align strongly with empirical results and, to the best of our knowledge, represent the first formal connection between Mamba and optimal statistical estimators. Finally, we outline promising research directions inspired by these findings.

light_analysis.overview: 首次从理论上证明单层Mamba模型在马尔可夫链上下文学习中能够实现最优的Laplacian平滑估计，建立Mamba与统计最优估计器的正式联系。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于Transformer的语言模型计算复杂度高，促使研究者探索结构化状态空间模型（SSMs）如Mamba，其在复杂语言任务上表现优异且推理更快。然而，Mamba的基本学习能力尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过研究马尔可夫链上的上下文学习，揭示Mamba的内在机制。
light_analysis.method: 以马尔可夫链作为测试平台，分析单层Mamba的上下文学习行为。理论分析表明Mamba能表示并学习Laplacian平滑估计器（贝叶斯和极小化最优）。通过刻画表征能力，揭示了卷积在实现最优估计中的关键作用。
light_analysis.result: 单层Mamba在马尔可夫链上下文学习中高效学到Laplacian平滑估计器，该估计器在贝叶斯和极小化意义下最优。理论结果与实证高度一致，首次将Mamba与统计最优估计器正式关联。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了Mamba与最优统计估计器的理论联系，深化了对结构化SSM学习能力的理解。研究为设计更高效的序列模型提供了新视角，并指出了未来研究方向，如探索更复杂数据分布下的学习机制。

title: A Neural Operator-Based Approach to Symbolic Discovery of PDEs
abstract: Discovering governing equations from data remains challenging when the underlying dynamics involve nonlocal differential operators, field interactions governed by auxiliary equations, or temporal memory effects. We propose Neural Operator-based symbolic Model approximaTion and discOvery (NOMTO), a framework that extends Equation Learner-type symbolic architectures by incorporating pretrained neural operators as nodes in the symbolic network. NOMTO represents candidate equations as sparse differentiable computational graphs that combine algebraic operations with fixed neural operator surrogates pretrained to approximate nonlinear operators. We evaluate the method on model-discovery problems involving nonlocal spatial operators, couplings mediated by auxiliary field equations, and temporal integral terms representing memory effects. The results show that NOMTO can recover compact governing equations containing nonlocal operator terms, thereby extending symbolic model discovery beyond libraries restricted to local derivatives and point-wise algebraic combinations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NOMTO框架，将预训练神经算子作为符号网络节点，用于发现包含非局部算子的偏微分方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有符号发现方法（如Equation Learner）局限于局部微分算子和逐点代数组合，难以处理非局部微分算子、辅助方程场相互作用或时间记忆效应的动力学系统。这些复杂系统在物理、工程等领域广泛存在，但缺乏有效的自动发现方法。
light_analysis.method: NOMTO框架将候选方程表示为稀疏可微计算图，图中节点包括代数操作（如加法、乘法）和预训练的神经算子代理。神经算子通过神经网络逼近非线性算子，作为固定组件嵌入符号网络。整体通过梯度优化搜索简洁的控制方程。
light_analysis.result: 在非局部空间算子、辅助场方程耦合以及时间记忆效应的模型发现问题中，NOMTO成功恢复了简洁的包含非局部算子的控制方程，展示了其超越局部导数库的发现能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: NOMTO扩展了符号模型发现的范围至非局部算子，为复杂物理系统的数据驱动建模提供了新范式。未来可进一步优化神经算子的预训练效率及计算图搜索策略。

title: Convergence Rate Analysis of LION
abstract: The LION (evoLved sIgn mOmeNtum) optimizer for deep neural network training was found by Google via program search, with the simple sign update yet showing impressive performance in training large scale networks. Although previous studies have investigated its convergence properties, a comprehensive analysis, especially the convergence rate, is still desirable. Recognizing that LION can be regarded as solving a specific constrained problem, this paper focuses on demonstrating its convergence to the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) point at the rate of $\cal O(\sqrt{d}K^{-1/4})$ measured by gradient $\ell_1$ norm, where $d$ is the problem dimension and $K$ is the number of iteration steps. Step further, we remove the constraint and establish that LION converges to the critical point of the general unconstrained problem at the same rate. This rate not only delivers the currently optimal dependence on the problem dimension $d$ but also tightly matches the theoretical lower bound for nonconvex stochastic optimization algorithms, which is typically measured using the gradient $\ell_2$ norm, with respect to the number of iterations $K$. Through extensive experiments, we not only demonstrate that LION achieves lower loss and higher performance compared to standard SGD, but also empirically confirm that the gradient $\ell_1/\ell_2$ norm ratio aligns with $Θ(\sqrt{d})$, thus proving that our convergence rate matches the theoretical lower bound with respect to $d$ in the empirical sense.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文严格证明了LION优化器的收敛速率为O(√d K^{-1/4})，并实验验证其与理论下界匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: LION优化器在大型神经网络训练中表现优异，但此前缺乏对其收敛速率的全面分析。现有研究虽涉及其收敛性质，但未给出精确的收敛速率，尤其是与问题维度d的依赖关系。理解LION的理论收敛特性对于指导实际应用和进一步优化具有重要意义。此外，非凸随机优化算法的理论下界通常基于梯度ℓ2范数，而LION的收敛速率分析需要填补这一空白，以验证其效率。
light_analysis.method: 本文将LION重新解释为求解特定约束优化问题，并证明其收敛到KKT点的速率为O(√d K^{-1/4})，其中度量采用梯度ℓ1范数。随后，将结果推广至无约束一般问题，得到相同速率。该速率为当前最优的维度依赖，并匹配非凸随机优化关于迭代步数K的理论下界（ℓ2范数度量）。通过实验验证梯度ℓ1/ℓ2范数比与Θ(√d)一致，证明了理论结果。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明LION以速率O(√d K^{-1/4})收敛到KKT点（梯度ℓ1范数），该速率在维度d上最优，且在迭代次数K上匹配下界。实验表明，LION相比标准SGD获得更低损失和更高性能，并经验证梯度ℓ1/ℓ2范数比与Θ(√d)一致，证实了理论下界匹配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次给出了LION优化器的精确收敛速率，揭示了其维度依赖的最优性，并实验验证了理论结果。该研究加深了对LION优化器理论原理的理解，为其在深度学习中的高效应用提供了理论基础。未来可进一步探索其他符号类优化器的收敛性质，以及拓展至更广泛的约束问题。

title: A Generalization Bound for Nearly-Linear Networks
abstract: We consider nonlinear networks as perturbations of linear ones. Based on this approach, we present novel generalization bounds that become non-vacuous for networks that are close to being linear. The main advantage over the previous works which propose non-vacuous generalization bounds is that our bounds are a-priori: performing the actual training is not required for evaluating the bounds. To the best of our knowledge, they are the first non-vacuous generalization bounds for neural nets possessing this property.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种先验的、非平凡的泛化界，适用于近乎线性的神经网络。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经网络泛化界多为后验或平凡界，需要训练后才能评估。该研究旨在提出一种先验的泛化界，即无需实际训练即可评估，这对于理论分析网络性能具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 将非线性网络视为线性网络的扰动，基于此推导出泛化界。关键在于网络接近线性时界非平凡，且仅需网络结构信息而非训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 证明了所提出的泛化界在接近线性的网络上非平凡，且是首个具有先验性质的神经网络非平凡泛化界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了神经网络泛化理论的新视角，特别适用于分析近乎线性的网络。局限性在于仅适用于接近线性的情况，未来可推广至更广泛的非线性网络。

title: SimAC: A Simple Anti-Customization Method for Protecting Face Privacy against Text-to-Image Synthesis of Diffusion Models
abstract: Despite the success of diffusion-based customization methods on visual content creation, increasing concerns have been raised about such techniques from both privacy and political perspectives. To tackle this issue, several anti-customization methods have been proposed in very recent months, predominantly grounded in adversarial attacks. Unfortunately, most of these methods adopt straightforward designs, such as end-to-end optimization with a focus on adversarially maximizing the original training loss, thereby neglecting nuanced internal properties intrinsic to the diffusion model, and even leading to ineffective optimization in some diffusion time steps. In this paper, we strive to bridge this gap by undertaking a comprehensive exploration of these inherent properties to boost the performance of current anti-customization approaches. Two aspects of properties are investigated: 1) We examine the relationship between time step selection and the model's perception in the frequency domain of images and find that lower time steps can give much more contributions to adversarial noises. This inspires us to propose an adaptive greedy search for optimal time steps that seamlessly integrates with existing anti-customization methods. 2) We scrutinize the roles of features at different layers during denoising and devise a sophisticated feature-based optimization framework for anti-customization. Experiments on facial benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly increases identity disruption, thereby protecting user privacy and copyright.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SimAC方法，通过探索扩散模型的时间步选择和特征层特性，提升反定制性能以保护面部隐私。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型的定制化在视觉内容创作中取得成功，但也引发隐私和政治担忧。现有反定制方法多采用简单的对抗攻击，如端到端优化最大化原始训练损失，忽略了扩散模型的内在特性，导致部分时间步优化无效。因此，需要深入探索这些特性以提升反定制效果。
light_analysis.method: SimAC从两方面研究扩散模型特性：1）时间步选择与频率域感知的关系，发现低时间步对对抗噪声贡献更大，提出自适应贪心搜索最优时间步；2）分析去噪过程中不同层特征的角色，设计基于特征的优化框架。该方法可无缝集成到现有反定制方法中，在面部基准上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在面部基准实验上，SimAC显著提高了身份干扰效果，有效破坏生成图像与原始身份的一致性，从而保护用户隐私和版权。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但相比现有方法有提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SimAC通过利用扩散模型的时间步和特征层特性，为反定制提供了更有效的优化策略。学术上揭示了扩散模型的内部机制，应用上可用于防止未经授权的图像生成，保护个人隐私和知识产权。未来可进一步优化时间步搜索和特征整合。

title: XConv: Low-memory stochastic backpropagation for convolutional layers
abstract: Training convolutional neural networks at scale demands substantial memory, largely because intermediate activations must be stored for backpropagation. Existing remedies (checkpointing, invertible architectures, or gradient-approximation methods such as randomized automatic differentiation) either add significant computation, impose architectural constraints, or require non-trivial code changes. We propose XConv, a near-drop-in replacement for standard 2D and 3D convolutional layers that addresses all three: it preserves standard backpropagation, imposes no architectural constraints, and integrates into existing codebases with minimal changes. XConv exploits the algebraic structure of convolutional weight gradients, storing highly compressed projections of the activations rather than the full tensors and approximating the gradients via multi-channel randomized trace estimation. The number of probing vectors sets a memory-accuracy tradeoff and recovers the exact gradient in the limit. We establish convergence guarantees and error bounds for the estimator, showing that its gradient-error variance is comparable to that of stochastic gradient descent. Empirically, XConv matches exact-gradient methods across classification, generative modeling, super-resolution, inpainting, and segmentation, with gaps that narrow as the number of probing vectors grows, while reducing activation memory by a factor of two or more when convolutional activations dominate, and remaining computationally competitive with optimized convolution kernels at larger batch sizes. At half precision the gradient-approximation error falls to the rounding floor, so XConv adds essentially no error beyond that of low-precision arithmetic. The savings matter most where activation memory rather than compute is the binding constraint, such as high-resolution and volumetric training and on-device finetuning.

light_analysis.overview: XConv通过随机迹估计近似卷积梯度，大幅减少激活内存占用，同时保持标准反向传播和最小代码修改。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模训练卷积神经网络时，反向传播需要存储中间激活，导致内存瓶颈。现有方法如检查点、可逆架构或梯度近似方法各有缺陷：增加计算、约束架构或需重大代码改动。XConv旨在同时解决这三个问题，实现低内存、无约束且易于集成。
light_analysis.method: XConv利用卷积权重梯度的代数结构，存储高度压缩的激活投影而非完整张量，通过多通道随机迹估计近似梯度。探测向量数量控制内存-准确度权衡，极限下恢复精确梯度。提供收敛保证和误差界，证明梯度误差方差与SGD相当。
light_analysis.result: 在分类、生成建模、超分辨率、修复和分割任务中，XConv匹配精确梯度方法，差距随探测向量增多而缩小。当卷积激活占主导时，激活内存减少两倍以上。半精度下梯度近似误差降至舍入水平，计算上在较大批量时与优化卷积核竞争。
light_analysis.conclusion: XConv作为标准卷积层的近即插即用替代品，保持标准反向传播，无架构约束，最小代码更改。其内存节省在激活内存为瓶颈的场景（高分辨率、体积训练、设备上微调）尤为显著。未来可在更多架构中应用。
